But they have no idea about the house, there was a tragic incident. Strange things often happens at night when they smelling the scent potato and hearing crying kid. Slowly, their horror novel story comes true. The only way to save their life is to find out, what was exactly happened in that house.

title: June & Kopi
storyline: A young couple takes in a street dog, and the family pitbull becomes an instant accomplice as he adjusts to his loving new home.

title: Belkibolang
storyline: Turithrepe could be the translation of Belkibolang, a contraction of 'Belok kiri boleh langsung' ('Turning right through red permitted'). An exception to the rule. Nine young Indonesian filmmakers take a light-hearted yet profound look at rapidly changing rules in their society.

title: Home Sweet Loan
storyline: Kaluna, a middle-class worker, who still lives with her parents and older siblings who are already married. She tries hard to save and live simply in order to realize her dream of buying and owning her own house. But the reality of her life as a sandwich generation who has to help support her extended family, coupled with her minimal income, makes it difficult to realize this dream. This condition makes Kaluna feel like she is not at home every time she comes home.

title: Rumah Pasung
storyline: Ryan, Sultan and Mayang are the crew for the tv program. One day Ryan has to attend the funeral of his biological father. Ryan's parents unmask Ryan's past. Ryan is adopted son. Ryan's father left a house for him.

title: Hijab
storyline: Four best friends were independent women in the first place. After three of them married, they became wives who would always serve their husbands and decided to wear hijab in different styles. Only one of them chooses to be free, not wearing hijab and not deciding to get married yet because she doesn't want to follow everything her future husband says and feels helpless with her own choices. —Mwd

title: Valentine
storyline: Batavia City, a beautiful city that no longer safely inhabited. Robbery, violence, and a variety of increasingly rampant criminality. In the midst of this chaotic city, Srimaya, a cafe waitress who dreams of becoming an actress never thought that dream would change her life. Her meeting with Bono, a film director and his friend, Wawan, will take her on a dangerous adventure full of thrilling action with lives at stake. Turning her from an ordinary girl into Batavia City heroine of hope, Valentine. —akakage00

title: After School Horror
storyline: Rino, 3rd grade high school student, tells scary stories about the locked old toilet door in the school to his juniors who are in the probation for candidates of OSIS (school organization) leaders.

title: Garuda di Dadaku
storyline: Dreaming of becoming a great soccer player, the twelve-year-old schoolboy, Bayu, is training tirelessly. With this in mind, every day, Bayu tries to hone his skills and perfect his dribbling techniques in the small alleys of his neighbourhood. As a result, believing in Bayu's remarkable talent, Heri, his best friend, strives to convince him to sign up for selection to the junior national soccer team; however, Bayu's grandfather disapproves of the boy's aspiration. In his eyes, a soccer player, unlike a painter or say, a drummer, has no future. Can the determined Bayu make his dream come true without losing his grandfather's love and respect? —Nick Riganas

title: Mata Dewa
storyline: Dewa (Kenny Austin) wants to bring his school, Wijaya High School, becomes the first DBL champion. Dewa and his team are assisted by coach Miko (Nino Fernandez). Bumi (Brandon Salim), the supporter coordinator, is always in the stands to lead his friends. Bening (Agatha Chelsea), high school journalist Wijaya, actively participates in the journey of Wijaya High School basketball team. Dewa's heart who is an arrogant boy, dissolves. Disaster strikes Dewa, while helping Bening from mugging. His left eye was beaten by thugs. As a result, the eye can not function properly. Dewa is broken. A former veteran boxer (Ariyo Wahab) who lives across from his uncle's (Dodit Mulyanto) apartment, helps Dewa from deterioration. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dosen Ghaib: Sudah Malam Atau Sudah Tahu
storyline: Pak Bakti is a killer lecturer who is very feared by all students on campus. Their credibility and good name are at stake when Amelia, Emir, Maya, and Fattah, are declared to have failed their courses. They are required to take remedial classes to improve their grades. Unfortunately, the remedial class turned into such a horrible experience that they wanted to leave the class.

title: Waktu Maghrib
storyline: Adi, Saman, and Ayu live in Jatijajar, a remote Central Java village. Having to help their family in the fields, Adi and Saman are often late for school. As a result, the two of them are often punished by Mrs. Woro, their strict teacher. One day, Adi and Saman's resentment toward Mrs. Woro peaks. They swear at her and even hope that the teacher will die. This oath is pronounced simultaneously as the Maghrib call to prayer. Not long after, Mrs. Woro dies tragically. Since then, Adi and Saman are experiencing a terrifying supernatural terror. There is a mysterious spirit in a teacher's uniform, just like the one Mrs. Woro wore when she died. Over time, terror threatens not only physically but also their souls. After slaughtering the village head's pet chicken, Saman fights his brother to death. After carrying out this bloody action, the teenager falls into a trance and commits suicide just as the Maghrib call to prayer resounds. Ayu suspects that there is a more frightening evil force behind this series of events. If she doesn't do something, Adi will have the same fate.

title: Ratu ilmu hitam
storyline: Hanif (Ario Bayu) took his wife Nadya (Hannah Al Rashid) and their three children to the orphanage where Hanif had been raised. The caretaker of the orphanage, Mr. Bandi (Yayu A.W. Unru), was very old and seriously ill, Hanif came to visit after years of not meeting. Two of Hanif's best friends while living at the orphanage, Anton (Tanta Ginting) and Jefri (Miller Khan), also came with their wives. That night they all arrived at the orphanage located outside the city and far from the settlement. They intend to spend the night there to pay their respects to those who have cared for them since childhood. They thought that night would be a peaceful night. They immediately understood that they were wrong. One by one they experienced a terrible peculiarity. Some are terrorized by the things they fear the most. Meanwhile, the children began to see the appearance of a crippled woman. Victims began to fall, one by one from them. Lost, or died. Someone wants them dead, apparently with black magic that is very deadly. She has a grudge. She was also born because of the sins of the orphans who formed her into the Queen of Black Magic.

title: Macabre
storyline: Two newly weds Adjie and Astrid, along with 3 of their best friends decided to have an interstate road trip as a last attempt to reconcile Adjie with his estranged little sister Ladya. Their trip is however abruptly interrupted when they run into Maya, a strange girl out of nowhere, who wanders aimlessly into their path. "I've been robbed" is all she has to say. The friends unanimously decided to give her a ride to her isolated house by the end of the woods. Maya introduces Adjie and friends to her blue-blooded mother Dara, a woman of ageless enigma and few spoken words. Dara insists that their kindness should be repaid with a dinner feast. This is where the night turns into a crimson-hell for the 6 friends, who find themselves trapped and hunted down by Dara and her cult-like family of her three deadly protégés, born and raised to systematically eliminate unsuspecting passers-by for one nefarious reason. Slaughtered one by one, everybody will bleed, the darkest of nights never looked so red. —Anonymous

title: Hutang Nyawa
storyline: Erwina's struggle for her child and mother leads her to be trapped in a sacrificial ritual at the Gemah Ripah batik factory that holds a dark mystery. A sacrificial ritual that demands lives to pay off old debts, until finally the time for collection is getting closer. An agreement that makes Erwina have to pay with her life. The dark mystery involving Erwina's family is slowly revealed.

title: Kapan Hamil?
storyline: Two husband and wife couples, Alan - Nadya and Athar - Karin have not yet been blessed with children after approximately three years of marriage. In an effort to have children, they both underwent an IVF program at Doctor Sanjaya's clinic. Alan, who felt he was infertile (because he had lived a free life before marriage but none of his girlfriends had been able to get pregnant by him) was very afraid of having himself checked, worried that it would be discovered that he was truly infertile, which would have made him very embarrassed. An accusation that gives rise to new, increasingly serious problems.

title: Wedding Agreement
storyline: Tari (Indah Permatasari) does not expect her marriage to be a nightmare. The first day she arrives at the house of Bian (Refal Hady), her husband, Tari is immediately confronted with a marriage agreement which says that they would divorce within one year. Bian plans to marry Sarah (Aghniny Haque), his lover. Bian's marriage is only for the sake of his parents. Tari does not give up, she tries to get Bian's heart. But no matter how hard she is trying, there is always Sarah between them. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rumah Gurita
storyline: Selena only wants ordinary life. Since born she has the ability that normal people didn't have, her ability which she scared most is her own sixth sense. Selena starts her new life in Bandung, she lives in the house from her deceased parents that called "Octopus House". But Selena knows, she's not alone in that house. —Anonymous

title: 13: The Haunted
storyline: Seven jet-set friends who get tired of wealth attempt to gain popularity by defeating two famous vloggers, The Jackals, who always cover the existence of ghosts. The effort brings the seven companions to an abandoned resort on the somewhat creepy island of Ayunan. They tape their experience in the form of a reality show that unexpectedly turns into a disaster that threatens their safety. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Cinta Dalam Ikhlas
storyline: Athar's meeting with Ara made him better. But they were still too young and had to pursue their dreams. They separated and learned to let go of each other. Athar's meeting with Zein who became his best friend and mentor during college led him to meet Salsabila and Tari, which also became a test between them.

title: Rentang Kisah
storyline: The story of Gita Savitri (Beby Tsabina) from high school in Jakarta to studying in Germany begins with her unhappy relationship with her mother (Cut Mini). While studying at a university in Germany, she meets Paulus (Bio One) who has a different faith. Gita deepens Islam and decides to wear the hijab. Her faith is tested in relation to her lover of different beliefs.

title: Hamka & Siti Raham Vol. 2
storyline: Shortly after the proclamation of Indonesia's independence, the threat of a second aggression from the Allied forces emerged. Hamka decided to travel around Medan to spread the importance of unity between the community (religious figures) and the Indonesian military, in order to prevent them from being divided. However, this effort led to Hamka being shot. Fortunately, Hamka survived and as a result of his service, he moved to Jakarta and founded Al-Azhar. However, Hamka was falsely accused of being involved in a rebellion against Soekarno. He was arrested and tortured to sign a confession letter. Hamka persisted and his experience led to him writing the most influential book in Islamic education, the Tafsir Al Azhar.

title: Lucid Love
storyline: Juno, an ordinary man, always feels insecure because he has a beautiful girlfriend, while Trish, a beautiful woman, is always played by men. They never expected to meet in a place full of wonders, a place that would determine their love lives, in a lucid dream.

title: Sarang Kuntilanak
storyline: A group of film students travel to a mysterious village named the Kalimati to make a documentary. While there, one of the students leaves with a necklace, leaving the students plagued with an evil curse.

title: Ketindihan
storyline: Tania is a tennis athlete who lives to fulfill her father's ambition, which is to win the tennis championship and bring home the Olympic gold medal. However, in the process, there is a disturbance that at first she thought was a fantasy, but a series of events that continue to appear make her increasingly troubled. This makes the dream that Tania has been pursuing increasingly difficult to achieve. The irrational problems that come to her, as well as the supernatural disturbances that continue to terrorize her, coupled with a romantic relationship that is also increasingly on the brink, make Tania frustrated. Until finally, she begins to find out who the supernatural entity that has been terrorizing her is, and Tania feels that she must stop this series of supernatural terrors. Will Tania succeed in getting what her father's ambition is? and will Tania also succeed in stopping the supernatural disturbances that befall her?

title: Namamu Kata Pertamaku
storyline: A boy who gets the name from his mother. Then somehow get the magic of the world.

title: Ashiap Man
storyline: Zulkarnaen (Atta Halilintar) since childhood has been obsessed with heroes who are always told by his father, Mr. Ibrahim (Arswendy Bening Swara). Aisyah (Aurelie Hermansyah) is the only person who always support Zul to be the defender knight of their village. One day Zul meets a mysterious girl named Kiara (Nasya Marcella), which amazed Zul. But after Zul failed to save his father, Zul was discouraged. Can Zul as Ashap Man be a hero? And who will Zul, Aisyah or Kiara choose?

title: Rumput Tetangga
storyline: Kirana, housewive, who was once the most popular and outstanding student in school, experiencing a crisis of self-confidence. She feels she could not be the ideal wife for Ben, her husband, and a good mother for Rega and Windy. Kirana often confides to her high school friend, Diana, which is always accompanied by her personal assistant, Indra. One day Diana makes a high school reunion event. Diana lies to her friends that Kirana is a PR Consultant. At the reunion, Kirana comes to the Madam Sri Menyan's forecast stand. Kirana gets a card that reads "Starting from the Starting Point, After that Not Going Back". Madam Sri said this card would be red if Kirana's dream of changing her destiny, becoming a single and successful woman, is granted. The next day Kirana wakes up in a luxury apartment. Indra appears before her and claims to be her assistant. For a moment Kirana is happy. She enjoys being the boss of a good office, with dozens of staff following her orders. But Kirana feels a longing for Ben and her two children. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Ada Apa dengan Cinta? 2
storyline: 14 years after their budding romance in high-school, Rangga and Cinta reunite in Yogyakarta to have their closure after Rangga had left Cinta with no explanation years prior. —Miles Films Publicist

title: Cek Toko Sebelah
storyline: Cek Toko Sebelah is the tale of a widower father left with a shop to tend. When he has a heart attack, he puts his youngest son Erwin in charge of it. This is an epic movie that tells the story of how the shop gets sold and how Erwin and his brother Yudi devise a plot to win the shop back. —N8Etube

title: XL: Extra Large - Antara Aku, Kau, dan Mak Erot
Melukis Harapan Di Langit India
storyline: In Kerinci, little Devi grows up with her mother and believes that her father is the famous Indian actor, Amitabh Bachan. Often teased for dressing in an Indian style, her two cousins, Emir and Uli, always defend her, even though they secretly fall in love with her. As an adult, Devi vows to only marry a man who can reunite her with her father. But who will she choose Emir, Uli, or another man?

title: Jaga Pocong
storyline: Mila is a nurse, could not refuse when assigned to take care for Sulastri at her house. When she arrives at Sulastri's house, it turns out that Sulastri has died.

title: Waktu Maghrib 2
storyline: 20 years after the incident experienced by Adi and his friends in Jatijajar, Jin Ummu Sibyan terrorizes children in a village again, this time in Giritirto. Yogo, Dewo, and Wulan along with 5 other children are involved in a brawl at a soccer match between the main and reserve players. Losing in the brawl, they rush back to the village at dusk. Throughout their journey they cursed the main football team to be hit by a disaster. Without them realizing, they had raised a disaster like the Jatijajar incident. This time it was crazier and more gripping, in the middle of the forest and the cold night, Ummu Sibyan possessed one of them to hunt down the lives of children without mercy.

title: Sewu Dino
storyline: Sri is a young woman who lives in poverty. She only lives with her seriously ill father who requires expensive medical treatment. Sri's daily life is spent working for Yu Minah. However, the income from her job is not enough to cover the cost of living or her father's medication. A new opportunity finally comes when the Atmodjo family offers Sri a job with a high salary. Sri is asked to work for the Atmodjo family because she was born on a Friday Kliwon. However, the reason is suspicious, as is the type of job which remains a mystery. Nevertheless, Sri accepts the offer due to her difficult situation. She is recruited to work with two other women, Erna and Dini. They are taken to a hidden hut in the middle of the forest, where they are assigned to bathe Della Atmodjo, the granddaughter of Karsa Atmodjo. Della has been unconscious for a considerable amount of time due to the "kutukan sewu dino" or a thousand-day curse. This makes the three realize that the Atmodjo family has trapped them. Sri soon realizes that Erna and Dini were also born on Friday Kliwon. The situation becomes even more complicated as they have to take care of Della, who is confined in a coffin. Sri, Dini, and Ema then face various mystical terrors while staying at the house. They also discover that they are involved in a mystical agreement. Their lives are even threatened if they dare to escape before the agreement ends on the 1,000th day.

title: Kromoleo
storyline: Zia, the young daughter of Djarot, a thug with the nickname 'gali', is married to his daughter Danang who is actually the leader of Petrus (Mysterious Shooter). When Danang no longer needed Djarot and the 'gali' he had been using, Danang decided to kill and massacre them all. Since then, the curious spirits of the dead 'Gali' have appeared, becoming a group of coffin-bearing ghosts who frighten the villagers called 'Kromoleo". Anyone who witnesses the Kromoleo will die because of the Kromoleo's terror. Zia is trapped between two choices, choose Danang, her grandfather or Djarot's father.

title: Kucumbu tubuh indahku
storyline: In Center Java Juno, a pre-teen abandoned by his father, joins a Lengger dance centre where men assume feminine appearances but the political and social upheaval in Indonesia forces him on the road, meeting remarkable people on his journey. —Keith Simanton

title: Cek Toko Sebelah 2
storyline: Continuing the story of two brothers, Erwin and Yohan, in Cek Toko Sebelah. Erwin proposes to Natalie, his girlfriend. Agnes, Natalie's mother, becomes a hindrance. She couldn't trust Erwin one hundred percent, partly due to differences in social class, which according to Agnes, was one of the sources of the failure of her marriage with her former husband. Meanwhile, Afuk starts to pressure Yohan and his wife, Ayu, to have children soon. Previously, Yohan always reasoned that he needed to be more well-established. As his business progressed, Afuk kept Yohan's promise. Even though Yohan and Ayu feel that having children is a serious commitment, they are both mentally unprepared.

title: 1 Kakak 7 Ponakan
storyline: After the sudden death of his older siblings, a struggling young architect finds himself suddenly a "single parent" to his nieces and nephews. When the opportunity for a better life arises, he must choose between his love life, his career, or his nieces and nephews.

title: Siksa Neraka
storyline: Four brothers, Saleh, Fajar, Tyas, and Azizah, have heard stories about heaven and hell since childhood. They were educated strictly by their father, a young ustad who was well respected in the village. One night, on their way to the opposite village without their parents knowing, Saleh and his younger siblings were swept away by a strong river current and disappeared. Saleh then woke up in another realm, the hell that his father always talked about. A search is carried out in the world to find the father's children, whether alive or dead. One by one the secrets are revealed, making fathers and mothers question whether they are providing enough for their children. In hell, Saleh and the others also look for each other, while facing increasing torment for the sins they have been hiding.

title: Kereta berdarah
storyline: Celebrating his recovery from cancer, Purnama invited his younger brother, Kembang, to go on holiday to a newly opened natural resort in a remote place. To get there, they boarded a tourist train that specifically served trips to the resort. A series of terrors and mysteries arise when every time you pass through the tunnel, one by one the carriages disappear. Now the lives and deaths of passengers and train officers are at stake. Purnama, Flower. The train stewardess and the mysterious passenger Ramla diligently try to warn people. Unfortunately, the warning was ignored. Purnama, Kembang, Tekun and Ramla then take action to save the train from the bigger threat that awaits in the final tunnel.

title: Kuntilanak 3
storyline: Dinda, who is considered strange by the village children because of her strength, accidentally injures Panji and Ambar. She regrets it and asks Aunt Donna to register her at the Mata Hati School so that she can learn to control her power. At that school, Dinda immediately finds her peers: Dennis and Uchi. At home, Dinda's brothers investigate the school and find strange things: many students have disappeared. Miko and Kresna decide to take her home. Baskara, the school principal, thinks that Dinda's presence brings its aura. This is reported to Eyang Sukma, the school's founder, who lives in a hidden place where the students cannot see her. She feels haunted by the figure of kuntilanak. Dinda is the most special psychic child ever at the school. She is a descendant of Mangkujiwo and kuntilanak butcher. The power of the kuntilanaks that she had killed settled in her. Dinda finds another obstacle in her life in the kuntilanak universe.

title: Warkop DKI Reborn 4
storyline: Sentenced to be hanged in the city centre, Warkop DKI (Aliando Syarief, Adipati Dolken, Randy Nidji) manage to escape to Marrakech. This is where they meet a man, who controls the children spy network, and they soon discover that Inka (Salshabilla Adriani) is in a luxury riad. Warkop DKI infiltrate the riad, but get caught again by big boss, Aminta Bacem (Rajkumar Bakhtiani). —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Nona Manis Sayange
storyline: Sikka is a teenage girl born to a rich businessman's family. Since childhood, Sikka has been friends with his friend, Akram. Unlike Sikka, Akram is the son of a sailor's family who lives on the coast of Labuan Bajo Island. Sikka and Akram grow together and strengthen each other. The two of them went through various life journeys until feelings of love grew. The story line continues when ambition and manipulation come from Sikka's father who wants to separate the two. As the son of a sailor, Akram was guided by traditional rules for paying belies (a traditional dowry requirement for the Manggarai Tribe in Labuan Bajo).

title: Asih 2
storyline: Six years after Amelia's disappearance, a child is seen running in the forest. She ran out of the forest barefoot and was hit by a car and was rushed to the hospital. Doctor Sylvia who handled the child felt sorry to see the condition of the 6-years-old girl, and asked permission to her husband, Razan, to take Ana home. Sylvia never realized that it was both Asih and Ana that she brought home. Various terror ensued, until Sylvia realized that Asih felt she was taking Ana who was considered as Asih's own daughter. Ana loved Asih but Sylvia's perseverance and attention melted Ana's heart. Asih felt sad and jealous and when tension intensified, Mbok (who was like Asih's mother) finally steps in. With Mbok's help, Asih finally left. Ana remains living with Razan and Sylvia. Time passed and now Sylvia is carrying her baby with Razan. Without their realization, in silence Asih is creeping back into their lives. —MD Pictures

title: Komedi Moderen Gokil
storyline: The new detective has to investigate the affair of the husband from his boarding house's madam.

title: Imperfect: Karir, Cinta & Timbangan
storyline: For Rara (Jessica Mila), being born fat and dark-skinned is a curse, especially as her sister Lulu (Yasmin Napper) looks exactly like their mother Debby (Karina Suwandi), who was a model in the 1990s. Luckily, photographer Dika (Reza Rahadian) loves Rara just as she is. One day Rara gets an opportunity to rise in the office where she works, but her boss Kelvin (Dion Wiyoko) requires her to change her appearance. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Why Do You Love Me
storyline: Baskara, a paraplegic with paralyzed nerves, Danton with a brain tumor that paralyzes his lower body, and Miko with retinitis pigmentosa, which has made him completely blind. But they are not going to let anything stand in their way, hellbent to finally losing their virginity.

title: Dasim
storyline: A young couple, Salma and Arman, who initially lived a happy household life. However, their happiness began to be disturbed when Salma experienced a series of unusual mystical events. As the days went by, the disturbances intensified and affected Salma's emotional condition, especially after she became pregnant. The tension in their household increased when Arman had to accept a big project that often required him to work overtime, leaving Salma alone at home. It turned out that the house was haunted by Jin Dasim, a supernatural creature known as a household disturber. The disturbances carried out by Jin Dasim were not just playing around, but also brought slander and noise that destroyed the harmony of Salma and Arman's household. Salma felt trapped in fear and confusion, trying to find out the identity and motives of Jin Dasim who threatened her life. When Salma and Arman decided to move to Arman's mother's house, the hope of getting protection actually brought new conflicts, including differences of opinion with her in-laws and suspicions of a third party in their relationship. The situation is further complicated when Salma seeks help from a mysterious neighbor who seems to have knowledge of Jin Dasim. With threats from outside and within the household, Salma and Arman's marriage is faced with a very difficult and unexpected test.

title: Imam Tanpa Makmum
storyline: Imam is a man who is looking for a makmum for his life, his name is imam but it is difficult to find a makmum, falls in love with a woman named Naira, is good at playing the violin, is the owner of a shelter for street children and has rosy cheeks. The Imam called her humaira, like the Prophet Muhammad's affectionate nickname for his wife Aisyah. Mamak disagreed, apparently Humaira was a woman of the night.

title: Ritual
storyline: Peter, his wife Jenny, their daughter Lisa, and her lover Michael are preparing for a long weekend. They plan to camp in a remote and deserted area outside Jakarta. In the journey, an accident happens. Because they are in the middle of a deserted forest and rain would come down they try to find a place to shelter and find a house where a child who is inhabiting the house had died and then revived through a ritual. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Wedding Proposal
storyline: Bisma, a single photographer who is constantly being asked to marry by her parents, finally meets a perfectionist wedding organizer named Sissy. However, the struggle to get it is not always easy.

title: Sihir Pelakor
storyline: Vita's life when she was still in junior high school. Initially, Vita's family lived harmoniously with her father and mother. However, everything changed when her father said goodbye to go out of town and did not return for a long time. Since then, Vita's family began to experience various events beyond reason. Until finally, they realized that they had become victims of magic in their family.

title: Aku Jati, Aku Asperger
storyline: Jati, a young man with Asperger's who is crazy about everything train-themed, is threatened with not being able to carry out his daily routine due to the breakup of his brother Daru's relationship with Kiara who has always been involved in Jati's daily routine. His schedule is increasingly threatened with being destroyed because Daru is not interested in finding a new girlfriend. Jati's difficulties increase when he has to get out of his own routine in strategist to convince Jenar, an independent woman he met at the training center as a suitable partner for Daru.

title: Posesif
storyline: A platform diving athlete in her final year of high school when she meets a transfer student. The initial romance blossoms, but something about him is unfolding one by one.

title: Kuntilanak
storyline: A group of kids agree to explore an abandoned house in order to win a reality show contest, which requires them to prove that the stories of the evil Kuntilanak are real. They soon discover that the ghost is very much real when it appears from an old mirror and starts haunting them.

title: The Doll
storyline: Anya and Daniel just moved to their new house in Bandung. Daniel brings home a doll from his workplace. Anya, who is a dollmaker, welcomes the doll happily to their house. They later learned that the doll belonged to a little girl named Uci, who died when she and her family were brutally murdered in a robbery. Strange things begin to happen, like the doll mysteriously move places, door bell ringing by itself, and a little girl's voice late at night. What is really happening? —Anonymous

title: Serigala Langit
storyline: This movie about Gadhing "Panther" Baskara, an air force pilot at Skadron 10 - Serigala Langit. He was the best student in school, so it makes him proud and over estimate about himself. He has conflict with his father too, he never talk to his beloved dad since his Dad left family when Gadhing was a kid. At that time, Skadron 10 is lead by First Marsekal Erik "Red Bee". He instruct the team to guard an agent from Kabubed named Helen. Tami "Rajawali", gets a mission to guard Helen with C-130 Hercules. But when Tami on mission, she get attack from the enemy. Gadhing and his senior, Herman, try to save Tami and all passengers. —Winda

title: Pasukan Garuda: I Leave My Heart in Lebanon
storyline: Garuda Contingent members, Captain Satria, Lieutenant Arga, and Sergeant Gulamo, assigned to Lebanon as peacekeepers. Satria, among others, must arbitrate a dispute between Israeli soldiers and the Lebanese army, and manage to free the Spanish army from Hezbollah troops. During the mission in Lebanon, the Garuda Contingent also provide social assistance to local residents. Captain Satria meets with Rania , a primary school teacher, during a visit to schools in order to provide health check-up and information. While in Indonesia, Diah, Satria's girlfriend, getting giddy, since appears of Andri, the young British graduates who is successful in the property business. Andri loves Diah and he is supported by her mother. Diah's father, on the other side, tell Diah to wait Satria. Furthermore, in Lebanon Satria does not possibly marry Rania and remained there, except he quits the TNI. —Rifqidolohov

title: Tarung Sarung
storyline: Deni Ruso (Panji Zoni) was born from one of the richest families in Indonesia. For Deni money is everything, he even lost faith in God. Everything changed when he went to Makassar to take care of the family business, and met Tenri (Maizura) a Makassar girl activist who hates RUSO CORP as an environmental destroyer capitalist. Deni also hid his identity to get Tenri's love. Problems arose when Sanrego (Cemal Faruk) the martial arts champion, TARUNG SARUNG, did not accept. Deni was beaten by Sanrego. Finally, Deni studied with Mr. Khalid (Yayan Ruhian) a mosque guard. From Pak Khalid, Deni did not only learn the SARONG FIGHT but also learned to know his God again. Is Deni able to defeat Sanrego and get Tenri's love?

title: Battle of Surabaya
storyline: BATTLE OF SURABAYA recounts to you the adventure of Musa, a spontaneous, brave, thirteen-year-old shoe shiner, who makes a living under the pressure of necessity or poverty in the era of World War II. Meeting with Musa, Yumna has turned her life into a more colorful journey. Captain Yoshimura hopes that the war could be ended soon. He misses his wife and his daughter, Kioko, in Tokyo. Mr. Yoshimura helps Indonesia reach her freedom and then he can go back to his country. He has known Musa since he was a child. He is like Musa's father. Although life is not easy, Musa leads a life patiently. To Musa, life is a choice. As a matter of fact, being a shoe shiner is not bad; still, such a job less leads to what he is struggling for, that is to say: patriotic spirit and peace, both based on divine values. Physically he is only a teenager; however, mentally he is a hero. He makes up his mind of choosing a job as a courier. Here, he is not a courier who merely delivers common letters, but the secret letters concerning the strategy of the war adopted from the true, pierce war that broke out in Indonesia, exactly in Surabaya on November 10th, 1945. It is worth for you watching this film to see how Musa and Yumna, with such letters, mediates the youths of Surabaya in the war; and how the youths, who are armed only with bamboo spears, are able to win the war with the allied forces, while such forces, which are developed under the aegis of the Dutch government, are armed with modern weapons.

title: 12 Cerita Glen Anggara
storyline: Shena gives Glen a list of 12 things she wants him to do before death hits her. Glen agrees because he feels sorry and wants to do good. It turns out that Glen begins to feel true love for Shena. This makes Shena afraid because their love would make it difficult for Glen later if she were gone. Shena decides to end the 12 requests before they are finished. However, Glen insists on completing the 12 requests.

title: Rumah dan Musim Hujan
storyline: Meticulous family story set in an old Javan house. Outside, it's raining incessantly. The story's three parts, each with a relative as protagonist, reveal contradictions between faith, generations and views of the future. Atmospheric film about old and new Indonesia. In three chapters, the relationships are sketched within one Indonesian family. The first scenes are set in the father's house, just after the dinner which ends the fast. The family is sitting at the table, minus mother: son Ragil with another new girlfriend, son Raga who still lives at home and daughter Ade. After the departure of the others, Raga and his father are left behind. Their visibly loving relationship, portrayed calmly and implicitly, is overshadowed by a secret. Chapter two is set on the way to, and in, the house of the divorced mother, where the daughter Ade lives and experiences events that transcend normal reasoning. The last part looks at Ragil, girlfriend Sukma and an ex-girlfriend who suddenly turns up. Although each chapter is told in the same calm tempo, they are different in character and tone and we see three films in one: drama, horror and comedy - always with an unexpected turn. —

title: London Virginia
storyline: This is the story of a girl named London (Cheverly Amalia) who has everything in terms of career. London became a model and a top artist who came from a well-off family. However, despite having it all, London has always faced a number of problems. Candra (Gading Marten) likes London and tries to approach her by disguising himself as a gay. Sandara becomes London's assistant.

title: Nini Thowok
storyline: After the death of his grandmother, Nadine (Natasha Wilona) gets the legacy of Mekar Jiwo inn in Solo. Nadine and her sister, Naya (Nicole Rossi), have to move to Solo to manage the inn because Eyang Marni (Jajang C Noer) advised that the inn not to be closed or sold. Nadine's parents had died several years ago in a car accident. The long-deserted Inn has one empty room that should not be opened. Nobody even knows where the key is stored. At the inn Nadine has some strange happenings. Nadine is convinced that it must have something to do with the forbidden room. Nadine is desperate to open the forbidden room despite being banned by Mbok Girah (Ingrid Widjanarko) and Pak Rahmat (Slamet Ambari), trusted employees of Eyang Marni. Inside the room she finds a painting of Chinese woman and nini thowok doll. Later she knows that the first owner of the inn was Mrs Oey (Gesata Stella), the woman in the painting. The mystical terror continues. Nadine finds out what happened there dozens of years ago. Finally Nadine finds the answer: there was an unfinished business during Mrs Oey's life.

title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Cengeng
storyline: Boy, a famous movie star, has a dark past, as he was involved in a car accident that killed two people. Later, he becomes an Ambassador for an Anti-Drug campaign and gives a lecture at the rehabilitation center. There he sees a junkie who resembles the person who died in the accident years ago. She is Yani, daughter of the deceased couple, whom he saved in the accident. Out of guilt, Boy tries to help Yani to recover from her addiction. Then Yani escapes from the center and begins using drugs again with Felix, her dealer. Boy finds her and brings her home. This makes Boy's girlfriend, Luna, angry. But when Boy's relationship with Yani grows closer, Boy's former manager, Ahmad, tells Yani that it was Boy who killed her parents. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Sang Pencerah
storyline: The journey of an Indonesian national hero named K.H. Ahmad Dahlan striving for Muhammadiyah, an Islamic organization in Indonesia, and how he was rejected by the society as he was trying to fix up their perspective.

title: Aku Tahu Kapan Kamu Mati
storyline: After suspended animation, Siena (Natasha Wilona) can see a sign that people will die. Siena is scared and wants to get out of this terrible situation. Flo (Ria Ricis), Neni (Fitria Rasyidi), and Vina (Ryma Gembala), Siena's friends, do not believe in the abilities that Siena has suddenly. Siena continues to convince herself with her eyesight. One by one the people around her die after Siena saw the sign of the appearance of a spirit who picks up the person. Finally the sign appears near Brama (Al Ghazali), the upperclassman she loves. Siena tries to stop Brama's death. Siena also sees signs that the people closest to her are going to die. Siena tries to stop those deaths. Then, the sign of death is threatening her. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pretty Boys
storyline: Rahmat and Anugerah, two best friends since childhood, aspire to be famous. Anugerah is always challenged by his father, Jono, because he considers that entertainment world is close to bad things. Anugerah runs away from home and tries his fortune to Jakarta with Rahmat. Fate says otherwise. Their career is just stuck as a waiter and restaurant cooks. Luckily there is Asty who has always been at Anugerah's side. One day, Anugerah and Rahmat, who are paid spectators at "Kembang Gula" (Candy) talk show, meet Roni, the audience coordinator, and Bayu. This meeting paves the way for the dreams of Rahmat and Anugerah? —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Paku Tanah Jawa
storyline: Ningrum has had to face negative views from local residents since childhood because her mother, Handini, was always accused of having sex with many men. The death of one of Handini's close friends further plunges her family into local gossip. Ningrum's life becomes increasingly uneasy when the man she secretly loves, named Jalu, is trapped as Handini's new sacrifice. Ningrum has to face various supernatural terrors. Finally, Ningrum got a clue and asked for help from a Kyai who gave him a powerful spear to destroy black magic on earth.

title: Sabar Ini Ujian
storyline: It has been four years when Sabar chose not to attend his wedding day with Astrid due to his childhood trauma. Now, Sabar has to swallow his bitter taste when he gets Astrid's wedding invitation to his high school friend, Dimas . The next day, Sabar comes to the wedding. Although it is difficult, Sabar makes it through the day smoothly. An oddity occurrs. The next day, Sabar wakes up on the same day, which is Astrid's wedding day, his ex. Initially, Sabar can not believe it and thinks that his friends are doing a prank on him. The next day, Sabar again wakes up the same day. He is stressed and confused. He concludes that he is Astrid's true match. All kinds of things he does to get Astrid back.

title: 12:06 Rumah Kucing
storyline: Many strange and frightening events experienced by Randy's (Adi Nugroho) family with Rosa (Masayu Anastasia), since her split warehouse floor at her home just past midnight at 12:06 mysteriously. The presence of a few cats originally found only and maintained by Rasti, Randy's daughter, unwittingly reopened the tragic story of the past and resulted in reviving the soul of Sally, who passed away in an unnatural way. Randy initially did not believe in the horror stories scary experienced by his wife and children. Rasti slowly entered Sally's ghost. By the time Rasti starts acting strangely, quiet and often revealing a violent face with keen red-eye eyes, his sister Radit decides to find out their home story to the previous inhabitants. Adelia the previous owner of the house told, that his family often experience disturbances from the creatures are very frightening smooth and it is causing her husband suffered a disability. At Adelia's suggestion, Radit summoned Kyai Rahman to help Rasti and his family. Kyai Rahman has the sixth sense senses, can wander the peristiswa2 what really happened in the house. Who is the soul of Sally who pervades Rasti ... what is the relationship of all events with Rosa, the mother of Rasti .... and who the ghost of the grandfather and the little boy who often warns the family about his presence Saly's soul ... Apparently, sometimes the past still holds his grudge and haunts to demand revenge as well as accountable for the mistakes that have been made by humans & hellip; .Witness the next story 12:06 HOUSE CAT.

title: Cinta itu buta
storyline: Diah works in Busan, South Korea, as a tour guide. For three years she has been engaged to a local male named Jun-ho. The status never improves because Jun-ho always postpones their marriage. Their relationship crashes. Feeling disappointed and hurt, Diah is fainting. After regaining consciousness, Diah must not only face the reality of living without love and hope, but also without sight. During the depression, Nik comes and always give optimism and enthusiasm. Love seeds between them slowly appear. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Like & Share
storyline: Lisa and Sarah not only sit together in high school and do projects together but also have their problems. Lisa's mother, Ninda, demands a lot because she fears failure in her new household. Lisa became uncomfortable at home. Sarah is a rich kid who lost her parents due to an accident. She lives with her older brother. As a result, they seek answers in their way. Like most teenagers, the duo goes through puberty which sparks curiosity about sexuality. Lisa, who is curious about sex, watches adult movies. She becomes addicted to the point that she becomes obsessed with Fita, one of the women in the viral video. Lisa's curiosity about sexuality is not always understood. Meanwhile, Sarah meets Devan, who has a decade of the age difference. She thinks she has found someone to rely on. The boyfriend takes advantage of her innocence. Sarah is raped and becomes a victim of revenge porn. She does not receive social protection or even the law as a victim. She is alone.

title: Khanzab
storyline: With her own eyes Rahayu witnesses her father being beheaded. He became one of the victims of the witchcraft shaman massacre in May 1998 by ninjas. Together with his stepmother and sister, Rahayu left Banyuwangi and returned to his childhood home in Jetis. However, Rahayu's family is ostracized because they are considered a family of witch doctors. Trying to stay positive, Rahayu tries to pray diligently to lighten his heart's burden. The more isolated, Rahayu increasingly difficult to concentrate during prayer. Distractions often come to disturb the solemnity of her prayers. Rahayu often forgets the rak'ah and prayer readings, along with a disturbance by an astral figure that appears: the khanzab.

title: 13 Bom di Jakarta
storyline: Jakarta, the metropolitan city with all its hustle and bustle, suddenly became dark. A group of terrorists launched their attack with the threat of 13 bombs scattered throughout Jakarta. Investigations by the Intelligence Agency and secret agents into the terror led to Oscar and William who were thought to be involved. The secret agent team's mission becomes complicated when they suspect there is an intruder on the team. On the other hand, the leader of the terrorist group, Arok continues to spread terror by exploding bombs every 8 hours. The only way to stop this terror attack is to hand over billions of rupiah worth of rewards in the form of bitcoin to Arok or the safety of all Jakarta residents will be threatened.

title: Buffalo Boys
storyline: Two brothers named Jamar and Suwo came back to the land of Java to avenge their father, who was a Sultan, after years of exile in America.

title: Queen Bee
storyline: A girl who has a normal life like most teenagers until his father was elected as one of the presidential candidates.

title: Bangsatnya Cinta Pertama
storyline: All this time, Fraya had been busy managing her small cafe until Tya, her friend, invited her to go to the Netherlands to join their other friend, Dara. There, Fraya meets Elmar, Dara's college friend known as a mysterious playboy who manages to make her fall in love for the first time. However, she must keep it a secret because Tya openly likes Elmar. Plus, there's a secret about Elmar that Fraya doesn't know yet. Will Fraya's first love story have a happy ending?

title: Lovely Man
storyline: Cahaya (Raihaanun) travels to Jakarta, Indonesia, to search for her father and discovers that he is a prostitute for men.

title: Roy Kiyoshi: The Untold Story
storyline: Roy, who has the ability to interact with supernatural beings, is very frustrated when his sister Rani is kidnapped by the demon. Roy feels he failed to protect his younger sister. Three years later, Sheila, one of the NGO workers who care about lost children, is terrorized by the devil while dealing with cases of children mysteriously disappearing. The demon always appears in the middle of the night and wants to kill Sheila. Sheila is very confident that the appearance of this demon has something to do with the case she is handling. Sheila knows that one of the members of the NGO died horribly while handling this case. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Orang Kaya Baru
storyline: The life of an ordinary family consisting of father (Lukman Sardi), mother (Cut Mini) and three children Duta (Derby Romero), Tika (Raline Shah), and Dodi (Fatih Unru), suddenly changes when the father dies and leaves a legacy of wealth.

title: 24 Jam Bersama Gaspar
storyline: Gaspar, a somewhat punk amateur detective, investigates a government-involved mass slaughter case. During the process, he stumbles upon clues about his friend who disappeared without a trace during childhood and traces a human trafficking villain. However, due to a malfunctioning artificial heart, Gaspar has only twenty-four hours left to live. With little time remaining, aided by friends Agnes and Kick, he seeks to exact revenge.

title: Milea: Suara dari Dilan
storyline: Dilan (Iqbaal Ramadhan), the combat commander of a motorcycle gang in Bandung in the early 90s, formed a relationship with a new female student from Jakarta named Milea (Vanesha Prescilla). Dilan was always happy when he was with Milea, but his motorcycle gang friends feel that Dilan was getting away from his group because of Milea. A terrible event happened: one of their members, Akew (Gusti Rayhan), died of being beaten by a group of people. The incident made Milea worried about the safety of Dilan. Milea made the decision to part with Dilan as a warning for Dilan to stay away from the motorcycle gang. The Akew incident dragged Dilan to the authorities along with his friends. The parting which had been only a bluff for Milea became a parting that lasted until they graduated from college and grew up. They both still carry the same feeling when they meet again at a reunion, but each of them already has a partner. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pocong Jalan Blora
storyline: Sandra, Mei, Josh and Joe finally satisfy their curiosity about pocong sightings in Blora Road but they are now haunted. Then when Sandra visits Mei's house, she is greeted by Hilda, whom she doesn't know. Sandra now thinks that Mei has gone missing. Fredi, Mei's boyfriend, claims that he has not seen Mei since she returned from Blora. Sandra enlists Hilda's help to find Mei, as Hilda can see the spirit of dead people. Hilda is also haunted by a spirit of a woman resembling Mei. At her friend Seno's advice, Hilda tells Sandra that she has met Mei in spirit form. Then they all return to Blora road. —Letterboxd

title: Pemandi Jenazah
storyline: After losing her mother in a series of mysterious deaths, Lela, a mortician, strives to uncover the truth by following clues while washing each victim, but during the process, she is haunted by spirits and burdened by the weight of not revealing their past secrets.

title: GJLS: Ibuku Ibu-Ibu
storyline: Rigen, Hifdzi, and Rispo are three siblings with no direction in life, who continue to depend on their father, Tyo. a boarding house owner whose late wife recently left him. This situation makes the family lose their footing. Tyo is down, while his children are busy with personal problems: Hifdzi the dangdut MC needs money to marry his pregnant girlfriend, Rigen the rain shaman has to replace the EO boss's lost car, and Rispo is being hunted by loan sharks because of his online gambling addiction. They hope that Tyo will sell the family boarding house to solve their problems. It turns out that the father instead announces that he will marry Feni, a boarding house resident and young SPG, and even wants to pass on the boarding house business to her in the future. The three siblings suspect Feni's motivations and try to thwart Tyo's wedding plans. While they are busy suspecting each other, Sumi, Tyo's old friend, appears and easily deceives the family. When they realize it, Sumi has run away with the boarding house certificate. Finally, Hifdzi, Rigen, and Rispo must use their below average intelligence to save the family's wealth and atone for their sins to their father.

title: Angkara Murka
storyline: Behind the silent mine, Ambar searches for her husband who disappeared without a trace. But the land not only holds secrets - it also holds anger. Under the cruel rule of Raden Broto, one by one the mine workers begin to mysteriously disappear. Together with Lukman, Ambar tries to fight invisible terror, human greed, and unhealed past wounds. When silence turns to terror, who can survive?

title: Nenek Gayung
storyline: This mysterious grandmother figure stirred up the masses. This grandmother was called Nenek Gayung, because she always brought a dipper and pandan mat to bathe her victims. Many had met their deaths after meeting and talking with this Nenek Gayung.

title: Zanna: Whisper of Volcano Isle
storyline: A girl named Zanna who is separated from her family. One day, she accidentally enters a world full of magic. Together with two beautiful fairies, Dinda and Novi, Zanna dares to explore various new and challenging things, even fighting against attacks from evil enemy troops.

title: Merindu Cahaya de Amstel
storyline: The story of a Dutch girl, Marien Veenhoven, who later converted to Islam and changed her name to Khadija Veenhoven (Amanda Rawles). Khadija's figure intrigues Nico (Bryan Domani), a photographer and journalist, because it reminds him of his mother.

title: Sukma
storyline: Arini's move to a small town with her children and husband, Pram, to start a new life turns into a disaster after they discover an ancient mirror in a secret storeroom at their home. Mysterious voices and apparitions begin to disturb their peace. Shadows of people in the mirror frighten the family. The reappearance of Arini's ex-husband, Hendra, and the mysterious figure of Mrs. Sri add to Arini's anxiety and stifle her happiness. Slowly, it is discovered that Mrs. Sri, the always polite caretaker of the house, is the key to all these strange occurrences. Gradually, it is revealed that the old woman wants Arini's youthful body back by exchanging her body with the mirror. Can Arini save her family from the threat hidden behind the mirror?

title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
storyline: Dodo Rozak wants to be a good father to his daughter, Kartika. Despite his limited intelligence, he acts and behaves like children. It is Kartika who takes care of her father most of the time. Both live happily. Kartika is proud of her father, who sells balloons every day. However, their happiness does not last long. Dodo is arrested on charges of raping and killing a little girl. Dodo is imprisoned in cell No.7, which violent inmates inhabit. After various events, Dodo gets help to smuggle Kartika into his cell. Dodo and Kartika's closeness spreads happiness to inmates and guards in prison. They begin to doubt whether a loving man like Dodo could kill a little girl.

title: Sajen
storyline: The three offerings in Pelita Bangsa high school is a mystery. Rumors say the offerings is a school effort to soothe the souls of the students who commit suicide for being bullied. Alanda (Amanda Manopo) attempts to break the bullying chain at school. Unlike the other students who are resigned when Bianca (Steffi Zamora), Davi (Jeff Smith) and their gang act arbitrarily, Alanda dare to fight. Alanda's mission makes her two best friend, Riza (Angga Yunanda) and Keyra (Chantiq Schagerl), anxious. One night, Alanda is framed. Due to depression, Alanda decides to commit suicide. Alanda's anger makes her spirit uneasy and encourages her to take revenge on the people who have destroyed her. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Homecoming
storyline: Homecoming (Mudik) In the few days before Eid, a young married couple, Firman (Ibnu JAMIL) and Aida (Putri AYUDYA) like many urban Indonesians are travelling across the country to spend the festival with family. Aida and Firman decide to drive together from the city to their rural hometown. The atmosphere in the car is tense due to Aida's suspicion of her husband's infidelity. In the middle of their journey, they are involved in a tragic car accident which brings them into contact with Santi (Asmara ABIGAIL). This unexpected event is the beginning of a series of uncomfortable encounters with Santi, which triggers Aida's journey of self-discovery and confronts her with questions about her life and marriage. Through the touching circumstances of the main characters' confrontation during the annual pre-Eid journey home, Homecoming's screenplay subtly tackles moral questions regarding gender and economic inequality in modern Indonesia. —woutervandersluis

title: Badarawuhi di Desa Penari
storyline: A group of students who want to do KKN and meet elders. After living in the village for days, one by one the students experienced unexpected events. Mila, one of the students, experienced terror from Badarawuhi. It turns out that Mila was chosen by the snake demon to be a dancer in his world. Mila's spirit is trapped in another world, while her body is helpless. This was an unforgettable experience in the village.

title: Ghibah
storyline: Firly (Anggika Bolsterli) and his boarding house friends, Dina (Zsa Zsa Utari) and Ulfa (Arafah Rianti), have a habit of talking about people. Ghibah is like daily food for them. Even Okta (Adila Fitri), her schoolmate, has been targeted by various stories about her weirdness. In addition, Yola (Josephine Firmstone), a dream student on campus, is always an easy target for them to talk about. Their boarding house keepers, Umi Asri (Asri Welas) and Mang Opie (Oppie Kumis) have reminded them not to gossip or even slander other people. Until Firly realized something was wrong with him, when he became fond of eating raw meat even though he was a vegetarian. Even their body smells like carcasses, because people chant like eating the carcass of their own brother. Firly's relationship with his college friends was stretched. Only Arga (Verrell Bramasta) never shied away from him. They try to find a way out together. —farhanazhari05

title: Hayya: The Power of Love 2
storyline: Haunted by guilty feelings and sins in his past, Rahmat, a journalist who is learning to understand the meaning of love and faith, feels the need to do things differently in the process of Hijrah (move on). Rahmat decides to become a humanitarian volunteer in the Palestinian border refugee camp. In that area, he meets Hayya (5th), an innocent orphaned girl who is a victim of the conflict in Palestine. Hayya's presence brings many changes to Rahmat's life. When Rahmat has to return to Indonesia because he has to marry Yasna, Hayya is badly hurt. Relations between Rahmat, Hayya, and Yasna turn out to be complex, funny and stressful. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rudy Habibie: Habibie & Ainun 2
storyline: This movie was the prequel of the movie Habibie and Ainun in 2012, The story was started as Rudy Habibie entered the RWTH Aachen University and meet up with his other friends in Germany, and his struggle life as a student, and his love life before he eventually dates Ainun. The story also highlighted the meaning of friendship, and family treasure, and how hard, and tough life is. The movie also highlighted the meaning of patriotism, and understanding of archipelago life, and culture. —anon

title: Bumi Manusia
storyline: This is a story of Minke and Annelies who weave love in the early 20th century colonial turbulance. Minke is a native youth, purebred Javanese. While Annelies is a mixed-Dutch girl, the daughter of a nyai (mistress), called Ontosoroh. Minke's father, who has just been appointed as regent, is always against Minke's closeness to the Nyai's family, because a Nyai's position at the time is seen to be as low as pet animals. But this one nyai, Nyai Ontosoroh, Annelies' mother, is different. Minke admires all of her thoughts and struggles against the arrogance of colonial hegemony. To Minke, Nyai Ontosoroh is the reflection of modernization, which at the time is just beginning to rise. When the arrogance of colonial law tries to wrench Annelies from Minke's side, Nyai Ontosoroh is also the one who urges Minke to keep going and shout the word, "Fight!" —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Bayang-Bayang Anak Jahanam
storyline: A dark mystery story of a remote village haunted by the legend of the evil child, a vengeful spirit believed to be the cause of the tragic deaths of a number of residents. The shadow of this evil child haunts the couple Gina and Gani. The couple's lives change drastically after they find out that their child, Agni, gets his energy from unknown things. Agni scares everyone in his neighborhood. They try to find out what might have influenced Agni to cause this chaos. Over time, it is revealed that Agni is no ordinary child. He is the Evil Child.

title: Dear David
storyline: The life of Laras, a smart high school student, changes completely when her provocative fantasy blog about David whom she likes is leaked to everyone at school. David knew that the author was Laras and promised not to leak it. The reward: Laras is asked to bring David closer to Dilla, his best friend, who is accused by the school of being the author of this horrendous fantasy. Dilla still denied the accusation, even though she was bullied by her friends. The triangular relationship becomes complicated.

title: Qorin
storyline: Zahra, a third-year student at the Rodiatul Jannah boarding school, has always been a model student with many achievements. Zahra is willing to obey any orders from Ustad Jaelani, her teacher, to get grades. Including the task of looking after a new student who is notoriously naughty named Yolanda and the task inviting the students to perform the Qorin ritual. After undergoing both tasks, Zahra began to experience terror and mystical things. Zahra and the other students who perform the ritual of summoning Qorin to begin to be haunted by the figure of a genie that resembles each of them. The arrival of the Qorin jinn made them commit unimaginable sins, and their lives began to be taken over by Qorin.

title: Budi Pekerti
storyline: Prani, a guidance counselor whose video of her altercation with a market visitor went viral on social media. Due to her actions that were deemed inconsistent with a teacher's demeanor, she and her family faced bullying, were scrutinized for other mistakes, and even faced the threat of job loss.

title: Pintu Terlarang
storyline: The life of a successful sculptor is turned upside down when he begins receiving mysterious messages from someone who asks for his help.

title: Menebus Impian
storyline: Nur, a student, suffers hardships with her mother, Sekar, who only works as a laundry clerk. Both have different views of achieving a better life. The mother wants to focus on financing Nur's college education, while Nur is thinking of working to help her family. Then Nur meets Dian, another student, who is already well established. Dian urges Nur to dream on but after several ups and downs, Nur begins to doubt her dreams, which seem impossible to achieve. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Hit & Run
storyline: Tegar Saputra, a celebrity policeman who is followed by cameras everywhere because he has his own reality show. Tegar is assigned to arrest Coki, a drug kingpin who has just escaped from prison. Unfortunately this time Tegar must be paired with Lio, a conman. Tegar, who is used to acting alone, now has to try to complete his mission with Lio, which makes it difficult instead. Tegar's and Lio's search for Coki are accompanied by Meisa, a singer, and Jefri. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rompis
storyline: After graduating from high school, Roman (Arbani Yasiz) continues his studies in the Netherlands with Sam (Umay Shahab) and is forced to distance himself from Wulan (Adinda Azani). The romance between Roman and Wulan had gone well initially but it's disturbed by the presence of Meira (Beby Tsabina), a student who becomes Roman's new best friend in the Netherlands.

title: Baracas: Barisan Anti Cinta Asmara
storyline: Bandung is in tantrum because many youths left their family to join Baracas. Baracas is a group of boys who were let down by the woman and built by Agus. They gather their strength and unite their feelings of hatred of women around the world and on all the elements concerned with women. Agus is the ex-boyfriend of Sarah, who suddenly breaks their relationship. Resistance movements against Baracas accuse the police the government of Bandung deliberately allowe Baracas to grow. That's why they demo. Baracas is even physically attacked. Resistance is also done by the ex-girlfriend of Baracas members. They do a variety of ways to change the Baracas' way of thinking.

title: 6,9 Detik
storyline: A story of the growth of a world champion that begins in a small village in Purwodadi, Central Java. Little Ayu who has big restlessness, is looking for her own way as a teenager to become a national rock climbing athlete. The explosion of emotions during growth succeed in making her a champion of the 2018 Asian Games. The story of the growth of a woman is never simple. She is formed by the obstacles in the search for identity and the wishes of her parents. She is questioning whether being a champion means making peace with all the wounds and likes that have passed. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Cinta/Mati
storyline: A girl names Acid who was brokenhearted, decided to end her life. In her attempt to commit suicide, Acid met Jaya. Firstly, Acid forced Jaya to help her end her life. Jaya submitted unwillingly but they almost failed. The failure after failure opened up Jaya's life in disguise. It turned out, Jaya had the same wish as Acid, which was to commit suicide with different reasons. Finally, they decided to cooperate in completing the wish in ending their lives. The time shared in completing the suicide made love grew between them. Their wishes in ending their lives turned into a wish to surrender into a life full of love. —anonymous

title: Badrun & Loundri
storyline: Badrun is entrusted with a bag of laundry clothes while taking shelter at a laundry shop. Badrun checks into the laundry bag and finds a variety of clothes. To warm himself up, he puts on a Hajj clothes with a turban on his head and leaves the laundry shop. The locals who are not familiar with Badrun begin to think he is a wise hajj who travels to various places. Badrun's wise answers made the villagers start consulting to him. However, the story changes when Badrun wears a police uniform from the bag. Badrun tells the mosque guard that he is ordered by the police general to impersonate a policeman. Badrun starts to carry out his task as a fake policeman. He starts taking bribes and even starts protecting the local thugs. What will happen to Badrun's journey and the clothes in the laundry bag?

title: Milly & Mamet: Ini Bukan Cinta & Rangga
storyline: Continuing the story of 'Ada Apa Dengan Cinta 2': Milly and Mamet are busy taking care of their babies. Mamet, who has a passion for cooking and once worked as a chef, now works at Milly's father's factory--a choice that is rather forced, because now he becomes the family breadwinner after Milly quit at the bank to focus on raising their child. One day, Mamet meets Alexandra, a close friend from college, who now enthusiastically announces that she has found an investor to finance the restaurant that they had once imagined together. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Aisyah: Biarkan Kami Bersaudara
storyline: A Muslim woman who become teacher in a Catholic village in Atambua, East Nusa Tenggara.

title: Seperti Hujan yang Jatuh ke Bumi
storyline: Kevin and Nara have been friends since childhood, although they love each other, they promise to always be Best Friends Forever. Kevin, who turns out to be more than a friend, never dared to confess his feelings to Nara. In fact, Kevin often accompanies Nara through difficult times when her romance fails. When Nara falls in love with the mysterious rock climbing boy Juned, Kevin feels that there is no hope for him to be with Nara forever. Humans can only plan, but God decides, can Kevin and Nara be put together? Or both of them choose their own path? —farhanazhari05

title: Taman Lawang
storyline: Young journalist Angie (Angie Virgin) is challenged to investigate a mysterious incident in Taman Lawang: the death of a transgender named Ningrum. After Ningrum's death, Chyntia (Olga Syahputra), Ningrum's best friend experienced strange events and became a victim of terror. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Santet Segoro Pitu
storyline: Since his father found a mysterious package and heard the voices of a group of creepy tribes, Ardi and his family have experienced strange events. Sucipto, Marni, and Arif fell ill one by one. Ardi and his younger sister, Syifa, believe that this is a black magic attack and that they will both suffer the same fate. A high-level black magic from outside Java called Seven Seas Black Magic.

title: Satu untuk Selamanya
storyline: Salma, who had left her two best friends, Alex and Ziva, nine years ago, suddenly returned to her hometown. Salma's return got a strong reaction from Alex, who once felt very hurt because Salma had just left their motorcycle gang without having time to say goodbye. This situation makes Salma have to try hard to win the hearts of Alex and Ziva to carry out their dream that had never been realized before: driving on a sacred path called Route 18.

title: What's Up with Secretary Kim?
storyline: Kim is the top secretary at the company where she works. For years, she has served and understood all the needs of her boss, Rendra, a young, handsome, yet perfectionist and fierce boss. Kim knows all of Rendra's habits, preferences, and even his little quirks by heart. However, despite her loyalty and professionalism, Kim is starting to feel tired. She realizes that her life revolves too much around her work and her boss. Until one day, Kim decides to resign and seek her own happiness. This decision leaves Rendra panicked. For the first time, he realizes how significant Kim's role is in his life, not just as a secretary, but also as someone he has secretly appreciated and cared for. From there, their relationship evolves into a journey filled with laughter, prestige, and unexpected confessions.

title: Mountain Song
storyline: Since his father died, Gimba did not want to get away from his mother, while his mother feels that her health is getting worsen. One day, Gimba was left in a hut by his mother. Gimba also realized that his mother was gone too long.

title: Moga Bunda Disayang Allah
storyline: Karang, who loves children, changes after a sea accident happened, he couldn't save the children who were with him. He suffers from trauma and is plagued by guilt. He shuts away from children and breaks off her engagement with Kinarsih because he thinks he doesn't deserve her. He alienates himself to an island far away from the capital city and becomes a drinker. His life changes when Mother HK, a wealthy and respected figure in the region, comes and askes him to become Melati's teacher. Her daughter Melati is blind, deaf and dumb. The girl can't communicate with anyone around her. Since he drinks a lot, Karang grows violent when teaching her. He often yells and treats her ruthlessly, making everyone scared and confused. However gradually both of them become more and more dependent on each other.

title: Mariposa
storyline: Iqbal Guanna is like a Mariposa butterfly to Natasha Kay Loovy or Acha. Each time someone approaches, he runs away. Acha is determined to win Iqbal, a man known to be handsome, smart, yet cold. Acha's best friend Amanda tries to prevent Acha from approaching Iqbal. She is sure that even if Iqbal's heart is as hard as stone, Acha is the water that drips on it all the time, until the stone breaks and accepts her. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Jakarta Hati
storyline: An omnibus film that tells six stories of life in the Metropolitan City of Jakarta, which starts from the question, is there a heart in Jakarta?

title: Kafir: Bersekutu dengan Setan
storyline: A family living in harmony suddenly experiences an unexpected tragedy. One night during dinner, the father reacts to a sharp pain. Before he dies, he spits out a piece of glass. After that, the mother begins to behave strangely and often saw terrifying visions. Jarwo (Sujiwo Tejo), a shaman in their village, suddenly dies mysteriously, and his house burns down. ls this related to the supernatural terror affecting the family? The children Andi (RanggaAzof) and Dina (NadyaArina) won't let their mother suffer the same fate as their father. They need to find out why this is happening and stop it before it's too late. —Wetv

title: Rumah Untuk Alie
storyline: Alie, the youngest of five siblings and the only daughter, received punishment for the death of their mother. Alie's body is countless because of the bullying by her father and siblings. In the corner of Alie's heart there is a wound because of the insults and curses from her father and siblings. But Alie cannot hate them. Alie only asks for a little pity from her family to be accepted.

title: Love Story
storyline: Together since childhood, Ranti and Galih grow up to love each other. However, the local authority prohibits Galina and Ranti to marry. They believe that marriage between those living in Galih and Ranti's village, which are separated by a river, will end in disaster. The couple is separated when Galih's family moves to town. For years, Ranti waits for Galih's return by teaching, accompanied by Pengkor. Finally, Galih returns and wants to build a school for Ranti. But the villagers ostracize them after Galih proposes to Ranti. Galih begins the school's construction while Ranti's father holds her captive for fear of the curse. Galih falls ill but continues to struggle. Finally, the school is built and their love manages to change the narrow view prohibiting the two hearts to be united. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Mata Batin 2
storyline: After her sister died, Alia decides to start a new life by living in an orphanage owned by Mrs Laksmi and Mr Fadli as well as doing social work there, but Alia feels something wrong with the orphanage. Nadia, one of the orphanage who apparently also has an inner eyes like Alia, can hears mysterious voices asking for help from all over the walls of the house. Alia and Nadia open a mysterious locked room. Since then disasters begin. It turns out that Alia and Nadia had made a big mistake and releases Darmah, a vengeful spirit that was deliberately locked in the room. Together with Mrs Windu, the paranormal and mentor of her inner eyes, Alia must confront Darmah and save the orphanage. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Sejuta Sayang Untuknya
storyline: For Aktor Sagala (Deddy Mizwar) life is a struggle to make Gina (Syifa Hadju) happy, her only daughter. For Gina the main thing is to stop her papa's suffering. As a single parent, Aktor is the breadwinner, takes care of various household needs and is determined that Gina must grow up well and be highly educated. He never tries to cover up the realities of life he faces as an extra in film production. Gina grows up like most high school teenagers. Among the warmth of their love comes Wisnu (Umay Shahab), a school friend of Gina who comes with love too. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Takut: Faces of Fear
storyline: Anthology of 6 horror stories from Indonesia. From ghost, zombie, insect, murderer, and cannibal.

title: Ayat-Ayat Cinta
storyline: This is a love story. But not just a simple love story. It's about how to deal with the ups and downs of life's problems in the Islamic way. Fahri bin Abdillah is an Indonesian student trying to reach his master's degree in Al-Azhar. Fatigue with the dust of Egypt. Dwell with a variety of targets and simplicity of life. Persisting with being a translator of religious books. All Fahri's targets were enthusiastically excited except one: getting married. Fahri is an obedient man who is so straight. He does not know the courtship before marriage. He is less articulate when confronted with a creature named woman. There are very few women close to him all along. His grandmother, his mother and his sister. Moving to Egypt made that change. It was Maria Girgis. One flat neighbor who is a Coptic Christian but admire the Qur'an, and admire Fahri. Admiration turned into love. Unfortunately, Mary's love is only poured in the diary only. Then there is Nurul. The son of a famous kyai who also dredge knowledge in Al-Azhar. Actually Fahri put heart on this sweet girl. Unfortunately his sense of inferiority that only a son of farmers made him never show any taste to Nurul. While Nurul was hesitant and always guessing. After that there is Noura, also a neighbor who always tortured his own father. Fahri was full of empathy with Noura and wanted to help her. Unfortunately only empathy. No more. But Noura is expecting more. And later this becomes a big problem when Noura accuses Fahri of raping her. Last Aisha appeared. The beautiful eyes that bewitch Fahri. Since an incident on the metro, when Fahri defended Islam from allegedly stodgy and rigid accusations, Aisha fell in love with Fahri. And Fahri also can not lie to his heart.

title: Buyut
storyline: Kanaya and Bima live in an auctioned house. Kanaya finds many strange events in the house. An incident that leads to something terrible in the past. Once upon a time, Bima and Kanaya travel to the village of Banyu Bening, headed by Enggar Waluyo. The arrival of Kanaya and Bima opens the story of the village. A village cursed with the presence of a river demon named Buyut.

title: Pembantaian Dukun Santet
storyline: A community conflict occurs, those accused of being witch doctors are killed without having the chance to defend themselves. Chaos is everywhere. In a boarding school, terror occurs that is no less dangerous. Teachers and students are killed one by one. One of the students at the boarding school, Satrio, tries to save himself from the storm of conflict while ensuring the safety of his parents who are threatened. Satrio also tries to uncover the mastermind behind the terror that attacked the boarding school.

title: Sampai Nanti, Hanna!
storyline: Gani is a simple and quiet Bandung student. Gani is a man who believes that true love only comes once in a lifetime. Secretly, Gani has deep feelings of love for Hanna, a brave woman who always sticks to her principles. Hanna, who grew up in an environment full of restrictions, has a strong desire to escape from the pressure and determine her own direction in life. For years, Gani kept his love for Hanna without ever daring to express it, all his feelings were only poured out on the pages of his diary until finally fate separated them. Hanna is married to Arya. Although from the outside their relationship looks perfect, the reality is filled with manipulation and violence. In the end, Hanna decided to get out of her toxic life and fight to find her own happiness. After so long keeping her feelings of love and loyalty only to memories with Hanna, now a big question arises. Will Gani continue to wait for her or choose to let go and continue his life? On the other hand, Hanna, who is now trying to free herself from a relationship full of manipulation, needs support to find her true happiness.

title: Rahasia Rasa
storyline: Ressa, a successful chef known for his ability to recognize flavors with just one taste, finds his life falling apart when he loses his sense of taste. In desperation, he meets Tika, his childhood friend, who helps him rediscover his taste and passion through the legendary recipe legacy of Mustikarasa. However, the secret behind the book brings Ressa to a big dilemma: rise again as a chef or risk his relationship with Tika.

title: Ben & Jody
storyline: Since deciding to leave Filosofi Kopi, Ben (Chicco Jerikho) has lived in his hometown and has been actively defending farmer groups whose land has been taken over by the Company.
