At the same time, Jody (Rio Dewanto) is preparing a new concept of Philosophy of Coffee which will be launched soon. Ahead of the launch event, Ben who was scheduled to attend suddenly disappears. Jody sets out to find Ben. In order to save Ben, they face life and death adventures against gangs of illegal loggers led by Tubir (Yayan Ruhian), until their encounter with a traditional village group changes the map of their resistance.

title: Iseng
storyline: Inspired by a true story about a young rookie detective paired with an experienced officer, a flirtatious secretary, a prostitute, three thugs, a driver, a restaurant owner, a cook, and a business man, all related in one deadly connection rooted in greed, lust, and deceit.

title: Agak Laen
storyline: In pursuit of their dream of changing their fate, four friends who guard a haunted house at a night market look for new ways to scare visitors to escape bankruptcy. Unfortunately, Bene, Jegel, Boris and Oki's efforts resulted in the death of one of their visitors. Panicking, they buried the victim in a haunted house. Unexpectedly, the victim's spirit wanders around, making the haunted house scary and busy with visitors. When the police started investigating, they were forced to carry out various ridiculous conspiracies to cover up the real incident. What will happen to them next?

title: Malam Pencabut Nyawa
storyline: A terrible incident occurred in Yogyakarta. The victims were found hanging upside down. No one knows who did all the murders. My name is Respati. I have a strange ability, namely being able to enter someone's dream just by touching the dreamer's skin. I was used to this ability before I met Wulan, whose dreams I couldn't penetrate. It was from Wulan that I knew that I was a Dream Explorer. I also knew from Wulan that all the murder cases were closely related to my abilities.

title: Inang
storyline: Wulan, a supermarket employee, is abandoned by her boyfriend after finding out about her early pregnancy. Wulan takes responsibility for herself and starts to find solutions online. One day, Wulan stumbles upon a "support pregnancy" on her social media page. From that group, Wulan finally finds a solution by a family to adopt her baby: Agus and Eva from the rich Santoso family. The family gives their all-out effort to keep the unborn child safe. They offer Wulan a place to stay in their big house and take care of all pregnancy medical bills. But eerie circumstances slowly unfold as Wulan begins to witness the family's strange behavior. Wulan also starts to be haunted by babies in her dreams. The family's sinister plan starts to unfold when their oldest son, Bergas, suddenly comes home. Wulan gradually becomes close with the son and learns that the family is part of an occult group that sacrifices babies every ten years to save their own cursed son. Bergas is a cursed son born in Javanese sacred Wednesday named Rabu Wekasan. The myth says every person born on that day has to face endless unfortunate luck throughout their lives. Wulan and her unborn child are perfect victims of the sacrifice.

title: Surga di Bawah Langit
storyline: Ayu dances every day to earn a living and earn more school fees. Agus lives by picking pockets. And, Laras works as an umbrella taxi and peddler. Living in a marginal social environment unites them. The three struggle daily to live without ever dreaming of anything more. As adults, they meet again at the place they promised.

title: Indigo
storyline: Zora has a younger sister, Ninda, who suffers schizophrenia. But then a psychic named Sekar stated that Ninda is an indigo, the one who has a sixth sense that could see other worlds. Currently, Ninda's life is threatened by an invisible figure who kept bothering her. To save her, Zora's help is needed. When she was little, Zora turned out to be an indigo whose abilities had been closed. Now this ability must be unlocked again in order to save her younger sister. And when her abilities reopen, she has to adapt for being an indigo, facing ghosts from another world, while also uncovering the mystery of a frightening past.

title: Dilan 1991
storyline: December 22, 1990, Dilan and Milea officially date. Amid their happiness Dilan threatened to be fired from school due to a fight with Anhar. Dilan also increasingly involves in fights and gets enemies. Milea is worried about Dilan's future. Milea feels that she has the right to ban Dilan from being involved in a motorcycle gang. One day, Dilan is attacked by unknown people. When he knows who is doing it, Dilan is planning revenge. Milea finally asks Dilan to stop from the motorcycle gang or their relationship ends. Dilan, a combat commander and motorcycle gang leader, will always be in trouble. In the midst of all these problems, Yugo, the son of a distant cousin of Milea's father who has just returned from Belgium meets Milea. They often spend time together. Yugo likes Milea. And Milea - only loves Dilan. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Nana
storyline: Raden Nana Suhani, a Sundanese woman in the 1960s, lost a father and son to the war in West Java. She remarried to start a new life with a man who was rich but always looked down on her. Her husband was also an unfaithful person. Nana suffers in silence. Until one day, she became friends with one of her husband's mistresses who made everything change. Together, these two women seek hope for independence.

title: #BerhentiDiKamu
storyline: Doctor Gia searches for the meaning in life through extraordinary events in the ER where he works.

title: Di Bawah Umur
storyline: Aryo is told as a guy who likes to make other people's children upset. In addition, the character Aryo is told to always appear as he is even though he also likes to make a riot, is loyal to friends, and is devoted to his mother. This brat is a male character who falls in love with a new student at his school. Lana is said to be a new student who has transferred from Bandung. Her charm and beauty make Aryo, who is known for being bad and peculiar, falls in love with him. But for one reason or another, Lana didn't dare to reciprocate those feelings. —farhanazhari05

title: Calon Bini
storyline: Because of the ambition and greed to become the village chief, Mr Lik Agung forces Ningsih to marry Sapto. Ningsih herself is more concerned about how to continue her studies, but her parents could not afford it. When it is decided that Ningsih would get married, she goes to Jakarta. Lik Agung is confused. Sapto cries every day. Ningsih finds moral support and finally fall in love with a character in a virtual world called "Footsteps". Ningsih works for Prawira and Andini. In this family, in-law and daughter-in-law relations do not get along. The only thing that fits is Satria Bagus who is sent to school in London. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: 2045 Apa Ada Cinta
storyline: Indonesia, 2045. When getting an assignment from the campus, Meara meets a young entrepreneur named Marsha, the cofounder of Go Green which she is promoting. That meeting makes Meara fall in love with Marshal. Meara asks for help from Renata, her best friend, who is very attached to technology. Marshal wants Renata, who has made Magic Life Ice Cream, which he founded, grow after several years of being stagnant.

title: Keluarga Cemara
storyline: After the debt collector confiscates his house and all his treasures thanks to his brother-in-law's debt, Abah is determined to withstand it by staying temporarily in a house in a remote village in West Java. It is his childhood home, inherited from his father. But then he loses his court case, dooming his family to live in poverty forever. Abah must now get used to his new economic status along with his family: wife Emak, Euis (stepping into adolescence and experiencing her first period and her first crush), and Cemara/Ara (a high-spirited child). They also face problems within their own family that slowly shake their principle: "The most valuable treasure is family." —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Bucin
storyline: Andovi, Tommy, Jovi, and Chandra try to get out of unhealthy relationships because they are "bucin" (slaves of love). They decide to take the "antibucin" class so they can have a more mature relationship, and not be enslaved by love. It turns out that the method of teaching, taught by Vania, is very extreme. Even threatening their love and friendship relationships. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Algojo: Perang Santet
storyline: Desta was born in the happy family. However, happiness in the family did not last long when a shipment of witchcraft led to the death of both parents. Desta grow up to be a loner and full of mystery. His desire for revenge made him seek the mastermind behind the death of his parents. Along Desta search in finding the killer of his parents, Desta were met by a group of teenagers who also has a special power like himself. Witchcraft war began to dominate Desta life when knowing the murder of his parents. In the end, Desta should choose to satisfy the lust of revenge or choose another way which is more civilized.

title: Buku Harianku
storyline: Kila is a cheerful, smart, critical, but also a stubborn kid. She likes to pour out his mind by writing in a diary. One time, by his mother Kila is left temporarily during her holidays to her grandfather's house, Prapto, in Goalpara Village, Sukabumi. In this beautiful village, Kila meets her old friend, Rintik, who is protected by her mother because of her disability. Kila regards her as a best friend. Kila's cheerfulness is increasing because she gets new friends who are the same age. They spent their time playing, singing happily, and even taking part in line-up exercises with Grandfather Prapto, a retired soldier. Armed with her curiosity about various problems and concerns for her surroundings, Kila helps the villagers to get out of the trap of a property entrepreneur. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Uang Panai' 2 Maha(r)l
storyline: Iccang, being their first customer, tries to collect panai money for his girlfriend Icha with the help of Tumming and Abu. However, Iccang realized that the challenges he faced were more than just Uang Panai. With various obstacles stretching out, how do Tumming and Abu find a solution for this client?

title: Bangku Kosong: Ujian Terakhir
storyline: On that day, the examination at school was supposed to proceed peacefully. However, something horrifying happened. It began with mass possession, and one by one, students died. A terrifying dark force took hostages and terrorized that high-achieving school.

title: Koala Kumal
storyline: Dika (Raditya Dika) is a guy who his married just got canceled because his girlfriend, Andrea (Acha Septriasa) is cheating on him with a guy named James (Nino Fernandez). Dika is broken-hearted, he's even in trouble writing the final chapter of his book. One day, a girl named Trisna (Sheryl Sheinafia) met with Dika, a girl who made a unique viewpoint on the world on Dika. Dika went along Trisna, they become best friends. Trisna who had intended to help Dika finish the last chapter of his book finds the reasons why Dika is in trouble writing the final chapter: because he was still heartbroken to Andrea. Trisna was trying to make Dika stop heartbreak. Trisna told Dika to revenge Andrea. Will Dika follow Trisna advice? Why Trisna really intend for Dika to separate from the heartbreak that happened to him? —Muhammad Adita Athalla

title: A Normal Woman
storyline: Milla seems to live a luxurious and peaceful life as the wife of Jonathan, a successful businessman. For no apparent reason, Milla experiences physical problems-first a wound on her heel and then on her face-and psychological ones that increasingly disrupt her daily life. The pain comes not only from her body, but also from the pressure she faces: Liliana, her authoritarian mother-in-law, who is greatly adored by her son. When her childhood maid, Irah, accidentally mentions Grace's name, Milla begins to question who she really is. The dark secrets of her past are slowly revealed.

title: Mata Batin
storyline: Alia decides to leave Bangkok and return to Jakarta after her parents die. She and Abel, her teenage sister, move into their childhood home away from the city. But Abel, who is often strange and frightened, dislikes the house. She says there is something else besides them. Alia and Davin, Alia's boyfriend who accompanied Alia, ignores everything Abel says. But Abel's attitude gets worse. Feeling she must help Abel, Alia takes Abel to a psychiatrist. But Abel refuses and she says that she can see those who are already dead because her third eye has been open since childhood. Abel invites Alia to see Mrs. Windu, a psychic who helps Abel. Wanting to prove the things that make no sense in this, Alia asks Mrs. Windu to open her third eye. And slowly, Alia begins to experience unusual events. She sees things no one else can, and the presence of ghosts ask her help. But those who appear at Alia's house hurt her. Their energy is so negative that it can harm Alia and Abel. Without any other place for them to stay, they are forced to remain and ask for Mrs. Windu's help. Can Mrs. Windu assist? —Farhan Azhari Anwar

title: Timur
storyline: A soldier named Timur leads a rescue team on a dangerous mission to free researchers kidnapped by an armed group in the interior. This dangerous mission then takes him back to the land of his childhood. Meanwhile, in this process of returning home, Timur is accompanied by his best friend, Sila. As they plunge into the dangerous jungle, this humanitarian mission turns into a difficult personal struggle for Timur and Sila. They must not only fight to save the hostages, but also face tough challenges in the land where Timur grew up.

title: Jeritan Malam
storyline: Reza (Herjunot Ali) decides to take a job from a company in Jakarta. The assignment received made Reza occupy a company mess in East Java. He then befriended Indra (Winky Wiryawan), Minto (Indra Brasco), and Dikin (Fuad Idris), old employees who occupied the mess. Reza began to notice of various kinds of scary events in the mess. Reza invited his friends to explore the mess's past history. Various kinds of scary events occur in the process of extracting the history of the mess's past. Reza tried to prove that things that smelled supernatural did not exist. But unfortunately Reza did a ritual that should not have been done. That was his biggest mistake. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Uti Deng Keke
storyline: After moving schools to Gorontalo from her native Manado to follow her father's duties, Maria/Keke is a friend of Umar/Uti, Ruslan, and Danial. Since childhood, the four friends from different backgrounds have remained intertwined. They are determined to achieve the ideals they often pledge on the highest hill.

title: Autobiography
storyline: Rakib, an eighteen-year-old housekeeper, lives in a country house when Purna, the owner, suddenly returns. Purna, a retired general, declared himself a candidate in local mayoral elections, running a campaign focused on modernization and development. The village experienced frequent power outages, and Purna proposed building a new power plant - which would require many residents to give up their land. Because his father is in prison and his brother is working abroad, there is a father figure in Rakib's life which Purna fills. Purna makes Rakib his go-to man, a role the boy seems intent on taking-until a small act of vandalism infuriates Purna. He orders Rakib to track down the culprit, who is brutally punished for his crimes. Realizing that he is being absorbed into a culture of violence, Rakib tries to escape.

title: Tak Kemal Maka Tak Sayang
storyline:
Samarinda, 2006

Kemal (17 thn), seorang pelajar SMU dari Samarinda yang selalu mendambakan wanita tercantik untuk menjadi kekasihnya.Ia memiliki pola pikir yang absurd, sulit berfokus dan sulit ditebak.Karakternya ini menyebabkan dirinya lama menjomblo dan berulang kali gagal dalam percintaannya.

Ada yang gagal ia tembak karena terlalu cepat ia tembak, ada yang ditikung oleh pria lain bahkan ada yang ia tembak saat wanita itu sedang dalam prosesi pernikahan.

Namun wanita tercantik yang ia idam-idamkan adalah Raisya(17 thn), gadis tercantik di sekolahnya tapi juga berani dan ekspresif. Masalahnya adalah, Raisya adalah kekasih dari Nanda (18thn), cowo ganteng, keren, jagoan di sekolahnya. Usaha Kemal dalam menarik hati kekasihnya Raisya, berbuntut pada duel antara dirinya dengan Nanda.

Menjelang duel, Kemal berlatih dengan ayahnya yang merupakan juara beladiri capoeira tingkat nasional.Latihan demi latihan ia jalani demi mengalahkan Nanda dan mendapatkan wanita pujaannya. Raisya.

Dibantu Khalil (17thn), teman dekat sekaligus teman sekelasnya, Kemal berusaha mengakali tantangan Nanda dengan cara uniknya.

Perkelahian mereka malahan menimbulkan kelucuan demi kelucuan, hingga Nanda berhasil ia kalahkan. Kemal yang merasa bangga atas kemenangannya, segera memberanikan diri untuk menembak Raisya.Tapi Raisya justru menolaknya karena ia tidak menyukai keagresifan Kemal.

Setelah lulus SMU, Kemal pindah ke Jakarta dan kuliah di Lembaga Perguruan Kesenian Jakarta (LPKJ), mengambil jurusan teater yang sesuai dengan jiwanya. Di kampus itu, ia berteman dekat dengan Jovial (20 thn) dan Hifdzi(20 thn) yang sama-sama memiliki sifat absurd, spontan dan unik sepertidirinya.

Disitupun, ia jatuh cinta pada teman kuliahnya yang terkenal cantik, Putri (20 thn). Mereka bertemu saat acara audisi drama Romeo dan Juliet di kampus. Dari sana, Kemal berusaha mendekati Putri dibantu kedua temannya. Namun sayang, Putri pada akhirnya menolak dirinya juga.

Putus asa dengan percintaannya, Kemal sempat mengurung diri, hingga dia diajak teman-temannya kesebuah acara Stand Up Comedy. Setelah melihat acara tersebut, Kemal melihat sebuah jalan untuk bisa mendapatkan wanita yang diidam-idamkannya, yaitu dengan menjadi orang terkenal lewat panggung stand up comedy.

Akhirnya Kemal mengikuti audisi acara kejuaraan Stand Up Comedy. Tujuannya adalah menjadi terkenal sehingga bisa menjadi pujaan para wanita demi mendapatkan wanita idamannya. Apakah Kemal berhasil menjadi juara Stand Up Comedy? Apakah Kemal berhasil mewujudkan impiannya mendapat kan wanita yang diidamkannya? atau justru Kemal kembali gagal dalam hal percintaannya?

title: Siksa Kubur
storyline: After both of her parents became victims of suicide bombings, Sita became distrustful of religion. Since then, Sita's goal in life has been only one: to find the most sinful person and when that person dies, Sita wants to go into his grave to prove that the torment of the grave does not exist and religion is not real. However, of course there are dire consequences for those who do not believe.

title: Terbang: Menembus Langit
storyline: Born in a simple family in Tarakan does not make Onggy (Dion Wiyoko) to stop dreaming. He wants to see the world, get out of Borneo. After getting the blessing from his family, Onggy goes to continue his studies to Surabaya. Armed with the values of life given by his father (Chew Kin Wah), Onggy undergoes his business struggles: ranging from selling apple, roasted corn, and crackers. Then Candra (Laura Basuki) comes into his life by accident in a beauty salon. Onggy does not wait long to marry Candra. Together with Candra, he undergoes a process of achieving his goals. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Sultan Agung: Tahta, Perjuangan, Cinta
storyline: The story about Sultan Agung of Mataram, how he ascended the throne and had to face VOC in great wars, the events that caused his people's misery.

title: Arini
storyline: On the train going home in Germany, Arini (Aura Kasih), 38, student, meets Nick (Morgan Oey), 15 years younger, who travels backpacking around Europe. Nick falls in love at first sight and immediately tries to get into Arini's life, while Arini who no longer believe in love could not accept Nick. A few months later Arini returns to Indonesia and is appointed as CEO at the company where she worked. Nick who is urged by his love for Arini following her back to Yogyakarta and leaves his study in London. It is in this city that they resume their relationship, facing the dark past of Arini with her ex-husband, Helmi (Haydar Salishz) and her best friend Ira (Olga Lydia). Arini always regrets her meeting with Ira on the train to Yogyakarta a few years ago, while Nick keeps trying to make Arini remember their meeting on the train in Germany. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Danur 3: Sunyaruri
storyline: After years of being friendly with her little ghosts, Risa (Prilly Latuconsina) begins to feel that she must have a normal life like other women. Especially now Risa has a boyfriend named Dimas (Rizky Nazar), a radio announcer. Risa does not tell Dimas about her ability to see ghosts, and that she has five little friends who were not human. Risa's friendship with Peter cs shaken, after she feels Peter cs begin teasing Dimas. Risa finally chose to close her inner eyes so she could live a normal life. But a strange thing happens. He could no longer see Peter cs, but again smells danur (liquid that comes out of decayed corpses). It is an evil ghost who enters the house through heavy rain: the ghost of an evil woman who not only threatens her life, but also Peter cs. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Singsot
storyline: Ipung, a 13-year-old boy, is warned by his grandparents not to whistle at dusk or during the night as it's believed to be a bad omen. Instead of being compliant, he brushes it off as an outdated superstition and keeps whistling as he pleases. That night, he finds himself trapped in a nightmare, as if walking through a tunnel of terror that ends with a vision of his own death. When he wakes up, the horrors cling to him, growing stronger with every passing moment. Now, he's thrust into a deadly race against time to stop his nightmare from becoming his new reality.

title: Tabayyun
storyline: Zalina and Arlo, two individuals from different worlds who meet in the midst of a storm of prejudice. The conflict begins to heat up when their love must face challenges from Zalina's mysterious past and pressure from Arlo's family, especially his mother, Samira, who is strongly against the relationship.

title: Keluarga Cemara 2
storyline: Ara feels lonely as the Cemara Family grows. Father got a new job, so he was quite busy with his work and couldn't pick her up every day. Mother is doing a side job so that her family has additional income and savings. And Euis enters puberty. She wants privacy and doesn't want to be in the same room with Ara anymore. The journey of Father, Mother, Euis, Ara, and Agil to find the meaning of family.

title: Perempuan Bergaun Merah
storyline: Since her best friend disappeared, Dinda's life turns into a nightmare when an evil spirit in the form of a woman in a red dress haunts her. Dinda's life is threatened, not only by the evil spirit but also by people who try to keep the events of the night of her best friend's disappearance a secret.

title: DJS the Movie: Biarkan Aku Menari
storyline: In the life of Wulan, she only wants to be a dancer. When his father, Lukman and his brother, Satria were still alive they were the ones who always supported Wulan's ideals. However, now they have died and Wulan only lives with her mother, Linda. One time, Wulan had a fight with Linda and decided to go with Joko, her boyfriend, to a hill. There, he was again annoyed because Joko asked him to go home and apologize to Linda. Wulan refuses and chooses to run away from Joko until he enters another dimension tunnel.

title: Sundul Gan: The Story of Kaskus
storyline: At Seattle, when realizing Andrew Darwis is a man who created Kaskus, Ken Dean, a man with great passion quickly persuade Andrew to come back to Indonesia so they can expand this site together because he believes that there's a great potential in it. But Andrew hesitates, until Ken bait him to Indonesia. From a loan they slowly building an office for them. But Ken who's busy finding investor and arranging his own marriage, makes him almost never be at the office. After awhile Andrew feels Ken did nothing for the company. Anti-pornography legislation presents another challenge when Andrew has to make one of the most difficult challenges in his life. Between ever tenuous friendship and an attack to their site rendering them unusable, can Ken and Andrew overcome this problem to save their business and friendship?

title: Para Betina Pengikut Iblis
storyline: Sumi takes care of her father, Karto, who is sick. To survive, she opens a curry shop made of human flesh, from freshly buried corpses to fresh corpses. Sari returns to become a witch doctor and terrorizes the village because her younger sister, Ningrum, is murdered, and her body is missing from the grave. They are instigated and become Satan's slaves.

title: Tinggal Meninggal
storyline: When his father dies, Gema, an awkward young man, is shocked by the attention he receives from his office colleagues. When the warmth fades and the cold returns, he begins to wonder: who else has to die? Thus begins a series of lies that lead to increasing chaos.

title: Love in Perth
storyline: Lola (Gita Gutawa) got a scholarship at a high school in Perth, Australia. Her best friend who had a crush on her said that he'll be waiting for her to come back. But, Perth changed Lola's life as she knows more people her love in Perth.

title: Keramat
storyline: A group of filmmakers travels to Bantul to prepare for shooting. After several supernatural occurrences, the main talent gets possessed and is taken to another dimension. The crew enlists help from a paranormal and embarks to find her.

title: Romeo + Rinjani
storyline: Romeo (Deva Mahenra), works as a freelance photographer for an outdoor adventure magazine. One day, he got a job to take photographs on Mount Rinjani. On the way to Rinjani, Romeo meets someone who will change his life.

title: Ikatan Darah
storyline: Mega, a talented martial artist, sees her fighting career come to a halt after an injury during a competition. While she's sulking at home, a thug shows up demanding payment for a debt owed by her brother, Bilal. Mega discovers in shock that her brother has gambled away their home. Desperate to fix things, Bilal goes to see Henry the man he owes money to. But things spiral out of control, and Bilal ends up doing the unthinkable. Now, Henry's brother a deranged priest with a taste for violence wants revenge. He unleashes his army of henchmen on the town, including a savage killer with a nose like a bloodhound. Bilal and Mega can only run for so long. Sooner or later, they'll have to fight. And when that time comes, all bets are off.

title: Kelam
storyline: Relationship of Nina (Aura Kasih) with her mother, Dewi (has turned cold since 8 years ago when Nina ran away from her house. Nina's little sister, Fenny (Amanda Manoppo) have to call Nina, because Dewi had an accident in the house. Nina came with her 7 years old daughter, Sasha (Giselle Tambunan). Nina and Dewi are dealing with it, but Sasha suddenly collapse. In the hospital, doctor said that the leaking heart that Sasha had since she was a baby are getting worse. Sasha needs a heart donor. At the same time, Tiara passed away in that hospital. After knowing Sasha condition, Tiara's parents agreed to donate Tiara's heart to Sasha. Sasha were saved. When Sasha coming home, somethings happened in the house. Sasha's attitude has changed. Then the child ghosts terror haunting her. Nina assumed that it's because the heart donor from Tiara, Tiara's spirit, haunting Dewi's house. Nina had to fight to save Sasha from the terror of that child ghost, Nina realized that all of this had to do something with her dark life when she left Dewi 8 years ago.

title: Tengkorak
storyline: Humanity discovered a 170,000 year old fossilized skull with a length of 1,850 meters due to an earthquake in Yogyakarta in 2006. The discovery confuses a lot of religious leaders and scientists. Even the world is arguing whether they should research the fossilized skeleton or hide it from the public on behalf of humanitarian reasons. A young girl is trapped in the search for the answer for the mystery behind the skull and the revelation of the truth to the world. If we are indeed not the most perfect beings as we believe, do we really want to know?

title: Minggu Pagi di Victoria Park
storyline: A woman starting a new life as a migrant worker in Hong Kong reluctantly searches the city for her missing sister.

title: #TemanTapiMenikah
storyline: Ayudia (Vanesha Prescilla) and Ditto (Adipati Dolken) have been best friends for 12 years. And for all those times, Ditto has been secretly in love with her. Until one day, Ayudia told him that she's gonna get married.

title: Demi Ucok
storyline: Glo doesn't want to be like her mother: Get married, forget her dream, and live boringly ever after. She wants to reach her dream: make a movie. Her mother, having one more year to live, tries to make her daughter live like her: Get married, live for others, and live happily ever after. So the battle begins. —anonymous

title: The Sacred Riana: Beginning
storyline: In her childhood, Riana lived in a small town with her father and her mother who ran a funeral house business. A disaster required them move to Uncle Johan's house in Jakarta and Riana meets with Riani doll. Riana grows up and one day got visited by Mrs. Klara, a counselor-teacher in her school who wants to know why Riana has not attended school and suggests Riana rehabilitated. Disasters take place to Riana's parents. Mrs. Klara comes again with Hendro, Lusi and Anggi, to help Riana socialize. But, their presence triggers a bigger problem; a vicious creature of the past ia released and terrorize them all. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Reva: Guna Guna
storyline: Reva, a cheerful student, suddenly changes after her 21st birthday. Reva becomes moody and doesn't want to hang out. Then at her house, her mother and two younger siblings are killed sadistically. Reva is declared a murderer and is rehabilitated in a mental hospital. Devi, Reva's best friend, does not believe this and feels there is something about Reva. At the hospital Reva is terrorized by a horrible supernatural being. Doctor Karina, Reva's aunt, always assures her that it is only Reva's hallucinations. But, the supernatural creature keeps appearing and tries to kill Reva. From the paranormal smuggled into a mental hospital, it is discovered that the supernatural being is sent to kill Reva. Reva and Devi try to find out who and what supernatural beings sent for to Reva. From this supernatural being it is revealed who killed Reva's mother and sisters. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Nikah Yuk
storyline: Trauma of their late marriage, Arya's parents ask Arya (Marcell Darwin) to get married soon, but Arya wants to focus on his career as a photographer. His parents did not run out of intelligence and had various crazy plans that Arya could not refuse. Until one day Arya met Lia (Yuki Kato), a comic artist who brought his life to a new chapter. —Wikipedia

title: Detektif Jaga Jarak
storyline: Almond Surendra, a marriage consultant who is trying very hard to maintain his client's household. This year, Almond intends to propose to Arum, his dream girl and childhood friend. Arum's parents also often asked their daughter to get married. Unfortunately, the pandemic made Almond try even harder to make money. The marriage consulting business that was built went bankrupt while the pandemic is still not known when it will end. Bima Sena will play the role of Takdir, a street busker who makes his living as a paid spy to investigate the affairs of several couples. Seeing Fate's unusual work, at first Almond didn't want to get involved. But after seeing the results, he finally became a detective.

title: Nariti: Romansa Danau Toba
storyline: The beautiful and smart Nariti becomes the boys' idol at her school. Jefri and Riko try to conquer her heart. Although initially annoyed with Jefri, who is considered a bad boy, Nariti falls in love with him instead. Nariti's mother strongly opposes Nariti and Jefri's closeness. At last, she can rest easy because Nariti goes to Jakarta to study while Jefri is still in Medan. Since then, Jefri has disappeared like the earth has swallowed him. Nariti never got any news about Jefri. Nariti feels that Jefri has betrayed her love. Nariti forgets about Jefri and is close to Riko, who never stops fighting for Nariti's heart.

title: Lupa Daratan
storyline: Vino Agustian, a top Indonesian actor with an arrogant personality, suddenly loses his acting skills. The embarrassing incident was recorded and went viral, prompting the producer to call him for confirmation. Cornered, Vino tried everything to salvage his image. He blamed the incident on supernatural interference and even claimed it was all part of a film promotion. Unfortunately, these efforts not only failed to salvage the situation, but also worsened it. Vino's reputation was destroyed, and his childhood dreams began to feel distant. He was forced to face the bitter reality that his career was on the line.

title: Ngenest
storyline: Ernest, an Indonesia guy of Chinese descent, has to deal with his life as a Chinese-born, how he often got bullied in school, and how he decided to find a local girl to marry.

title: Melbourne Rewind
storyline: Failed to move on. That reality is faced by Laura (Pamela Bowie), a radio broadcaster who lives in Melbourne, when she finds her first love Max (Morgan Oey), appears before her. The memory of the past is slowly returning. Max is not just her first love, but also the man who makes Laura find her purpose in life. Their youth ego makes them separate. Max has to go to America to realize his dream as a lighting designer. Both agreed to realize their dream in their own ways. Max comes back when she is ready to forget him and move on to another man, Evan (Jovial Da Lopez), a veterinarian, who is also the boyfriend of his friend, Cee (Aurelie Mauremans). —Letterboxd

title: Nona
storyline: Nona (Nadya Arina) goes to Azerbaijan after losing her best friend, Ogy (Augie Fantinus), who suddenly died. Nona is desperate and almost commits suicide. She is very surprised when she hears his best friend's voice from the orangutan doll, the last gift Ogy gave her. Nona then sets out on an adventure with Ogy the orangutan to the mountains of Azerbaijan to find Noah's Ark. However, her trip to Azerbaijan is not as smooth as planned. Nona promises to fulfill Ogy's childhood wishes. Ogy wanted to see the scenery that Noah witnessed when he got out of his ship. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Notebook
storyline: A Muslim teacher Rintik went to teach in Sumba, where she falls in love with the people and with Arsa. Can they fall in love amidst the differences?

title: Bangkit dari Kubur
storyline: Three medical students are doing an internship at a hospital. As part of their new responsibilities, they have to take charge of the morgue.

title: Pulau Hantu
storyline: A woman named Dara who ignores her mother's warning. Where, her mother forbids Dara to join in celebrating her graduation with Pandu, Niki, Lathi, and Noah. The graduation celebration was held on a ship that was rented together. Unfortunately, Dara and her friends experienced an unpleasant fate. The ship she was on was stranded on an unnamed island full of mystical atmosphere. Dara immediately remembered her mother and harbored a deep longing for her.

title: Mangkujiwo
storyline: After being ousted by Tjokro Kusumo (Roy Marten) with various kinds of slander before the King, Brotoseno (Sujiwo Tejo) intends to take revenge through the baby conceived by Kanthi (Asmara Abigail). Kanti is a village girl who is impregnated by Tjokro Kusumo, and then put in stocks because she is slandered as a woman with a demon child. Kanthi becomes a tool for the two warring leaders. She is secretly assisted by Sadi (Septian Dwi Cahyo), Brotoseno's servant who could not stand the actions and plans of his master. The Kanti's baby was saved and named Uma (Yasamin Jasem). —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Ghost Writer
storyline: An old diary containing dark secrets. For Galih, this book is a defense against the prejudice of his parents. For Naya, this book is good material for his latest novel after three years of dry ideas. Then a cooperation between two different worlds begins. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Jailangkung: Sandekala
storyline: The supernatural terror centers on Adrian, his wife Sandra, and their two children, Niki and Kinan, who are on vacation out of town. While in a lake that becomes their destination, Kinan mysteriously disappears without a trace at sunset. The family search for Kinan in an area that is foreign to them. There's absolutely no trace, but there's a jaillangkung doll they find in an intense search.

title: Suami yang Menangis
storyline: The story of life of Ustad Arifin Ilham from childhood until he becomes a great ulema: from being bitten by a snake which make him coma in months. This incident is the starting point for him to get closer to the almighty creator. This true story is juxtaposed with the family of Dahlan, who live a difficult life then given abundant fortune by Allah SWT. When he hurts his wife, he is always lying and restless because he feels guilty for his wife. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Vina: Sebelum 7 hari
storyline: The body of the late Vina, which was found on the Cirebon flyover, is thought to have been in a single motorbike accident. Vina's grandmother was suspicious because Vina's body was unnaturally crushed but did not have enough evidence to reject the report. Vina possesses the body of her best friend Linda. She only has 7 days after her death to reveal the painful truth. Al Fatihah.

title: Hanya Namamu Dalam Doaku
storyline: A seemingly harmonious family with a daughter, Nala. The father always prays for his family to always be healthy and happy, both in this world and the hereafter. However, there is a figure from the father's past whose affairs are unfinished which ultimately causes a rift in their family life.

title: Sebelum Iblis Menjemput: Ayat Dua
storyline: Two years after escaping from demonic terror, Alfie (Chelsea Islan) and Nara (Hadijah Shahab) try to continue their lives. But Alfie is still haunted by feelings of guilt and unnatural vision. Alfie's worst nightmare has just begun and the dangers that await her are increasingly threatening: the figure of darkness so hungry for souls rises to take their lives.

title: Di Bawah Lindungan Ka'bah
storyline: Growing up in West Sumatra in the 1920s, Hamid and Zainab come from families from very different social classes. Hamid is poor, while Zainab is wealthy. Hamid receives a scholarship from Zainab's father because Hamid's mother works for Zainab's family. Hamid and Zainab fall in love and dream of finding a way for society to accept their union, and also to make the pilgrimage to Mecca. —Anonymous

title: #Malam Jumat: The Movie
storyline: To provide a different experience to his subscribers, Ewing tries something new by exploring a playground called the Wonder Park that had been abandoned for a long time. With his team, Agan, Oji, Wingky, and Lulu, they find jacket and hat with the initials RH in the park. It is alleged that the objects belonged to a suicide person, but they does not find the body. A girl named Dinda, claims to be the sister of the owner of the jacket and hat. She is not sure that her brother committed suicide. To prove that, Dinda invites Ewing and his team to return to Wonder Park. At the second visit, they must face a more dire reality. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: The Boy with Moving Image
storyline: Vaiyang, a film director, wants to rent a house for making his new movie that owned by a woman named Ning. However, the agreement has the condition that he must accompany Ning until her death prediction is coming tomorrow.

title: Para Betina Pengikut Iblis: Part 2
storyline: The chaos in Potrosaran village caused by the actions of the Three Female Devils reached the ears of Kiai Taqim until he sent his student Ahmad to quell the abomination of the Three Female Devils. But along the way, it turns out that it is not easy to defeat the Three Female Demons. Moreover, it turns out that Ahmad has a past, which is connected to Potrosaran village.

title: Arisan! 2
storyline: Eight years have passed since the first "Arisan!," much has changed in the lives of Sakti (Tora Sudiro), Meimei (Cut Mini), Andien (Aida Nurmala). Even Lita (Rachel Maryam), has decided to settle down in Jakarta. Nino (Surya Saputra) has agreed to Sakti's request to take a break on their relationship. Amidst the chaotic sequence of events in Jakarta, Meimei decides to pack her bags and head to Gili island, Lombok, to immerse herself in nature. Meimei's choice arouses the suspicion of her four friends, and after a while, Sakti, Nino, Lita, and Andien, are forced to face the reality that Meimei is not merely going on a prolonged retreat, but that she is in fact struggling with something much more serious. —Anonymous

title: Kukira Kau Rumah
storyline: Pram (Jourdy Pranata) is a lonely young man; his father passed away when he was still in middle school and his mother is busy working. Pram fills his days playing music and composing songs while working in a music cafe. Then he meets Niskala (Prilly Latuconsina) and they become friends. Pram doesn't know that Niskala has a bipolar disorder. Niskala hides from her father Dedi (Kiki Narendra) that she's pursuing a college education; her only goal is to prove to her father that she can still excel, even with her condition. Since becoming friends with Pram, Niskala breaks all the rules and promises she made. Pram feels that Niskala can fill his lonely days and can even support him in music. Pram's duet with Niskala receives tremendous appreciation. Pram finally finds out that Niskala has bipolar disorder, but he loves her even more. When Dedi finds out that she's singing in the cafe, he causes a commotion with Pram. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Temurun
storyline: Siblings Dewi and Sena are grieving after the departure of their parents. In the midst of the grief that Dewi and Sena felt and tried to overcome, they were both shocked by the legacy left behind for them. A legacy passed down from the family's ancestors brings horror that changes Dewi and Sena's lives. Various scary mystical events and terror beyond reason begin to come to the two of them. Even though Dewi and Sena don't like the money and hope for this inheritance, there's nothing that can be done. Both of them also try to accept and continue to live side by side with their ancestral heritage. So what exactly is the inheritance that Dewi and Sena have inherited from generation to generation? Can they overcome and uncover all the mysteries behind the inheritance passed down from the family that brought terrible terror?

title: Lyora: Penantian Buah Hati
storyline: Meutya Hafid, a busy career woman, is trying to conceive despite her advanced age. Together with her husband, Fajrie, they undergo various pregnancy programs, including IVF. Along the way, Meutya and Fajrie face the ups and downs of life, filled with failure and a deep sense of loss, but they never give up their struggle and hope.

title: 27 Steps of May
storyline: Following a horrible experience, May has isolated herself and stopped talking. Her father blames himself and tries to live by May's conditions year after year. But one day a hole appears in the wall and through it May discovers a magician.

title: Catatan Si Boy
storyline: BOY, a perfect student: handsome, wealthy, enjoyable, and with a gentle heart. It's no wonder that many female students want Boy to be their boyfriend. However, Boy already has a beloved girlfriend named NUKE, a beautiful girl and the daughter of a public official. Unfortunately, Boy and Nuke's relationship is not approved by Nuke's father. Boy is frustrated and heartbroken when Nuke disappears and cuts off all contact with him. Boy is engulfed in sadness due to the feeling of loss until a new and beautiful female student named VERA manages to infiltrate and begins to try to heal Boy's heart. This leads to Boy being attacked by Vera's ex-boyfriend, JEFFREY, who doesn't accept Boy and Vera's relationship. The situation becomes even more complicated when Nuke reappears in Boy's life. Who is the woman who successfully entered the heart of Boy?

title: Ku Tunggu Jandamu
storyline: The struggle of Perssik, a young widower who wants to straighten the views of society about her status. But her now ex-husband, Rozak, do not want to let her go and tried many ways to make her return to him.

title: Haji Backpacker
storyline: A spiritual journey of a backpacker who gets dissapointed with God, wandering 9 countries to find himself.

title: Mendarat Darurat
storyline: Surviving an accident is something that should be good news for many people. However, this does not apply to Glenn because he, who is supposed to be the victim of the plane crash, actually survives because he is having an affair with Kania at a hotel. Glenn's confusion increases because he has told Maya, his wife, that he is already on the plane and ready to take off. He faces a difficult choice: he must tell Maya and his family that he is still alive, but the truth about what saved him threatens his marriage.

title: Lantai 4
storyline: Jonathan and Julia are a married couple who are currently facing financial problems and the bankruptcy of their business. Their house has been seized by the Bank, so they are forced to move from their home to the Flamboyan Apartment, an inheritance from Jonathan's late father. They now live on the fourth floor of the apartment, which is already vacant and only inhabited by Oma Lie, an elderly Chinese descendant who is still related to Jonathan. Laura, Jonathan's eldest daughter, feels that there have been strange occurrences since they moved to the fourth floor. Citra, Laura's younger sibling, also experiences peculiar behavior; she often gets angry and tries to harm Laura. The fourth floor has been the site of many terrifying deaths. Laura continuously experiences mysterious terrors that threaten the lives of her family.

title: Surat dari Praha
storyline: A girl named Larasati (Julie Estelle), trying to fulfill her deceased mother's last wish to deliver a box filled with letters from her past to an old guy lived in Prague. A story about forgiveness, tying loose end and bond.

title: Kisah Dua Jendela
storyline: An urban romance about loneliness and disconnection in the megapolis of Jakarta

title: One Fine Day
storyline: Alana (Michelle Ziudith), a girl who is never truly happy with her boyfriend, Danu (Maxime Bouttier), who spoils her with expensive gifts, meets Mahesa (Jefri Nichol) in Barcelona. This unexpected meeting of two opposites brings a big change in both their lives. —iflix

title: Cinta Laki-Laki Biasa
storyline: Nania (Velove Vexia) who comes from a rich family falls in love with Rafli (Deva Mahenra), an ordinary man. They were opposed by Nania's mother. Their love was tested by various trials.

title: Wanita Ahli Neraka
storyline: Female student Farah got married to fulfill her desire to get heaven according to her beliefs. However, what she got was hell in her marriage. She realized that she was part of her husband's agreement with the devil for his big plan. Farah entered into a complicated situation: wanting to rebel and wanting to remain devoted to her husband in order to get heaven. A letter from Umi Hanum, her teacher, made Farah fight back and become a Woman Expert in Hell.

title: 3600 Detik
storyline: 3600 Detik tells about the life of Sandra (Shae), who changes over night when her parents divorce ; she colours her hair red and also changes her personality. This causes her friends to wanting stay away from her. Her mom (Wulan Guritno) then decides to move to another city with Sandra. At her new school, Sandra gets acquainted with Leon (Steven William), a bright student who is the best of his class. No one wants to be friends with Sandra, because of her strange behaviour, except for Leon. They spend a lot of time together and Leon starts to have a good influence on Sandra. Until one day Leon cannot be reached. It appears Leon has a big secret. —Annika Kuyper

title: Zeta: When the Dead Awaken
storyline: Deon witness a strange incident when a friend he beats suddenly bites the nurse's neck and becomes a cannibal. After that, the attacks from the zombies happen quickly at school and on the streets, so Deon picks up his mother, Isma, in Teratai Asri apartment. Deon and his mother are trapped inside the apartment while other residents has fled. Meanwhile at the Five Military Base, Colonel Vito welcomes Richard, Deon's father, a scientist, who discovered the origin of the outbreak: originating from the evolution of an amoeba parasite named Naegleria-ross zeta, and that the Zeta serum he had created located in Teratai Asri apartment. Colonel Vito decides that their team visit a zombie killer gang called Blue River to get the best combat strategy against the zombies. Deon also tries to fight the zombies who attack the apartment. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pulung Gantung: Pati Ngendat
storyline: Getting news that his father died in the village of Kidul, Ryan wants to pay his respects but is forbidden by his mother Marlina. Together with Alana, Ben, and Elsa, Ryan still goes to pay his respects to his father, Prasetyo. But when they arrive there, they realize that the village is under the curse of Pulung Gantung. Those who are cursed will be controlled to commit suicide by hanging themselves. When he was about to leave the village, Alana, Ryan's lover, was possessed by Pulung Gantung. Ryan, Ben, and Elsa tried hard to save Alana from the power of Pulung Gantung.

title: Bangkit!
storyline: Jakarta is subject to continuous rain. The Katulampa embankment collapsed, then there was hurricane Laluna heading from Australia to Jakarta.

title: Merry Riana: Mimpi Sejuta Dolar
storyline: Merry Riana, a girl from Chinese ethnicity in Indonesia, is forced to move abroad to Singapore during Indonesian riot in 1998. She then must live a hard life because she doesn't know anyone in Singapore.

title: Belenggu
storyline: There are dead people. Dreams of an oversized rabbit. More dead people, various murders and a detective.

title: The Empire's Throne
storyline: The Empire's Throne is colossal dramatic action film, based on the story of the empire Majapahit, the most powerful Empire in South East Asia. The Empire's Throne tells the story of the epic struggle for the throne of the kingdom.

title: Janin
storyline: Randu (Reuben Elishama Hadju) and Dinar (Jill Gladys) are happy because Dinar conceives for the fourth month. However, their happiness slowly disappears when a middle-aged woman, Sukma (Meriam Bellina), becomes their new neighbor. Strangeness makes Dinar feel scared and often disturbs the fetus in the womb. Dinar feels threatened when she sees a female ghost who wants to take her fetus. She tells her experience to Randu, who considers Dinar to be hallucinating, so Randu gives a nurse to look after Dinar. Dinar feels a little calm. But the female ghost suddenly bothering her again and almost does her harm. Without Randu and Dinar knowing, Mrs Sukma is always watching their lives.

title: Aku atau Dia?
storyline: Novi and Dafi are campus sweethearts, who meet in college and continue dating till they graduate. But the relationship is not as smooth as everyone thinks. After accepting an offer from his boss Dafi is promoted at the law firm.

title: Kartini
storyline: This is a story about the most famous Indonesian heroine, Kartini. In the early 1900s, Indonesia was still a colony of the Netherlands, Java is a land where noble families rule under Dutch supervision. Only noble and royal family were able to get education. Women weren't allowed to get higher education, even for women of royal blood. Women in the Javanese culture only had one purpose - to be a bride for a man with royal blood. Kartini grew up to fight this caste system, fight for equality for women, and most importantly she fought for the right for everyone to get an education regardless of their social status or gender. This is an emotional journey of Kartini where she had to defy her own family, her own culture and she had to fight to change in rules and traditions that were considered sacred in Java. —Anon

title: Pesugihan: Bersekutu dengan Iblis
storyline: Hendri and Marini are successful in business. However, they don't pay enough attention to their children, Resika and Karin. Due to the economic crisis, their business goes backward until their lives undergo significant changes. Hendri turns into a gloomy person and enters a misleading path. Marini accidentally catches Hendri outside the house to go to a large tree in the corner of a vacant lot. Hendri secretly looks for shortcuts to regain his wealth: allying with the devil. The business is recovering. Since then, Resika began to realize that something strange is happening to her sister, Karin.

title: Nyai: A Woman from Java
storyline: Set in the Dutch colonial period in 1927, story of a woman who lives with her Dutch husband. One day, the woman named Nyai begins to realize that she is living like a prisoner.

title: Malik & Elsa
storyline: Malik and Elsa play a game of riddles. Elsa is lost and punished to treat Malik for seven consecutive days, Those seven days can unite Malik and Elsa, whose family conditions couldn't be more different from each other. Then, Elsa's mother forbids her from hanging out with Malik because she often lost track of time, and Malik wins a writing competition that gives him a rare opportunity to study in the Netherlands. Malik has to choose between his dream or the love which has not been spoken. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Heartbreak Motel
storyline: Ava, a famous actress, is required to appear perfect in public. However, behind the glamour of her life, Ava feels lonely. Ava decides to take a break from the world of entertainment and vacations at a remote motel called the Heartbreak Motel. At that place he met Raga, a simple man who worked there. He also didn't know Ava was a famous actress and treated her as an ordinary person. Because of this treatment, Ava felt comfortable with Raga and fell in love with him. On the other hand, there is Reza, an actor and former lover, who still loves her. Reza tries to win her heart back, but he has already fallen in love with Raga. Ava must choose simple true love or return to the world of entertainment and become a celebrity with Reza.

title: Bukan Cinderella
storyline: Amora is reunited with Adam due to the accidental mismatch of shoes. They are caught in a love game from their best friend's arrangement but end up loving each other, being able to change the friendship of the superior class with the outcast class who has always been hostile, even the blossoming of parental harmony. Adam's secret that has been kept for a long time can be revealed: a bald boy who always bothered Amora when she was in kindergarten.

title: Merah Putih
storyline: A band of Indonesian men bond together as cadets, survive a massacre, and fight on as guerrilla soldiers against the Dutch despite their conflicts and deep differences in social class.

title: Generasi Micin
storyline: For Kevin (Kevin Anggara), school is a boring place. He only has three best friends in his class. One day, Kevin found a mysterious website that challenged him to do naughty things at school.

title: Night Bus
storyline: A group of civilians share a bus ride to Sampar, a town full of natural resources. It is heavily guarded by the state army who is fighting against the rebel militias, who want freedom over their homeland.

title: Ancika: Dia yang Bersamaku 1995
storyline: The friendship between Dilan and Ancika Mehrunisa Rabu. Their increasingly close relationship made the seeds of love grow and their relationship rose to the level of being a couple. In 1995, the former motorcycle gang leader, Dilan, fell in love with Ancika, a girl who despises motorcycle gangs. Not only that, Ancika is against any kind of dating relationship, and without exception, she hates Dilan. Therefore, Dilan has to figure out a way to win this girl over, as she is very different from Milea, his ex-girlfriend. He finds it extremely difficult due to their age difference and surroundings. Despite the fact that Ancika is mature for her age, she gets jealous a lot, which makes things more complicated. That, though, is love, isn't it? He must battle for it. Ancika: "She (Milea) does have a history, but I have Dilan"

title: Ambu
storyline: Ambu Misnah was left by her daughter, Fatma. She left their house at the Baduy for her love for Nico, the youth from Jakarta. Fatma then has a child named Nona. One day, Fatma brings Nona to Baduy. Family polemic arises.

title: Ayah, Mengapa Aku Berbeda?
storyline: The story of a deaf girl who is fresh out of middle school and transitions to high school.

title: Pernikahan Arwah
storyline: Follows the story of a prospective husband and wife named Salim and Tasya. The two decided to move their pre-wedding photo shoot to Salim's family home after his aunt, Salim's only blood relative, passed away. In addition to having to take care of his aunt's funeral, Salim also had to continue the family ritual of burning incense every day on a mysterious altar. If not, his life would be in danger. Unexpectedly, their presence along with the photo shoot team in the house actually made the spirits of Salim's ancestors who died during the Japanese occupation appear and start terrorizing them. Instead of feeling afraid, Tasya was moved to uncover the mystery of Salim's family's past in order to free her prospective husband from his obligations so that they could leave the house. What really happened? Will Tasya succeed in carrying out her mission?

title: Setetes Embun Cinta Niyala
storyline: Niyala, a village girl who has succeeded in realizing her dream of becoming a doctor. However, her happiness is disturbed when she is forced to accept an unwanted arranged marriage in order to pay off the family's debt. At the same time, Niyala must let Faiq, her childhood friend whom she secretly loves, marry another woman.

title: Badoet
storyline: Three friends in an apartment complex must discover what's behind the killings of local children, all of whom drew the same picture before they died. They uncover the evil spirit of a circus clown and must send it straight back to hell before more children are murdered.

title: Janin Iblis Neraka
storyline: A newlywed couple, Dika (Samuel Rizal) and Ranti (Aliyah Faizah), live in a new house. Chaos in the couple's life began to appear when Ranti became pregnant and the child she was carrying was a demon fetus.

title: Hujan Bulan Juni
storyline: Pingkan (Velove Vexia), a young lecturer in Japanese Literature at the University of Indonesia, has the opportunity to study in Japan for two years. Sarwono (Adipati Dolken) is sad to learn that she will be leaving him behind. Sarwono is commissioned by his chief to present a cooperation to Sam Ratulangi University, Manado. Sarwono brings Pingkan as his guide while in Manado and she meets his father's extended family. She begins to be cornered by questions about her relationship with Sarwono: in their eyes the difference is huge. Not that Pingkan and Sarwono do not realize it. They are already comfortable staying for years in a soundproof room called love.

title: Di Ambang Kematian
storyline: Nadia, who is living on the brink of death, knows that she will become a victim of her father's sacrifice. As a result of this sacrifice, her mother tragically passed away in 2002. Ten years later, Nadia's brother, Yoga, suffered the same unfortunate fate as their mother. Among all the family members, Nadia is the only one left. After the passing of Yoga, will Nadia experience the same fate as the other family members? What will happen next in Nadia's story? Will she be able to escape her father's sacrifice, or will she meet a tragic end like her mother and brother?

title: Lara Ati
storyline: Joko faces the fact that he doesn't like his job and his parents don't support his dream of becoming a designer. Plus, Joko is left by his fiancée, Farah. Joko's life is a mess. His meeting with Ayu, his childhood friend, sparks his hopes again. With Ayu's help, Joko is determined to improve his life. And it all started with getting Farah back.

title: Nussa: The Movie
storyline: Nussa's life changed when he met a new friend who was much more liked by his friends than himself.

title: Mau Jadi Apa?
storyline: 1997. Soleh Solihun successfully entered the University of Padjadjaran. But the ugly campus conditions and their remote location made Soleh doubt his choice. "What the hell am I doing here? What do you want to be?" churning in Soleh's heart. Together with his friends who has the same confusion-Lukman (Boris Bokir) the drawing whiz; Marsyel (Adjisdoaibu), a hopeless romantic who is always unlucky; Eko (Awwe), the crazy music hobbyist; Fey (Anggika Bolsterli), the beautiful but slightly crazy mulatto; as well as the big mouth of Sharif (Ricky Wattimena)-Soleh set up an alternative campus magazine. The contents: light things such as music, movies, sports and gossip between students, They name the magazine Karung Goni, short for 'News, Phrases, Gossip and Opinion'. Managing Karung Goni is not easy. Soleh and his gang must face the scorn of the Jatinangor Facts kids, a super serious magazine that dominates the campus, led by the arrogant Panji (Ronal Surapradja). Along with that, Soleh also had to fight to win the heart of Ros (Aurelie Moeremans), a beautiful Slanker who has made him fall in love since student orientation.

title: Jokowi
storyline: Story of the Indonesian President's life before he become famous.

title: Toilet 105
storyline: A transfer student moves to a new school after moving to Indonesia, where she and the students has been disturbed by strange supernatural anomalies in the school's bathroom.

title: Tiren: Mati Kemaren
storyline: Unable to accept his daughter's sudden and mysterious death, the father intentionally let the child's death shroud still tied during the funeral which make her became free spirit, and take revenge on the person who has committed the murder.

title: One Night Stand
storyline: A young man's trip to attend a funeral and a wedding on the same day leads to a journey of self-discovery when he's captivated by a chance encounter.

title: 3 Nafas Likas
storyline: Set in Indonesia, through 1930's to 2000. 3 Nafas Likas is the extraordinary story of an extraordinary woman, named Likas who, then achieved numerous remarkable and great success in her life. What motivated her are her promises to three most important persons in her life. Three promises that become her breath in everything she does. Three promises to always fight and survive in life. —Titien Wattimena

title: Bike Boyz
storyline: When Agus (Aep Bancet) is about to help Lilis (Aline Manza) looking for her husband who has not come home for three months and not a single news, his Vespa is stolen. Together with his fellow Vespa owners, Agus travels around Bandung looking for his Vespa and Lilis's husband. They accidentally enter into a case involving a group of thieves, motorcycle gangs, terrorists and the police. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Terimakasih Cinta
storyline: Eva just enters high school when she meets Ryan, because both belong to a group of student who have a disease during the School Orientation Period. Ryan thinks that Eva is just pretending to be sick like him. An incident makes Ryan take Eva to the hospital and has to be treated. Lupus is the doctor's diagnosis of Eva's disease after a series of tests. Sugiarti and Badarudin, Eva's parents, hesitate to tell Eva about her illness. Her roommate, Dewi, a patient with pancreatic cancer, makes a beautiful friendship. Eva continues to wait for Ryan who does not come again because he is banned by his parents. Dewi also always awaits the presence of her brother, Nanan, who always comes at night when Dewi falls asleep, Nanan is unable to see Dewi suffer. Dewi is devastated when Dewi leaves and Ryan ends their relationship. The same feeling of loss makes Eva and Nanan close. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Desa Mati: The Movie
storyline: Lintang and some of his friends who visit his grandmother's house. After visiting his grandmother, they continue their journey to a waterfall. However, on the way, the car they were riding in suddenly broke down, so they were forced to stop at a village. Initially, there was nothing suspicious about the village, especially when the residents welcomed them friendly. However, things changed after one of them found a corpse and curiosity began to increase. Right at that moment, they realized that they were trapped in a village inhabited by mystical residents full of secrets known as the Dead Village.

title: Dua Garis Biru
storyline: Dara (Zara JKT48) and Bima (Angga Yunanda) violated the boundary without knowing the consequences. They try to take responsibility for their choices. They think they are ready to become adults to face all the consequences. Their innocence is immediately tested when families who really loved them knew, then forced into their chosen journey. —http://filmindonesia.or.id

title: Primbon
storyline: It all started with Rana and his friend Janu embarking on a mountain climbing trip amidst unfavorable weather. In the midst of dense forest, they got separated and lost. Fortunately, Janu managed to make it back home eventually, but not Rana. A massive search operation was carried out, but Rana could not be found. A week had passed, and Rana's extended family decided to hold a prayer gathering (tahlilan) as they believed it was unlikely for Rana to have survived and assumed he had perished. However, Dini, as a mother, couldn't accept it. She refused to give up and continued to believe that her daughter Rana was still alive. And indeed, after the prayer gathering, Rana returned home in the pouring rain. Dini, her husband Banyu, and their youngest daughter Tari joyfully welcomed Rana's return. However, the larger family did not share the same joy. Living by the guidance of superstitions, they believed that the person who returned was not human. A conflict arose between Dini, who believed that the person who came back was indeed her daughter Rana, and the extended family. The only way to prove the truth was through a ruwat ceremony. Was Rana truly deceased? And who was the person who actually returned home?

title: Yohanna
storyline: The young nun Yohanna's encounter with the underworld of child labor in Sumba restores her sense of purpose in life.

title: Tarung: City of the Darkness
storyline: The story about true friendship of four young men in the face of the harshness of life and challenges problems which they live.

title: Warkop DKI Kartun
storyline: The Warkop trio Dono, Kasino, and Indro are dragged into the most daring mission yet: disguise themselves as Indonesian national team players in a World Cup qualifier to sabotage a match in the fictional country of West Korea and stop a conspiracy that could trigger a nuclear war. But saving the world is only a small part of their job as CHIIPS agents. They also have to hunt down a self-made robot that rebels; and transform into elementary school children to uncover a national exam cheating scandal. Three Missions, Three Heroes, Action first, think later.

title: Pelukis Hantu
storyline: Tutur (Ge Pamungkas), an amateur painter, accepts an offer to become a ghost painter on a television show because of economic demands. He has absolutely no ability to see spirits. He is surprised when he could actually see these creatures. The TV show goes viral and the rating soars. However, he feels uneasy with the presence of the kuntilanak that haunts him. He asks the help of Amanda (Michelle Ziudith), who writes and researchs occult things. Tutur, Amanda, and Udin (Abdur Arsyad), Tutur's manager, perform various rituals to communicate with the kuntilanak and to find out what message he wanted to convey.

title: The Most Beautiful Girl in the World
storyline: Reuben, a carefree playboy and sole heir to a media mogul, has always mocked his father's obsession with ratings and dating game shows. But to secure his inheritance, he must fulfill his late father's final wish: marry the most beautiful girl in the world.

title: Air Mata Terakhir Bunda
storyline: This film tells story about the struggle and sacrifice of a mother who acts as a single parent of two sons, Delta Santoso (Vino G Bastian) and Iqbal (Rizky Hanggono). This film is an adaptation of a true story, which tells about the life of a poor family who lives in a place known as the "Land of Mud", Sidoarjo a small village in Renokenongo. Delta Santoso is the name given by Sriyani to her second child hoping the name will be prayer.

title: Mati Suri
storyline: In the days leading up to her wedding, Abel is confronted by a strange pregnant woman who claims she's carrying the child of her fiance, Wisnu. Shocked by this revelation, Abel feels that her world is falling apart and decides to kill herself. She fails her suicide attempt and suffers a near death experience. Now troubled and depressed, she finds comfort in her best friend, Charlie, who asks her to take some time off at a large getaway mansion outside of town. Strange events begin to occur as the house is haunted by apparitions of the dead. Something from Abel's brush with death seems to be following her and the only way she can escape is if she dies once again. —Irishlass240 (smmorr240@aol.com)

title: Mama: Pesan dari Neraka
storyline: Putri had always known her mother, Sari, only as a talented tarot reader trusted by many high-ranking officials and prominent businessmen. She had almost no personal memories of her. That was until Sari died in an accident. One day, Putri received a text message on her phone-from her late mother's number. At first, she thought it was just a prank. But gradually, the messages began to give guidance about the future-events that actually came true. Putri slowly realized the messages were truly from her mother.

title: Twivortiare
storyline: When they met for the first time, they immediately fell in love. Within months, they married. After two years, after being tired of all the endless conflicts and arguments, finally, the super busy surgeon, Beno Wicaksono, and the successful banker, Alexandra Rhea decide to divorce. Friends of Alex, Vienna, calls it a divorce that is never seriously separated, because various events always bring them to meet each other. Even though there is other men, Denny who tries to fill Alexandra's heart, but still, the strong sense of love that is forced to die, even more blossoming. They are united again. A second marriage takes place. This time Beno and Alex promise, they will go through this marriage with a more mature attitude, mutual understanding and willingness to budge. They believe they can, because they still love each other. But is it true, love is enough? or what they feel it - is not love? —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kuambil Lagi Hatiku
storyline: Agra City, India, will be the witness to the marriage of Sinta and Vikash, which are just counting the days. But Sinta is shocked by her mother, Widhi Malthora, who suddenly disappears. Sinta tries various ways to find out her mother's whereabouts while Vikash's family urge that the marriage be carried out immediately. Apparently, Widhi returns to her hometown in Indonesia after receiving a telephone call from Dimas, her only brother. Widhi gets word that her father had died three months ago. Sinta is shocked because she always heard from her mother that her mother has no family in Java. Sinta is following her mother's departure with a thousand questions and delays her marriage in India. Arriving in Borobudur Village, Widhi's hometown, how surprised is Sinta, when she discovers the reality of her true roots and the dark secrets of her mother's past is not as beautiful as she has imagined so far. This reality will change her life forever. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kuasa gelap
storyline: After the death of his mother and sister in a tragic accident, Thomas intends to resign as a priest. However, he is given a final task to help the exorcist pastor, Rendra, whose health is declining, to exorcise the demon that has possessed Kayla, his late sister's best friend. Thomas and Rendra try their best to exorcise the demon that resides in Kayla's body. It turns out that the demon not only threatens Kayla's life but also Maya, Kayla's mother who has a dark past that makes her haunted by guilt.

title: Ketika Mas Gagah Pergi the Movie
storyline: Gagah was changed. After went to Ternate for his assignment suddenly, he changed drastically. His sister, Gita Ayu can't accept this. She thought Gagah is a new person who totally different from the previous one.

title: Air Terjun Pengantin Phuket
storyline: After experiencing the bad disasters on Pengantin Island, Tiara (Tamara Blezynski) decided to calm down on the beach of Phuket, Thailand. Until one day his best friend in college, Alan (Darius Sinathrya) came to visit and intended to persuade Tiara to return to Indonesia.

title: Kang Mak from Pee Mak
storyline: Makmur is an Indonesian soldier who has to leave his wife, Sari, who is heavily pregnant, to go to war somewhere, defending the integrity of the Republic of Indonesia. Makmur fought together with other soldiers, Supra, Fajrul, Jaka, and Solah. His strong desire to meet Sari again made Makmur and his friends survive the battlefield. They promised to be friends for life and death. When he returned home, Makmur reunited with Sari who had given birth to their child, Cipluk. Makmur's friends were also happy and a little jealous, seeing Makmur's affection for his extraordinary beautiful wife. However, the situation became uncomfortable when there were rumors that Sari had actually died. Sari, who lives with them, is a wandering spirit.

title: Taring
storyline: A monster from sacred jungle attacks a group of people who broke the offering

title: Sampai Ajal Memisahkan
storyline: Vanesha had the chance to kill her boyfriend, Arya. Arya, however, did not recognize her and confess that they never had a relationship.

title: Jaran Goyang
storyline: A gardener named Dirga fell in love with a sworddut named Elena. But his love was rejected by Elena who already had a girlfriend, Robert. Dirga killed Robert and asked Jaran Goyang black magic to his aunt, Mrs. Srinthil. Successfully getting Elena, Dirga also tried to get the love of Elena's sister Tania. There was a fight between Elena and Tania. —sujithsudhakarann

title: Selamat Pagi, Malam
storyline: GIA (32, played by Adinia Wirasti) returns home after living abroad for years. Calling Jakarta "home" is ironic as she experiences reverse culture shock. In a desperate attempt to latch on to her identity, Gia reunites with NAOMI (32, played by Marissa Anita), a lover from her past. Naomi reminds her of her old life; a life when everything was possible. What she doesn't expect is that Naomi has changed, that she has conformed to the societal norms of the city. INDRI (24, played by Ina Panggabean) wants to find a prince charming who will sweep her off her feet and serves her a silver platter. Her job as a towel girl in a local gym is not promising. She has to climb up the societal ladder with the only thing she can offer: her body. It is not prostitution; her body is her own, her right, regardless of how the society views it. She decides to meet with a prince charming through online dating, a place where identities are obscured. MRS. SURYA (48, played by Dayu Wijanto) has just lost her husband. In fact, she has lost her whole life because he was her life. People even know her only through her husband's name. She finds there is nothing to hang on to anymore. As she goes through her late husband's belongings, she finds out about another woman in his life: a prostitute/lounge singer named SOFIA (32, played by Dira Sugandi).

title: Surat Untukmu
storyline: The adventures of Gendis, a girl from Dieng, looking for traces of her mother and solving the biggest puzzle in her life.

title: Gentayangan
storyline: Abimanyu Karindra (Baim Wong) has no choice but to bring his wife, Sofia (Nadine Alexandra) and their two children and his sister Sheila (Jelita Callebaut) to settle in a parent's hotel in a mountain valley hundreds of kilometers from Jakarta, after being declared bankrupt by the court. The Kaki Langit Hotel, originally regarded as a comfortable and quiet residence, turns into a fearsome terror just moments after the Karindra family begin to live in it. Abimanyu who wants to sell the hotel is not able to do much after the prospective buyer and his child suddenly disappear and himself not allowed to leave the hotel. The mystery puzzle series of terror of supernatural beings in the Kaki Langit Hotel begin to find a bright spot after various clues lead to the dark past of the Karindra family. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kutukan Cakar Monyet
storyline: Roy and his wife Amara are expecting their first child. Roy also recently bought a house as a form of his dream. However, there is a tragic incident after the owner of the house comes and asks for a sacred object belonging to her late husband. Slowly the mystery surrounding the events in the house unfolds. The sacred object is also causing Roy and Amara to become hostile toward each other.

title: Pamali
storyline: Jaka Sunarya, who recently lost his job, and his wife, Rika, want to sell the house left by their parents to start a new life. In the village, they accidentally violate the customs that have become traditions, thus facing the existence of spirits that threaten their lives.

title: Glenn Fredly: The Movie
storyline: When Glenn Fredly faced difficulties in his career, he was almost fired from the label and experienced a breakup with Nola, his girlfriend of seven years. However, his life suddenly changed with the release of the song 'Januari' which was a hit in the market. Then, Glenn was helped by his sister named Uchie to recruit a professional manager for him. However, Glenn's life is not only about music, but also about community service which requires him to balance his life in both worlds. In the midst of his efforts to deal with the conflict in Ambon, he also had to face a conflict with his own father.

title: Geez & Ann
storyline: They first met at an alumni event. The first meeting was very memorable for the dreamer Ann and the mysterious Geez.

title: Trinity, The Nekad Traveler
storyline: A career woman from Jakarta named Trinity, who travel to various parts of the world.

title: Insya Allah Sah 2
storyline: Raka (Pandji Pragiwaksono) is now trapped in an online taxi with Gani (Donny Alamsyah), a fugitive who just escaped from prison. Both of them must go through a journey full of comedy action and unexpected situations.

title: The Exocet
storyline: We don't see so often on the big screen such a vibrant, turbulent, modern portrait of Jakarta. Indonesia is usually represented by gorgeous pictures from Bali and Jawa, while everyone recommends to skip or pass through smoggy cloudy foggy capital city Jakarta.
