Director Ertanto Robby Soediskam will demolish prejudices with painfully honest and playfully provocative revelations, which are widely known to everyone, but kept in silence out of fear for punishments.

title: Cinta Suci Zahrana
storyline: Zahrana is the first woman in Indonesia to receive an International award in the field of architects. But, the problems came in her life when she realized that she was no longer young and she was still not married.

title: Misi Kafe Biru
storyline: Naya, who has only known Ary for two weeks and is immediately proposed to by Ary, wants to find out what is behind this too hasty and somewhat suspicious proposal. Ary's closed attitude and lies to Naya worsen the situation, so Naya is desperate to do drastic things to get the truth and peace, even though the relationship is at stake.

title: Kafir: Gerbang Sukma
storyline: Eight years after Herman's tragic death due to black magic, Sri is rebuilding her life with her daughter, Dina, and Andi, who has married Rani. Sri's father informs her that her mother is seriously ill. They came to visit, and that was the beginning of disaster. Because there was a past sin that Sri was hiding, and now it was threatening her family.

title: Sang Pemimpi
storyline: This movie is an adaptation from a popular novel by the same title, and sequel to Laskar Pelangi. It portrays two village boys with a dream of traveling to Paris, to study at Sorbonne University.

title: Pencarian Terakhir
storyline: After the disappearance of Sita, his wife, on Mount Sarangan on the 10th birthday of Drupadi, his daughter, Tito's attitude becomes cold and makes Drupadi sad. Her boyfriend, Raka, and her best friends Maya, Ucok, Jamal, Nurul, and her parents' friends Bagus and Oji, as well as Gancar, her uncle, are Drupadi's encouragement. All is not enough. On her 17th birthday Drupadi goes to Mount Sarangan to look for her mother.

title: Bulan Terbelah di Langit Amerika 2
storyline: When Hanum (Acha Septriasa) and Rangga (Abimana Aryasatya) decided to return to Vienna after finishing their work, Hanum's boss gave them a new mission which only they could accomplish: to find a mysterious treasure left behind by a group of Chinese Muslim sailors who had set their sail toward the American continent long before Columbus arrived. Because of that, Hanum and Rangga have to fly from New York to San Francisco. Hanum then asks Azima Hussein (Rianti Cartwright) to help them out, because Azima has a source to find the necessary evidence. However, they do not realize that other treasure hunters are going after the same reward and that danger is never too far away. Yet, on the other hand, Azima and her daughter, Sarah Hussein (Hailey Franco) are still dealing with her mother's (Ira Wibowo) rejection toward her decision to become a Muslim. She does not realize there's a secret in each fragment of life. Meanwhile, Stefan (Nino Fernandez) who's dealing with a broken heart after his relationship with a pregnant Jasmine (Hannah Al Rashid) deteriorated also finds himself stuck between two difficult options. The journey toward the light has broken them apart, until they discover the meaning of their journey in the form of God's miracles. In theaters December 2016

title: Kembang Api
storyline: 4 people intend to commit suicide together by blowing themselves up using a large ball of fireworks.

title: Suzzanna: Malam jumat kliwon
storyline: This film's story is set in the 1980s and revolves around a couple named Suzzanna (Luna Maya) and Surya (Achmad Megantara). They have been in a long-standing relationship and deeply love each other. Their relationship takes a new turn when they plan to get married. However, their plans are hindered by a significant problem: Suzzanna's parents are burdened with a large debt. This debt is owed to Raden Aryo (Tio Pakusadewo), the wealthiest landlord in the village. Suzzanna's parents do not have enough money and seek an alternative way to repay the debt. Raden Aryo then proposes a condition to consider the debt paid off - he wants Suzzanna to marry him and become his second wife. With no other choice, they comply with Raden Aryo's demand. As a consequence of the forced marriage, Suzzanna's relationship with Surya falls apart. Shortly after the marriage, Suzzanna becomes pregnant with Raden Aryo's first child. This triggers jealousy in Minati (Sally Marcellina), Raden Aryo's first wife, who is unable to conceive. Minati eventually seeks the help of a powerful witch to curse Suzzanna, who is heavily pregnant at the time. The curse is successful, leading to Suzzanna's death while carrying the baby, precisely on the night of "Jumat Kliwon." However, Suzzanna's death does not mean she completely disappears. She returns in the form of "sundel bolong," a female ghost with long hair and a white dress with a hole in the back. As a vengeful spirit, she seeks retribution against those who committed sins in her past, especially the perpetrator of the curse that resulted in her and her unborn baby's death.

title: Tersanjung: The Movie
storyline: Yura (Clara Bernadeth), a poor girl who lives with adoptive parents, is lulled by hopes for life. She faces the complicated love triangle between Oka (Kevin Ardilio) and Christian (Giorgino Abraham). The story of dreams, romance, and emotions raging together. —MVP

title: Laura
storyline: Laura Anna and her struggle to survive after having an accident with her lover. If in real life Laura Anna's lover is known to be named Gaga, then in the film version Laura's boyfriend's name is changed to Jojo. Laura's happy and cheerful life as a teenager who was popular on social media suddenly changed drastically due to the accident. Sadly, Laura was the only one who had to bear the fatal consequences of the accident. Because Laura had a spinal injury that left her paralyzed for the rest of her life. Meanwhile, Jojo only suffered minor injuries that were not life-threatening. Laura also had to get used to living lying down. However, Laura Anna, accompanied by her family and friends, remains enthusiastic about recovering. Jojo himself was still with Laura during her illness even though various conflicts eventually started to occur and caused their relationship to fail.

title: Anak Garuda
storyline: Koh Jul (Kiki Narendra), the founder of the Good Morning Indonesia school for poor orphans, invites seven children with different backgrounds (ethnic, religious and racial)-Sheren (Rania Putrisari), Olfa (Clairine Clay), Wayan (Geraldy Kreckhoff), Dilla (Rebecca Klopper), Sayyida (Tissa Biani), Yohana (Violla Georgie), and Robet (Ajil Ditto)-to become a team. But uniting them is not a simple matter. Quarrels and uproar over and over, ranging from misunderstanding to envy. Not to mention the emergence of Rocky (Krisjiana Baharudin) which makes their relationship heats up.The jealousy that arises because of the hidden love between them. The only person who can glue them together is the figure of Koh Jul who has to bang the hardest reality on them. He releases the seven children left for Europe without his company. In Europe, everything that is feared comes true. Quarrels and riots explode.

title: 40 Hari Bangkitnya Pocong
storyline: Jessi is haunted by a strange shadow. Her cousin thinks she's stressed since her break up with Nino. She meets Kevin who makes her feel safe, but the terror worsens.

title: The Other Side
storyline: Alea decides to move to Bandung, because she wants to forget her ex Reynand who is having an affair with her best friend. Alea goes to Gempita High School. Alea also decides to join the student council. On the first day of student council acceptance, Alea, who is late in rushing to the meeting room, bumps into Revo. Alea sees Revo's figure is similar to Reynand, her ex. Alea and Revo get closer when she help Revo persuade his mother, Cecil, who is suffering from dissociative amnesia. Their closeness is interrupted when Reynand comes to meet Alea and asks Alea back. And also when a woman appears: Reva, Revo's lover who has just returns to Bandung. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Slank Nggak Ada Matinya
storyline: Abdee (Deva Mahenra) and Ridho (Ajun Perwira) were called by SLANK, a rock band, to come jamming with Bimbim (Adipati Dolken) and Ivan (Aaron Shahab). As it turned out, SLANK wanted to prove that SLANK did not disperse even though the personnel were only the remaining Bimbim, Kaka and Ivan went on tour. Abdee and Ridho were also invited, and given the requirements to be able to perform 35 SLANK songs in just 3 days. The tour around the area began, and that's when the adventure of SLANK began with a new format. —iflix

title: Tabu: Mengusik Gerbang Iblis
storyline: When six best high school buddies are cross the forbidden forest and broken all the rules in there, something evil follow their back and causing death among themselves.

title: My Stupid Boss
storyline: My Stupid Boss recounts the story of an absurd boss and his employees. Bossman (Reza Rahadian) is an Indonesian who owns a company in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia: a large but disorganized company. The culprit for the disarray in the organization is the bossman himself. His first principle of management is that "Bossman Is Always Right"--which means whatever the Bossman fancies, he'll get it done. And that is his following principle: "Impossible We Do Miracle We Try". In the midst of this is Diana, the Bossman's secretary, who at every turn must juggle odds that never seem to add up in the company. Confronted daily with her boss' antics, Diana's patience and good sense are tested constantly.

title: Susah Sinyal
storyline: Ellen (Adinia Wirasti), a successful lawyer, is a single mom who rarely spends time for her only child Kiara (Aurora Ribero), who eventually grows as a rebellious teenager who has more to vent her emotions on social media. They live with Agatha (Niniek L. Karim), Ellen's mother who is very fond of Kiara. When Agatha died of a heart attack, Kiara who since childhood very close to Omanya immediately shaken. To entertain Kiara, Ellen invites away on vacation so that they can both spend quality time to treat the times in which Ellen is too busy working. They finally went to Sumba, and Kiara went home with carefree heart. In Jakarta, Ellen immediately greeted a big problem in the office. The big project he's working with Iwan (Ernest Prakasa) is in danger of falling apart. Finally because busy, Ellen did not keep his promise to watch Kiara appear in audition talent search event on television that Kiara prepared for a long time. Kiara was angry and went to Sumba alone, where the last time he could feel a glimmer of happiness. Will Kiara be able to trust her mother again? Is Ellen able to knit back this little family? Watch the SILY SIGNAL, showing in theaters starting December 21st.

title: Dejavu: Ajian Puter Giling
storyline: "Mirna" A young nurse, takes a job in a spooky house to help a disabled woman called "Sofia" In the house she has to deal with Sophia's strange husband and a constant feeling of deja vu.

title: Iblis Dalam Kandungan 2: Deception
storyline: After losing her husband, Ferdi, Amelia decides to return to their old house with her two adopted children, Alani and Vito. Their lives slowly start to return to normal, especially as Amelia's pregnancy approaches its due date. However, this peace is disturbed when Doctor Imam suggests that Amelia be hospitalized to reduce the risk during childbirth. For the safety of herself and her baby, Amelia follows the advice, even though she has to move to a new hospital. Unfortunately, the hope of safety turns into a nightmare when Amelia realizes there is a conspiracy between Doctor Imam and the hospital. Terror after terror lurks, forcing Alani, Vito, and Bara, Alani's senior, to be involved in a life-and-death struggle to save Amelia and the baby she is carrying. In this struggle, they are faced with a dark truth that threatens their lives and reveals a big secret behind the evil power that lurks.

title: Mama
storyline: Wahyu takes Dinda away from the city on Rizal's advice for their safety. This decision was made after the fact was revealed that the mastermind behind the hit-and-run accident that claimed the life of his wife, Mira, was Bahar, a cold-blooded thug leader. In a house far from the hustle and bustle of the city, Dinda and Wahyu continue their lives while enduring their grief. In Dinda's longing for her late mother, a woman appears who can slowly cure her longing for her mother. He calls her: Mama.

title: Father & Son
storyline: An unpopular teenager meets his father who has become a spirit after his death. His father guides him in finding love and rising against the bullies at school.

title: Jalan yang Jauh, Jangan Lupa Pulang
storyline: In London, Aurora finds a soul mate with the same vision as hers, Jem, an up-and-coming artist who is also a senior on campus and an immigrant from Indonesia. Aurora's life is perfect and full of passion until she finds another side of Jem, who makes Aurora give up college and leave her dream. During her difficult time, Aurora is assisted by her two best friends: Honey and Kit, to live together in their apartment. Aurora's preoccupation with surviving and trying to return to her studies by working odd jobs causes her to lose contact with her family. Two months without news make Angkasa and Awan follow Aurora to London. Surprised by Aurora's messy condition, Angkasa and Awan agree to force Aurora to come home.

title: Dua Hati Biru
storyline: Dara got the opportunity to continue her education in South Korea. In the midst of her happiness in achieving her dream, Dara must be faced with the bitter reality of being separated from Bima and her son, Adam. The two of them also underwent a long distance marriage after getting married and giving birth to children who were conceived before they legally became husband and wife. Bima, who now had to look after Adam without his wife, looked happy, until one day a question came out of Adam's son's mouth.

title: Lily Bunga Terakhirku
storyline: As a child, Tura, witnessed thieves to rape and kill his mother. After he buried her mother in the back garden of his home, he takes care of himself until adulthood and became a florist like his mother was. Feeling guilty for not being able to help his mother when he was a kid, Tura become a hunter rapists. When Tura falls in love with Lily, a high class prostitute, will he be able to retain he seek of revenge against Lily's powerful clients? —PL

title: Identitas
storyline: Adam, the mortuary officer in a hospital ask to himself about the idea of "identity" of a person, due to his own unknown past and his own lack of an identity. So he only feels alive when he is among with the dead people. Someday, Adam eventually falls in love with a woman without a name. Through her, he is able to find his true self, and this will leads him to fight for the woman's right to live. —Rifqi Aska

title: Tumbal Kanjeng Iblis
storyline: Two years without receiving news from her older brother who is studying at another city, Tia receives constant promptings to find her older brother or her father, Yusuf, will die. Armed with a photo, Tia's search leads her to a mysterious boarding house near her brother's campus. Welcomed by the couple who own the boarding house, Rosa and Jefri, Tia suspects that something is wrong with Rosa's excessive friendliness. Not to mention the presence of a mysterious young man named Nathan who keeps warning her to leave the boarding house immediately. Inside the boarding house, strange events occur in succession. The deeper Tia searches for her brother, the greater the terror she faces. Behind it all is a curse and a cult that targets Tia.

title: Srimulat: Hidup Memang Komedi
storyline: Starting from an offer to become a national star, the Srimulat comedy group went to the capital. One of the obstacles they have to face is the language barrier. In their daily lives, they often use Javanese to communicate. However, after landing in the capital, they had to face a situation that required them to speak Indonesian. Apart from facing various challenges of life in the capital, conditions are increasingly complicated by the love problems between Gepeng and Royani. Apart from that, Tessy, who experienced an identity crisis, had to stop her career because she was caught in a case and went to prison.

title: Rumah Kaliurang
storyline: Bram, Rani, Kinan, Aji, and Anom realize their vacation plans. On the way, they accidentally bump into something. Surprisingly, when they checked, they didn't hit anything. During the interruption, Kinan suddenly wants to pee and asks her boyfriend, Bram, to accompany her. Because she could not stand it, the two of them went into the forest and stopped at a big house in Kaliurang. The other three follow and wait at the mysterious house. All of them are trapped in the terror of Kaliurang House.

title: Para Perasuk
storyline: Bayu aspires to be a shaman for trance parties. He later becomes key to solving a crisis over impending eviction in his area.

title: Modal Nekad
storyline: Three brothers, Saipul, Jamal and Marwan were forced to get along again to pay off their father's hospital bill. With their determination, they decided to steal a TV from an empty house. Until suddenly the owner of the house who turned out to be a mafia boss came home. Panic peaked, now they were not only the perpetrators of the theft, but also witnesses to a shocking event!.

title: Dua Alam: Moseleum Van Motman
storyline: Exploring the Moseleum van Motman with an indigo child, Mars and a journalist who likes to investigate the occult and mystical, Bobby.

title: Perfect Strangers
storyline: Seven friends who attend a dinner and decide to play a game with their cell phones which culminate in disaster when their dark secret is revealed.

title: Aruna & Lidahnya
storyline: An epidemiologist tried to satisfy her obsession with food when she was assigned to investigate a bird flu case.

title: Sule, Ay Need You
storyline: Sule's father, a farmer whose not that rich, has fallen into poverty because of the failure to become "Lurah", and become crazy. So Sule had to go to Jakarta asking help to uncle Salim, the brother of his mother who supposedly rich. Instead of getting help, he was being chased and arrested by police because he was suspected of being a police fugitive. —Mwd

title: Tali mati
storyline: Hari and her sister return to the village where they were born after the death of their mother, a practitioner of black magic. But the inexplicable suicides of several villagers cause the hostility towards the two to explode.

title: Rumah Dinas Bapak
storyline: Dodit, Mother, Mbak Lis, and Mas Dewo had to accompany Father to move to his new official residence in the middle of a teak forest. There, there is a prison which is said to be used to punish blandong (wood thieves). Strangely, every Friday night in Kliwon terrible things happen. Dodit, Mother, Mbak Lis, and Mas Dewo were all terrorized. Including two of Father's subordinates, Sugeng and Kasno.

title: Surat dari Kematian
storyline: Failing to prove the urban legend of Mbak Rohanna's ghost at Virgin Bridge, Yogyakarta means that Zein (Endi Arfian) must propose other haunted places to Kinan (Carrisa Perruset) to make content on their YouTube channel. Pasha (Omara Esteghlal), a student from their college, carries out a gruesome action in the middle of the city of Yogyakarta and claims to get a letter from Death that threatens that if Pasha doesn't do what the letter orders, Death will pick him up. From that letter, Kinan and Zein investigate Gama Plaza, an old building that former college student Darius (Jerome Kurnia) used as a suicide site years before. When they begin the investigation, the next letter arrives to another college student; this time it takes a life. Kinan believes that this is a premeditated murder, but Zein argues that everything that happens is related to the spirit of Darius. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Spirit Doll
storyline: After recovering from the mental pressure after the divorce caused by Darius's extramarital affair plus the accident that took the life of his daughter, Embun, Dara Blue, an actress known as the queen of horror, returns to the entertainment stage, through her latest film 'Puppet Spirits'. One day, the doll used in the Spirit Puppet Movie appears in front of Dara's house. Even though at first it seemed odd, Dara felt Embun's figure through the doll. Dara treats the doll as her own child, as do those who take care of the "spirit doll". Along with that, terror after terror haunted the people who tried to awaken Dara from her 'insanity'.

title: Badai di Ujung Negeri
storyline: Very good film . i love it

title: Kutukan Suster Ngesot
storyline: A bus that carried Cheersleader after competing experienced the accident and entered the chasm. The bus was stopped in the middle of the muddy and slow old cemetery land but must swallow the bus body inside. Derry (Randy Pangalila), the team's assistant coach of basketball suggested to leave the bus and looked for help. But Shanti (Celine Evangelista), insisted on waiting for help to come than must run in the cemetery. The party was broken into two, and Derry decided to leave the bus. Gina, Shanty, Raya and Tya continued to live in the bus. Derry and the friend of the running friend opposed hisapan mud headed kesebuah the old building that evidently a Hospital that already did not operate. In the hopeless condition, they looked for everything that could be used to ask for help. When they dispersed, began terrorism attacked one by one, Derry and Lina found a containing diary the secret from destruction of the hospital. They realised that they were indeed facing the ghost Sister NGESOT was curious and the only way out was them must be faced with Sister Ngesot. —Cinemageddon

title: Jagal Teluh
storyline: The story revolves around an ugly woman who is ostracized in her community. In her pursuit of beauty, she eventually engages in a ritual that requires her to seek the corpse of a long-haired woman. After succeeding, her revenge plot unfolds.

title: Sampai Titik Terakhirmu
storyline: A touching love story and struggle between the late Shella Selpi Lizah and her husband, Albi Dwizky. Shella has to fight against ovarian cancer that she has suffered from since 2021. On the other hand, her lover, Albi Dwizky, has always been faithfully by her side and taking care of her. Albi's sincerity and patience in supporting his lover have never diminished one bit. He did not even hesitate to marry Shella.

title: Emak Ingin Naik Haji
storyline: Emak, an elderly woman who is patient, sincere, and full of kindness, really wants to make the pilgrimage to Mecca. Unfortunately, she does not have enough money to realize her dream, while her daily life depends only on the sale of cakes.

title: Moammar Emka's Jakarta Undercover
storyline: Pras (Oka Antara) wants to realize his dreams of having a significant life and career as a journalist, but Jakarta changes everything.

title: Laskar Pelangi
storyline: In the 1970s, a group of 10 students struggles with poverty and develop hopes for the future in Gantong Village on the farming and tin mining island of Belitung off the east coast of Sumatra.

title: Srimulat: Hil yang Mustahal - Babak Pertama
storyline: The comedy group Srimulat, which is popular in Java, is suddenly disturbed by the appearance of a more amusing drum player named Gepeng. A telegram from the capital comes: inviting Srimulat to appear on national tv. Srimulat leader, Teguh fulfills the invitation. Asmuni is assigned the task of leading Srimulat to the capital. Teguh invites Gepeng to join Srimulat. In the capital, Gepeng must be able to unite with Srimulat, which consists of Asmuni, Timbul, Tarsan, Tessy, Paul, Basuki, Nunung, Anna, and Djudjuk. In their efforts to merge into the Srimulat family, Gepeng and Basuki meet Royani, the daughter of Babe Makmur, the owner of the rented house by Srimulat. When Gepeng's focus is disturbed because of Royani's presence, Srimulat receives a request to make a special appearance in front of the President and First Lady.

title: Will
storyline: A man who was in a broken household fell and broke his bone in the middle of the forest. Unable to move, without food and drink, Andra had to rack his brain and heart to survive.

title: Ibu
storyline: When her children rarely come home, lonely Siti chooses to take care of a psycho-neurotic pregnant girl. However, Siti's choice is against her children who are worried about their mother's health.

title: Ziarah
storyline: Madam Sri is on the search for the grave of her husband who disappeared during the Indonesian National Revolution. Along the way, her grandson looks for her through various conversations with other villagers he encounters. Stories and accounts of the displaced bleed into one another, offering differing pieces of the same past on which the very land they are traversing was built on.

title: Keramat 2: Caruban Larang
storyline: A group of young people goes to Cirebon for various purposes. Arla, Jojo, and Maura want to do research on their final project with the help of Umay, who is making a documentary. Ajil and Keanu are mystical YouTubers creating content to maintain their existence. Their journey becomes wild and uncontrollable after meeting with Ute, an indigo with a secret agenda.

title: Hotel Sakura
storyline: Sarah, who lived in the dark shadows of her past, could never forget the tragedy when she was in middle school: her mother was killed in a motorcycle accident. Guilt continues to haunt every step of Sarah and make him trapped in endless regret. Hoping to redeem his sin, Sarah repeatedly tried to find ways to communicate with the spirit of the mother, but always ended in vain. One day, a mysterious man who also studied at the same campus, offered a secret method that was said to be able to bring Sarah with his mother in other realms. Without hesitation, Sarah followed the instructions. Since then his life turned into a nightmare. The supernatural terror begins to haunt his days and bring Sarah into the vortex of mystery that is much darker and dangerous than whatever he had imagined before.

title: La tahzan
storyline: During her study in Japan, Viona (Atiqah Hasiholan) falls in love with a Japanese photographer but their relationship is ruined when her long lost crush reenters her life.

title: Pocong the Origin
storyline: Ananta, a cold-blooded killer has been executed by the State. Sasthi, his only daughter, has to deliver her father's body to be buried in his hometown. Accompanied by Yama, the prison guard, the two race with time to reach the village of Ananta. This becomes increasingly difficult because various magical disturbances block them along the way. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Norma: Antara Mertua dan Menantu
storyline: The quiet and shy Norma feels lucky to be married to her first love: Irfan. Their married life is happy, Irfan showers Norma with love. Irfan is even devoted to Norma's parents: Abdul and Rina. Who would have thought, behind Irfan's perfect facade, he was actually having an affair. Norma's heart is broken, her extended family is also devastated when they find out that Irfan is actually having an affair with Rina, Norma's own mother. Norma is heartbroken, looking for answers as to why all this happened to her.

title: Kutukan Calon Arang
storyline: Five friends try to escape from the shadows of their past sins, hoping to start a new chapter in a rural house. However, the new life they dream of is threatened by evil mystical forces lurking, forcing them to face unimaginable fears.

title: Pesantren Impian
storyline: Ten girls get a mysterious invitation to stay in Pesantren Impian (Dream Islamic Boarding School). The secluded school was built by Gus Budiman to provide a second chance for those who have a dark past. Sissy, a model, came with her friend, Inong, who keeps their own problems; Butet has drugs problem; Sri comes with a prostitution scandal; and Rini who is looked innocent, gets pregnant out of wedlock. There are also other names with their own problems, including Eni, a young policewoman, intelligent and ambitious, who is investigating the murder case at the Crystal Hotel and gets clues that the suspects are in Pesantren Impian. It is not easy to melt the stiffness among the female students who do not know each other, because of their past and various bad habits. School supervisor, Ustadz Agam and Ustadzah Hanum, and Umar, a handsome mysterious figure that is close to Gus Budiman, keep encouraging them. Slowly, they proceed to get to know Islam better. The school gradually feels like a second home that offers a cool oasis which they never found. Until one day when the schools is attacked. Death after strange death begin to occur. The pupils are frightened. Umar, Eni, Inong and the other girls are striving to defeat the horrible terrors that befall on the dream school.

title: The Tarix Jabrix
storyline: Starting from the desire of Cacing, an energetic natural born leader, wants to become a member of The Road Devil, the most brutal and feared Motorcycle Gang in the City of Bandung. But he always fails when undergoing tests or exams.

title: Setan Alas!
storyline: 5 typical college students spend their weekend in a typical old villa only to find that they have to survive in a battle of wits against an absolute all-mighty all-powerful terror that is seemingly undefeated. Fight for your fate!.

title: Assalamualaikum Calon Imam
storyline: Childhood trauma due to being left by her father makes it hard for Nafisya(Natasha Rizki) to believe in men. But since childhood, she has a feeling for Jidan (Andi Arsyil), her old neighbor. She always hoped for Jidan's proposal. But Jidan instead proposes Salsya (Merdi Octav), Nafisya's sister, who is a doctor. Nafisya is heartbroken but doesn't want to say anything. Nafisya knew that it was impossible to hurt her sister. Accidentally Nafisya met Alif (Miller Khan) in an accident. Nafisya tried to save a little girl who was a victim, but it was Alif who turned out to be a doctor trying to take over Nafisya 's good intentions. Without her knowing, Alif is brought Nafisya 's cell phone. Inevitably their meeting could not be avoided. Especially when she found out that Alif suddenly became one of the substitute lecturers on his campus. Image of Alif as a doctor with a cold and firm character always overshadows Nafisya and it makes her upset. Not infrequently, Alif often makes Nafisya ashamed in front of her friends. Encounter many times accidentally turns out to make Alif fall in love with Nafisya. However, he kept his feelings deep because he knew Nafisya still loved Jidan. Until one day when Nafisya 's father was seriously ill, her father told Nafisya that Alif had come to propose to Nafisya. Nafisya is in dilemma. Does she have to accept Alif for the sake of her father's happiness or still maintain her feelings of love for Jidan whom she has always loved?

title: Panggonan Wingit 2: Miss K
storyline: After her mother died, Alma and her sister, Mia moved from Jakarta to Surabaya because Alma got a job as a manager at the Sasmaya Apartment. Strangely, the 6th floor of the apartment was closed. But because there was an urgent matter, Alma and Mia were forced to enter the floor and enter unit number 610. They saw the figure of a woman and a mysterious little girl there who said, "Papat dina, maghrib ..." Since then Alma and Mia began to experience terrible terror. It turned out that unit 610 was a haunted place. Anyone who opened it would die within four days at maghrib time.

title: Hati Suhita
storyline: The story of Alina Suhita. She is a strong, mature, and never-give-up woman. Her resilience guides her through the storms of her marital life, which began on the very first night. The struggles of her inner self are tested as she reaches out for the love of her own husband, Gus Birru.

title: 2nd Miracle in Cell No. 7
storyline: Until two years later, Kartika a child of a disability who still does not know the news of her father being sentenced to death. As the Head of the Prison that houses Kartika, Hendro and Linda still want to keep the news from her as the child of Father Dodo who met a tragic fate. Likewise with her cell mates who also still keep the fact tightly closed and act normally when Kartika is still smuggled into the cell to visit her father. However, the conflict began when the Head of the Prison, Hendro planned to adopt Kartika as his child. This effort was about to be thwarted by the Head of the local Social Service which made all the inmates in cell No. 7 including Hendro demand justice. So what is the reason behind the Head of the Social Service wanting to thwart Hendro's plan? And what will be Kartika's fate in the future after knowing the facts?.

title: Kutukan Sembilan Setan
storyline: Five friends named Verdy, Sarah, Devon, Miko and Lia who often vacation together. After almost a year of always failing on vacation, they decided to visit Mount Bromo. The five of them decided to rent a villa located at the foot of Mount Bromo. Devon, who was in charge of looking for a villa, finally found a colonial style villa at a very low price. Although there was debate about the condition of the villa which was considered too ancient and spooky. Finally Verdy and his friends decided to stay in the villa for five days on vacation in Bromo. And finally they were haunted by fear while living there.

title: Kampung Keramat
storyline: Erlan Mario and Widi Kania decided to return to their grandfather's village after Maya suffered a fatal accident that left her paralyzed and frequently experiencing magical occurrences. Jabo came to pick up his three grandchildren along with Ruth to take them back to the village for Maya's healing. Jabo believed that Maya's illness was not an ordinary one, but a mystical disease that could only be cured by a shaman in a deserted village called Kampung Bekandang. Maya's healing by the shaman, however, brought about disaster and terror, threatening the lives of their family.

title: Surat Cinta Untuk Starla the Movie
storyline: Hema guy who is obsessed with his love for nature has the uniqueness of making a love letter for nature. Assisted by his old typewriter's legacy of his former journalist grandfather, Hema creates a mural showing how much Hema's love for nature is. Nature is the only love that Hema knows. Until one day Hema knew Starla. A beautiful and self-contained girl who has managed to make him fall in love only in six hours. For the first time, Hema realized there was a love letter that was more beautiful than a love letter for nature that was a love letter for Starla. But as Hema and Starla get closer, suddenly Starla's attitude changes. Starla angry and away from Hema even told Hema to forget the 6 hours of their story that became viral in social media even broadcast on the radio by Athena, a friend of Hema. Until one day Hema just found out the cause of Starla's change of attitude associated with a secret past the Hema family. How does Hema and Starla's relationship continue? How is Starla Continuing with Bimo's Fiance? —Farhan Azhari Anwar

title: The Sacred Riana 2: Bloody Mary
storyline: Riana, who has been in a slump since losing Riani, gets news that the doll is now in an Elodia female dormitory. Riana asks her parents to move schools to Elodia. Riana's request is immediately fulfilled by her parents, who hope that Riana can return to being as vibrant as before. However, Elodia's dormitory turns out to be very strict about the behavior of its students. They even put 100 mirrors in all the dormitory halls so that students who want to do bad things immediately cancel their intentions because they are embarrassed when they see themselves. The strictness of the rules creates pressure and a group of schoolgirls who enjoy playing a strange game using mirrors: the ritual of summoning the bloody mary with the new girls. The game, originally just a way to scare new students, turns into a disaster when a spirit appears trying to harm the students. Riani doll is considered to be the mastermind behind this disaster. Riana is trapped in a dilemma between bringing back the Riani doll or finding answers to the various terrors accused of the Riani doll.

title: Jangan Sendirian
storyline: 4 (four) characters take turns experiencing scary events when they are alone. The terror of these spirits that spread fear, panic, and hysteria just came unexpectedly.

title: Sosok Ketiga
storyline: Finally, Anton fell in love and married Yuni, who was also his wife's friend, Nuri. Even though Yuni and Nuri had promised not to pursue each other's partners, Nuri decided to let go because she had experienced multiple miscarriages. In the end, Nuri felt disappointed because Anton did not fulfill his promise to be fair. Yuni started experiencing supernatural terror during her pregnancy, which made her fall ill and led to conflicts with Bude. This situation led Yuni to choose Nuri to take care of her while Anton was away. What will happen when the first and second wives are under the same roof? Yuni's mother realized the danger that could befall her child and future grandchildren, but it was too late. Will the supernatural terror against Yuni end or escalate further?

title: Jin & Jun
storyline: Jun, a teenage boy who is bullied by his school friends in an abandoned room. Jun experienced harsh and cruel treatment. When Jun explored the room, he found a clay jar that sparked his curiosity. Unexpectedly, after the urn was opened, thick black smoke appeared, followed by the appearance of a mysterious figure that surprised Jun. This event is the starting point of Jun's life journey which is full of mystery.

title: Perewangan
storyline: Terrors and strange events haunt the lives of Maya and her family. Maya suspects that her uncles and aunty are behind it, as they always after Maya's family's only assets, the house and land belongs to Sudarsih (Maya's mother) which they got from their grandfather. But there is a greater evil force. The manifestation of human greed, a creature that helps achieve glory and fame at the cost of the life that we love. Now, this evil is targeting Maya's entire family.

title: Tali Pocong Perawan
storyline: A jealous young man tries to steal his brother's girlfriend using the power of an ancient myth.

title: Tegar
storyline: Tegar, a child with a disability, wants to be like normal children: make friends and go to school. On his 10th birthday, Tegar shares his dream with his grandfather. Grandpa's decision to make Tegar's dream come true puts him and Wida, Tegar's mother, at odds. Tegar decides to leave home to pursue his dream.

title: Single 2
storyline: Ebi is going towards 30 years old and still single. Towards the age of 30 years without ever dating. Towards 30 years old and still alone. Now, Ebi is determined that before his 30th birthday he must release his single status. He must have a girlfriend. Even though Ebi doesn't know how to do it at all. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Monisme
storyline: Volcano Merapi. In the shadows of recent eruptions, actors play a story that is written together with a volcanologist, sand miner, and a mystic-people who have a close bond with the mountain illustrating fiction and non fiction stories.

title: Coboy Junior: The Movie
storyline: It's a story of Coboy Junior's (Bastian, Iqbal, Aldi, Kiki) struggle to participate in the biggest singing and dancing competition in Indonesia. The competition is not only the arena to prove oneself as the best but also a crucial process of a coming of age, character-building, and priority-learning for each of the member's lives. Bastian has to be a figure who strengthens ties among his friends. His dancing skill is an important point. Iqbal has to learn to determine priorities when his father questions his activities. Aldi has to divide his focus between his relationship with Lovely and Coboy Junior's team spirit. Kiki, meanwhile, has to produce suggestions to advance their group, including when a disaster emerges and threatens his band's participation in the competition. Their biggest rivals, Superboyz and The Bangs, remain determined to undermine them in every way. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Habibie & Ainun
storyline: This movie is based on the memoir written by the 3rd President of Indonesia and one of the world-famous engineer, B.J. Habibie about his wife, Hasri Ainun Habibie.

title: Kembalinya Anak Iblis
storyline: Rama, Garin, Farel, Quincy, and Celsi survive from the spirit terror at the Ayunan Island resort which harbored a terrible history of the slaughter of a family and resort employees. Rama is frantic: her lover is in a mental hospital, the bodies of Hana, his sister, and Fira have not been found. Rama returns to Ayunan Island to look for them. But obstacles lie ahead. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dia Bukan Ibu
storyline: Two years after her parents' divorce, Vira lives with her mother and younger brother, Dino. Yanti, her mother, who was once devastated by her husband's departure, has now changed drastically and become more cheerful, beautiful, successful, and able to buy a new house and open a salon that is always busy even though the location is not strategic. But behind that success, Vira begins to witness strange things: her mother injures customers, to the point of daring to attack Dino and the next day will behave as if nothing happened. Vira decides to find out what really happened to her mother, and is her mother still her mother inside?

title: The Doll 3
storyline: After an accident that killed both of Tara's parents, Tara now only has a younger brother named Gian as a member of her family. However, the accident traumatized Gian, so Gian choose to end his life. Tara, who works at a toy shop, decide to ask a shaman to summons Gian's spirit using Bobby, a doll which she sell in her toy shop, for the place for Gian's spirit.

title: Sunshine Becomes You
storyline: Ballerina girl who accidentally make a pianist fall from the stair, then the pianist guy asked her to take responsibility by being his maid until he fully recovered.

title: Romeo Juliet
storyline: The film about a love story between Rangga, loyal supporter of Persija soccer club with Desi, Persib supporters. Rangga willing to do anything to get love Desi, even eloped to another city that is not related to Persija and Persib.

title: Filosofi Kopi
storyline: A coffee shop struggling to pay their debts, while at the same time maintaining their principles.

title: Tuyul: Part 1
storyline: TUYUL (Toyol in English) tells a re imagine story about the Indonesian urban mythical spirit. Husband and Wife, Daniel (Gandhi Fernando) and Mia (Dinda Kanya Dewi) moves to an old house given by Mia's mother after she passed away. Daniel is the one that insists they move to her old house to saves up some money before the birth of their first born while he'll be working on his job at a tea plantation project. After cleaning up one of the rooms, Daniel finds a bottle hidden mysteriously underneath the broken wooden floor. The empty bottle might be a home to a scary creature that could potentially put Daniel, Mia, and their unborn child in danger. —Renee Pictures

title: Hayya 2: Dream, Hope and Reality
storyline: Traumatized by the conflict situation that occurred in Palestine made Hayya not want to be sent home and flee again so that she could live in Indonesia. While on the run, Hayya meets Lia, who thinks Hayya is her daughter. Lia asks Hayya to stay at her house and meet Faisal. Faisal considers Hayya the savior of his household life. Elsewhere, Rahmat, Adhin, and Ricis continue to search for Hayya. One by one, the veil of Faisal's family is opened until, at its peak, a tragedy occurs to Hayya. The situation becomes complex and tense.

title: Rest Area
storyline: Five crazy rich people are stranded at a remote rest area during their nighttime journey. What was supposed to be a stopover turns into a nightmare when they are attacked by the Kresek Ghost, a wandering spirit with a face covered in black plastic, seeking revenge for past sins. One by one, they begin to lose control, terrorized relentlessly in every dark corner. The dark secrets they have been hiding are slowly revealed. What fatal mistake have they committed? And... can they survive the revenge that comes from beneath the ground?

title: Selesai
storyline: Ayu wants to leave her husband, Broto, because she is tired of being cheated on. Anya is the third person in this married couple's relationship. When the pandemic comes and everyone have to stay at home, Ayu's mother-in-law is at their house. In the midst of Ayu's efforts to separate from Broto, Ayu must be able to take care of her mother-in-law's feelings. They try to survive. Broto discovers new facts about his wife that have never been revealed. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pohon Terkenal
storyline: As a new cadet at the Police Academy, Semarang, Bara Maulana, Ayu Sekarwati and Johanes Solossa have to say goodbye to normal teenage lives. Their future is no longer their own. Who will survive and who will give up? Especially when love and heart are at stake. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Cinta di Saku Celana
storyline: A simple man who wants to have love receives mysterious postcards from all over the world and bringing him to a girl whom he later met often on the train every day.

title: Titus: Mystery of The Enygma
storyline: Titus (Arbani Yasiz) is a puzzle-loving mouse-detective who lives in the city of Steamburg. In his adventure as a detective, he is accompanied by a magician rabbit named Bobit (Lukman Sardi) and Fyra (Ranty Maria), the beautiful lizard who is also an amateur pilot and likes to adventure. They will jointly expose the crime that occurred in the city of Steamburg. One of their biggest enemies is a cat named Bulpan (Robby Purba). Starting as a pickpocket, Bulpan works hard to become a very skilled criminal.

title: Tenung
storyline: Ira lives with her mother, Linda. One day, without any rational explanation, a mystical incident causes Linda to behave like a madwoman-suffering physically and frequently hallucinating. Unable to cope with her mother's condition, Ira asks her siblings, Ara and Ari, to come home and help take care of their mother. Unfortunately, fate has other plans, and Linda eventually passes away. On the day of her funeral, Linda's corpse is jumped over by a black cat, and supernaturally, she comes back to life. In the early days of her second life, Linda seems like a completely different person-she becomes a loving mother to her three children. But sadly, this doesn't last long. Linda begins to terrorize her own children. Eventually, the cause of all these strange events is revealed: a curse was cast upon Linda, and it has allowed a demon to possess her-with the goal of wiping out her entire bloodline.

title: Perjalanan Pembuktian Cinta
storyline: Fathia, a devoted servant of a religious school and a memorizer of the holy scriptures, enters into a marriage under the coercion of her parents. She is married to Satya, a married man much older than her. However, her heart is attached to Raehan, an ordinary man who brings the sweetness of love into her life.

title: Pemukiman Setan
storyline: Under economic pressure, Alin pushes Ghani to join him with Fitrah and Zia to rob an antique house. Everything runs smoothly until they find a shackled woman, Sukma, in the basement. Having thoughts that she is an abused victim, they save her without knowing the aftermath. With the help of Urip, a paranormal trapped within, they know that Sukma was possessed by Mbah Sarap, a vengeful spirit. In a blink, the terror circle runs amok over a deadly curse in Sukma's bloodline, that can only be stopped by an ancient dagger hidden somewhere beyond the ultimate quest of the chosen one.

title: Adit Sopo Jarwo: The Movie
storyline: On the way to Jogjakarta, Adit was separated from his parents. His journey taught Adit the true meaning of friendship.

title: Kampung Jabang Mayit: Ritual Maut
storyline: Weda's (Ersya Aurelia) career , a rising young photo model, is nearly destroyed by a scandal involving her boyfriend, Bagas (Bukie B Mansyur). On the run, Bagas takes her to his hometown, Rangkaspuna Village-a remote place once used as a dumping ground for corpses, still steeped in dark mystical practices led by the shaman Ni Itoh (Atiqah Hasiholan) and her servant, Rini (Rachquel Nesia Gusty Gaza). What begins as an escape quickly turns into a nightmare. Weda becomes trapped in the grip of an ancient curse that demands blood sacrifice. She must choose: fight against a dark fate, or become part of an unavoidable death ritual.

title: Ipar Adalah Maut
storyline: Love is unpredictable. Nisa engages with Aris, a brilliant professor with a fascinating personality. Their marriage appears to be a picture-perfect fairytale, especially after the birth of their first child, Raya. However, just like love, problems also arise out of the blue. Nisa's mother entrusts her second daughter, Rani, to live with Aris and Nisa. Initially, Rani keeps her distance with Aris. It does not last long though, before the window to a forbidden relationship is opened. Behind Nisa's back, he develops an affair with his wife's sister.

title: Nightmare Side: Delusional
storyline: The story of a high school student in Bandung named Naya (Fay Nabila). She is known as an indigo child. In her new school, Naya meets Shelly who has the same ability like her. But Shelly conceal it and makes Naya curious to her. At the same time, Naya was curious by the Nightmare Side radio broadcast that she heard and always being a nightmare, as if its were real.

title: Kirun + Adul
storyline: When the daughter of the Vice President is kidnapped, Kirun (Ricky Harun) and Adul (Abdurrahman Arif), who live in Bali, are the prime suspects. In fact, it is Gita (Permata Sari Harahap), the Vice President's daughter, who actually takes advantage of the two friends because she is angry with her father. Kirun has a huge crush on Gita and doesn't mind being chased by the guards. Adul, as his friend, ends up also as a fugitive. The beautiful Bali Island is transformed by the hilarious scandal that rocks it. —VIU

title: Ratu Dansa
storyline: A girl's wish for a shooting star has brought her mother into the future, giving the two of them a chance to get to know each other and find answers about their futures.

title: Roh Fasik
storyline: Akbar loses his belief in religion and God after the death of Zahra, his wife, to the point that he even refuses to teach his religion's ways to their daughter Amira. He remarries, to a woman named Renata, but his new marriage isn't as happy as his first. One day, his old friend Hassan comes to visit and try to bring him back to the right way. He finally allows Hassan to teach Amira, but strange things begin to happen in their house. Oddly, Renata is often the target of the terror. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kuntilanak 2
storyline: Dinda who escapes the Kuntilanak (female vampire ghost) terror, without the agreement of Aunt Donna, intends to meet someone who is believed to be her biological mother, Karmila. Together with his younger siblings and accompanied by Julia and Edwin, they are trapped in a house in the middle of the forest. Many irregularities occur. Dinda again has to deal with Kuntilanak, but it was different from what she had defeated using spikes or spells. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Hangout
storyline: Nine people who were invited to a mysterious island tried to survive when someone began to murder them one by one.

title: Sleep Call
storyline: Dina, trapped in debt and compelled to work at an illegal loan company, seeks an escape from loneliness through 'sleep call' sessions with Rama, a charismatic stranger from a dating site. However, as their addictive relationship deepens, a series of inexplicable deaths haunt her, turning tranquility into a deadly obsession.

title: Hantu Jembatan Ancol
storyline:
NIKKO (BEN JOSHUA) 20 years old, handsome, last semester student, engages to a beautiful and smart woman, DONNA (NIA RAMADHANI), 19 years old. Nikko loves donna very much, and so does the other way around.

One day, Nikko meets a sexy woman, LIVI (NADILLA ERNESTA) , 19 years old, a waitress in a café. Since this meeting, Nikko feels different. So does Livi, until finally he cheats on Donna. Livi is so convinced that Nikko loves her. But her conviction is torn, when livi sees niko with Donna so in love to each other. Livi is so angry to nikko, but nikko manages to convince her that donna is a just a woman his parents have arranged for him. Dan Livi is the only woman he loves. Livi believes in him.

Time passes. Nikko and Livi is drown in their romance. Until Livi is pregnant and demands for Nikkos responsibility. Nikko denies it because he is not ready to accept that pregnancy and he also cant betray donna, his fiancé. Livi is so disappointed with that answer. They argue. Nikko cant control his emotion and he pushes livi to the wall, livis head hit the wall and dies. Nikko is panic. And then nikko throws her dead body under the Ancol bridge.

After what happens, Nikko suddenly feels haunted by livi. At first, the sound of Livis phone ringer that followed Nikko everywhere. And then short message in Nikkos phone that says Honey, this love belongs to us. Because this is the sentence that Livi often said when shes alive.

After those terrors, suddenly NISSA (MARSHA ARWAN), 10 years old, his only sister, often laughs by herself and does activities that as if shes doing it with someone invisible. Nikko often sees this strange things. Until finally, he reveals that Nissa has been playing with Livi ghost all this time. Even, one day Nissa tries to kill herself upon Livis incitement.

These terrors keep attacking Nikko. Until finally Livi ghost shows herself and terrorizes NIkko. Donna is so sad to see Nikkos changes who often looks scared and acts strange. When donna takes him to a psychiatry, nikko is angry at donna for thinking hes mad.

Nikko gets worse. Donna keeps insisting nikko to tell her the truth of whats happening. But nikko stays silent. Nikko only tells this story to JOJO (DENNIS ADISWARA), 22 years old, his best friend. Jojo is willing to help Nikko. But before he helps him, Livi ghost terrorizes him.

Nikko is completed down. So does donna. Donna cant handle it anymore, and then she returns the engagement ring to Nikko. Dona decides to go to her parents in Australia. When donna is about to go, Nikko comes and apologizes. Finally, Nikko tells her the truth about his affair and Livi who is dead now terrorizing him. Donna is shocked and so angry, they argue. Donna runs from Nikko and then gets hit by a car that puts her in comma.

In this comma condition, Livi ghost appears. Donna almost dies. Nikko cries. And then Donna finds her way back. She approaches Nikko and says Honey, this love belongs to us.

Nikko is shocked, because that sentence is Livis sentence. In that case, Livi has taken over Donnas body.

title: 12 Menit
storyline: This is a story about struggle. Struggle for self-defeating. For the sake of a very simple aspiration : to realize 12 minutes that they will remember forever. A marching band in Bontang is struggling to become a champion of a major event : the Grand Prix Marching Band. Repeatedly failed to become champion, a new coach named Rene eventually lead that Marching Band. Rene - a woman coach with strong character - forced them to practice very hard during 12 months after 12 minutes in Grand Prix Marching Band. Tara, Elaine, and Lahang are members of this Marching Band. Three different children. Three different backgrounds and characters. And also three different problems. Tara has a pretty traumatic past which keeps haunting her. Meanwhile, Elaine and Lahang have to face conflicts with their own fathers. Their conflicts increased just before leaving for Jakarta. All three have strong enough reasons to stop struggling and not going to GPMB. So what will Rene, Tara, Elaine, and Lahang do? Could they beat themselves? Could they realize the 12 minutes ? —Oka Aurora

title: Moonrise Over Egypt
storyline: In 1947, the Indonesian first diplomatic mission arrived in Cairo without passport, to gain recognition over Indonesian sovereignty. They were having series of tackles, which putting the fate of Egypt and Indonesia in the hands of traitor.

title: Cinta Subuh
storyline: Angga, a student who rarely prays on time, falls in love with Ratih, who is intelligent and religious. Angga's uniqueness, sincerity, cheerfulness, and demeanor make Ratih want to open her heart. Before meeting Angga, Ratih hopes to have a partner who can maintain his eyesight, be a good character, be intelligent, and maintain his obligations as a religious person. Ratih's hopes are gathered in Arya Satria Negara, who also has feelings for Ratih. The difference with Angga, Arya is obedient to every religious value and rule. Because of that, Arya does not approach Ratih carelessly. According to Arya, he could only be with Ratih through marriage. Fajr prayer on time was the only request Ratih makes to Angga that is never carried out properly, a request that eventually makes Ratih decide to end their relationship.

title: Labuan Hati
storyline: Bia, mother of one daughter, comes to Komodo for solitude. Her suitcase is full of clothes from upscale designers, as well as self development books that actually he had memorized by rote. He chose the island because of longing for an alternative world under the sea. Bia has not dive for a long time. Since giving birth to her child, she even stopped going to the sea. Indi, has a fiance who interpret that love is commitment. She has a couple of dives in Komodo. That sea which she chose as her final dive spot before marriage. Maria, a free diver from the coast of North Sulawesi, is working at a resort on the island Sebayur, as a tour guide for the last year. Since abandoned by his boyfriend two years ago, Maria always put the blame on her body. According to her, that's the reason why her boyfriend had an affair and left her. Labuan Bajo is the meeting place for Bia, Indi, and Maria. For seven days, six nights they live in the boat. Participate in their boats, a diving instructor named Mahesa. He participated in the board because Indi and Bia need assistance for diving. In a short time the relationship of the three women develops from friendship, camaraderie, until the cold war to become number one in the eyes of a Mahesa.

title: Mantan
storyline: Before getting marriage, ADI (Gandhi Fernando) travels to 5 different cities in Indonesia to get closure with his ex-girlfriends.

title: Qodrat 2
storyline: After the battle against Assuala, Qodrat continued his journey to find Azizah, his wife who was suffering from depression because she sold herself to Assuala to save Alif. After being treated in a mental hospital, Azizah had actually left and was working in a spinning factory that was in the middle of a series of mysterious deaths that occurred to its workers, due to a demonic ritual carried out by the factory owner for the sake of a black magic ritual. Knowing this, Qodrat tried to save Azizah by any means, especially when all this terror culminated in a mass possession attack where the devil was once again ready to attack, waiting for Qodrat to fall into their trap.

title: Love
storyline: In Jakarta, five couples of varying ages and backgrounds experience the different stages of romantic love, from its giddy start to its painful end.

title: Otomatis Romantis
storyline: A woman who has a successful career in a women's magazine office has an affinity for an innocent administrative employee. But, she was proud to express his feelings because of her authority as a boss.

title: Love for Sale
storyline: Richard Achmad (Gading Marten) is too long to live alone. People nickname him acute single. One day his hang out friends betting : "Two more weeks I'll get married, take your girlfriend or your pride at stake," As the elder in his group, Richard is challenged. He who always tells about his lovers and give advice to his friends, does not want to be embarrassed. All efforts are made: old female friends who are generally married or even forgotten, friend connections that may be available to be invited to accompany him, to the dating site which then bring himself with Arini Kusuma (Della Dartyan). Administrative mistakes made Richard forced to let Arini linger with him, for at least 45 days, the duration of the contract. Slowly the seeds of romance grow. Richard is impressed with Arini's understanding of him, in his hobby even on his appetite. He falls in love. Something that has not happened for the past 20 years. Richard propose to Arini to be forever with him. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Aku Ingin Ibu Pulang
storyline: An Indonesian drama following the life of a young marathon runner who just wants his mother to return and make their family whole again.

title: Ummi Aminah
storyline: Ummi Aminah (Nani Widjaja), an ustazah who has thousands of faithful worshipers. wherever he gives the sermon, the mosque is always packed full. In fact, he never asked for payment. Ummi Aminah is an favorite ustazah. Ummi is blessed with two children - Umar (Gatot Brajamusti) - has Risma (Yessy Gusman). Aisyah (Cahya Kamila), the second child of Ummi, a housewife who married Hasan (Budi Chaerul). From her second husband-Abah (Rasyid Karim) - Ummi has five children: Zarika (Paramitha Rusady), Zainal (Ali Zainal), Zubaidah (Genta Windi), Zidan (Ruben Onsu) and Ziah (Zee Zee Shahab). Zarika, a successful career woman who was anxious with her age. He does not have a mate yet. Zarika has a special relationship with his subordinates-Ivan (Temmy Rahadi) who already has a wife, Dewi (Elma Theana). In social networking, Zarika becomes a whimper, accused of being a conqueror's husband. Ummi asked Zarika to end their relationship. Zainal's wife, Rini (Revalina S. Temat) is pregnant with a second child. They still ride at Ummi's house. Zainal's work only brings Ummi to various places of his lectures. To supplement his income, Zainal tried to sell shoes at Ummi's lecture venues. Unfortunately for him, Zainal used his business friend as a drug courier. Zainal's capture was witnessed by Ummi congregation. News spreads, Ummi can only surrender when all the study places cancel invitation lecture. Not only the problems of Risma, Zarika and Zainal, Zidan's problems also make Ummi must be more trustworthy. Abah is still difficult to accept Zidan circumstances that are like women. While Zubaidah feels never paid attention Ummi. His education was low, Zubaidah felt Ummi not trusted as a famous ustazah assistant. Ummi family problems increasingly mounted when Abah deceived the business of buying and selling land rent.

title: Sayap-Sayap Patah 2: Olivia
storyline: A bomb explodes in a cafe, at the same time as Leong is released from prison. Sadikin orders Pandu to investigate Leong's trail. Pandu's time is increasingly taken up with Olivia, his daughter who needs the presence of a father after her mother died of illness. Luckily there is Suri, Olivia's teacher, who tries to fill the void by approaching Olivia. Because of Olivia, Pandu and Suri's relationship becomes closer. But the situation becomes more dangerous for Pandu because his face is seen when the ambush and revenge action are about to be carried out.

title: Lokananta
storyline: ANANTA was forced to leave his parents, whom he considered as a thick wall hindering his pursuit of a career in music. However, his meeting with LOKA only strengthened what he had to fight for: love, faith, and music. The love story of LOKA and ANANTA was hindered by their different faiths. The love they struggled so hard to fight for was challenged by their differing beliefs. However, they both realized that it was not religious faith that united them, but music that brought them together. ANANTA finally obeyed his parents' wish for him to study in Cairo. The long distance and time separating Jakarta and Cairo did not diminish their love; instead, it made their longing even more intense. In the end, upon returning from Cairo, ANANTA faced a difficult dilemma between following his parents' wish for him to marry Syafir or returning to LOKA, who had filled the depths of his heart.

title: Pizza Man
storyline: Three girls waking up from a hang over only to find the house is trashed and a mysterious pizza delivery guy is in a coma in their bathtub. They have to remember what happened the night before in order to save the pizza man before anything worse happens.

title: Getih Ireng
storyline: Pram and Rina are a married couple who deeply long for a child. However, they have been afflicted by Santet Getih Ireng, a type of black magic that targets blood and lineage. If Rina becomes pregnant, she will keep having miscarriages. They will never be able to have children. What should they do?

title: Dear Imamku
storyline: Haris (Dul Jaelani) and Alysa (Tissa Biani) are YouTubers who have successfully create content about their romantic relationship. However, their relationship changes when Haris's mother has a stroke. Harris realizes that he has not made his mother happy yet. Harris begs for his mother's recovery and vows to move if his mother is healthy. Harris's mother manage to get through her critical period. Harris carries out his vows. He moves and brakes his relationship with Alysa. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Talak 3
storyline: Talak 3 is an Indonesian movie directed by Ismail Basbeth and Hanung Brahmantyo, while the story of Talak 3 is written by Bagus Bramanti and Salman Aristo. Talak 3 told the story about Bagas and Risa that just divorced a couple of months ago. Their house still on loan and threaten to be taken off from them by Bank. It force them to work together again to finish one big project that can make fortune enough to save both of them financially. The job demands them to be together all the time, so while they working on that project, they found again every piece of love they once had before. And they decide to be back together again. But it is not that easy to be together again after Bagas has given Talak 3 to Risa before. The law of Talak 3 requires if a couple want to get together again must have thru Muhalil, which means Risa has to married to another man first and then divorce. To make their wish to get back together go well, they start to find a contract husband for Risa. Along the way, they found many silly characters that leads to funny moments. At last, they choose Bimo, an old friend of Bagas and Risa that they think is kind and responsible enough to help them. So when they plan the wedding for Risa and Bimo, Bagas finds out that Bimo already likes Risa for a long time.

title: Buya Hamka
storyline: The period when Hamka became a manager of Muhammadiyah in Makassar and successfully brought significant progress to the organization. Hamka also started writing literature for newspapers and his romance stories were well-liked by readers. Hamka and his family moved to Medan because he was appointed as the editor-in-chief of Pedoman Masyarakat magazine. This position caused Hamka to clash with the Japanese authorities, leading to the magazine being shut down as it was deemed dangerous. The Hamka family's life was also shaken when one of their children died due to illness. Hamka's efforts to approach the Japanese authorities were viewed as being sycophantic and met with hostility, resulting in him being asked to step down from his position as the manager of Muhammadiyah.

title: Mendadak Dangdut
storyline: Naya, a rising pop singer, feels stifled by her producer, Thomas, who only cares about business. Zul, Naya's manager, plans to move to another label. Naya also faces old wounds after her father, Anwar, left her for another woman, and her relationship with her sister, Lola, becomes complicated because of it. The conflict peaks when Thomas kills Zul to defend Naya and frames him as the murderer. Naya and Lola, along with Anwar who suffers from Alzheimer's, flee to Singalaya village to care for Anwar and avoid punishment. However, in the village, Naya is forced to become a dangdut singer by Wawan and Wendhoy who threaten to report her. Naya must struggle to disguise herself as a dangdut singer while avoiding the law.

title: Siapa Dia
storyline: Layar, a popular film star who is bored with his career and wants to make a musical theater set in a family history that is always related to Indonesian film history. The screen is in the process of creating works, making it imaginable in the form of various characters, from great-grandfathers, grandfathers, to fathers. The entire story is told through diary-based narratives, love letters, photographs, documentaries, artifacts and songs that bring Layar to various eras of Indonesian film history in a musical atmosphere.

title: Bidadari Mencari Sayap
storyline: Reza (Rizky Hanggono), a Muslim of Arab descent, is married to Angela (Leony VH), a girl of Chinese blood. Even though she has decided to convert to Islam, Reza's family still does not accept Angela as part of their family. Likewise, Angela's father who always look cynical about his son-in-law. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dopamin
storyline: The relationship between married couple Malik and Alya has been strained since Malik was laid off and plunged into debt. Malik's car has trouble after a failed job interview, so a stranger drives him home and then stays at their house. In the morning, they are shocked to find their guest lying dead with a syringe in his hand, leaving behind a suitcase containing billions of rupiah that changed the lives of this young couple.

title: Perayaan Mati Rasa
storyline: As the first child, Ian struggles to achieve his dreams with his friends and tries hard to fulfill all the expectations he has built up that make him far from his family. However, when a big event makes Ian lose his parents suddenly, Ian tries to always be strong and bury all his feelings until he is numb.

title: Eggnoid
storyline: Eggnoid is a human who comes out from Eggnoid eggs. He's been assigned to look after and be a friend when a human feels lonely.

title: Sabyan Menjemput Mimpi
storyline: The story of youngsers led by Ayus to build and develop a gambus musical group called Sabyan. Many interesting stories behind their struggle to reach a dream. They start to get famous thanks to simple video uploads on Youtube. Sabyan starts to have fans. There are even fanatical fans like Ndut Kece who are always present wherever Sabyan is. Also Bilal who has physical disability and is only able to see Sabyan in cyberspace. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Bisikan Jenazah
storyline: Aldi (Aldiansyah Taher) and Emma (Emma Maembong) are a newlywed couple who are going on their honeymoon to Ipoh, Malaysia. However, Aldi had to work in Kuala Lumpur for several days. They also look for lodging in Kuala Lumpur. Unfortunately, they actually strayed into a house they had never been to. They don't know that the house is a haunted house. The owner, Sukri (Shyrim Husni), is a devil worshiper and his son and wife are killed in the house to serve as a sacrifice to the devil. Emma is always terrorized by the spirits of Sukri's wife (Maya Marissa) and their child (Abdul Hadi). Ultimately, Emma is possessed by the spirit of Sukri, who is also used as a sacrifice. —Zeah

title: Di Timur Matahari
storyline: On Papua, the easternmost island in Indonesia, a group of students who have been without a teacher for six months are waiting for a teacher, who should arrive through the small airstrip in their village; the airstrip is their only contact with the outside world. —Mwd

title: Surga Yang Tak Dirindukan
storyline: An architect and also a married man was forced to marry a depressed woman in order to save her life. This caused various conflicts within his marriage life start to happen.

title: Sekala Niskala
storyline: One day in a hospital room, 10-year-old Tantri realises she will not have much more time with her twin brother Tantra. Tantra's brain is weakening and he has begun to lose his senses one by one. He now spends most of his time lying in bed, while Tantri has to accept the reality that she must soon face life alone. This situation opens up something in Tantri's mind: she keeps waking up in the middle of the night from a dream and seeing Tantra. The night becomes their playground. Tantri experiences a magical journey and an emotional relationship through body expressions, finding herself between reality and imagination, loss and hope. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Mars Met Venus (Part Cewe)
storyline: Kelvin (Ge Pamungkas), an aspiring architect, plans to marry his girlfriend, Mila (Pamela Bowie), his junior in high school. In order to propose for Mila, Kelvin recorded their love journey by making a vlog assisted by Lukman (Wisnu Adji Hidayat). It turned out that making vlogs opened up things that had not been noticed by Kelvin and Mila all this time. Many misunderstood, and conflicting viewpoints. In Mars Met Venus (Part Cewe), the portion of girls dominates, Mila's two best friends are always there: Icha (Ria Ricis) and Malia (Rani Ramadhany) who always support and give advice. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Catatan Harian Menantu Sinting
storyline: This is the love story of Minar and Sahat and their mother-in-law with a Batak family background. Minar and her mother-in-law have different beliefs about love. For Minar, love is quality time and communication. Meanwhile, for mothers-in-law, love is the presence of a son as the successor of the clan. Because of this, since the beginning of the marriage, Mother-in-law never got tired of asking Minar to give her a grandson. Because they didn't have enough money, Minar and Sahat were forced to stay at their mother-in-law's house and were given a bed left by Sahat's grandfather. That bed was called the 'Sacred Bed' by my mother-in-law, because one week of sleeping on that bed she immediately became pregnant with Monang, her first child. Minar has an agenda: to get Sahat out of her mother-in-law's house. Minar wants to have her own house, without interference from her mother-in-law. But, is it possible for Mother-in-law to allow Minar and Sahat to leave her house before giving Mother-in-law a grandson?

title: Warkop DKI Reborn: Jangkrik Boss Part 2
storyline: Jangkrik Boss Part 2, picks up on the adventure of Dono (Abimana Aryasatya), Kasino (Vino G Bastian) and Indro (Tora Sudiro) in searching for the treasure to pay their debts, so they could avoid prison. The neighboring country, Malaysia, is their first destination at the start of this film. The bag with the codes to the treasure which gets mistakenly switched with one belonging to a pretty Malaysian woman, Nadia (Fazura), leads them to all sorts of unimaginable places, concluding at a haunted uninhabited island. On the island, they are forced to split up and face scary yet hilarious ghosts. Funny events and occurrences that will break up the laughter continue to follow their antics, where twists upon unexpected twists will be revealed in this excitingly wacky Treasure Hunt sequel called Warkop DKI Reborn : Jangkrik Boss Part 2. Can't wait? Coming soon, Warkop DKI Reborn: Jangkrik Boss Part 2, in all cinemas across Indonesia, August 31st 2017. Also featuring Indro Warkop, Hanna Al Rashid, Nora Danish, Babe Cabiita, and Ence Bagus.

title: Noktah Merah Perkawinan
storyline: After eleven years of marriage, the relationship between Ambar and Gilang enters a period of disappointment. The intervention of their parents. Gilang works as a landscape architect, while Ambar while taking care of the house and the children, tries to keep himself busy and find peace by teaching ceramics workshops. It is there that she meets Yuli, who is a student in her class. Gilang, Ambar, and Yuli's relationship become more complicated after Gilang works on a garden project owned by Kemal, Yuli's boyfriend. Yuli brings the long-lost comfort to Gilang and vice versa. Ambar questions whether her marriage is worth saving at the height of her heartache and disappointment.

title: Sah! Katanya...
storyline: Marni who is grieving because of Dipo's sudden death, her father finds out another surprising reality. Through her uncle and mother, Mar finds out her father's will about the last wish that is very difficult to carry out. Mar must marry in front of the corpse with the man chosen by her father, namely Marno, the son of her best friend. Mar knows that her father has a very large debt, the debt can be resolved if Mar marries Marno. It is difficult for Mar to carry out the marriage because Mar actually already has a boyfriend named Adi. Mar is now in a dilemma. Should she maintain her love story or be devoted to her father and save her family?

title: Wakil Rakyat
storyline: Bagyo loses his job when he is accused of ruining a national meeting of a large political party led by Zainuddin. This jeopardizes his marriage plan with Ani. Then when a gang is robbing Atika, a famous artist, Bagyo shows up to rescue Atika. He is now a national hero.

title: Ayat-Ayat Cinta 2
storyline: Fahri, now living in Edinburgh and even a lecturer at the University of Edinburgh, was forced to live his daily life alone. Together with Uncle Hulusi, his Turkish household assistant, he continued his life without Aisha. Sometimes Fahri was still crying when he remembered his memories with Aisha. The fact that his beloved wife now vanished somewhere, made him miserable and almost desperate. So he spends his days immersing himself in the busy work, research, teaching, and business that he and Aisha shared together. Aisha disappeared on a trip to Palestine with her girlfriend while wanting to make stories and reportage about life there. Aisha's friend was found in a state of loss of life and body condition is pathetic and very likely Aisha condition is also the same even though her body has not been found at this time. For more than two years Fahri grieved and drowned in the search for his beloved wife. He also moved to Edinburgh because that is the city that Aisha really liked in the plains of England. With his busy self, he tried to get rid of his sadness while improving the image of Islam and Muslims in the first world. He does good to his neighbors, spreads the science of religion on various parties, and helps people who need help regardless of feathers. Various activities busied himself, until a disturbing question came from various parties. Will he be single for life after Aisha left? Will he meet his wife again?

title: Pengejar Angin
storyline: In a small village in Lahat, South Sumatra, 18-year-old Dapunta (Qausar Harta Yudana) is almost ready to graduate from senior-high school. He is known as the Wind Chaser locally because of his running capabilities. He and his mother Dakunta (Wanda Hamidah) want him to go to university, but his father, leader of a gang of bandits, refuses to allow it. Dapunta decides to go to university no matter what. His crush Nyimas (Siti Helda) and teacher Damar (Lukman Sardi) help him, motivating him to practice his running so that he can use athletics to enter the university of his choice. However, his classmate Yusuf (Giorgino Abraham), who has similar running abilities, is also training, and sabotages some of Dapunta's practice sessions.
