Tanpa sepengetahuan yang lain ternyata Rini sudah menentukan pilihan hatinya ke Sahroni yang dianggapnya meskipun preman dan hampir semua orang desa membencinya tapi punya hati mulia. Sahroni yang mulai berubah total dan giat mempersiapkan diri kampaye mendapat saingan Raden mas Pono yang minta bantuan HERI (Den Baguse Ngarso) dukun sakti dari Dieng. Hari pemilihan pun tiba dan semua orang menunggu dengan tegang hasil perhitungan suara, Raden mas Pono unggul satu suara dari Sahroni karena curang menyuap panitia pemilihan... Sahroni terpaksa menerima kekalahannya dengan hati terluka. Dan Rini, harus mau tidak mau menikah dengan Raden mas Pono. Di malam midodareni Rini kabur lewat jendela. Warga undangan-pun heboh termasuk pak Lurah dan Raden mas Pono. Rame-rame mereka menghakimi dan menyeret Sahroni. Ternyata Rini, punya rencana sendiri. Rini menjebak IIR (kaki tangan Raden mas Pono) untuk mengaku bahwa Raden mas Pono berlaku curang. Iir pun menyerah dengan gaya interogasi Rini dan akhirnya mengaku bahkan mau menjadi saksi. Perhitungan ulang-pun dilakukan dengan persetujuan semua warga dan disaksikan pejabat daerah. Terbukti dengan hanya unggul satu suara Sahroni berhasil menang. Dan jalan dia untuk menikahi Rini mulus tanpa hambatan. Belum selesai kegembiraan Sahroni dan Rini, HERI dukun kepercayaan Raden mas Pono muncul mengacaukan suasana dengan segala strateginya untuk melegalkan Raden mas Pono....

title: Radio Galau FM
storyline: Bara Mahesa (Dimas Anggara), who wants to be a writer, is restless in the absence of any girlfriend. He then meets Velin Caliandra (Natasha Rizki), a junior that later becomes his girlfriend. But Velin is a spoiled girl and a source of irritation. Then comes Diandra Pramita (Alisia Rininta), a senior who can make Bara feels comfortable. But Diandra, in fact, is going to be a source of greater resentment. —Mwd

title: Losmen Melati
storyline: The year is 1997. On the outskirts of Java, Indonesia, travelers from near and far check out a strange and mysterious inn - a family looking for a place to stay after their grandmother's funeral and a couple looking for a place to spend the night together. However, things are not as they seem at the Inn and the house guests soon realize that once they enter, they can never get out. The hostess, Madam Melati has her own plans for the souls that enter her cursed motel, never to leave the place. In the midst of the ongoing horror, we soon learn about Melati's tortured history and the truth behind her ties to the inn. However, Melati's dark past and ancient traditions are soon disrupted when a pair of local tow truck drivers attempt a nighttime robbery of the sinister home. It wasn't long before the drivers realized they had made a big mistake. They find themselves caught up in a deadly game with the house curse and accidentally unleash a much greater evil that has been buried within the depths of the inn for over a century.

title: Aku Tahu Kapan Kamu Mati: Desa Bunuh Diri
storyline: Five years since SIENA gained the ability to see when someone will die, Siena still often feels consumed by fear, a secret she even hides from her two friends, WINDY and RIO. Siena only confides in NAYA, a professor and clinical psychologist on campus. Then, one day, a death occurs on campus, but this time Siena sees no sign. This event prompts Naya to return to her hometown, Remetuk Village, to meet with LARAS. Armed with a message left behind, Siena is accompanied by Windy and Rio on a journey to Remetuk Village. As harvest season approaches, suicide attempts are a recurring theme in Remetuk Village, but Siena, who wants to help, has never been able to see the signs. Siena, Windy, Rio, Naya, and Naya and Laras, none of them can escape this curse, the desire in each of them to know and determine when they will die.

title: Surat Cinta Untuk Kartini
storyline: On his first day of work, a new postman who recently moved from Semarang did not realize that one of the letters he delivered was for Kartini, a beautiful who also care for people, and he starts to fall in love with her.

title: Romansa: Gending Cinta di Tanah Turki
Sanubari Jakarta
storyline: An omnibus of 10 stories, 10 romances that portrays lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender relationships throughout Jakarta.

title: Akad
storyline: Mr Abdi (Mathias Muchus) wants his daughter, Indira (Indah Permatasari), to get married soon because he doesn't want her to be lonely like him. Indira is an independent woman and does not feel there is an interest in getting married. Meanwhile, Dion (Kevin Julio), Indira's past, a consultant of nature conservation who has a project in Lombok, must return to Jakarta to take care of the administration of his work. Dion and Indira are reunited in the wrong time and atmosphere. Meanwhile, Roy (Nino Fernandez) becomes the man who will fill Indira's life.

title: Ayo Balikan
storyline: Selatan returned to his old habits: breaking up after three days of dating. Natali was the next victim. Without realizing it, all the women he dated had similarities to Alma, his old girlfriend. And one day he said to his two best friends that he was tired of dating and they agreed to go out of town. At the station, Selatan saw Alma with a man and his mother. Selatan chased him but failed to meet him. He was determined to approach Alma again. He had to overcome many obstacles.

title: 3 Srikandi
storyline: Three female archers from Indonesia created history by winning the first medal ever for the country. This small team was coached by Donald, ex Indonesian top archer who was left bitter after Indonesia did not participate in 1980 Uni Soviet Olympic where he could be the first Indonesian person to win a medal for the country after breaking the world record in 1980. This movie tells background story of each archer and problems that they had to overcome before making history for the country. —Reinard

title: Atambua 39° Celsius
storyline: A Father, a son and a stranger cross path in a place where the heat of the sun can either burn or warm old wounds.

title: Oma the Demonic
storyline: Fiona spent time with Oma (grandmother) as a child, but Fiona has not seen Oma for a long time because of the conflict between her mother and Oma since her father died. She has nightmares of a woman who seems to give a message to visit Oma's house. Fiona continues to be disturbed by demons and finally goes to look for Oma's house, accompanied by two of her friends, Luna and Jeff. When they head and arrive at Oma's house, mysterious things happen. The situation gets scary when many strange things happen at Oma's house until they find out what happened, and it turns out that the lives of Fiona and her friends are involved.

title: Dinda
storyline: It has been three years since Dinda went to Malaysia and had a long distance relationship with her boyfriend, Geri. Now Dinda is back and hopes that her relationship with Geri can be more harmonious. Unfortunately, a bad start occurred: Geri couldn't leave her job as a photographer, even though she had promised to take Dinda to apply for work. Dinda is late, but is accepted to work at a flower shop owned by Satya. Dinda felt distant from Geri, as if she was hiding many secrets. It is at this point that Satya offers a comfortable home.

title: Meet Me After Sunset
storyline: A bizarre love triangle between the Sun, the Moon, and the Star.

title: Pamali: Tumbal
storyline: The village where Putri lives often experiences mysterious events. Several women suddenly disappear without a trace. There are often thefts of money that cannot be explained logically. One day Putri's mother suddenly disappears. Putri, along with her best friends Kiki and Cecep then trace the existing clues to find her mother again, starting from exploring a haunted forest, an abandoned factory, until arriving at an old house that turns out to be inhabited by a terrifying tuyul and black kuntilanak.

title: Tuhan Minta Duit
storyline: Adi tries all the means so that his prayer is granted, but his prayer "God, give me money" does not come true. The prayer that he originally asked is only to repair the leaking roof tiles of his house. His goal increases when his grandmother, who has taken care of him since he was a baby, falls in the bathroom, is hospitalized, and costs a lot of money. Instead of being granted, Adi even lost his job as a polisher because his friends in the profession exposed his disguise. It turns out that Adi is a woman. Women are prohibited from participating in polishing because it can cause "excessive" compassion from potential customers. At the lowest point, her prayer is answered: Adi finds a bag containing hundreds of millions of cash. But that leads her to doom.

title: I Know What You Did on Facebook
storyline: A lady made a facebook profile to date to a man. After he dates a man, suddenly the man fell in love with another lasy and the first lady want him back

title: Hari Untuk Amanda
storyline: Amanda (Fanny Fabriana), a woman in her mid-20s, suddenly shrouded in extreme doubt. Because Hari (Oka Antara), her ex-girlfriend comes back in her life, when Amanda will be married in 10 days to Dody (Reza Rahadian).

title: Duka Sedalam Cinta
storyline: Gagah (Hamas Syahid) a handsome and intelligent young man went to North Maluku for his thesis research. He had an accident and was helped by Yudi (Masaji Wijayanto) and his brother, Kyai Ghufron (Salim A. Fillah). When recovered, Yudi took Gagah to South Halmahera and learned about the local wisdom of the region from two unexpectedly unique figures. Upon returning from North Maluku, Gagah changed. Mama (Wulan Guritno) and Gita (Aquino Umar) the younger brother are difficult to accept the change. Gita is hostile to Gagah until he meets Nadia (Izzah Ajrina) who is beautiful and kind. Nadia brings a new nuance in the relationship Gita and Gagah. On the other hand, Gita who met accidentally several times on the bus with Yudi began to sympathize with the unusual path the young man took. Meanwhile, Silence Gagah has a big plan that will change everything. Until one day something happens, making Gagah, Gita, Yudi and Nadia meet in the fabric of destiny that leads them to grief as deep as love.

title: Punk in Love
storyline: The story about love, life, and friendship of four street punks friends. From their hometown in Malang, East Java, they plan a journey to Jakarta with the purpose to help their friend confess his love to his crush before her wedding day.

title: Jembatan Shiratal Mustaqim
storyline: Following the tsunami disaster and the issue of embezzlement of aid funds, Arya is frequently terrorized by the sight of a place suspected to be the Shiratal Mustaqim Bridge, the most feared bridge in the afterlife, connecting to heaven and stretching over hell. Arya and his mother then try to investigate the connection between the embezzlement and the Shiratal Mustaqim Bridge. However, their efforts risk their lives.

title: Kaka Boss
storyline: Kaka Boss, a successful debt collector, wants to change gears to become a singer to please his only daughter who is in high school. Unfortunately, the sound was fake, and no one dared to say it, neither Kaka Boss's men, nor the people in the recording studio. They also continued to make Kaka Boss a single. A time bomb that is about to explode and is ready to trigger chaos. What will happen next?

title: 99 Cahaya di Langit Eropa
storyline: The story of a Indonesian students in Europe. How they adapt, to meet with various friends until finally lead them to the secrets of Islam in continental Europe.

title: Danau Hitam
storyline: After 5 friends find mysterious chest at the lake, dreams and terrors begin to haunted them.

title: Dedemit - Diikuti Makhluk Halus
storyline: Andi Marlina, the second daughter of Andi Baharuddin Mahmud, a successful Makassar-born entrepreneur and a beautiful Sundanese woman named Lilis. She was born and raised in Jakarta, as her father migrated and became successful in Jakarta. She has graduated from college and has chosen Makassar as her next adventure destination after not going anywhere for three months due to her sister Lia's death. However, her real goal in going to Makassar is to find out about her father's legacy house that has been kept secret all this time. Armed with an address and an old photo of a grand house with a spacious yard surrounded by a fence. The house is large, quiet, and well-maintained. Lina meets a woman her age, but with a classic style wearing a kebaya and sarong and a cold face. Puang Tenri, that's the name of the woman whom her father entrusted to guard the house.

title: Tulang Belulang Tulang
storyline: Mangokal Holi, a ritual to dig and move the bones of tribal ancestors to a new site, is a symbol of pride for Batak family who can afford the lavish ceremony. Unfortunately, the suitcase containing the skeleton of Great Grandpa went missing in the airport. Grandma and the whole clan were waiting, ready to party on the banks of the magnificent Lake Toba, the world's largest caldera lake. The journey to find Great Grandpa's skeleton threw a family to many hilarious obstacles: racing across the winding road, chasing a dog thinking the bones were his meal, walking through the forest known for its hungry tigers, all in HIGH HEELS. Their family honor is at stake. —Sammaria Simanjuntak

title: Indera ke Enam
storyline: Merry and her daughter, Dina, decided to organize their lives by moving to a small house. But the situation that went well changed drastically when he began to look again at the occult.

title: Chrisye
storyline: Finding passion and talent in the world of music does not make Chrisye peaceful throughout his life. Since he is a teenager, he has to defy his father who wants him to be an engineer. He plays music secretly and struggling to prove that music is his choice of life. Despite the popularity he has gained, his anxiety never stops. He makes cooperation with various parties. Even he does the craziest thing in his life: dancing on stage. Chrisye's anxiety continues in the process of searching for his true self. Married to Yanti and having family, open new horizons for him. Going down to Banjar is an important part of his spiritual journey. It is this essential search of the meaning of life that underlies in creating the song Ketika Tangan dan Kaki Berkata (When Hands and Feet Say). —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Fiksi.
storyline: Alisha (Ladya Cheryl) never feel comfortable staying in her cool and spacious home until one day she meets Bari (Donny Alamsyah) who introduces her the meaning of love.

title: Once Upon a Time in Indonesia
storyline: Haunted by the deeds of his father, Max (Franki Darmawan) wants to be more than the son of a criminal and escape the crime infested neighborhood he lives in. Max's best friend Leo (Djaitov Tigor ) is always in and out of trouble and has a history of crossing the line in hopes of making it big someday. In a neighborhood where everyone knows everyone, and everyone has a committed a crime or two, the past is hard to escape.

title: Devil on Top
storyline: Having a boss like Sarah makes Angga and his co-workers, Richard, Boni, and Rudi, feel like they are working under the supervision of a demon in hell.

title: Dusun Mayit
storyline: The terrible story experienced by four climbers named Aryo, Nita, Raka, and Yuni. Initially full of laughter, their ascent ended in disaster. The four of them are trapped in a mysterious village after getting lost in a market at the foot of a mountain, which is said to be a gateway between dimensions. On their way down, they find a strange folk festival and are stopped by a mysterious old man who brings 8 wild dogs. Can Aryo and friends face this terrible situation and find their way home?

title: Panggilan dari Kubur
storyline: There is no mother in this world who can bury her own child... That is what happened to Alya when she and her husband Raka and their daughter Yasmin went on vacation to her mother's house, Mrs. Dewi in a remote village. But this vacation turned out to be disastrous. Her daughter Yasmin had a tragic accident and drowned while playing in the lake. In a state of deep grief, Alya could not bring Yasmin's body back to Jakarta to be buried. Because of the weather and the impossible travel, Yasmin was finally buried in the backyard of her mother's house. Then Alya and her husband returned to Jakarta, trying to live life as usual. But it was not easy, Alya always felt the call from her daughter Yasmin. This strange feeling pushed Alya to return to her mother's village to see her daughter's grave. And it turned out the grave was indeed empty. Yasmin had risen and become a terrifying figure. The grave was apparently cursed: anyone buried in the ground would come back to life as a terrifying figure. With the help of Basri, a local resident, they search for Yasmin, who has begun terrorizing the village. If Alya refused to let her child go, is Alya now ready to accept Yasmin's return to life.

title: Gundik
storyline: Otto, a former soldier who has just been released from prison, must accept the fact that his daughter, Merry, has secretly married Baim, a taxi driver who is considered to have no future. When he receives a job to rob the house of a Nyai who is suspected of being a Gundik, Otto recruits his team: Saud, a fellow former soldier, Reza, his brother-in-law, and Baim as a driver and lookout. However, their action turns into a nightmare when they realize that the Nyai who owns the house that was robbed, is not an ordinary Gundik, but rather she is a powerful ghost, the ruler of the South Coast.

title: Rintihan Kuntilanak Perawan
storyline: a virgin girl was killed by a boy who rape her and then she try to kill that boy.but, will that be easy because she has been a ghost.

title: Ali Topan
storyline: From a tumultuous family background, Ali Topan chooses to spend his time on the streets of Blok M and at the Art Stall under the guidance of Opung Brotpang along with his gang, Dudung, Bobby, and Gevaert. His encounter with Anna Karenina, the daughter of a prominent property business family, adds color to Ali Topan's life. Ali and Anna fall in love, but unfortunately, their relationship is strongly opposed by Anna's parents. Unbridled disappointment drives Ali and Anna to embark on an adventure, traversing the streets across the island of Java in search of a new future. However, on their journey, many parties attempt to track them down and hunt them, including Boy, who disapproves of Ali and Anna's togetherness. Ali Topan is accused of being the mastermind behind the turmoil at the Art Stall and the kidnapping of Anna. Can the courage of Ali Topan and Anna Karenina overcome everyone who opposes them? Will Ali Topan continue to be with Anna Karenina?

title: Akhirat: A Love Story
storyline: An accountant falls in love with a free-spirited artist. One day, they're involved in a car accident that puts them in a coma. They later find themselves at the intersection of the human world and the afterlife. Reluctant to be separated from each other, they explore the realm and meet other souls. —Studio Antelope

title: Gangster
storyline: Jamroni, a village boy, went to Jakarta to find Sari, his childhood love, and to find the truth about himself. But instead, he is involved in a feud between two powerful figures concerning arranged marriage of the daughter.

title: My Annoying Brother
storyline: Kemal (Angga Yunanda), a national athlete, loses sight due to a competition injury. Things become more complicated when his estranged older brother, Jaya (Vino G Bastian), returns home after a long absence. Jaya, a convict, uses Kemal's condition to request a reduction in his prison sentence. Unbeknownst to them, this dramatic reunion rekindles the fond memories of their once beautiful brotherhood. Their lives are filled with laughter once more. However, fate has other plans, and the laughter soon turns to tears.

title: Love for Sale 2
storyline: Ican aka Indra Tauhid (Adipati Dolken) have often faced with matchmaking attempts by his mother, Ros aka Rosmaida (Ratna Riantiarno). One day, tricked Ros by bringing a prospective daughter-in-law through a dating application called Love Inc. Not long, Arini (Della Dartyan) has comes. Ican introduced her as his ex-girlfriend when they were in the college. Arini allowed to stay in Ros's rented house. Arini's presence brought a big changes to Ros family. Their family became tighter thanks to Arini. Ros liked Arini. She proudly introduced Arini as her prospective daughter-in-law to her friends. Gradually seeing relationships between families that began to improve thanks to Arini, Ican slowly fell in love to her.

title: Iqro: My Universe
storyline: Aqilla has aspirations to become an astronaut, Her grandfather, an astronomer, is a place where Aqilla learned a lot and asked questions. Aqilla's hobbies in outer space make her compete with June, her schoolmate, a transfer student from England who also has similar interests. They compete to make a vlog of people who are instrumental in the world of science, especially outer space. Thed prize: visit the Astronaut Training Center. Aqilla immediately thinks of Opa in his vlog. It turns out that Opa has gone to England to help with a research. Raudhah, Aqilla's teacher, gives a book to Aqilla about Tsurayya, an Indonesian astronaut who is conducting research on plants to be sent into space. Aqilla tries hard to meet and ask her to be part of her vlog. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: London Love Story 2
storyline: This is the continuation of the romance between Caramel (Michelle Ziudith) and Dave (Dimas Anggara). They plan to visit Switzerland for a holiday. However, Dave cancels the trip at the last minute, leaving Caramel alone. When Caramel arrives in Switzerland, she continues her holiday with her friend, Sam (Ramzi). Her peaceful holiday suddenly changes because of Gilang (Rizky Nazar), a chef and an heir to a famous restaurant owner. Somehow, he starts a love-and-hate relationship with Caramel. Will Caramel keep her commitment to Dave? —iflix

title: Argantara
storyline: The marriage at the age of 16 between Syera and Argantara changed their lives. Argantara and Syera live alone in one house. Argantara and Syera's attitude turned out to be the opposite. Argantara is rarely at home and more often with his motorcycle gang friends. Argantara and Syera also kept their marriage a secret at school. But suspicion arose because of their closeness. And Syera is pregnant.

title: Sekte
storyline: Lia is experiencing memory loss after an accident. When awakened, she is in a large, isolated house. It is a place of community consisting of people who do not have a home and relatives. They live in harmony and look after each other. They are the ones who help Lia when she was injured. Because she does not remember who she was and where to go, she stays there to get treatment. The days pass. Lia, who begins to recover, realizes there is something strange about the situation where she stays. It turns out that the inhabitants of the house consist of followers of cults and those who enter the house can never come out again. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Believe: The Ultimate Battle
storyline: Agus grew up in the strict upbringing of his father, Sergeant Major Dedi, a soldier who was injured during an operation in East Timor. After Dedi's death, Agus understood the magnitude of his father's sacrifice and was determined to follow in his footsteps by becoming a soldier. In the midst of duty and conflict, Agus also struggled to maintain his household with Evi, so that it would not be destroyed like his family before. Slowly, he began to understand that his father's footsteps were not to be repeated, but rather used as a lesson in forming his own path.

title: My Sassy Girl
storyline: Gian should have gone to his aunt's house because she wants to set Gian up with her late son's ex-lover. However, from the station to the train carriage, Gian is caught in a situation where he has to take care of a drunk girl named Sisi and take her to a hotel. There is a misunderstanding between Gian and Sisi. Still, this misunderstanding brings them into meeting after meeting, forming a togetherness where Gian finds himself unable and unwilling to be separated from Sisi even though Sisi often bullies him. Sisi has a gloomy side due to her past and finds happiness every time she is with Gian. Unfortunately, Sisi always feels she doesn't deserve to be happy. At the same time, Gian always tries to fulfill Sisi's wishes, no matter how strange Sisi's requests are, to bring Sisi free from the sadness that Gian often finds in Sisi's ridiculous behavior.

title: Comic 8 Revolution: Santet K4bin3t
storyline: Fueled by vengeance from the past, a shaman couple Ki Bagus and Ni Gendis plots to take control of the nation by casting black magic on the president and his cabinet. With the aid of a mystical skull, they successfully bewitch a deputy minister but fail to curse the president. To complete their spell, they must sacrifice eight souls. The government assigns Pakde Indro and Oki from the Bureau of Intelligence of the Republic (BIR) to stop Ki Bagus and Ni Gendis. Pakde Indro and Oki gather eight agents and infiltrate them into the couple's home under the guise of domestic helpers.

title: Saranjana: Kota Ghaib
storyline: The adventures of a band from Jakarta called Significant which is currently holding a concert tour in Kotabaru, South Kalimantan. Right in the middle of the tour, Sitha, the band's vocalist, mysteriously disappears. After conducting a search, the other band members believed that Sitha was in Saranjana, an unseen city which the locals believed to be a modern and advanced city. For seven days, they will enter the city of Saranjana with various horror and mystical events accompanying their journey.

title: The Day Before the Wedding
storyline: Clara, a wedding dress cosplayer who wants to become a flight attendant, lives in the same house with her best friend, Kinan, by the train tracks. They work together to make a living. Because she is about to marry her boyfriend, Gerald, Kinan, who doesn't know that Gerald is a pickpocket, goes to his boyfriend's house. The day before Kinan's wedding, Clara does a medical test as a flight attendant. She fails because it turns out she is pregnant. She confesses to Kinan that it was Gerald who got her pregnant. It turns out that Kinan is also pregnant.

title: Shutter
storyline: Darwin, a photographer who discovers a mysterious woman appearing in all his photographs. As the spectral figure begins to manifest in real life, his girlfriend Pia investigates the ghost's identity, uncovering connections to a former university student named Lilies. When Darwin's friends start dying, Pia suspects the hauntings are connected to Darwin's past misdeeds.

title: Maling Kutang
storyline: Two neighbours steal a bra and they think it is magical.

title: Uang Panai' Maha(r)l
storyline: Anca (Ikram Noer) just returned from overseas. He was reunited with his ex-girlfriend Risna (Nur Fadillah) and intends to marry her. But Anca's intention was hindered by a marriage conditions: Uang Panai' with a fantastic amount of money.

title: Marley
storyline: Marley, a dog, befriends Doni, a math teacher. One time, Doni is fired from school because he applies a different learning system. Because of that, Doni opens his own math tutoring. The tutoring is initially empty, but finally crowded. It is there that Doni meets Vina and there is love between them. Tension occurs when there is a math competition, Marley is kidnapped by a dog butcher. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Tri Mas Getir
storyline: Ciang Pek inherits a wushu school and lives with his grandfather. When Ciang Pek's grandfather died, mafia boss, Munar came and threatened to confiscate the wushu if he failed to pay his grandfather's debt.

title: Air Mata di Ujung Sajadah
storyline: Seven years have passed, Aqilla just found out that her child, Baskara, is actually alive and being raised by Arif and Yumna, a couple who had only one hope: to have a child. Aqilla departed from her empty life in Europe to head to Solo City to embrace her new future. Will Aqilla be able to bring herself to take Baskara away, as he has been raised by Arif and Yumna for years? Indeed, Aqilla's blood runs in Baskara's veins, but there is also Yumna's sweat and tears there. Who has more right to be Baskara's mother?

title: Rectoverso
storyline: Rectoverso is an omnibus or anthology of Indonesian movie nuances of love. This film is an adaptation of a work of music albums Dewi "Dee" Lestari titled Rectoverso which was released in 2008.

title: Dear Jo: Almost Is Never Enough
storyline: Joshua and Maura, a young married couple, got married and worked in Baku, Azerbaijan. Despite their financial success, they felt empty because Maura couldn't conceive. Maura had a friend named Ella, a single parent from Indonesia who also lived in Baku. Ella knew about Maura's desire to have a child, and they agreed that Ella would become the surrogate mother. However, tragically, while Ella was pregnant, Maura passed away in an accident, leaving Ella and Joshua devastated and their lives in disarray.

title: Malam Pertobatan
storyline: In the 1980s, security forces carry out secret operations known as "Petrus" to suppress rampant thuggery, spreading terror among notorious figures like Baron, Pange, and Bedul. Baron grows even more fearful when he hears that Pange and Bedul have already fallen victim to these mysterious shootings. Determined to change his ways, he seeks to make amends with his mother and turn his life around for his girlfriend, Ratna. But will he get the chance?

title: Cahaya dari timur: Beta Maluku
storyline: Sani Tawainella wants to save the children of Ambon from religious conflict through football. In the midst of life's difficulties as well as the choice between family or the football team, Sani is assigned to bring his team to represent Maluku in the national championship, but his decision to mix children of different religions into one team actually leads to a split. Can Sani, through all of this, bring a good end to the story for Maluku? —nitorch

title: Mangga Muda
storyline: Agil (Tora Sudiro), a taxi driver, and his wife Luli (Alexandra Gottardo), a salon employee. live in a mediocre state. They are bussy looking for income. It makes them difficult to get a baby. Then Agil makes a wish: if his wife is pregnant then he will fulfill all requests of his wife. His prayer is answered. Luli is pregnant. Instead of being happy, Agil actually is confused. One morning he finds a brochure of a red Yaris car under the pillow of his wife's bed. He asks his wife if she really wants a red Yaris. Luli says yes. His efforts to fulfill the wishes of his wife failed continuously, and he falls into a failed robbery.

title: Cinta Dalam Kardus
storyline: A boy called Miko went to Stand Up Comedy show in a restaurant to release his stresses. While in the show, his jokes are hated by the restaurant costumers, so he brings the box that contains the pieces of stuff of his past loves.

title: Tanah Surga... Katanya
storyline: Tanah Surga Katanya is movie about a nationalism of patriot that still alive in frontier between Indonesia and Malaysia, his son is choose to living in Malaysia than to live in Indonesia because in Indonesia, the government is not take care of people in hinterland and frontier, and the economic in Malaysia is more greatful in frontier of two country

title: Arwah
storyline: 5 foster siblings who reunited to reminisce, suddenly experienced a disaster. The youngest sister could not be saved. After the accident, the four siblings felt terrorized by the youngest sister. The psychic said that the youngest sister was not calm, she had something to say. The four siblings find out, what is it?

title: Bolehkah Sekali Saja Kumenangis
storyline: After her brother left home, Tari struggled alone to save her mother from her abusive father. Tari, who had been traumatized since she was little, was no longer able to bear this burden. Accompanied by Baskara, a temperamental man who also joined the same support group. Will Tari be able to overcome the trauma she has and no longer keep her tears to herself?

title: Petualangan Menangkap Petir
storyline: Sterling (Bima Azriel) is an aspiring filmmaker who lives in Hong Kong with his parents, Beth (Putri Ayudya) and Mahesa (Darius Sinathrya). Sterling is left to his grandfather (Slamet Rahardjo) who lives in Selo, Boyolali, Central Java, while his parents prepare their move to Jakarta. Sterling, who is accustomed to his "friends" in the internet world, feels uncomfortable staying in the mountains of Boyolali. This changed when he met Gianto / Jaiyen (Fatih Unru), Neta (Zara Leola), Wawan (Jidate Ahmad), Kuncoro (Danang Parikesit) and Yanto (Siswanto). He knows the fun of friends, adventure, playing with various childhood games that he had never met. Triggered by Jaiyen's desire to become a film star, Sterling and friends met Arifin (Abimana Aryastya) and Kriwil (Arie Kriting), the owner of a wedding video and on a mobile screen to teach how to make films inspired by the legendary story of Ki Ageng Selo, the story of the Lightning Catcher for Sterling is the figure of a superhero. The conflict happened because of differences in Beth's parenting and Sterling's desire to have fun chasing dreams. The children's adventures aside from being excited also gave Beth a valuable lesson, and most importantly: Sterling knew what true friendship meant.

title: Backstage
storyline: Elsa (Vanesha Prescilla) and Sandra (Sissy Priscilla) are sisters with a million dreams. Elsa-the little sister- dreams of becoming a movie star. Their father is dead. Their mother, Andini (Karina Suwandi), becomes the backbone of the family by selling dumplings with her daughters who work as cafe waitresses. One day Elsa auditions for a movie looking for a singer role. Elsa sent a video of her singing but using Sandra's voice. Elsa fails, but Bayu (Verdi Solaiman), a music producer, orbits Elsa as the new singer using Sandra's voice. And - successful. On this journey Elsa gets to know her idol singer, Michael Nara (Achmad Mgantara), duet and - fall in love. Sandra began to lose her sister. There is a conflict between these sisters. Then, a lie is revealed: Michael Nara turns to using Elsa's fame to raise his prestige again. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: R: Raja, Ratu & Rahasia
storyline: Ratu (Aurora Ribero) joins a club called Komplotan Rahasia (Secret Order) in order to bring joy to herself because her parents are dead. Then there's Raja (Brandon Salim) who loves Ratu. But Raja has a secret.

title: #OOTD: Outfit of the Designer
storyline: Lost among destruction and uncertainty, a fashion design student in Birmingham. Nare's heart was hurt, it was difficult to decide between what she wanted and what she really needed. The love story grew when he fell in love with the photographer, Bagas, who was introduced to him by Luni. However, tragedy followed, forcing Nare to choose something she never wanted.

title: Puisi Cinta yang Membunuh
storyline: The story of Ranum, who is always tricked by the sweet words of men who then betray her and later ends with death by a mysterious figure. Ranum's family drama revolves around deceit; it is poetic, romantic, and hilarious, which instantly turns into terror.

title: Darah Daging
storyline: Three siblings: Arya (Ario Bayu), Rahmat (Rangga Nattra), and Fikri (Arnold Leonard) carry out a bank robbery to save the lives of their mothers. They invited Rahmat's childhood friends, Salim (Donny Alamsyah), and Borne (Tanta Ginting). On the appointed day, they robbed the bank where Fikri worked as an apprentice employee. The robbery did not go according to plan. Salim was punished and felt betrayed by others. Hana (Estelle Linden) visits Salim to explore the truth of the robbery case that occurred 14 years ago. As one of the perpetrators of the Salim robbery will soon serve his death sentence in 10 days —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Roman Peony
storyline: Clara goes to Japan to find someone important in her life with the abandoned novel 'Dejavu', and Kenji who runs away from Miyu his childhood friend. Fate brings Clara and Kenji to meet, the same language makes them start their journey of searching and running. The locations written in the novel 'Dejavu' become the direction of Clara and Kenji's journey. Along the way, romance grows between Kenji and Clara. Every love story that arises, there must be a broken heart. Miyu does not accept that she is the figure who must be lost in this love story, she hopes for a miracle by chasing Kenji's footsteps. How is the relationship between Clara, Kenji, and Miyu?

title: Rumah Belanda
storyline: Raya, an author, is hired by a millionaire called Hilda to write a biography on Aline. She gets sent to live in a mansion so she can write the book in peace. But once there, she and her two children become the haunting target of a mysterious entity. Realising that the house holds a deep, dark secret, Raya sets out to uncover the mystery behind it. —Anonymus

Desperate for a job, Naya lucked out as her best friend offers her a job as a housekeeper at a 5 star hotel by the beach. But the hotel has one strange rule : Never ever open room number 308 under any circumstance. Based on the true legend of Nyi Roro Kidul, the spirit of the Queen of the South Sea that supposedly lives in room 308 in Samudra Hotel. —Anonymous

title: Wewe
storyline: A family move to a new, creepy house. While the parents fight a lot, their youngest daughter missing. It said that she was taken by a supernatural being called Wewe Gombel.

title: Sengkolo: Malam satu suro
storyline: Ibrahim, a mortician who lost his family in a terrible incident, quits his job. When a rich family in their village died mysteriously, the residents believed it was black magic. There were no bathers who wanted to bathe them, until the village head asked Ibrahim for help. Although reluctant, Ibrahim finally agreed. After a year, he finds clues about his family's death and confronts the evil that awaits him in the cursed house. Will he be able to fight the devil with his lost faith?

title: Best Friend?
storyline: Tania is the golden child of the teachers because she is smart. But her schoolmates find her too serious. Moli, the new student, is the exact opposite of Tania. But the other students, also reject her for being too extreme. Nobody is willing to go with Moli except Tania. Seeing Moli's life, Tania suddenly feels that her life is very boring. She starts doing all the things that Moli does - speeding in a car, clubbing, cigarettes, alcohol, and even sex. Tania enjoys all this, especially the attention she gets from her schoolmates due to the change in her. When her family finds out about her dramatic change, Tania chooses to get away from them. However the party ends when Moli leaves her. And Tania has to fight alone to find the way back to her true self. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Hantu Jamu Gendong
storyline: Kafka never believe in ghost, but somehow he always gets the chance to see the ghost with her medicine basket thinking that she's human.

title: Turis Romantis
storyline: Turis Romantis is 2015 Indonesian romantic film having Shaheer Sheikh in lead role.

title: Tutuge
storyline: The presence of Ameera in Bali is looking for inspiration to break her deadlock as a mystery writer. Ameera's encounter with Ketut leads her into the mysterious story of a Balinese woman, Laras, a very artistic villa owner. Many mysteries full of irregularities and thousands of question marks arise in Ameera's mind. It turns out that the beginning of all the mysteries that haunt the lives of Ameera and Laras comes from Tutuge, a Balinese word that means: followed by spirits.

title: The Watcher
storyline: Stuck at home with broken leg, Krishna made use of the telescope his friends gave him and watched suspicious activities from his new neighbor, Markus.

title: Rasuk 2
storyline: Isabella (Nikita Willy), a medical student who is undergoing intern, feels uncomfortable with her sixth sense ability. She tries hard to think it do not exist, so she could live normally. However, the incident in the autopsy room when dissecting a woman's body without identity changes all her views. The corpse continues to follow, terrorize her, even possess her for help. This condition disrupts Isabela's relationship with her friends and threatens her studies. The only person who could understand Isabela and give her support is her sister, Fransisca Inggrid (Asri Welas). In the midst of her efforts to escape from the disturbance that threaten her life, Isabela falls in love with Radja (Achmad Megantara). For the first time in her life, Isabela meets someone who could understand her strengths besides Fransisca Inggrid. The disturbances experienced by Isabela lead her to uncover one by one the mystery of the death of the spirit that has been bothering her all this time. There was no choice for Isabela but to accept her strengths, and to help the spirit finish her business. Even though she has to risk the safety of her live.

title: Malaikat Tanpa Sayap
storyline: When Vino's life falls apart, he has to make tough decisions to save his younger sister. But when he meets Mura, he begins to regret the choices he has made.

title: Hiruk-Pikuk Si Al-Kisah
storyline: Siman discovers a foreign crew shooting a moon landing. He gets caught and his tongue is cut off. He goes through life in slow motion, imitating an astronaut in outer space, labeled as crazy.

title: Gara-Gara Bola
storyline: Ahmad, has a small T-shirt design business, while his best friend, Heru, works in his father's noodle restaurant. They are big fans of soccer and live at the same rented place. On July 2006, four days before the World Cup semifinals, they place a bet on their favorite team, Germany. But Italy wins instead. So the bookies give them only one night to pay their debt or they have to face the debt collector sent by the mafia. Things get worse when Heru is fired by his boss, and when they are thrown out of the rented place they live in.

title: Bajaj Bajuri the Movie
storyline: When Bajuri (Ricky Harun) gets money from selling his inheritance, the problem starts. He, his family, thugs, and police were trapped in a horrendous comedy action.

title: Perempuan Berkelamin Darah
storyline: Nine days after his death, Abraham had not yet been buried, in fulfillment of Abraham's final message: "There will be no funeral until Martha comes home." Martha's return from Sabah, Malaysia, was certainly a joy for her family, especially her mother Orpa and her sister Bertha. However, after two years abroad, Martha turned out to be seriously depressed due to the rape she experienced while working as a laborer on an oil palm plantation. As head of the family, Orpa must also be a strong woman. However, because the environment was less conducive, Martha again became a victim of sexual harassment.

title: Layar
storyline: Ani had worked at Merapi Theater for 20 years when the cinema was closed due to the pandemic. Employees were mowed down. The screen has to be closed. Marni tries to maintain the only cinema with all her efforts. She agrees with the cinema owner. She is allowed to run the cinema business without any funds from the owner, who is looking for a buyer for the cinema building.

title: Pasutri Gaje
storyline: Newlyweds, Adimas and Adelia have just moved into a new house. For the sake of the house installments, Adimas asked Adelia to postpone having children. But they are under pressure from the office environment, as well as pressure from their home. When Adelia said that her menstruation was two weeks late, Adimas immediately announced to everyone that Adelia was pregnant. Adimas soon became the family's favorite son-in-law. Adelia felt guilty and guilty for lying. He asked Adimas to tell the truth that she was not pregnant. However, Adimas is hesitant to do this, because he cannot bear the shame and ridicule of people who doubt his ability to get Adelia pregnant, let alone give up his favorite daughter-in-law status.

title: Ketika Cinta Bertasbih 2
storyline: After nine years in Egypt, Azzam (Kholidi Asadil Alam) finally finishes his study and return to Indonesia. But good luck is not on his side yet, he still struggle to find job and love.

title: Scandal Makers
storyline: Oscar, a has-been celebrity, is dying to get his name back up, when an opportunity finally appears albeit in form of a scandal: his love child from the past, Karin, suddenly shows up, with a baby of her own named Gempa.

title: Gerbang Neraka
storyline: The oldest pyramid in the world is found in Indonesia. A journalist must team up with an archaeologist and a shaman to uncover the mystery of the pyramid. When they found out that this ancient pyramid is a prison for a malevolent ancient demon, they must stop the demon from breaking out or it's the end of the world, as we know it.

title: Affair
storyline: Affair tells the story about a deadly love triangle. Reta and Santi are childhood friends, after not having met for several years they meet again in college. Reta falls in love with David, who Santi has had an affair with. Since Reta has a serious illness, Santi decides to keep her love affair a secret so that Reta's final time will be as good as possible. What Santi doesn't know is that Reta is in fact very much healthy and that she's lying to Santi in order to get David. Let the deadly games of deception begin. —Anonymous

title: Benyamin Biang Kerok
storyline: Knowing the headquarters and settlements of Betawi suburbs will be evicted, Pengki (Reza Rahadian), Somad (Adjis Doaibu), and Achie (Aci Resti) sabotage illegal casinos in Jakarta. They drain all bets to buy the land to be evicted. The casino belonged to Said (Qomar) who is gambling with Hengki (Hamka Siregar). These two people are the biggest mafia that controls gambling business. The problem becomes more complicated when Pengki falls in love with singer Aida (Delia Husein), Said's mistress, sold by her parents to pay the debt. As a wealthy Betawi, Pengki is considered a useless man. Her mother always assumes Pengki is just a spoiled child who wasting his mother's money. His love for Aida changes Pengki's attitude. Pengki now has the ideals: to have a school that can accommodate poor children. Unfortunately, Said spots Pengki-Aida's relationship and unmask him as he is lurking his casino. In the midst of such a complicated situation, Hengki invites Pengki, Somad, and Achie to cooperate. Hengki secretly has a grudge with Said because his precious watch was held hostage by Said. Hengki asks Pengki to take back his watch and take all Aida's parents debt contract to Said. So Pengki can freely take Aida from Pengki's hands. Pengki et al break into Said's house.

title: Critical Eleven
storyline: Ale and Anya first met on a flight from Jakarta to Sydney. Anya lured on the first three minutes, seven hours later they were sitting next to each other and know each other through conversation and laughter, and eight minutes before separating Ale sure he wants Anya.

title: 3 Pocong Idiot
storyline: Based on four friends Glenn, Pipin, Jadoel and Rivet. They are a fairly well-known boy band, which often appear in the cafes. Until one night, on the way to a cafe, Pipin, Jadoel, and Rivet suffered in a tragic accident that killed them. After the death, they were still hanging around like any other human. Pipin still pursuing his love for a beautiful lecturer, while Jadoel and Rivet are still looking for love themselves.

title: The Sun, the Moon, & the Hurricane
storyline: A story of one gay journey since he was in high school until in he's 32 years old. How he saw people around him changed, how himself changed simply to adapt, to survive. How all events in his life and people he met shaped his life and destiny. A story of the ever changing human. The endless search of happiness, the struggle to grow up and the battle with loneliness. —Andri Cung

title: Stay with Me
storyline: Boy Dimas (Boy William) and Deyna (Ully Triani) are a couple who promise to stay together forever. One day, Deyna gets the news that her parents died in a plane crash. The incident forces her to go to Europe and live with her Aunt. Six years passed. Boy becomes a film director and marries Key Hapsari (Natasha Ratulangi). As fate goes by, Boy bumps into Deyna who is now also married. Despite being married to other people and having separate lives, Boy still believes that Deyna should be with him.

title: Si Juki the Movie: Panitia Hari Akhir
storyline: Juki is a celebrity at the height of popularity. His innocent, humorous, and courageous attitude gains him the love of everyone. Until one mistake turns him into public enemy number one. But then, a fallen meteor is threatening to destroy Indonesia. When Erin, a talented young scientist asks Juki's help to stop the meteor, can Juki save Indonesia?

title: Uka-Uka the Movie: Nini Tulang
storyline: The popularaity of Uka-uka program on television makes Shelly want to participate in the courage test. The Uka-uka team is heading to the location of the latest courage test: Alas Moyang, which is close to Shelly's residence. Shelly, accompanied by Rama, Karin, Doni, and Eja, go to Alas Moyang. Shelly is accepted as a participant by Bayu, the producer of the tv program. As soon as the program shooting begins, Shelly shouts "bone", which is a taboo in the forest. Team Uka-uka and her friends panick. Suddenly Shelly disappears. The search begins, and the terror also begins. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rumah Teteh: Story of Helena
storyline: Brii lives in a boarding house with Nando, Kamil, Doni, and Asep. In the boarding house they often experience strange events and are terrorized by a female ghost wearing a white floral dress. Strangely, this coincides with Brii befriending a mysterious woman named Helena. Helena has a dark past that then makes Brii sympathize with her even though it means breaking their friendship because Brii's attitude has changed since getting close to Helena.

title: Galih dan Ratna
storyline: A story about life in transition, where there are two teenagers who are not ready to become an adult. But they demanded a lot by their environment without considering what exactly that they want. They only have each other to quietly encourage each other and pursue their dreams.

title: Lost in Papua
storyline:
In the deep jungle of Papua, Rangga (Edo Borne) and his team is on a mission to explore possible mining opportunities in the area. They do not realize they have entered a restricted area known as RKT 2000. Not long after that the team members are found missing one by one.

Three years later, Nadia (Fanny Fabriana), who is former fiance of Rangga, has still not forgotten the incident at Papua. David (Fauzi Baadilla), who used to be dumped by Nadia is not giving up his pursuit of chasing her. Nadia ignores David and decides to accept an assignment to Papua that is given by his boss, Mr. Wijaya(Didi Petet), who is Davids father.

Nadia departs for Papua and brings along a souvenir from his grandfather (Piet Pagau) to the head of Korowai tribe, who had saved his life previously. This is also the first time Nadia visited Papua and she falls in love with its natural surroundings. However, Nadia still could not forget the mysterious disappearance of Rangga.

The journey to the Korowai tribe village is not simple, and Nadia with her friends has to endure obstacles along the way. Eventually they manage to reach a primitive village where all their villagers are females. She is trying to ask them about Rangga. Can she find Rangga alive from these tribe?

title: Air Mata Buaya
storyline: Johan lives alone with his mother on a crocodile farm in West Java. The mother and child live in voluntary exile with a white crocodile they trust so much. Their lives are disrupted when Johan falls in love with a girl in town, Arumi, triggering a series of events that threaten the balance of their lives.

title: Danyang Mahar Tukar Nyawa
storyline: Galang, a farm worker, falls in love with Resti from a wealthy family. Resti's parents forbid Galang from loving his daughter. Not accepting his unrequited love, Galang decided to go to Mount Srandil in search of wonder. Galang's life was then full of riches. Prerequisite: The plant must regularly provide life-saving offerings. Once Dasmi, Galang's in-law, learned of her daughter-in-law's offering room. Galang also secretly discovered his father-in-law's offering room. Fearing for Resti's safety, Galang and Dasmi decide to go to Segoro Sewu to perform the tubal exchange ritual. Once in Segoro Sewu, they accidentally meet and engage in illicit relations as a condition of the exchange ritual.

title: Arumi, Night Is Blue
storyline: In the midst of chaos in her family and relationship with her boyfriend, Arumi realized that Juna, her colleague, was able to heal her sadness. They spent that blue night, which would define their future relationship.

title: Cahaya Cinta Pesantren
storyline: The daughter of a fisherman on Lake Toba failed to enter a favorite public school and later became a student at the Al-Amanah Islamic Boarding School.

title: Setannya Kok Beneran?
storyline: With their career acting as ghost-busting paranormals in a fake reality show is about to end, the three phony losers accepted an invitation for a friendly meet and greet in a village out of town. At least a taste of being a celebrity before their television career is over. They did not realize that the villagers didn't invite them for a fan meet, instead to get rid of an angry ghost that's terrorizing the village. Trapped with nowhere else to go, our scared fake heroes are forced to deal with a real ghost, or everyone will know that they are nothing but impostors. —Raya Fahreza

title: Koki-Koki Cilik
storyline: Bima, a child from an underprivileged family, managed to take part in the Cooking Camp, a very prestigious and expensive camping program. With all his shortcomings, Bima must challenge the cuisine of Chef Grant and compete with Audrey and Oliver. Luckily, Bima has friends who have enthusiasm. Can Bima become a champion? —Mwd

title: Preman
storyline: After his son witnesses a brutal murder by a notorious crime boss, a deaf Indonesian gangster is thrust into the fight of his life when he takes on his dangerous former allies, including a sociopath assassin, in order to protect his child.

title: Munkar
storyline: Herlina, who behaved strangely and was often bullied, died in an accident. Not accepting that their child had died, the parents sent Herlina's spirit with the help of a shaman to avenge Herlina against her friends at the Islamic boarding school.

title: Gita Cinta dari SMA
storyline: Love slowly grows when the new girl in school meets an unassuming boy from a run-down part of town, but her disapproving father stops them at every turn.

title: How Are You, Really?
storyline: When he was nineteen years old, Rendra, a tattoo artist, saw his father with other women and tried to chase them. That's when Rendra had a car accident that almost took his life. Rendra told his mother about the affair. He was surprised that his mother already knew but chose to ignore it because she didn't want a divorce. Disappointed, Rendra left his parents and covered the scars from the accident with tattoos, building a life of his own. He opens a service shop to make tattoos right in front of a flower shop whose owner manages to captivate his heart. The flower shop owner turns out to be unhappy with her husband and chooses to accept the harsh reality of her husband's infidelity.

title: Kurban: Budak Iblis
storyline: Due to economic difficulties and constant nightmares, Bella, along with her mother Dewi and younger brother Dio, move to Bandung to live in their inherited ancestral home from their father. Despite residing in the house, Bella continues to be haunted by nightmares. Eventually, she decides to uncover the truth behind the connection of these nightmares to her own life. It turns out that her father, Purnomo, holds a terribly dark secret within the house. Will Bella be able to unravel the secrets hidden within the house? Or will it lead to a disaster they cannot evade?

title: Manusia Setengah Salmon
storyline: Dika and his family want to move out of his house for a reason, but Dika doesn't feel well about it. As time goes, he feels well about his new house, and he found Patricia, his high school old friend. But the problem comes when his old love comes back to his life, and how Dika handles it?

title: Perahu Kertas
storyline: Tidal relationship between two human beings, Kugy (Maudy Ayunda) and Keenan (Adipati Dolken). Kugy is a tomboyish girl, cheerful, and who believes that she is the agent of Neptune.

title: Darah Perawan Bulan Madu
storyline: A young gentleman called Putra (Restu Sinaga) marries Amira (Indah Kalalo) and would like to give the best honeymoon experience for his wife in his privately owned island. However, strange ghostly incidents are haunting them as a newly wed couple. From an exotic bedroom to a swimming pool filled with excitement to their romantic bathroom and in every corner of the island, a female ghost dressed in a wedding gown is seeking blood debt from the couple. A dark secret is waiting to be revealed, changing their romantic night into a scary encounter with the ghost. Who is the ghost and why is she terrorizing them? based on AvistaZ —kanglasa

title: Sawadikap
storyline: Ocep gets tickets for a vacation to Thailand with his friends, Bryan and Ariel. When they arrive at Bangkok they take part a traditional celebration where the spirits of the dead go back to the earth.

title: Serigala Terakhir
storyline: Jarot and Ale are friends. They grow-up together since childhood. Have the same story, same condition but different in character. They made their gangs followed by extra member Lukman, Sadat, and Jago. Serigala Terakhir a.k.the Last Wolves is their gang name. They have a dream to be the biggest mafia that can they reach. —Mwd

title: Enam Batang
storyline: After she meets her husband's ex-girlfriend at a college reunion, a wife becomes consumed with jealousy and digs into the past.

title: Sang Martir
storyline: Rangga must overcome the hardships of being an orphan in an unjust world where thugs and gangs run rampant. Will Rangga be able to protect those he cares for?

title: Toilet Blues
storyline: Anjany run away from home after she was accused of being involved in an obscence act with her male friends

title: Demi Cinta
storyline: Bagus wants a woman, he should be at the same level with her. It is impossible for Bagus to have Cempaka, a secretary to the director, because he is unemployed and only high school graduate.

title: Nay
storyline: Nay, who's pregnant for about 11 weeks now, has to face life's adversities and the true nature of the people around her: her boyfriend Ben, her manager Ajeng, Ben's mother, and Pram - who she thinks is dependable. Shot entirely in a car.

title: Quarantine Tales
storyline: Quarantine Tales is a collection of stories by 5 directors who tell the stories of life experienced during the pandemic.

title: Thaghut
storyline: A female student named Ainun, who admires the figure of Abah Mulya, the owner of the Padepokan in Bumi Suwung village who is famous for his supernatural powers in curing various diseases. One day, surprising news came. Abah Mulya was found dead, which made Ainun sad. However, the fact that surprised him more was the fact that Abah Mulya was Ainun's biological father. Armed with the desire to see his father's funeral process for the last time, Ainun together with two of his friends, Bagas and Rini, were determined to go to Padepokan. The three of them managed to arrive safely. However, there were many irregularities that occurred. One of them is about Abah Mulya's will which wants Ainun to be his successor. Ainun was also caught in heretical teachings. So, how do Bagas and Rini save Ainun so she returns to the right path?

title: Epen Cupen the Movie
storyline: Celo a young man from Papua, prompting his father to go look for the lost twin brother since childhood. Celo set off by following the instructions of the dream of his father who saw his twin brother were in the battlefield. On arrival in the city of Jayapura, accidentally Celo met with Babe, a bankrupt businessman from Medan and asking him to look where the battlefield was. Babe involved a lot of debt just makes the problem Celo grow complicated. They were chased by debt collectors and hid in airport cargo warehouse, they unknowingly carried by air to Jakarta. In Jakarta, Celo and Babe involved a lot of new problems, especially when they pursued Nato Beko, gangs are again fighting dragons estate owned by William Male deer gang. Celo honest apart must find his twin brother, he was involved in the conflict between urban gangs, while Babe cunning also continue to utilize the cello to get his wish.

title: Aib #Cyberbully
storyline: 8 friends are trapped in a dangerous game. They revealed each other's shameful act to free themselves from the game.

title: Kamu Tidak Sendiri
storyline: Set in an office building at night, Mira, a workaholic, ambitious and independent person, works late and is about to go home. In the elevator, she meets Mika, a stranger who works in the same building as Mira. As soon as they got into the elevator, a massive earthquake caused the lift to break down. Mira has to accept the fact that this stranger was her only friend. Mira began to realize that she was very grateful to have Mika around. But not long after, she has to face the fact that she has to fight alone because of Mika's death. When Mira thinks everything will end tragically, a mysterious figure appears through a voice on the intercom. A security guard named Adrian tries to accompany her through everything. There is a unique relationship between them, which makes Mira finally able to make peace with her past.

title: Catatan Dodol Calon Dokter
storyline: Riva (Adipati Dolken) entered the Faculty of Medicine just because she joined her friend, Evi (Tika Bravani), her best friend since high school. When the co-ass program was started, Riva began to be close to Vena (Aurélie Moeremans), a beautiful co-ass of the hospital's shareholders, causing the relationship between Riva and Evi to crack, because each was ashamed to admit that they were more than friends. As a result of the mistake of the ridiculous mistake he made, Riva was blacklisted by the Professor. He began to hesitate and questioned his choice to become a doctor. But after seeing the death of a patient, then Riva was aware of the true meaning of the call and responsibility for his choice to become a doctor. Towards Evi's departure from his life, Riva also realized that what they had all this time was love. —Mwd

title: Topeng Bramacorah dan Media Sosial
storyline: Rama Wijaya is a tycoon who went viral due to his supposed "black business" which made him extremely succesful and wealthy. On the other hand, rumors about a masked killer who killed Rama Wijaya's men emerged. Ferly Pranata, a YouTuber and journalist, dared to interview Rama Wijaya to reveal the truth behind these rumors.

title: Sokola Rimba
storyline: One day, BUTET MANURUNG (Prisia Nasution) collapses in the middle of the forest, suffering from malaria. A tribal boy named NYUNGSANG BUNGO (Nyungsang Bungo), whom she doesn't know, comes to her rescue. He belongs to another clan of Anak Dalam that lives downstream Makekal, which is about 7-hour walk through the forest from upstream Makekal where Butet goes to teach. Unbeknownst to her, Bungo has actually been observing Butet teach the upstream children for some time. Her encounter with Bungo motivates Butet to also go and teach the downstream clan's children. But her good intentions don't get the blessing from both her superior at the agency where she works and from Bungo's clan people, who still believe that learning to read and write can bring calamities upon them. Despite the challenges, Butet is so inspired by Bungo's intelligence and eagerness to learn that she makes every effort to keep teaching him. Unfortunately, a disaster Bungo's clan has been dreading finally occurs. Butet is then forced to leave the jungle people she loves. Will she be able to return? —Miles Films Publicist

title: Mohon Doa Restu
storyline: Mel and Satya's love comes because they are used to it. Especially because their mothers, Widi and Ira, are close friends. So, when their two children want to get married, this is the perfect seal of friendship. Their old age will not be lonely. Of course there are four of them planning a wedding. But three months before the wedding, Mel suddenly has a new anxiety: is she really happy? Including whether he really wants Satya in his future? Now the couple's child and parents are fighting to cancel or continue the marriage. Testing each other what friendship, choice, and happiness mean.

title: Operation Wedding
storyline: A retired navy commander and single father who is very protective of his four daughters keeps threatening his daughters' boyfriends, preventing them to have real relationships. The girls have to find a way in order to be able to get married to their respective partners. —jetede

title: Air Mata Surga
storyline: A designer falls in love with a graduate student in Yogyakarta.

title: Mereka Bilang, Saya Monyet!
storyline: Adjeng lives alone in an apartment paid for by her boyfriend, a rich businessman. A writer of children's stories, she wishes to write short stories for adults; in this, she is mentored by Asmoro with whom she is also having sex.

title: The Perfect Husband
storyline: Ayla, a 3rd year high school girl, is enjoying her teenage years and her love affair with Ando, the rock band vocalist. She is very surprised when a young pilot named Arsen, who claims to be her husband. Ayla is upset, because she believes Tio, her father, who matches her with Arsen, because Ando is judged as a sloppy, tattooed, and has no future. Arsen is opposite of Ando: a bright young future pilot, a perfect husband for Ayla. Ayla tries hard to thwart this matchmaking. Unexpectedly Arsen is not easily shaken. Arsen remains patient with Ayla, even starting to have a plus in her eyes. Once, Ando succeeds to make Ayla flee and quit school. Tio unlocks the secret, why from the beginning he insists on matching Ayla with Arsen. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Keluarga Tak Kasat Mata
storyline: Keluarga Tak Kasat Mata (Invisible Family) is a story about a young man named Genta, telling a story about the company he used to work for in Yogyakarta. The story started when the company moved to a new building. That was where Genta and his workmates started to experience inexplicable incidents. Their nights became a series of intense moments. One by one, each employee was shown an apparition with a message. Terror upon terror happened as if proving the existence of other beings aside from us. One by one, assumptions arose, raising many questions to be resolved. Until finally came a point where Genta and co. were forced to ask a friend for help. They believed there was a mystery that must be solved immediately. Perhaps it was destined that through Rere, one by one the mystery began to get solved. But not all facts may be spoken out. Genta must find out the answers to his questions and curiosity from the start all on his own. Honest answers that only the Invisible Family can give.

title: Garuda Superhero
storyline: An anti-asteroid nuclear missile has been stolen by a terrorist group led by Durja King, who intends to use the weapon as a threat against the world's superpower countries. Only the Garuda Superhero, stands in the way of his evil plans.

title: Hari Ini Pasti Menang
storyline: Indonesia 2014. Gabriel Omar Baskoro rising star of Jakarta Metropolitan Football Club. His talent and persistence have brought Indonesian Football Team into 2014 World Cup final for the very first time in history and manage to pull through the quarter final against the mighty Brasil. Upon his return to Indonosia, Gabriel's life is torn between glory and integrity. Rumour has it, Gabriel's success is backed by a ruthless Indonesian mafioso group. Gabriel must choose to live by his ambitious coach or his honest-to-death father. Each choice has its own deadly consequence. Meanwhile, Andini, a dedicated sport journalist is doing an investigative report on mafioso's influence in Indonesian football. Andini's investigation leads to Gabriel's name among many others. What really happened to Gabriel Omar Baskoro, the real hero of Indonesian football, unfold during Andini's investigation. —Bogalakon Pictures

title: Maryam: Janji dan Jiwa yang Terikat
storyline: Maryam, whose life has never been free from the terror and shadow of a genie since birth. For 26 years, Maryam lived in the shackles of terror from an invisible figure who bound her with a dark promise, following her every step, whispering words that only she could hear. One day, she received mysterious letters whose meaning she never understood. Even though they were burned and thrown away, the letters always returned. Maryam realized that she was never alone and was always followed. The more she tried to escape, the tighter the shackles ensnared her, until Maryam no longer knew whether she was alive or simply belonged to the genie who followed her forever. Was this the journey of life she had to take? How long would this test bind her?

title: Turah
storyline: The residents of Kampung Tirang live in dilapidated shacks just to earn for their next meal. The hardworking and reliable Turah has been appointed by the cooperative leader to tend to complaints or settle conflicts that arise in the village. Peace in the settlement is disrupted when the alcoholic Jadag starts questioning the governance of the village. His accusations towards the leaders soon land both Turah and the whole village into further trouble.

title: Kultus Iblis
storyline: Naya and Raka were even more shaken when their father died horribly, his body suddenly mysteriously disappeared. They go to their father's hometown to find out their family's secrets, but end up getting trapped in a dangerous village full of terror.

title: Make Money
storyline: Mr. Tri (Ray Sahetapy) is a successful businessman but failed as a father. His children grow up to be arrogant and spoiled. One day, Mr. Tri planned to pretend to be dead and leave all his assets to the scavengers he met on the street.

title: Tembang Lingsir
storyline: Mala always deals with Tembang Lingsir, a song taught by her mother from her childhood. After a mysterious fire incident that killed her mother, Mala lost her voice. Then, Mala lives in her uncle's house, Gatot, and his wife Gladys with their two children, Daisy and his younger brother, Ronald. At the house, Mbok Rahma also takes care of their needs. Daisy is disturbed by Mala's presence, while Ronald is happy. Since Mala's arrival, the atmosphere of the house is no longer the same. Many strange events appear. Mbok Rahma accuses Mala of causing all this chaos. Mala feels that there is a big secret in this house that make all the terror appear. Especially when she discovers that she has a twin sister she has never known before. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kado Hari Jadi
storyline: A young man wakes up chained to metal chair in a room painted a sickening shade of pink and illuminated by a single blinding block of neon lights placed at his right. A razor blade hangs on a string before him, and sharp pink pencils are aimed at his left eye and stomach. He does not know where he is or why he is there. Periodically, a beautiful young woman dressed in floral summer dress enters the room and performs cruel and calculated acts of seemingly senseless torture. Who is she? Why is she doing this? What has he done to deserve this? And most importantly, will he survive? —paul agusta

title: Surga Yang Tak Dirindukan 2
storyline: The sequel to the 2015 film "Surga Yang Tak Dirindukan" follows the conclusion of the conflict in the marriage life of an architect and a married man who was forced to marry another woman.

title: I Love You from 38000 Feet
storyline: When Aletta (Michelle Ziudith) heads to Bali for a holiday, she meets Arga (Rizky Nazar) and they fall head over heels in love. They spent every waking moment with each other in Bali and then the time came for Aletta to return to Jakarta. Arga promises to find her and marry her. But surprisingly, he never shows up. Was it all a lie, or did something happen to him? —iflix

title: Suka Duka Tawa
storyline: Tawa, a young comedian, gained popularity by making the bitter story of her childhood and the shame of her father, Mr. Keset, a senior comedian who abandoned her, into her comedy material. Tawa's popularity soared, while Mr. Keset's career was destroyed. When Tawa met her father again, he was willing to reveal all his shame to help Tawa. Their relationship slowly thawed, until Tawa discovered a side of her father she never knew. In the midst of all this, Tawa was not alone. She was surrounded by her absurd, hilarious, and antics-comrades who were always loyal to her, even laughing at the hardships of life together. From them, Tawa learned to grow, find courage, and turn pain into laughter.

title: 172 Days
storyline: The journey of Zira, a woman who is far from religion. One day, Zira decided to hijrah and start improving herself. Zira's emigration journey also brought Zira to meet the figure of Amer Azzikra. when Amer invited Zira to ta'aruf and get married. Zira, who was initially hesitant, finally accepted Amer's proposal. Slowly, Amer began to gently guide Zira to become better. Zira also believes that Amer is the best gift from Allah SWT in her hijrah process. As Zira and Amer's love grows bigger, tests come to their home life. Amer fell ill and finally died. Amer's death was certainly a difficult trial in Zira's life.

title: Hari Ini Akan Kita Ceritakan Nanti
storyline: Domestic conflicts that are being experienced by Angkasa and Lika. As the father of Angkasa, Narendra certainly tries to defuse the situation experienced by his son. But, the different views on life and marriage make the discussion between the two to find a solution tough. Until finally we are brought back to the past when Narenda fought for the love of Ajeng who is of a different caste economically. The story of this love struggle will take place in 1987, where young Narendra tries to win the heart of young Ajeng. Even though they have different conflicts and stories, the struggle for love between Narenda and Angkasa can be united by a red line, a sentence "Love will mean more when it is fought for".

title: Catatan (Harian) Si Boy
storyline: A circle of friends risking their Friendship, Trust, Love and Hope in search of a legend. A young and privileged teenager with a golden heart, beset with challenges and tribulations we face today with the goal to open many young people's mind with inspirations and hopes that drive them in achieving their dreams. To get out of their comfort zone and finish what they started. —Anonymous

title: PSP: Gaya Mahasiswa
storyline: Monos, Rojali, Ade, Andra, Adit, Dindin, James, and Omen are students who are crazy, ignorant, but cool in music and are members of the OM Pancaran Sinar Petromaks (PSP). They are always agree in all matters, but in romance they make bets, as do Rojali, Monos and Ade. Ade has fallen in love with Fatima, a beautiful and sexy boarding house nanny. Dindin, Andra, and Adit are the trouble maker. They like to make pranks on campus so they are subject to sanctions for dropping out. They are shocked by the case of robber. This case developes into a hoax, which involved their college friends. Omen and James are moved to investigate this case with the help of PSP friends. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Honeymoon
storyline: David, a successful entrepreneur, is betrayed by an artist and model, Zevana, whom he deems an ideal wife-to-be. He turns his attention then to search for a chaste woman who lives a prudish life. When he finds a girl named Farah, he immediately marries her. Their first night together became a nightmare for Farah. She isn't ready for intercourse. David's mother, longing for a grandchild, mistakenly sees pregnancy symptoms and takes her to a doctor only to find out that she is still a virgin. David and Farah finally goes away for a honeymoon. Still, the destination's exotism and romantic ambiance can't dissolve Farah's fear. She seems to suffer from a past trauma. Later on Farah's distress deepens when she finds her husband being in a hotel room with another woman. Feeling betrayed, she decides to get divorced. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: KKN di Desa Penari: Luwih Dowo, Luwih Medeni
storyline: Six students who conducted Community Service Program (CSP) in a remote village, Nur, Widya, Ayu, Bima, Anton, and Wahyu, never thought their chosen village was extraordinary. Pak Prabu, the village head, warns them not to cross the prohibited gate. The mysterious place might have something to do with the beautiful dancer who starts to disturb Nur and Widya. One by one began to feel the strangeness of the village. Bima begins to change his attitude. Their CSP is a mess. The invisible inhabitants of the village do not like them. Nur finally discovers that one of them violates a fatal rule in the village. The terror of the mysterious dancer is even more sinister. They ask for help from Mbah Buyut, a local shaman. Too late. They are threatened not be able to return safely from the village known as the dancer's village.

title: Test Pack
storyline: Rahmat (Reza Rahadian), a psychologist who specializes in marriage counseling, and Tata (Acha Septriasa), working in advertising, have been married 7 years without children. While Rahmat is happy with their current life, Tata is set on having children and has made it her number one priority, trying everything from nutrition, fertility calendars, and even sexual positions to reach her goal of having a family. —Mwd

title: My Journey: Mencari Mata Air
storyline:
Four young people; Chinta, Cindy, Tasya and Celine intend to fill their holidays with friends come from New York named Lucas who are interested in the environment, especially the water springs. They are desperate to roam the wilds find a spring that allegedly are increasingly rare because of the development of civilization.

Accidentally escape from the guard, five teenagers were trying to rely on their instincts in to the wild. Many lessons and experiences they get, including when I had to struggle to prevent fires caused by negligence travelers. Fortunately in bad situation, the driver at the same time their guide, a man named Heronimus from Flores, appears to provide help. Along the way later, they met with several leaders who then help their quest for the water springs. Ki Barja, a villager who devote themselves to maintaining the forest, Maya and her team, activists, researchers insect dragonfly is an indicator for the purity of the water and in the end they stop at the traditional village, met Chinta Grandma "Bunda Ully" together with the volunteers who have been struggling preserve the environment and indigenous peoples.
