storyline: In the early 90s, Ina, a naive but diligent and strong personality woman, lived in a poor orphanage filled with orphans with various behaviors. One day, the Village Chief brought a quiet child named Andi who was the only survivor of a family who died mysteriously and sadistically. Ina accepted Andi even though the institution's financial condition was not good. She was sure that with love Andi would recover from his trauma. However, since Andi's arrival, strange things began to happen. They started receiving aid funds from strangers and they were happy. But, they also began to see pregnant women who haunted them and unnatural deaths occurred at the orphanage. Ina must protect her children and save the house from unseen dark forces. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pasar Setan
storyline: Rani, a female police officer who handled a murder case in the restricted forest where he served. This case involved Tamara, a vlogger horror who was a victim of the chancel culture of the netizens due to being caught uploading a fake sighting video. Knowing the legendary story of the Devil's Market, Tamara and his team then went on a journey to find the Devil's Market to prove its existence and restore their good name. Problems arose when Tamara discovered the restricted area, but instead of being able to correct a good name, they were instead trapped inside it.

title: Oo Nina Bobo
storyline: This is an Indonesian horror film based on the lullaby 'Oo Nina Bobo'.

title: Satu Hari dengan Ibu
storyline: Dewa, a troubled young man, finds himself trapped in a never-ending time loop. Every time he wakes up, he relives the day his mother passed away. He desperately longs to break free from this painful time loop. In the process, Dewa becomes aware of the mistakes he has made. With the help of Putri and his friends, Dewa continues to strive to become a better person and to be more devoted to his mother.

title: Perempuan Pembawa Sial
storyline: Mirah, cursed to see every man she loves meet a tragic end, faces ostracization in a village in Java after her husband Agus dies mysteriously. She finds solace working at Rancak Bana's eatery, he takes her in even after knowing her past. As Bana falls for Mirah, she uncovers the curse, "Bahu Laweyan," linked to her stepsister Puti, who seeks revenge for past torments. Determined to break free, Mirah chooses love over fear, ignoring the curse to forge their own destiny, regardless of the consequences.

title: Suami-Suami Takut Istri: The Movie
storyline: A film version of a popular Indonesian sitcom, "Suami Suami Takut Istri: The Movie" follows four close friends who travel on vacation to Bali with their domineering wives. The four wives (with two young daughters in tow) think their husbands are taking them on a romantic second honeymoon, but the real reason for the trip is that the four guys have secretly gotten tickets for a concert featuring sexy girl group "Trio Ganas", which includes their neighbor Pretty. —Anonymous

title: Jadi Tuh Barang
storyline: Bonar, a young man who is facing a difficult time. Just dumped by his girlfriend, Cantika, because she was considered not serious and not fighting enough in their relationship. Bonar must face various pressures of life. In the midst of his despair. Bonar is accompanied by his two best friends, Awang and Wongso, who are always by his side even though they themselves face their own challenges in life. The three of them find an unexpected way to survive when they get an offer to become a rain shaman from Zara. Although initially skeptical because the job is considered mystical, they still accept the offer for the money. Bonar is pressed by financial problems, and the urge to immediately propose to Cantika to her mother. Awang with family economic problems, and Wongso with his investment problems. Bonar finally agrees to play the role of the rain shaman. In creative and silly ways, through a powerful person named Ki Rengga, Bonar tries to fulfill his duties, and must compete with Arnold who has already received Ibu Cantika's blessing.

title: Bayi Ajaib
storyline: Kosim became rich after finding gold in the river in the village of Hirupbagja. He soon marries Sumi and lives a prosperous life as a landlord. When their child, Didi, was born, his soul was possessed by Albert Dominique's spirit, which was thirsty for blood and terrorized the villagers. Kosim tries to cover up this fact because he is currently running for the new Village Head. He must be able to beat Soleh, who has already won the sympathy of the villagers. But when the spirit threatens his family's life, Kosim decides to free Didi from the influence of Albert Dominique. To do this, Kosim must confront Dorman, a black sorcerer who wants to avenge his great-grandfather on the people who have destroyed his life.

title: Siap Gan!
storyline: Nina accidentally enters the Paskibra's (Flag flying group) training center. In that place Nina meets with a veteran of historical actors, Pak Sakiran. He makes Nina really want to fly the red and white flag in a flag ceremony.

title: Marmut Merah Jambu
storyline: It was based on Raditiya Dika 5th book with the same title. The story started when Dika visited Ina's Father before her wedding day, on his visit Dika told his experience on having Ina as his crush, making a Detective groups with his other friends Bertus, and Cindy. Dika made the Detective group as he and Bertus are trying to be famous on his High School, since they are highly in-popular at his school, and also trying to get Ina's attention, for Dika, as for Bertus he wants to be popular among the girls. The Trio Detective Group, Cindy, Bertus, and Dika soon became best friends forever. However, on the last mission of his Detective group (Dika), three of them could not resolve the mission of the "Demonic Pink Guinea Pig" that trying to kill the Principal. Will they able to resolve the case? What's the meaning behind the Pink Guinea Pig that everyone taught it was a monster?

title: Assalamualaikum Beijing
storyline: The day before the wedding, Asmara (Revalina S Temat) finds out the bitter truth that her lover, Dewa (Ibnu Jamil) had an affair with his office friend, Anita (Cynthia Ramlan). Although Dewa begged for the wedding to continue, Asma was already heartbroken. Moreover, the relationship that they had once resulted in a fetus. Anita was pregnant. Asma accepted a job offer in Beijing. The opportunity was obtained through the help of Sekar (Laudya Cynthia Bella) and Ridwan (Deddy Mahendra Desta), her husband. In Beijing, Asma met Zhong Wen (Morgan Oey), a handsome man who introduced her to the love legend of Ashima, a beautiful princess from Yunan. Zhong Wen's kindness and attention made Asma slowly open her heart. Although she was hesitant when Dewa followed her to Beijing. Unfortunately, before the relationship continued, Asma was diagnosed with APS, a syndrome that threatens her life and can die at any time.

title: 7 Hari 24 Jam
storyline: The power couple didn't have the luxury of quality time. Tyo (Lukman Sardi) is a successful film director and his wife, Tania (Dian Sastrowardoyo), is a manager at a prestigious financial firm whose career is on the upward track. With both devoted to their careers, they barely have time for each other and their 5-year-old daughter. But when Tyo suddenly collapses on the film set, he is rushed to the hospital and diagnosed with Hepatitis A. Tania is unable to take time off of work because she is being considered for a very important promotion, so she tries to juggle the demands of her job and taking care of her child and Tyo in the hospital. After three days of trying to do everything on her own, Tania collapses out of sheer exhaustion, causing her to become Tyo's roommate in the hospital. Now together 24/7, it seems that Tyo and Tania can spend the quality time they never really had before. But when secrets between the couple begin to emerge from their visiting coworkers and bosses, will Tyo and Tania's marriage turn into an all-out war?

title: Ku Tak Percaya Kamu Mati
storyline: Bagong became a hit-and-run victim. Kinasih, his auntie who cares for him since childhood because her mother is depressed due to the man who impregnated her, ran away. Her paralyzed mother doesn't know that her child has died. Fantar, Bagong's friend, who doesn't believe that Bagong is dead, considered crazy by his classmates. That belief makes Bagong's soul return to the real world. These two friends of different nature go again as usual. Bagong is again caring for his mother Furthermore, these two friends are looking for the impactor. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Cinta Pertama, Kedua & Ketiga
storyline: Raja and Asia share the same responsibilities: taking care of their own single parents. If Raja (Angga Yunanda) wants to live independently like his two sisters, Asia (Putri Marino) has chosen to be devoted to her mother, who she feels has sacrificed everything for her. Then, Dewa (Slamet Rahardjo Djarot), Raja's father, and Linda (Ira Wibowo), Asia's mother, begin to unite their hearts. Raja is happy, Asia hesitates. When Raja convinces Asia that their parents are compatible to each other, Raja and Asia slowly fall in love. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pantaskah Aku Berhijab
storyline: Sofi, a young girl who faces a life full of challenges and hardships. Sofi summarizes her difficult life struggles, from romance problems to a personal life that never seems to improve. Sofi's feelings of never having been lucky in her life make her feel hopeless. Her every attempt always led to failure, making her feel that luck never sided with her. Her life felt ruined because she had never felt the slightest bit of luck. Although Sofi faces many challenges in her life, she has a devoted male best friend supporting her. Her best friend named Aqsa, who is always there for Sofi in all situations, is both hard and happy. Aqsa is a kind-heated figure and always provides moral support to Sofi, who often feels she has never been lucky in her life. Together with Aqsa, Sofi gains support to continue to survive and forget her past.

title: Kurung Manuk (Bird Cage)
storyline: Manuk an overly imaginative man child who never leaves his bedroom who ends up not only becoming the black sheep of the neighborhood but also the prime suspect of a serial murder case.

title: Sesat: Yang Sudah Pergi Jangan Dipanggil Lagi
storyline: After her father died, Amara (Laura Theux), her mother and sister have to move to granpa's house in a remote village in the middle of the forest. Amara feels there is something strange with the village. All residents are old. Every sunset, all come out of the house carrying offerings while chanting a terrifying spell. Apparently in the village there is a sacred well inhabited by Satan Beremanyan who can grant any request. Amara wants to chat with her deceased father for the last time and performs the ritual of calling Beremanyan. Apparently Beremanyan does not grant the request, but harms her loved ones. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Pintu-Pintu Surga
storyline: Latifah feels tested when her husband dies: she has to take care of her ADHD child and her husband's educational foundation. Arman, Latifah's ex-lover, helps take care of her husband's foundation. This situation brings them closer together. Finally, Arman decides to propose to Latifah. Latifah is faced with the question: is she able to give her heart to becoming a second wife.

title: Te[rekam]
storyline: Olga, Jupe and Monique prepare for making their next horror film by recording it at a friends house. However, they come quick to realize that the house itself may be occupied by supernatural forces.

title: Ambyar Mak Byar
storyline: A young couple in love, Jeru and Bethari, want to fight for their love and dream of becoming famous musicians with Rick, Aruna, and other members of the Konco Seneng band. However, Bethari's family, who do not approve of their relationship, have the heart to sabotage all the efforts made by Konco Seneng. How will their story continue?

title: Kuntilanak Kamar Mayat
storyline: While searching for her missing sister, a college student experiences frightening dreams filled with other-worldly apparitions.

title: Generasi 90an: Melankolia
storyline: At his age who is looking for identity, Abby (Ari Irham) always makes his sister, Indah (Aghniny Haque), as a figure he admires. Suddenly, Abby had to accept the fact that Indah was lost in a plane crash. Abby, who is difficult to let Indah finally become closer to Sephia (Taskya Namya), his sister's best friend. But could the presence of Sephia help Abby release his sister or leave her instead? —Visinema

title: Tanda Tanya
storyline: A story of interconnecting lives in modern day Semarang, all struggling with the differences of their faiths.

title: Mukidi
storyline: A misunderstanding resulted in MUKIDI being accepted to work as a Credit Analyst. He also approves all credit applications to help many people. Unfortunately, that decision resulted in disaster. Together with his wife, MARKONAH, and his two friends, SAMINGAN and WAKIJAN, Mukidi must clean up the huge losses he caused.

title: Yowis Ben 2
storyline: After their relationship broken by Susan, Bayu faces rising house rent price which makes him, his mother and Cak Jon threatened to be expelled. Fortunately Yowis Ben is popular in Malang and is the only hope that Bayu resolves his financial problems. Unfortunately each personnel has a problem. Yayan is married to Mia; Nando's has family crisis because his father decides to remarry; and Doni has the ambition to have a girlfriend. Bayu fires Cak Jon, then entrusts Yowis Ben to Cak Jim, who claims he has raised many national artists. They also move to Bandung. But, the credibility of Cak Jim is suspicious and Bayu must also soften the heart of the super fiercely father because Bayu fells in love with Asih, his daughter. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Nakalnya Anak Muda
storyline: Two young women agree to spend the weekend in a remote vacation house deep in the woods with four young men they meet in a night club-only for someone in a blue rain slicker to turn up and pummel them with a double-headed mallet.

title: Bad Boy in Love
storyline: At his school, Jethro is respected, good at one-on-one combat, and intelligent. Jethro is in the same class as Sara, a Solo girl who is shy, simple, and always wears her hair in a ponytail. Sara's goal in moving to Bogor was to focus on studying to enter medicine. Initially, Jethro didn't pay attention to Sara, who he thought didn't exist enough. Sara secretly liked Jethro, who at that time was dating Lea, a social girl who was the idol of many men. One day, Sara treated Jethro's injured hand, Jethro began to notice Sara's existence and the two of them grew closer. Anin, Sara's close friend, does not accept that Sara is starting to get close to Jethro, she challenges Jethro to a fight as if she was fighting over Sara. This also made Lea jealous, thinking that Jethro had a special relationship with Sara. In the end, will Sara and Jethro become a couple?

title: Eiffel I'm in Love 2
storyline: 14 years passed. Tita who was a freshman in high school, has become an adult woman. For 14 years also, Tita and Adit live long distance relationship. Everyday, their relationship is always tinged with quarrels. Even Tita began to get restless because Adit did not propose her, while the two friends of Tita, Nanda and Uni, were married. Will Tita and Adit's relationship end up happily? Or are they not meant to be together? —Soraya Intercine Film

title: Kenapa Harus Bule?
storyline: Pipin Kartika (Putri Ayudya) is obsessed to get 'bule' a.k.a foreigner boyfriend to be her husband. By the age of 30 she still hasn't got it. Almost frustrated because she always met a jerk bule in Jakarta, Pipin decided to move to Bali to seek love. Arriving in Bali, for the help of her best friend, Arik (Michael Kho), Pipin acquainted with the mulatto man, Buyung (Natalius Chendana). Pipin initially liked Buyung, but after she knows that Buyung was her childhood friend disguised as a bule, so Pipin will love him, Pipin then close her heart to like him as a boyfriend and tried to get in touch with an Italian gentleman named Gianfranco (Cornelio Sunny). Pipin fall in love, but her dream was destroyed after Gianfranco was a liar. Pipin become used to be, a single woman with saving deposits and with no bule boyfriend. Haunted by the fear of being an old maid, she made one last attempt to gain true love in her life. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Nagih Janji Cinta
storyline: Bagas Mahardika and Ajeng Larasati have known each other since the first day of orientation for new students at the Faculty of Economics and Business at UNS, Solo. Love grows between them. But for six semesters, both of them harbor feelings. Bagas never dare to confess his love because Ajeng is a rich, beautiful, popular, and noble girl, different from his being the only child of a small farmer. Ajeng can only dare to give the sign. They are both suddenly desperate. RM Cokrodiningrat and Rahayu, Ajeng's parents, introduce Ajeng to Satrio. The Cokrodiningrat family is also close to the Satrio family. Bagas and Ajeng finally get the courage to talk heart to heart and confess their feelings to each other. Bagas musters all the courage to meet Mr. Cokro and Mrs. Rahayu to introduce himself as Ajeng's lover. Both are against the relationship. Bagas makes a promise of love to Ajeng in front of her parents. He will prove himself worthy as a prospective son-in-law. Ajeng's best friend, Rere, offers to work at her coffee shop. Bagas' hard work makes Rere raise Bagas to become a manager at the coffee shop. However, the relationship between Bagas and Ajeng cracks because Bagas discovers that the coffee shop is Ajeng's, not Rere's.

title: Tasbih Kosong
storyline: Asti and Umar, the employees of a Statistics Office, are assigned to update data in a remote village in a district in Sulawesi. Umar and Asti do not realize that the place where they are taking shelter is the house of the man who made a deal with the devil to become rich instantly. Difficult road access and long distances between houses become obstacles, so they are forced to live in the village for quite a long time. One day, Umar meets Rajeng, and they fall in love. Unknowingly, Rajeng entered into an agreement with her adoptive parents as the successor to the black magic they had. The arrival of Asti and Umar exposes various guises of the local villagers. Asti and Umar's lives begin to feel threatened.

title: Aku Cinta Kamu
storyline: An omnibus of four different love stories that presents an intimate portrait of each person overcoming various romantic problems.

title: Wa'alaikumussalam Paris
storyline: Itje hoped that her life will change drastically after marrying a French man, Clement, who promised to take her to Paris. When the harvest season arrives, Dadang, an Indonesian, came. Itje asked Dadang to teach her husband to pray and recite the Qur'an. But the presence of Dadang and Camille.

title: Mari Lari
storyline: Rio Kusumo (Dimas Aditya) is a pessimistic young man. One day, he suddenly takes part in a marathon race and meets a girl named Anisa (Olivia Jensen). Anisa invites Rio to run and they must finish the marathon on the slopes of Mount Bromo.

title: Ronggeng Kematian
storyline: Four youths - ADIT, RICKY, YUDI, and AKSAN - receive a horrifying invitation to return to the village where they underwent an internship seven years ago. What should have been an appreciation turns into a terrifying experience as they encounter SULASTRI, a vengeful and terrifying Ronggeng dancer ghost. Filled with malice, Sulastri seeks not recognition but their destruction, unleashing a trail of horrifying terror upon them.

title: Petualangan Anak Penangkap Hantu
storyline: Rafi, Chacha, and Zidan, who are members of the Ghost Catching Children (APH) Team, are asked for help from Gita, whose village where she lives has been hit by a drought and the terror of forest ghosts who have kidnapped several residents. In the middle of the investigation, the APH Team began to experience mystical disturbances that were frightening and could not be explained. Will the Team of Ghost Catching Children be able to Conquer Fear and solve the mystery of the disaster that has befallen the village so far?

title: Get Married 2
storyline: After four years of marriage, Mae (Nirina Zubir) and Rendy (Nino Fernandez) have not been blessed with children, unlike Mae's three best friends, Eman (Aming Sugandhi), Guntoro (Deddy Mahendra Desta), and Beni (Ringgo Agus Rahman)--all are married with children. When Rendy forgets their wedding anniversary, Mae sulks and asks to go home to her parents. But instead of persuading Mae to return to her husband, Babe Mardi (Jaja Mihardja) and Bu Mardi (Meriam Bellina) want to help her divorce him because he failed to give them grandchildren. —HOOQ

title: Gg. Damai IV
storyline: "The feud between two groups in the village, namely Wadidaw and The Bundaz, both harboring deep-seated grudges especially after the recent election, are trying to return to normal life. Meanwhile, a group of hackers causing unrest among residents, such as spreading fake servers, defamation, AI-generated hoax videos, and child cyber grooming, is operating in Gang Damai IV. Ultimately, the SIBER team must intervene and follow up on the cases that have occurred."

title: Star Syndrome
storyline: Jay Adi is a former vocalist of Jay Adi and The Others who disbanded himself after 3 albums because of the vocalist's ego. Now, Jay Adi is trying to revive himself as a soloist in the music industry, which is different from the time he was famous. It is hoped that his meeting with Nur, a young singer full of potential, will become a duet partner who can bring him back into the spotlight.

title: Wage
storyline: Wage is a biopic movie about the creator of the national anthem of Indonesia titled Indonesia Raya (The Great Indonesia), Wage Rudolf Soepratman.

title: Tukar Tambah Nasib
storyline: Naya lives and grows in an environment full of misery and endless problems. It's in this dark moment that Master offers Naya the opportunity to exchange her fortune.

title: Yowis Ben 3
storyline: Bayu's (Bayu Skak) life is comfortable because of Yowis Ben's growing popularity and Asih (Anya Geraldine), his girlfriend, also always supports him in his every dream. Bayu begins to feel anxious about his future when Nando (Brandon Salim), his keyboard player, decides to study music abroad; Cak Jon (Arief Didu) decides to leave Yowis Ben and pursue his love; Mbak Rini (Putri Ayudya) is engaged to Captain Arjuna (Denny Sumargo). The situation is worse still by the arrival of Susan (Cut Meyriska), Bayu's ex who makes them close again without Asih knowing. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: 5 Cowok Jagoan: Rise of the Zombies
storyline: 5 lifelong friends attempt to rescue a damsel in distress from gangsters and zombies in this action packed comedy.

title: 11:11: Apa yang Kau Lihat?
storyline: One night at 11:11 sharp, Galih (Rendy Kjaernet), an archaeological student who likes diving and photography, found the whereabouts of Dewi, her mother. Dewi disappeared when Galih was a child on a remote island called Tanjung Biru. Galih travels to the place with three friends, Ozan (Fauzan Smith), Vania (Twindy Rarasati) and Martin Bayu Anggara). During that dive, they find a ship wrecked on the sea floor. Inside the ship they find an ancient artifact that is a clue to look for Galih's mother, but the artifact also brought disaster. The disturbance after disturbance from the guardian ghost of Tanjung Biru hit the group. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Perjanjian Gaib
storyline: Andri and his wife, Wati, want to get rich quickly. The opportunity comes when they work as nurses for a wealthy Grandmother. When Grandma suddenly dies, they want to control her property. To prevent neighbors from getting suspicious, Andri, who once worked at a morgue, deliberately uses formalin to make it appear that Grandma is still alive and deliberately takes Grandma around the village.

title: Bangsal Isolasi
storyline: Weni, a journalist, deliberately manipulates herself into becoming a prisoner in order to uncover the mystery of the death of her sister, Ratna, in a terrible ward which the prisoners call the curse room because those who enter it will end up dying. Weni's efforts are assisted by Adit, the prison warden. Bela, human trafficking mafia convicts are very feared by the inmates. Everyone who has contact with Bella will end up in the isolation ward by the head of the prison, Herman. In prison, only Rusdiah, a psychologist, is gentle, kind and motivates the prisoners. The Isolation Ward silences what is real, who is good, and who is fake.

title: Gowok: Kamasutra Jawa
storyline: Ratri, the daughter of a prostitute, does not know who her father is. Since she was a baby, she was raised by Nyai Santi, a wise and respected gowok (a woman-in Javanese culture-who is hired to teach men about household chores and sexuality before they marry). Ratri grew into a beautiful and talented girl, educated to continue Nyai Santi's gowok knowledge. Before her time, Ratri fell in love with Kamanjaya, a teenager from a prominent family. They made love and Kamanjaya promised to marry Ratri, but he broke his promise. Twenty years later, Ratri meets Kamanjaya again who has now brought his son, Bagas, to study under Nyai Santi. Bagas falls in love with Ratri without knowing their parents' past relationship. Ratri uses her charm to take revenge.

title: Garuda di Dadaku 2
storyline: With his grandfather dead and mother getting too chummy with a new business partner, young Bayu finds little support at home as he captains his U-15 youth soccer team. With national pride on the line, sponsors abruptly replace his coach with a hard-nosed task master who brings in a new, taller, handsomer team member who unintentionally takes Bayu's limelight and best friend Heri. As grades slip, and forced to work with an appealing classmate, a school project becomes his only hope against repeating his grade level for another year - if only he can find the time. —statmanjeff

title: Air Terjun Pengantin
storyline: A woman and her lover go on vacation with their friends to Pengantin Island that has Pengantin Waterfall, a waterfall that if we hope for something there, it will happen.

title: Makmum 2
storyline: Still following the story of Rini who finally returned to her hometown but it turned out that in her hometown a mosque was being built and for some reason, something went wrong in the village until finally terrors appeared one by one in her village.

title: 3 Dara
storyline: Affandi (Tora Sudiro), Jay (Adipati Dolken), and Richard (Tanta Ginting) are three friends with different backgrounds but have in common: womanizer and have little respect for women even though they have a partner each. They are men of success who just always want to enjoy life and have fun without their partner. Their lives change when they meet with Mel, a bartender who condemned their behavior. Various oddities and misfortune hit them, especially their relations to their partners. They are forced to ask the help of Windy (Rianti Catwright), a psychologist who expertly handles a wide range of issues of identity turmoil. Their search for answers brings them to the new reality that they have never imagined before. —Letterboxd

title: CJR the Movie: Lawan Rasa Takutmu
storyline: Bastian's decision to resign from Coboy Junior makes Iqbal, Aldi, and Kiki feel lost. It is lucky that they have producer like Patrick (Abimana Aryasatya), which is always present to give encouragement. Patrick also invites them to travel around Australia in the company of Jimmy (Arie curly) who won the bet against Joshua (Ernest Prakasa). During their stay in Australia, a lot of experience and lessons learned: meet with Emmanuel Kelly (X Factor Australia contestant) who have physical limitations, but still work with the spirit of honest and heartfelt, to perform Sky Diving, so Iqbal, Aldy and Kiky can fight fear. During his stay in Australia, Iqbal, Aldi, and Kiki also have vocal and physical training with D-Doc (Rio Dewanto) and Melisa who is known firm and very disciplined. Finally they returned to Indonesia. The real test they face is while doing a great concert. Lots of trials they face before the concert. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Viva JKT48
storyline: JKT48 is suddenly dissolved unilaterally by Miss Kejora. Fans who had been waiting for the show of JKT48 are disappointed because their idols are replaced by a new group called BKT48. Miss Kejora challenges JKT48 members to raise money up to Rp 1 billion if they want to buy back their position. All members of JKT48 are trying hard to raise the money and start their career from the bottom. —Film Indonesia

title: London Love Story 3
storyline: After spending time together for two years, Dave (Dimas Anggara) decides to marry Caramel (Michelle Ziudith). They travel to Bali where Caramel is reminded of her past. Dave and Caramel face a tragedy that changes their lives.

title: Saat Menghadap Tuhan
storyline: Growing up with a dark past and a simple dream: to make his mother happy, Damar had to 'fight' against himself in order to become a good teenager.

title: The Tiger
storyline: In a West Javanese village, Raka, a chili trader, accidentally sparks a conflict with the hot-tempered Dirga. Cornered in a fight, Raka unleashes an extraordinary silat style, resembling a tiger, a secret family tradition known as Pamacan. The viral video of his power attracts Koswara, a feared warrior determined to claim the legacy. With his men, Koswara terrorizes Raka's family, forcing him to protect their honor and heritage. Guided by his wise father Abah, Raka learns to master his strength while facing relentless threats. The Tiger is a tale of honor, tradition, and the fight to safeguard cultural legacy.

title: The Tarix Jabrix 3
storyline: The Tarix Jabrix got the biggest challenge of their lives. After failing to become a hero when saving an orphanage from a fire, Cacing who now works at an insurance company was asked by his superiors to negotiate with their old enemies, The Road Devils motorcycle gang so as not to cause more riots in Bandung City which had already claimed many victims, and insurance claim bills that had accumulated. —iflix

title: Berangkat!
storyline: Jano (Tarra Budiman) is a Chemical Engineering student who spends her spare time as a "part-timer" worker & rdquo; In Aksara music store. Since childhood Jano often faces obstacles in socializing, that is why until the age of 22 years old Jano is still often in "bully", but Jano always has Joana (Ayushita Nugraha) and Dika (Ringgo Agus Rahman) who always accompany Jano Jano feel small . Jano fell in love with one of her music store customers named Kayla (Annisa Pagih). One day Kayla came to Aksara and asked Jano for help to put up her music concert posters in Bali and instead gave Kayla three tickets for the music concert to Jano. Dika who was busy helping Joana finish her geological research forced Jano to participate in helping Joana, but Jano always refused Dika's invitation. With the concert tickets from Kayla, Jano finally decided to help Dika and Joana remember that after collecting Joana research data in Ijen Crater, they can continue their journey to Bali. Armed with modest money, they rented an old VW Combi car from Gimbal (Tanta Ginting) that took them from Jakarta, Malang to Bali. Problems arise in turn, starting from cars that are often damaged in the street until dangerous events that threaten their lives. Will they arrive safely in Bali?

title: Komedi Gokil 2
storyline: A boarding house owned by Indro (Indro Warkop) has male residents. The boy saw an opportunity to tempt the girl where at that moment Indro got a proposal from the woman he was teasing.

title: Arwah Noni Belanda
storyline: In Batavia in 1834 lived Hellen Van Stolch. Hellen was the only daughter of a Dutch-German landlord who had a large plantation: Jacob Van Stolch. The tragic story that she experienced made her spirit remain detained in earth until now, One day her story is present in the subconscious world of Sarah Astari, a novelist who is working on a horror story. At first Sarah does not know the dimension friction. She only considers it a nightmare, but then everything change when terror after terror is carried out by the spirit of Hellen Van Stolch against Sarah and her family. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Janur Ireng: Sewu Dino the Prequel
storyline: Sabdo (Marthino Lio) and Intan (Ratu Rafa) are two people who can never be united. Their family holds a deep-rooted belief that if the two were ever to come together, they would unleash an unstoppable power. Driven by greed, their uncle Arjo Kuncoro (Tora Sudiro) lures them into the family's lavish mansion with promises of wealth - only to trap them in a nightmare. Their only hope for survival lies in Janur Ireng, the deadliest black magic ever known in Java.

title: Kapan Kawin?
storyline: Dinda is a successful Hotel Manager in Jakarta, but her parents think that she's a failure because she's still single in her 30s. An unacceptable thing for her parents who keeps their traditional culture by heart, where women should have babies in their early 20s. Dinda finally give in by her parents' pressure. She devise a plan to hire an actor, Satrio, to pretend to become her boyfriend for a week. She brings along Satrio to Jogjakarta for her parents' wedding anniversary party. But what it seems as a harmless plan turns into chaos. All Dinda's plan didn't work out as she hope to be. Satrio turns out to be an idealistic and eccentric actor who never follow Dinda's scenario and always has his own act to charm Dinda's parents. Dinda is trying juggling everything in order,but little does she knows that her parents also has their own scenario for Dinda. Hilarity ensues.

title: Dilanjutkan Salah Disudahi Perih
storyline: Alfa and Darian, a young couple who decided to separate after facing various conflicts. However, encouragement from their families led them to want to reconcile. The situation becomes complicated, because to remarry, after the third divorce, the wife is required to marry someone else first. Finally, the figure of Zainun appears who will be Alfa's temporary husband. Alfa and Zainun's marriage takes place. However, it turns out that it is not that simple, Darian's jealousy and worry arise, who is always curious and often interferes, causing a complicated situation. They then go on a journey full of surprises, laughter, and old wounds that are reopened.

title: Kembang Kantil
storyline: In order to attend the theater performance Alisa (Irish Bella) goes to the house of his brother Anton (Fadika Royandi) and his wife Santi (Nafa Urbach). In the house Alisa meets Tania (Richelle Georgette Skonicki), the adopted daughter of Anton and Siska. Alisa immediately realized the weirdness of Tania's mysterious attitude. Alisa sees Tania eating magnolia flowers in her room. Terrors begin to strike Alisa, until the appearance of a mysterious man Toro (Dorman Borisman) who reminds him not to approach Tania. Encouraged by her curiosity, Alisa begins to find out the origin of Tania. She is accompanied by Aldy (Kevin Kambey), Alisa's in the theater, to an orphanage. There they meet Novi (Sarwendah) the owner of the orphanage. Novi reveals to the dark past of Tania. Alisa moves to carry out dangerous missions.

title: Satria Heroes: Revenge of the Darkness
storyline: One year has passed since Satria Garuda Bima-X defeated VUDO and the earth is in peace again. Ray and Rena are rebuilding the Parallel World again. However, new evil forces attack and old enemies rise again to devastate the earth.

title: Mengaku Rasul
storyline: Rianti and Ajie are two young lovers, whose parents don't approve of their relationship. Rianti seeks consolation in a religious school led by preacher Samir. Ajie wants her to leave the school, which he thinks is brainwashing her.

title: Made in Bali
storyline: Made, a young puppeteer from Gianyar, Bali, has been matched with Putu, a puppet maker's son. Made never realized that Niluh, his best friend, who is also a Balinese girl of Japanese descent, has long loved him. Until one day, Niluh will be taken home to Japan by Makoto, her father. That's when Made realized that he loves Niluh. He also realized that his relationship with Putu was never based on love. Made then decided to express his love to Niluh through a unique anime puppet show. However, it turned out that Made's intention was found out by Putu. As a result, Putu and Made's relationship fell apart, while Niluh rejected Made's feelings.

title: Wonderful Life
storyline: Amalia grows believing that she is nothing before having these things above. She applies the same principle for Aqil, her only child. But life says another. Aqil is adjudged to have dyslexia. Amalia decides to find a cure for Aqil. Their journey confronts Amalia to many unexpected things: her own inner conflict, her trauma, as well as tests of her status as a mother. Amalia who has thought to control all things, is now realizing that he has no control over her world and Aqil. The world in the eyes of Aqil is a place rich in color and full of interesting things, where everything is possible at any time. Amalia has to give up his world of rigid black-and-white to be ransacked in the their journey. Amalia is facing the worst possibility in her life: losing Aqil.

title: Cek Ombak (Melulu)
storyline: Tells the story of a romantic drama experienced by a young couple between Kika and Igo. Igo and Kika are a pair of lovers who want to admit their relationship in front of their respective parents that they are dating.

title: Kukejar Cinta ke Negeri Cina
storyline: Imam (Adipati Dolken), although a Muslim, does not fulfill his duty as a Muslim. He also met with Chen Jia Li (Eriska Rein), a Muslim woman from China and he fell in love with her. Imam wanted to express his love for Chen Jia Li, but she had already returned to China to get engaged. Imam then goes to chase her to China. —HOOQ

title: Republik Twitter
storyline: On Twitter, Sukmo is a cool smart guy and full of confidence. He looks handsome on his twitter time-line, making Sukmo easily accessible to anyone, including Hanum, a pretty and well-established journalist. Their relationship, getting closer, makes Sukmo, who lives in Yogyakarta decide to meet Hanum in Jakarta for the sake of exploring a commitment. Apparently Sukmo had to deal with the fact that in the real world everything is not as easy and simple. His confidence collapsed when he saw the approaching figure of Hanum, truly beautiful and elegant, in contrast to himself - who is only handsome in the time-line. So, postponing his meeting with Hanum, Sukmo determined to change himself into a Jakarta "guy". Working at Belo's Internet café, he says he is a communications consultant, trying to become the man he thinks will be most appropriate to accompany Hanum. Is everything imagined by Sukmo in accordance with what Hanum desires? —Rupakata Cinema

title: Asal Kau Bahagia
storyline: Tells about the love story of Aliando and Aurora. One day Ali gets a severe accident that causes her to have a coma. But even though the body is lying helpless and must race between life and death, Ali's soul still lives like a normal human. Aurora is one of the reasons Ali struggles to get well and get up from her coma. Aliando doesn't want her beloved girlfriend to be sad because of her condition. But over time Ali just realized something he had never known. A big secret that has been successfully overtaken by Aurora. Great secret related to their love story. The bad reality that Ali faced made he very sad and sad. Should he continue to fight for his love for Aurora. Or he must give up everything.

title: I
storyline: A man lost his wife whom he loved very much. Full of anger and wrath makes him a sniper who thirsts for blood and justice.

title: Insya Allah Sah
storyline: Silvi (Titi Kamal) is a beautiful but unreligious girl. When she came to her fiancé's office, Dion (Richard Kyle), she was caught in an elevator with Raka (Pandji Pragiwaksono), a religious, innocent, and strange young man who worked for Dion. Fearing that this would be the end of her life, Silvi vowed, if survived, she would change her life, become a Muslim woman who is obedient to God's command. It turned out that, for a second after she said that, the elevator door suddenly opened. Since then Silvi always overshadowed Raka who always reminds her promise in the elevator. And after a few unfortunate attacks on Silvi, it was Raka who finally helped her until Silvi found her resolve. But not necessarily Dion agrees with Silvi's vow. —Mwd

title: Anak Setan
storyline: Gabrielle (Jill Gladys), woman with independent firm and just rule a mental hospital. Gabrielle disillusioned with the hospital that is not maintained and eventually make changes to improve the condition of the hospital One day Gabrielle accidentally discover a secret that hide in the hospital by that. A daughter named Stella (Indri Satiya) dipasung by former director of the hospital, before Gabrielle. Gabrielle ago to save the children from the distressing situation. —Cinemageddon

title: Pangku
storyline: Sartika, a young pregnant woman. Sartika moved from her hometown in the hope of providing a better future for her child. She met Maya, a coffee shop owner in Pantura. Maya took care of Sartika and helped with her delivery. After Sartika gave birth, Maya persuaded her to work serving coffee while she held her. One day, Sartika met and fell in love with a fish distributor truck driver named Hadi. Amidst the complexities of life and the lack of choices, will Sartika find her happiness?

title: Rumah Masa Depan
storyline: This time Sukri and Surti had to return to Cibeureum because Sukri's father died. However, after the funeral, Sukri's family could not immediately return to Jakarta, because his mother was involved in a criminal case. Meanwhile, their two children, Bayu and Gerhana, are starting to feel comfortable because they have met extraordinary new friends, Cempaka and Sangaji, go on an adventure to help solve the family's problems in an unexpected way. The sense of family is tested in the face of challenging situations.

title: Mungkin Kita Perlu Waktu
storyline: A family consisting of Restu, Kasih, and Ombak, who are struggling to deal with the trauma of losing Sara, Ombak's daughter and older sister, due to an accident. Their relationship is getting worse. Ombak, who is depressed, tries to find happiness outside the home with the presence of Aleiqa, Kasih; the mother, who secretly harbors anger towards this ecological event, wants to go on the umrah, and Restu; the father, who is reluctant to be trapped in sadness and wants to save the family with the help of a psychologist, Nana. Can they get through it all?

title: Alibii.com
storyline: Ganesha, a smart and resourceful young man who founded an alibi service business called Alibii.com with his best friend, Agus. This business provides solutions for people who want to hide the truth, whether for personal reasons, reputation, or what is often called the "common good". With a neat strategy and a proven system, this business runs smoothly and even grows rapidly, clients feel helped because their lies feel safe and without consequences. However, everything begins to change when Ganesha falls in love with Flora, a cheerful woman who highly upholds the value of honesty. Their sweet relationship makes Ganesha begin to question his life principles and the business he has been running. The peak of the conflict arises when Ganesha finds out that Flora's father is actually one of Alibii.com's loyal clients. The father has used Ganesha's services to cover up the lies from his wife and children, including Flora. Faced with this bitter reality, Ganesha is caught in a big dilemma, namely having to choose between maintaining the business he has built from scratch or fighting for love and a more honest life.

title: Molulo 2: Jodohku yang Mana?
storyline: When Ros is positively pregnant, Tiar decides to go to Jakarta with his friends Sakka and Dodi to find work and look for his father's family, who is said to be rich in Jakarta, to help his family in debt. They stray into Bandung and meet a young girl named Ayana who also wants to go to Jakarta. Tiar's loyalty is tested when he is involved in Ayana's problems. At the same time, Ros is experiencing an event that Tiar has never imagined.

title: EL: The Movie
storyline: Dafychi is a girl with two personalities. She has an alter ego named Dafyna. She felt her life was monotonous and boring until he met Mario Adipati, a successful young businessman who was famous for being cold-hearted.

title: Tali Pocong Perawan 2
storyline: Tania was a closeted girl who secretly liked Jordy. So she could only watch helplessly when Grace approached Jordy. One day, Janet, her neighbor, gave the idea to use the Virgin Pocong Rope to bewitch Jordy.

title: Dear Love
storyline: Rayya, who has inborn heart disease, befriends since childhood with Nico. For Rayya, the most important person beside her mother is Nico. And Nico is keeping Rayya carefully. Nico also knows all Rayya's secrets, including the guys who had attracted her. Anyone can see that both of them have a sense of more than just friend. However, both keep that feeling to them self. One day, Rayya surprises because the guys from his past comes together without telling her. The love letters she wrote and kept in Whisper, a pretty box engraved with heart, was sent to the boys. They are Mike, Cello, and Addin. Rayya has not lost curiosity about who sent her love letters, when Nico suddenly disappears. Rayya becomes frantic.

title: Sang Kiai
storyline: The Clerics (Indonesian: Sang Kiai) follows the story of a Muslim Cleric Hasyim Asyari through the Japanese Occupation of Indonesia and the Indonesian National Revolution.

title: Supernova: Ksatria, Putri & Bintang Jatuh
storyline: Washington, D.C. Reuben and Dimas, two Indonesian students studying in the U.S., are brought together by the soft trance music echoing through a party at a mansion. That night they make a pact - one day they will write a book, a science fiction romance that will move the heart of the masses. The tale of the Knight, the Princess and the Shooting Star. Jakarta. At an executive office, an impromptu interview between Ferre and Rana - the former a young, affluent, brilliant and well-known executive, the other the Vice Editor in Chief of a top Indonesian women's magazine - changes the course of both their lives. A rare honest interview on love, sacrifice and freedom. A sweet interchange filled withpounding hearts and piercing gaze, a gaze too deep for Ferre and Rana. They fall in love. Rana is married to Arwin, an entrepreneur from a renowned and distinguished family in Jakarta. The man Rana has chosen after the encouragement of her whole extended family- that Rana is fortunate to marry Arwin and that Arwin is a man worthy as a husband and a source of pride, chosen by the family. Ferre and Rana's beautiful story continues to unfold deeper, just like the Knight and the Princess in the kingdom of love. Both are drunk in a love they have never felt before. Ferre and Rana cannot break free from the chaos of forbidden love that feels right and the order of the private married life of Rana and Arwin, one that is acceptable but which feels wrong. Diva, a top supermodel suddenly appears in Ferre's life. Through all the chaos and order of the universe, under the starry night and the flash of a shooting star, Diva arrives. Extraordinarily, it turns out that Diva lives in the same residential area as Ferre. Their houses even face each other. Reuben, Dimas, Ferre, Rana, Arwin and Diva eventually meet without recognizing each other in an aggressive, poetic, romantic and phenomenal blog called "Supernova". Their stories erupt together with Supernova.

title: Pesugihan Sate Gagak
storyline: Anto a food stall employee living on a tight budget, is forced to marry his girlfriend, Andini, within a month with a fantastic dowry: 150 million rupiah. Together with his two friends-Dimas, a yet-to-be-successful horror content creator, and Indra, who is mired in debt from online loans-they find a shortcut through a crow satay ritual from an ancient spell book inherited from Indra's grandfather. Unexpectedly, the ritual actually brings in supernatural customers: genderuwo, pocong, and kuntilanak, who are willing to pay high prices for crow satay. What started as a mere pastime turns into a lucrative business. Life is suddenly luxurious, debts are paid off, and Anto regains his confidence to propose to Andini. However, as time goes on, the creatures grow greedier-coming at odd hours, demanding satay relentlessly. The lucrative business has turned into a terrifying trap. These three friends must make a choice: continue serving customers from another world, or face the deadly consequences of the shortcut they chose.

title: Tampan Tailor
storyline: Topan, a tailor, lost his wife, lost his tailor shop, and almost lost the future of his son Bintang who was expelled from school. With the help of Darman, Topan tried all sorts of work to make a living. Topan's spirit captivated Prita's heart. With Prita's help, the Topan rose again and got back all his dreams.

title: Penerbangan Terakhir
storyline: Behind the cockpit doors and the polished glamour of the cabin, lies one of the wildest scandals in the aviation world. Captain Deva Angkasa a charming, strikingly handsome pilot with a magnetic presence, hides the darker truth of being an emotional predator. He showers several flight attendants, including Tiara, with overwhelming affection, sweet promises, subtle threats, and psychological games. And in that storm of charm and manipulation, one question lingers: What does it feel like to kiss a captivating yet deeply problematic pilot at 30,000 feet?

title: Bertaut Rindu
storyline: Jovanka's life changed after her parents divorced. Together with her mother, Yuli she moved to Bandung to start everything from the beginning. At her new school, she met Magnus, a quiet boy who keeps many secrets and traumas. From this unexpected meeting, a relationship grew that not only brought together two hearts, but also two souls who were both wounded. Through pictures, laughter, and conversations that were not always easy, Jovanka and Magnus slowly found a safe place with each other and the courage to face a world that was not always friendly.

title: Misteri Hantu Selular
storyline: A youth group terrorized by the ghost who always come after their phone playing automatically the mysterious ringtone

title: Sepeda Presiden
storyline: After the incident the president gave bicycles to school children, some Papuan children also wanted to experience getting bicycles from the president too.

title: Guna guna istri muda
storyline: Angel dumped Roy to marry Uncle Burhan, who had been her sugar daddy. As soon as she officially became a young wife, Angel was even attracted to her husband's nephew named Leo. He also uses the services of a shaman named Sumi so that Leo wants to sleep with him. Vivian, the old wife, apparently found out about Angel's actions, so her plans fell apart. Angel also asks Sumi to torture Vivian through witchcraft.

title: 3 Cewek Petualang
storyline: Sally, Lyla, Citra, Jubed and Randu, five high school buddies, plan a reunion. Sally calls upon her friends to visit an island near Belitong. It's Sally's last holiday as a bachelorette. Their island of destination can only be reached.

title: Dua Alam: Villa Kaliurang
storyline: This time, Mars and Bobby invite their friend Dara to explore paranormal activity in a haunted villa in Kaliurang, Jogjakarta - which is known for its rich history because it was built since the colonial era.

title: Cinta sama dengan Cindolo Na Tape
storyline: Timi (A. Thesar Resandy) falls in love with Cinde (Maizura), a new student in his class. Their closeness makes Ian (Brilian Rexy Sondakh), Timi's friend since junior high, growl because Timi becomes rarely gathering with his best friend. Ian chooses to hang out with two crooks at school. —Letterboxd

title: Tulah 6/13
storyline: Gilang has decided to go on a vacation with two of his best friends, Sarah and Kevin to celebrate his birthday. The plan gets disrupted with the presence of a couple uninvited guests. The atmosphere gets ominous as they drive into a forest and they see the appearance of a mysterious grandfather figure and a scary little girl. Unexpected terrors bestows upon them which has forced Gilang to separate from his friends which also drive him to remember a cursed past of his.

title: Kakek Cangkul
storyline: Kakek Pacul was Nenek Gayung's husband. When he died, Kakek Pacul's body was not properly buried. Duta, Coki, Danu, Thalia, and Miki had to deal with an angry Kakek Pacul who demanded a proper grave.

title: Mama Cake
storyline: Three best friends in adventure to buy the steamed brownies "Mama Cake" for one of their friend's dying grandmother. But every time after they already bought it, there must be a bad accident happen to them.

title: Rumah Kentang
storyline: Farah and Rika are sisters who inherited their late mother's house after her sudden death. With nowhere else to go, they are forced to move into their late mother's place. Rika, on the other hand, objects to the move, however, Farah ignores her sister's plea. Having heard countless rumors about the house being haunted and called "Rumah Kentang" (trans: potato house), Farah tries her best to sell it but to no avail. Rika, however, feeling uneasy since the move was suddenly attacked when she was home alone. Farah regrets not listening to her sister and decides to listen to stories about the house's past. What hidden agenda lies within the walls of their late mother's house? Farah soon unravels why the house is called what is it; Rumah Kentang. —yukiii1

title: Trinity Traveler
storyline: Trinity published her first book, and it became a bestseller. Now she is better known as TRINITY TRAVELER, and got a master degree scholarship in Philippines while continuing her traveling hobby. Father and Mother always urged her to get married soon, because according to them, marriage would make Trinity happier. Trinity once again met Paul, but now she's in a dilemma between her love and her passion. —StarVision

title: Laskar Pemimpi
storyline: A mismatched group of misfits become guerrillas as Indonesia attempts to maintain its independence when colonists return in 1948.

title: Rasa
storyline: Following the kidnap of his ten year old daughter in Jakarta, Professor Anthony Collins is forced to recover an ancient artifact as a ransom for her life. His path is entangled with a young artist, called Rianti, whose premonitions of people before they die may help Anthony save his daughter's life. Anthony, Rianti and the love of her life are all in grave danger as the kidnappers masked agenda reaches beyond the ransom. —Golden Light Studios - Co-Production Company

title: Lima Elang
storyline: Baron is reluctant to move from Jakarta to Balikpapan. In the new town, he chooses to play with his remote-controlled car, instead of making new friends. Despite his behavior, Baron is chosen to represent his school in a boy-scout camp with his schoolmate, the overtly optimistic Rusdi. Together with other friends, the fire expert Anton and the temperamental Aldi, and a strong girl they meet in a camp named Sindai, they stumble into an unexpected adventure as Rusdi and Anton are kidnapped by illegal loggers. Now it's up to Baron, Aldi and Sindai to rescue their friends in this fun and thrilling adventure film for the whole family in the Lebaran holiday! —Anonymous

title: Kuntilanak-Kuntilanak
storyline: A novelist with her daughter and her assistent move to the haunted house. And she want the custody of her daughter after divorce

title: Yakin Nikah
storyline: The journey of Niken, a modern woman who must face the reality of today's relationships. Her life is full of trials-from the shadows of the past, family interference, social expectations, to personal dreams that have not yet been realized. The conflicts she faces are not only serious, but also presented with hilarious, awkward, and even painful moments. All of this stems from one simple but difficult question: are you really sure about getting married? Or are your doubts growing as the expectation of a "perfect marriage" continues to haunt you? This question is not only relevant to Niken, but also to many couples in the real world who are often caught between love, reality, and environmental pressures.

title: Survive
storyline: A woman wakes up tied to a bed in the basement. He was repeatedly beaten and harassed by a masked psychopath.

title: 99 Cahaya di Langit Eropa Part 2
storyline: This movie is a sequel of "99 Cahaya di Langit Eropa". This movie revealed the secrets of the history of the development of Islam in other part of continental Europe.

title: Petak Umpet Minako
storyline: A group of former schoolmates gets haunted after playing a famous deadly hide and seek game called 'Hitori Kakurenbo'.

title: Elang
storyline: Elang, a Garuda National Team player, is forced to fight on the streets to pay for his mother's medical expenses who suffers from Alzheimer's. Elang's decision to leave the Garuda National Team and join Sidney Warriors FC for money, disappoints his mother and Laras, his sister. When he returns to Indonesia, Elang faces the threat of Hardiman who takes his mother hostage and forces his team to lose. In a big dilemma, will Elang choose the honor of the Indonesian nation or the life of his mother?

title: Bidadari Terakhir
storyline: For Rasya, nothing matters more than following the track laid down by his father: be good in school, get into a good college, be a good civil servant. That is the way to happiness and anything else are merely distractions. However, after one misadventure to a red-light district and chance meeting with a free-spirited sex worker named Eva, Rasya begins to question his priorities and what he actually wants out of his life.

title: Runaway
storyline: Tala lived with her mother and uncle Toni, in Hong Kong. They can't return home because there are problems with their passports. Tala then snatched up Musa's wallet and passport, the son of a businessman who intended to expand his business in Hong Kong.

title: Pelangi Tanpa Warna
storyline: The beautiful plans of Fedi (Rano Karno) in his marriage are ruined because his wife has Alzheimer's disease. From day to day Kirana (Maudy Koesnaedi) forgets the simple to the most important things in her life. The situation turned so full of emotions that it made the peace in the house disappear. Fedi continues to be tested with Kirana's condition which is getting worse day by day. The household duties that were originally held by the wife, are now fully charged to her. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Senior
storyline: Nakula Jamie Megantara (Jerome Kurnia), Chairperson of MOS (Student Orientation Period) at Permata Bangsa High School, crossed Spanish-Indonesian, as if he could not feel happy, sad, afraid, had never fallen in love, and did not like being touched. Aluna (Rebecca Klopper), a new student, is curious. Stubborn Aluna wants to know Nakula even further, even making her senior as her boyfriend. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Merah Putih Memanggil
storyline: The story begins with hijacking an Indonesia medium-sized yacht flag within territory of Indonesia by international terrorists. One crew member was shot dead on board for insubordination. Four crew members including captains along with three French citizens, one Canadian citizen and one South Korean citizen were kidnapped and taken to an area in the southern part of a neighboring country. The kidnappers' leader asked for ransom from countries whose citizens were kidnapped and of course including Indonesia. TNI can not do anything because the terrorists are in other countries / neighbors. Neighboring countries are also being overwhelmed by these terrorists because their own Government is experiencing many problems in the country. However, because of the approach of the Government of Indonesia neighboring countries gave permission and the opportunity to TNI to enter the area to free hostages is limited within 2x24 hours. To that end, the TNI created a Joint Operation plan involving all Forces. TNI AD conducted a closed operation / dispatch by sending 1 team of Anti-Terrorist Kopassus Battalion which was deployed at night free fall. In a state of standby will be assisted by combat aircraft from the Air Force and naval war ships on the beach and Kopaska operations or Frog Troops and Marine Battalions to landed. All these TNI units were finally involved.

title: Perjamuan Iblis
storyline: Kala and Radit are a husband and wife who live happily and feel perfect with their only child named Bima. One day, this happiness slowly disappeared after they had to go to Radit's old house because their long-lost mother was found to have mysteriously committed suicide in Radit's old house. The death of the grandmother made this family experience a lot of terror by creatures beyond reason in the house. And strangely, all the terror was aimed at their only child, Bima. Kala and Radit decided to leave that place. They thought leaving that place was the best way to save Bima, however, they never thought that it was just the beginning of a series of nightmares that would soon happen, and the dark secret behind their grandmother's death was related to with the rise of a demonic figure.

title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
storyline: Surya goes to Yogyakarta by night bus and sits next to Asti, whom he saves from pranksters. Unexpectedly, the meeting with Asti changes Surya's life, both in love and in his relationship with his parents.

title: Taufiq: Lelaki yang Menantang Badai
storyline: Based on a true story, the film tells the story of a political figure, Taufiq Kiemas, who later known as Chairman of the People's Consultative Assembly (MPR RI) 2009-2014, and the husband of former Indonesian president Megawati Soekarnoputri. Taufiq is in Palembang and a member of a youth gang called Don Quixote. He is inspired by Soekarno's ideology. He decides to become a nationalist, goes to Jakarta and meets with Sukarno, makes friend with Guntur Soekarnoputra and meets Megawati Soekarnoputri for the first time. Taufiq then understanda the meaning of friendship, family, love and the state when he takes the way of life as a nationalist. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Jagat Arwah
storyline: The sudden and suspicious death of his father, Sukmo, pushes Raga to explore his mystical life. Including the fact that he is a descendant of the balancing of the Spirit Universe as well as the Human Universe who holds the 7th Aditya. The dream of being a famous band member must be risked to perpetuate his family tradition. Helped by his uncle, Jaya, Raga tries to control the power within him and encounters the spirits he still has a relationship with on the way: Nonik, Kunti, and Genderuwo.

title: Skakmat
storyline: Jamal (Tanta Ginting), motorcycle taxi drivers who like to play chess, had a dream to open a the motor wash near his base. Rodiah, Jamal's mother, threatens him if not promptly changes his life, the family land quota for him will be his cousin. In love affairs Jamal is challenged by Mirna's (Andi Anissa) parents because his unstable work. Jamal is asked by Ivan, whom he knew inadvertently, to take Dito (Donny Alamsyah), a courier heroin, to Tanah Tinggi Boss (Cecep Arif Rahman). He gives Jamal is an advance of 10 million and 90 million reward if he can complete the task. Having never seen that much money, Jamal directly takes it. Ivan knows that Dito is targeted by Mami Tuti (Hannah Al Rashid), a bookies who revenge on Dito because he made her sister a broken heart and became a junkie. After giving this task to Jamal, Ivan flees to Hong Kong with his wife. Dropping Dito is not as easy as Jamal thinks. They both have to face Mami Tuti's men. Arini, Dito's duaghter, is the reason for him to stop Tanah Tinggi boss that will spread of heroin into candies. Dito is afraid Arini will be a victim.

title: Juara
storyline: Bisma, a teenager with natural martial arts talent, has a crush on Bella, a girl at his college. But her boyfriend, Attar, always annoys Bhishma, until a mysterious man trains him to fight back.

title: MeloDylan
storyline: Melody moves to another school trying to avoid problems. She has a bad past with David, her ex-lover. But in the new school, the problem re-emerges when Melody meets Dylan, a guy famous for being cool, likely to make trouble but still an idol because of his handsomeness. Rumors about Dylan are common knowledge. Melody and Dylan find no point in their love relationship, so they agree to sever their relationship. Melody just realizes that her love for Dylan is so great. But it's too late. Dylan is sent by his father to study abroad. Melody sadly lets him go, but he leaves her a romantic video in which he reveals all of his mind; his honesty gives her new hope. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Parts of the Heart
storyline: Parts of the Heart tells 8 stories about Peter, a gay man living in Jakarta from the age of 10 to 40 and his experiences with love that help to shape the man he is today. From his first boyhood crush (Stolen Kiss), his first sexual experience (The Game Kiss), his experiences with lost love be it through death (Solace) or societal pressures (The Last Time), to dealing with the rough patches in a long term relationship (3 and The Couch and the Cat). Culminating in a moment where Peter, a few years into his marriage, flirts with infidelity when an attractive young man seeks shelter in Peter's coffee shop during heavy rain, causing him to question his commitment (Why Isn't Peter Happy?). —Kinekuma Pictures

title: Muslihat
storyline: When moving to a remote orphanage, Jihan and her sister, Syafa hope to start a new life. But one by one strange things start to appear. Starting from the appearance of Shinta, a mysterious woman who often hums strange songs, the introduction to Juna, a young man at the night market, to a series of terrors that attack Rahma and make her possessed until she dies. Gustaf, the orphanage caretaker tries to exorcise the evil power with ruqyah. But Jihan is worried that it will endanger Syafa.

title: Misteri Bilik Korek Api
storyline: After discovering a chamber filled with toys and stacks of matchboxes in the orphanage they recently moved into, Dina and the other orphans continue to experience supernatural disturbances in the house. In addition, the arrival of Luna, a new orphan who is no less mysterious than the orphanage they just moved into.

title: Ganjil Genap
storyline: Healing from a broken heart is never easy. Gala, who has been in a relationship with Bara for eight years, wants to get married soon. However, Bara suddenly asks for a breakup instead. Gala is devastated and struggles hard to mend her heart. Fortunately, Aiman appears and accompanies Gala, helping her to heal. Gala even starts to develop feelings for Aiman. But gradually, Gala realizes that Aiman is just like Bara. Aiman is not the remedy for her broken heart. Will Gala's broken heart heal? Or will it become even more shattered?

title: Stip & Pensil
storyline: Four rich high school students try to proof that they are not as arrogant as people in the school talk about.

title: Super Didi
storyline: In two weeks absence of his wife, a young brilliant architect has to look after his two little girls as a clueless father. In the meantime he got a deadline of the most important project in his career.

title: The Secret 2: Mystery of Villa 666
storyline: Nina, Cherry, Wynne, and Bulan reunite at the Nina's family's villa. The next day Nina disappeared and left a mystery for the three friends.

title: Pintu Surga Terakhir
storyline: Irma, a successful career woman, refuses many proposals even though she is quite mature. The reason: she wants to keep taking care of her father who she considers the door to heaven since her mother died. One day he accidentally meets Yusuf, a photographer, a man from her past who disappeared without a word.

title: Terpana
storyline: Ada is a successful woman with her career, however she is afraid to fall in love with someone else. However with the help of her friend (Reza Rahadian) she meet with Rafian. Rafian is able to makes her fall for him, however the big question is, will she be in love ? will both of them will meet together again ? —anon

title: Jamila dan Sang Presiden
storyline: Jamila is a prostitute serving a life sentence behind bars. She surrenders herself to the authorities after admitting she killed a high-ranking minister, and refuses to be represented by any lawyer or request a plea to ease her sentence.

title: Laura & Marsha
storyline: Laura & Marsha is a bestfriend since high school. Although their both characteristic is way too different, Laura is a single mother, lived with her mother and only daughter since her husband left her with no reason, and she living with dreams that her husband will back someday. While Marsha, is a girl who lived with free-spirit and never worry about anything. One day, Marsha planned themselves for euro trip, Laura refused at first, but finally agreed to join with one term: everything will always strict to the rule, her rule (Laura arranged everything). Their friendship was test when they argued and realized they lived with a truth left behind.

title: Tentang Rindu
storyline: In an effort to find her late father's signature recipe, Rindu is assisted by Rendi, her father's former sous-chef. Desperate in finding the recipe, Rindu intends to quit, making Rendi furious as he feels betrayed.

title: Lampir
storyline: In the midst of busy wedding preparations, the couple Wendy and Angga decided to go to a luxurious and vintage villa with their friends to take pre-wedding photos and relieve fatigue. However, they never thought that the villa was the nest of the demon Mak Lampir, who plays death games to become the most beautiful and eternal human being. They all really wanted to get out of the villa, but it didn't go that easy because only one person could get out safely and they were all trapped in the circle of death created by Mak Lampir. —Kenny Gulardi & Gandhi Fernando

title: Pijat Atas Tekan Bawah
storyline: Garry works as a massage therapist while Barry is a photographer. When they become acquainted with Hanny, a Public Relations executive in an oil company, their lives become unpredictable, making everything chaotic and hilarious.

title: Jomblo
storyline: Four best friends from different ethnicities, Agus (Sunda), Bimo (Jogja), Olip (Aceh), and Doni (Indo), who are studying at University campus B have one thing in common: although each of them has different reasons why singling. However, problems arise precisely when they desire to have a lover. The formerly beautiful friendship turned into a rivalry. Each has a conflict with his partner. Then, how the continuation of the friendship story between Agus, Ben, Olip, and Doni? —Mwd

title: Alena: Anak Ratu Iblis
storyline: Hendra and Maya found a small child on their way home. The couple, who were not blessed with children, adopted the child and named it Alena. Since being adopted, Alena has had a positive impact on the family. Hendra, who was previously not very successful in his business, began to feel a drastic change toward success. Hendra and Maya's happiness was complete when they were blessed with a child they were looking forward to. However, irregularities begin to be felt. Everything turns into a disaster until it becomes life-threatening. The cause of the catastrophe turns out to be Alena, the daughter of the Devil Queen.

title: Bukannya Aku Tidak Mau Nikah
storyline: In a week, Manda is getting married. Together with her two friends, Aul and Dee, they went to Bali for a bridal shower. By chance, they met Bossas, a local guy who likes to fight and cause trouble. He's very different from Dimas, Manda's future husband, who leads a straighter life. In just a few days, Manda already feels comfortable with Bossas. But Manda knows it won't be easy, especially since her mother is looking forward to her wedding. Manda is now faced with a dilemma. Should she continue with her wedding or follow her heart? This is a film about a woman who finds the right person at the wrong time.

title: Eva: Pendakian Terakhir
storyline: PASHA (Kiesha Alvaro) invites EVA (Bulan Sutena), his girlfriend, to climb a mountain with NISA (Ashira Zamita), VICKY (Ilham Aji Santoso), and JONI (Axel Matthew Thomas) who are the leaders. Unfortunately, some of them break some of the taboos when climbing a mountain, so Eva and her friends experience extraordinary problems and disturbances from the supernatural inhabitants of the mountain they are climbing. Vicky is possessed, Eva disappears mysteriously, etc. The situation becomes even more tense when they meet TENRI (Hanna Kinasih), a woman who is shackled because she is considered to follow her father's cult who is an ally of the mountain devil. So a big disaster befalls Eva and her friends and the villagers at the foot of the mountain

title: Milli & Nathan
storyline: Milli and Nathan liked each other since high school in Bandung. They dated. Until Nathan broke the news that he would get married. Milli was shocked, disappointed and angry. She removed Nathan from her life, until she found out that Nathan had never really left her.

title: Si Juki the Movie: Harta Pulau Monyet
storyline: In the midst of his family's difficult financial conditions, Si Juki finds a treasure map left by his ancestors. Together with Professor Juned, Babeh and Emak, Si Juki begins a treasure hunting adventure on a mysterious island. Before going to sea, Juki met and was helped by a female treasure hunter named Susi. In their adventure, they have to face various obstacles ranging from a group of pirates known as the Storm pirates, monsters, an army of monkeys, to a curse that can cause extraordinary disasters. Did Si Juki succeed in getting the treasure?

title: Comic 8: Casino Kings Part 2
storyline: The eight secret agents (Arie Kriting, Babe Cabiita, Bintang Bete, Ernest Prakasa, Fico Fachriza, Ge Pamungkas, Kemal Palevi, Mongol) who adopted the code name COMIC 8 are back in action.They are led into a trap by THE KING (Sophia Latjuba) and her army, led by Isa (Donny Alamsyah) and Bella (Hannah Al Rashid), and a co-conspirator named Dr. Pandji (Pandji Pragiwaksono). Our secret agents must bet on their lives in the world's largest online gambling scheme whose players include renowned gamblers from around the globe. The eight of them must get through each life-threatening level together, facing a killer squad called The Hunters (Barry Prima, George Rudy, Lidya Kandou, Willy Dozan, Soleh Solihun, Sacha Stevenson) who keeps on hunting them to end their lives. They also have to face the Master of Martial Arts, The Ghost (Yayan Ruhian), who resurfaced back into the world simply to eliminate Babe Cabiita. At the same time, Indro Warkop, who is wanted by an Interpol Agent named Chintya (Prisia Nasution) is also trapped in the Online Gambling scheme on the hidden island with a Security Guard (Ence Bagus) who appears in the wrong time and place. Chintya, Indro and the Security Guard must fight for their survival against tough fighters in the Fighting Cage. A series of humorous events will tickle you as our heroes battle their way toward finding and apprehending The King, and each twist will keep you on the edge of your seat as you follow the adventure of these agents. This sequel, Comic 8: "Casino Kings Part 2" will blow your mind. Making their memorable cameos in the action-packed, laugh-out-loud film are Nikita Mirzani, Agung Hercules, Agus Kuncoro, Candil, Gandhi Fernando, Cak Lontong, Joe P Project, Boy William, Ray Sahetapy and Bagus Netral.

title: Kejar Mimpi Gaspol!
storyline: A single mother from Bromo does not dare to pursue her dream and carry out her passion, which is writing, because she thinks that her only duty is to make her daughter's dream come true.

title: Penjagal Iblis: Dosa Turunan
storyline: A family was brutally murdered while being treated by a Ustadz for being possessed. The perpetrator was Ningrum, a 19-year-old girl who is now being treated in a mental hospital. A journalist named Daru was assigned to interview her. During the interview, Ningrum admitted that she was a devil butcher who had to kill the family before their bodies were used to resurrect a devil from the darkness by Pakunjara, a woman from a devil worshipping clan. The battle between Ningrum the devil butcher and Pakunjara the devil worshipper was inevitable. Trapped, Daru had no choice but to help Ningrum face Pakunjara and the devil she was going to resurrect.

title: The Wedding & Bebek Betutu
storyline: "The Crew" trying hard to find the one behind the blackmail, which threatens the wedding of their boss' daughter. And they have to find the best "bebek betutu" (balinese grilled duck) recipe as requested by the very important soon to be parents in law. All in 24 hours. —Sogi Indra Dhuaja

title: Hantu Aborsi
storyline: Caca (Bulan Ayu), a 7 years old girl disappeared in her house. Caca often laugh and play in her room by herself. Since moving to their new home, Caca has a strange behaviour. Her parent, Devi (Happy Salma) and Handy (Okan Cornelius), feel something is wrong with her. Until one day, Caca ask her parents to allow Cinta, her friend to stay with them. Previously, her parents think that it is only Caca's imagination. But the mysterious situation is haunting them. What happen to them? Who is Cinta? Why is she always haunts them? —Cinemageddon

title: Reuni Z
storyline: After 20 years graduated from high school, students of Zenith having a reunion. Zombie outbreak started in the reunion, infected most of the group. The survivors needs to find a way out to escape from zombies that surrounding the school.

title: Sule Detektif Tokek
storyline: The story began with a gecko that's worth billions of rupiah. Sule was hired to be a detective in charge of guarding the gecko because it was threatened to be stolen. Sule's busy detective life ended up threatening the lives of his children.

title: Di Dasar Segalanya
storyline: The poignant tale of a young woman's struggle with Bipolar Disorder, an illness that has haunted her all her life.

title: Teluh
storyline: about a terror that started with someone's murder of Yulia. She is an employee and the mistress of the director and owner of a batik company. namely Mr. Indra.

title: Arini by Love.inc
storyline: Arini (Della Dartyan), an agent of the technology company Love.inc, wants to pursue her own happiness by finding someone from her past. But unfortunately, Love.inc's system keeps getting in the way. Memories in the past are always deleted by the system. Because of this, Arini seems to be trapped in a met averse life. In this case, she has difficulty distinguishing what is real and what is virtual. Arini actually meets Tiara (Kelly Tandiono) who guides her to carry out an action.

title: Komang
