storyline: Ode is a young man from Buton who falls in love with Ade, a migrant from Bali. They meet in Southeast Sulawesi and fall in love. However, the challenges are so great that they become a barrier to their love. But it turns out that these obstacles are meaningless. As two people who are in love, they believe that fate will unite them. In addition to being hindered by religion, Ode and Ade are also fortified by social status. Ode is not afraid as a man, he is determined to prove his love. Ode must go to Jakarta to pursue his dream. Raim Laode's proof of his love is no joke. He concocts dreams and makes them come true. Until finally, he can conquer all obstacles to his love with his lover.

title: Tale of the Land
storyline: May has lost everything. Now, she lives a self-sustaining life in a shabby house floating on the sea. Long ago, she lived on land with her family as a Dayak native, but due to mining development, she lost her land and was rescued by an elderly man who brought her here. In the process, she lost her parents and lost contact with her relatives. She has been surviving on the sea for over a decade but doesn't dare set foot on land. Even touching the ground causes her to faint. Although the land has become a dangerous and ominous place for her, she still longs for it and the life it supports. She has no idea how long her old, crumbling house will continue to float.

title: Yang tidak dibicarakan ketika membicarakan cinta
storyline: At a high school for the visually impaired in Jakarta, Indonesia, the students are like any other teenagers: they attend classes, pursue artistic endeavors, and fall in love. The most privileged of the bunch, Diana, patiently awaits signs of womanhood and humors her mother's attempts to mold her into the perfect girl. The beautiful Fitri has no shortage of male attention and enters into a passionate affair with, unbeknownst to her, a hearing-impaired punk rocker who is masquerading as a doctor. Meanwhile, Maya, blind since birth, aspires to be an actress and performer. Regardless of physical barriers, the students find ways to communicate and collaborate, enabling them to connect-with each other and to the outside world. —Production

title: Jakarta Maghrib
storyline: Jakarta Maghrib is an omnibus movie derived from five real events experienced by some urban Jakarta residents during maghrib.

title: Youtubers
storyline: Andovi posts hilarious clips of his brother Jovial's attempts to prove his love to Alexandra, propelling them both to online fame.

title: Orpa
storyline: A teenage girl with a tragic life is desperate to run away from her village to continue her education even though she has to go through the ferocity of the Papuan Jungle

title: XXL: Double Extra Large
storyline: A gang's influential boss disappears, leaving his son to step up and lead. Despite being tapped for the role, the young man grapples with self-doubt and confidence issues as he considers taking the reins.

title: Ambilkan Bulan
storyline: Amelia was a lonely 10-year-old girl. Ratna, her mother, was too busy working. Amelia, who feels neglected, befriended her cousin, Ambar. When the holidays arrived, Amelia decided to visit Ambar in her village.

title: Heart 2 Heart
storyline: Pandu and Indah, meet for the first time on a lake and fall in love after three days. When they return to Jakarta, Pandu believes that they will meet again if they are meant to be together. Later, the couple reunites but while the love remains, there is now an obstacle. Indah already has a 'boyfriend', Ramon, arranged by her mother. Then Indah has an accident and loses her vision and her voice. In despair, she refuses to be accompanied by her parents, let alone a boyfriend that her parents chose for her. So Pandu gives up his school in Jakarta to follow Indah, and shares her solitude at the villa. Pandu never allows Indah to be alone, inspite of Indah's rejection. Together with Indah's friends, he brings back the smile on her face. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rembulan Tenggelam di Wajahmu
storyline: Ray (Arifin Putra/Bio One), the owner of a giant company, is dying. He is 60 years old and has gone through many things that bring him to be rich and respected. He is alone and sick. In a state between lives or death in the hospital, someone with a shady face comes and brings Ray to "return", tracing his past and finds five questions that he had shouted to God. Five questions that are finally answered one by one.

title: Wakaf
storyline: Delia is the daughter of Nata who was possessed by the genie Anzar. Nata herself is the stepson of Amrullah who donated a plot of land. In the waqf land there is a prayer room. Nata has a greedy nature that makes her want to control the waqf land belonging to her stepfather. Meanwhile, Amrullah has another child, Hamzah, who is his first son. Hamzah has a son named Farhan who is the target of Nata's crimes. Nata's greed brings disaster to her family. Until Delia, who intended to help Farhan, had to bear the consequences of her father's actions. Delia is possessed by the genie Anzar who wants to kill Farhan. So what happens to Delia who is possessed? Can he survive and save Farhan?

title: Madu Murni
storyline: Mustaqim, a former Koran teacher, works as a debt collector in the hope of earning more. However, Murni, his wife, never wanted to accept money from her husband because she did not agree with her husband's job which was full of risks in the hereafter. At the suggestion of his colleague Rojak, Mustaqim remarried to Yati. How do they live?

title: Winter in Tokyo
storyline: Keiko Ishida (Pamela Bowie), the librarian, who lives in a small apartment on the outskirts of Tokyo, gets a new neighbor, Kazuto Nishimura (Dion Wiyoko). He returns to Tokyo after 10 years living in America. The only reason of his return: to forget Yuri, friends, neighbors, and the woman he loves, who will marry his best friend. Slowly, Keiko starts familiar with Kazuto. Keiko who is still haunted by his first love, Akira Kitano (Morgan Oey), tries to deny her own feelings. Especially after she meets with Akira Kitano. Kazuto frustrates because Keiko could never understand him. Then, Kazuto gets memory lost. That is the time when Keiko realizes how she feels about Kazuto. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dear Nathan
storyline: When Nathan, known as a delinquent student who loves fighting, seriously starts to change for Salma, Nathan's past love comes, asking for Nathan's love back.

title: Sin
storyline: Metta and Raga shouldn't fall in love. Raga hates girls with many dramas like Metta. Metta just wants to prove that there is no good in Raga. But, they still fall in love. Their lives become tangled. The Raga family opposes their relationship, and Metta starts to become Raga's enemy target. For no reason, Raga breaks their love and disappears. When Metta knows the reason behind this breaking up, Metta must choose between giving in to fate or happily sinning. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Di Balik 98
storyline: Di Balik 98 (currently without an English title but literally meaning "Behind '98") tells the story, seen from many perspectives, of Indonesia's recent revolution in 1998, which resulted in the fall of the three-decade-long presidency of Suharto. —screenanarchy.com

title: I Am Hope
storyline: Mia is a writer who's very eager to make her own play with her musician father, Raja Abdinegara, until that very dream halts due to her newly found lung cancer, the same disease that once claimed the life of her mother. Mia and Raja, who came from wealth, now have barely enough for their needs, for the cost of her mother's treatment in the past means the musician has lost his muse. When Mia discovers she has only eight months left to live, accompanied by the presence of the Rainbow Girl, her own fictional character that was inspired by her mother, Mia sets herself to be as positive as possible. When Mia attends an independent play, she meets a young actor, David. As their relationship becomes romantic, they seem to resolve their grief. —anonymous

title: Keadilan
storyline: Raka, a court security officer, and his pregnant wife, Nina, celebrate her success in passing the bar exam. While they have a rare evening of fine dining to savor the moment, their joyous celebration is shattered when Nina is found brutally murdered. The investigation quickly identifies Dika as the prime suspect, leading to his swift arrest. However, with the support of a shrewd and manipulative lawyer, Timo, the trial takes an unexpected turn that Raka could never have anticipated. As the trial spirals towards an unjust outcome, Raka resolves to overturn the corrupt verdict and seek justice for his late wife.

title: Selepas Tahlil
storyline: A child in Surabaya who wants to bury his father's body. However, on the night after the tahlil, his father's body rises, walks out of the house, and disappears into the darkness. On the same night, a resident of Lamongan sees the apparition of a walking corpse at the end of the village road; a village that is cursed: those who are born in the village, if they die outside the village and are not immediately sent home will return home by themselves.

title: Love Therapy
storyline: Martin and Dara have lost intimacy after 17 years of marriage. In confusion, they decide to try sexual therapy, hoping to rekindle their connection. But instead of help, the clinic traps them sending actors to lure them into hotel rooms. Martin and Dara are made drunk, caught "cheating," and recorded then blackmailed by the clinic.

title: Anak Kunti
storyline: In the midst of a religious Islamic boarding school life, Sarah, a female student, is disturbed by a series of nightmares about Kuntilanak that threatens her. Following the instructions of the head of the Islamic boarding school, Nyai Fatima, Sara goes to a haunted village, Wonoenggal, to uncover the dark secrets of her past. There, she meets her best friend at the Islamic boarding school, Azizah who was born there. Fate also brings Sarah together with Majid a young doctor who is doing an internship in Wonoenggal. Sara discovers that the village is sinking into spiritual darkness under the control of Mbok Darmi, and the gripping terror of the kuntilanak. Sara must face supernatural threats and human evil, uncover terrible truths and face a deadly battle to find answers about her origins and help the village from the curse that haunts them.

title: Utusan Iblis: Dia Yang Berada di Antara Kita
storyline: Olivia, a psychiatrist specializing in mental health, who tries to help Rendy, a police officer, dealing with a brutal massacre case carried out by Cantika against her child and husband. After going through several therapy sessions, Olivia's own psychological condition deteriorates. A terrifying entity has long possessed Cantika's body and was the reason she slaughtered her entire family, and now it is causing Olivia's past to resurface.

title: #MoveOnAja
storyline: Broke and heartbroken, Irwan only wants to spend a gloomy New Year's Eve alone in his room, but his friend Dani persuades him to make a list of dating application. Because of this, Irwan will meet Nadia, who is looking for a New Year's Eve date. When Irwan and Nadia meet, they feel incompatible, but fate says something else. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Langit Kala Senja
storyline: Langit seorang penulis novel sedangkan Senja seorang junior editor di penerbit tempat Langit biasa memberikan tulisan untuk diterbitkan.

title: Andai Ibu Tidak Menikah Dengan Ayah
storyline: When her medical scholarship is threatened with revocation, Alin, who has been living away from home, is forced to return home. Upon her return, she realizes that her family life has become increasingly difficult, and her father is rarely home. Her younger sister and older sister also have to bear many burdens in the family to the point of sacrificing themselves and their dreams. Alin also accidentally finds her mother's diary. The contents of the diary are full of memories of her mother's youth, including her dreams. This makes Alin wonder, if her mother had not married her father, would her mother's life have been happier? This question also makes Alin think whether Irfan, her partner, is the right partner for her?

title: Si Paling Aktor
storyline: Gilang is an extra actor who has been in the film industry for 10 years. Gilang always gives too much extra effort so he is blacklisted by many directors and casting directors. Excessive effort makes Gilang always run out of money to invest in his extra roles. Gilang loves a Citra award actress named Rachel Hesington. Unfortunately, Rachel is dating a rising actor, Kevin Sumitro. Kevin is the son of a wealthy businessman named Mr. Nedy Sumitro. Mr. Chen, a mining entrepreneur, kidnaps Kevin and asks for a ransom of 100 billion. The kidnapping incident occurs at the shooting location. In the confusion, Kevin is kidnapped. The kidnapper thinks Gilang is Kevin. So Gilang and Rachel are also kidnapped. The director is also kidnapped. As the story progresses, Gilang manages to overcome all the obstacles that block him, using the knowledge he learned when he was an extra in many films.

title: Rego Nyowo
storyline: Lena came from Jakarta to Malang to study with her brother, Benhur. They lived in a boarding house owned by a kind and friendly couple, Mrs. Astri and Mr. Wiryo. The boarding house was nice, cheap, comfortable, and full of warmth. Every week Mrs. Astri invited all the boarding house residents to have dinner together. But the peaceful boarding house turned into something strange when a boarding house student had a strange dream. He believed the boarding house was haunted, even saying there was a hanging ghost. At first, Lena and the others did not believe it, until she saw it herself and the terrible terror happened. This boarding house was no ordinary boarding house. There was a price to pay. Not money, but life.

title: Galaksi
storyline: Galaksi, the leader of the Ravispa motorcycle gang from Ganesha High School, falls in love with Kejora, a Paskibra girl at the same school. Love makes Galaksi less tough than usual. Galaksi has conflicts with his father, which Kejora accidentally finds out, leading her to feel empathy towards Galaksi. The closeness between Galaksi and Kejora triggers conflicts with Paskibra and rekindles the long-standing animosity between Ravispa and Avegar.

title: Sweetheart
storyline: Nina was forced to move to a new school for girls because her mother Cynthia had just married a rich businessman. Nina has to deal with the Sweetheart gang, a collection of three of the most beautiful and popular girls in her school, Imel, Fifi and Cherry. Is Nina willing to sell all of her life principles for the sake of popularity at school. Will the world with all its bitterness finally change a Nina.

title: Sebelum 7 Hari
storyline: Years after a painful family rift drove them apart, yet Tari and her brother Kadar return to their childhood home with Tari's two children to visit their mother, Anggun, who lies on her deathbed. But their return soon descends into a waking nightmare as long-hidden family secrets begin to surface. They discover that Anggun is cursed and cannot be buried until the mystical day of Kamis Kliwon, just seven days away. As the days pass, the family is confronted terrifying hauntings , eerie rituals, and the malevolent force of a dark pact that has bound their mother. They must uncover the truth behind Anggun's past to break the curse to finally sew their family back together.

title: Hello Goodbye
storyline: Two people meet by chance in Busan, South Korea. Indah works at the Indonesian Embassy in Busan. Abi, a sailor who suffers heart attack and Indah was assigned as his guardian.

title: Partikelir
storyline: Adri (Pandji Pragiwaksono) and Jaka (Deva Mahenra), best friend from elementary to high school, obsess with being a detective. Adri is more brave and quick thinking, while Jaka is strategic and long thinking. They are known to take care of cases at school. From "The Mystery of Reduced Rice Vermicelli Cake", "The Mystery of the Missing Headmaster Buckle" and "The Mystery of Panties that Clog the Toilet". They split up during college. Jaka works as a lawyer at litigation law firm, while Adri is still insistent on his ideals and becomes a private detective. One day, Adri receives a job from a beautiful woman, Tiara (Aurelie Moeremans) whose father was suddenly shot. It makes Adri in the middle of a serious case and asks Jaka for help. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Lagi-Lagi Ateng
storyline: The story of Ateng and his twin Agung who have been separated for a long time. Ateng and Iskak, his friend, go to Jakarta for the first time. Unexpectedly, Ateng meets Agung who has the same body and face as himself. Iskak and Agung's personal assistant, Cemplon are also surprised. It is revealed the fact that they are twin brothers who were separated. Ateng and Agung later realize that their parents were still complete even though they were divorced. So the idea arises to exchange places to meet with parents they have never met. The plan is made to reunite the family. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Gampang Cuan
storyline: In the midst of the family's ongoing financial difficulties, Sultan, the first child who has been living in Jakarta for years and always claims to be successful to his family in the village, is confused by the news that his late father left an inheritance in the form of a debt of 300 million. This debt must be paid within 3 months, or their house in the village will be confiscated. Unfortunately, this news came at the same time as the arrival of Bilqis, his younger sister, who learned that all of the Sultan's successes were ephemeral. The problem is, Mamah, their mother, has heart disease and gets stressed easily. So these brothers and sisters have to work together to find money to pay off debts. Sultan tries all possible jobs, while Bilqis almost falls into being a (almost) plus-plus massage therapist. Until finally, Bilqis found a stock that he thought could be a shortcut to all his problems. As a result, they have to work together to find information about what stocks are possible to make a profit (insider trading). However, the information is difficult to get, they are also constantly harassed by Aji, his younger brother who is determined to come to Jakarta and always tries to get money for college. because they consider themselves special and the family's only hope. Sultan and Bilqis have to try hard, from being a ball picker on the golf course, to being desperate to give sleeping pills to billionaires at an event just to find out which stock will hit the moon next. Using the information they stole and the capital they borrowed, they were determined to enter the stock market-and they got lost. The shares they championed collapsed. All their lies were exposed by Mamah. The Sultan was imprisoned on the billionaire's report. The home they have been fighting for? Bank confiscated. After some time, the shares they were championing actually skyrocketed. They also entered the auction to win the house back and still lost. This made Sultan and Bilqis realize that what their mother needed was not the house, but her children. In the end, the Sultan's family used all the money they got from the shares which eventually skyrocketed to free the Sultan and start over from zero. This time with hard work, investing neck and neck, better money management, and, most importantly, as a family.

title: Dosa Musyrik
storyline: Pressured by debt to the point of despair. Nugie was forced to take his seriously ill mother to a powerful shaman, Mbah Narto. Seeing Mbah Narto's wealth, Nugie was tempted to get it. But unfortunately, what he got was not money, but the shaman's sacred keris. Since then. Nugie had to face the terror of Ni Loro Pati who was very terrible. Not only Nugie who experienced terror, but the people around him also began to die one by one.

title: Belok Kanan Barcelona
storyline: Four friends have been together since high school. Now, when one of them is getting married, all three of them must confess their feelings before it's too late.

title: Mooncake Story
storyline: David (Morgan Oey) is a young entrepreneur who is at the peak of success. But some unexpected events that began with and it turns out David has Alzheimer's disease which paralyzes his memory.

title: Hattrick
storyline: There is an International underground indoor football tournament that being held secretly every year in the world, called GROUND ZERO TOURNAMENT. BU BOSS, a widow of a powerful Mafia in Indonesia obsessed to win this year tournament, especially because this year, Indonesia is the host country. TORO, a seasoned football coach is responsible to assemble a football team that strong enough to become a contender. Because Indonesian team has a miserable reputation, they always eliminated in the early stages. Samuel, Halil, Alung, Anand, Markus, are chosen to be the members of the GARUDA MERAH (RED EAGLE) team, they will play for BU BOSS and for Indonesia. They have to able to cast out their differences and their ego, so they can give their best for the team. With different background, different ethnicity, and their personal baggage, it's not easy to make them a solid team, but TORO convinces them that their diversity actually is their biggest strength, something that maybe only possessed by the Indonesian team. Can this underdog team beat the power house team such as Italy, Germany and Japan? HATTRICK is a football film that made by football lover for football fans everywhere in the world.

title: Tumbal Darah
storyline: As a debt collector during the difficult pandemic, Jefri is waiting for the birth of his second child from Ella, his wife who is 8 months pregnant. Losing Aly, their first child in an incident makes Jefri and Ella eagerly awaiting the arrival of a baby girl whom they have named Kai. However, Jefri who has principles makes their financial condition even more difficult when Ella has to have surgery because her baby is breech, and Ella who secretly continues to work as an online motorcycle taxi driver has a serious accident. In that condition, the only health facility that can accept Ella without them knowing is an illegal Maternity Clinic run by a doctor-nurse couple Iwan and Sandra with their assistant, Bakar who sacrifices aborted fetuses to two twin devils who are always hungry. Jefri and Ella must fight to save themselves and Kai to be able to get out alive from the devil's wrath and the cruelty of Iwan, Sandra and Bakar in a terrible hellish night.

title: Comic 8
storyline: Eight young people each have different reasons and motives for committing bank robberies. Some rob because of anxiety, hobbies, fun, adrenaline sports, and some even rob to support orphanages and poor people. The eight Raiders will be divided into three teams with different abilities and flight hours. The action progresses from a robbery that at first looks like a strange coincidence, being surrounded by police forces with their super beautiful AKP, until finally they have to work together and find answers to puzzles and find the best solution for all.

title: Hujan di Balik Jendela
storyline: Dika (Bioone) helps a woman (Clara Bernadeth) with a traumatic past. The struggle began when Dika fell in love with that woman.

title: Bisikan Arwah Mantan
storyline: The making of the latest Kudeta Production's film is interrupted when one of the cast approaches Viki to get revenge on her sister ruin Viki's household with Angel. Since then, ghost terror has emerged.

title: Bila Esok Ibu Tiada
storyline: Haryo's death left a painful sorrow for his wife, Rahmi, and his four children, Ranika, Rangga, Rania, and Hening. Ranika as the backbone of the family who was too authoritarian, made the relationship between the siblings strained. In fact, Rahmi had high hopes for her children, that if Rahmi was gone tomorrow, they would always be harmonious. Unfortunately, other problems arose, causing chaos. Hening who was caught dating secretly, Rania who stole Ranika's close friend, and Rangga who had no job and considered Ranika a 'late hero'. The disharmony between her children made Rahmi's health worse... Will Rahmi be able to get through her critical period? Will Rahmi's four children be able to grant Rahmi's last wish 'If Tomorrow Mother Is No More'?

title: Qorin 2
storyline: Fitri, a young school counselor, has long suspected that her student, Jaya, is a victim of bullying. Not only Fitri, Makmur -Jaya's father-has also sought help from the school board to no avail. The school's inaction drives Fitri to investigate the case herself, seeking witnesses and proof from the community. However, the investigation leads Fitri to another mystery in her village where the people started acting suspiciously as if they are possessed by Qorin, a type of Jinn. The more Fitri investigates, the clearer the connection between the two cases becomes, and the more terrifying events follow.

title: Humba Dreams
storyline: Martin (J.S. Khairen) is a Jakarta film student who comes home to Sumba for a complicated task. The journey brings Martin to meet Ana (Ully Triani) and the many questions about Humba and himself starts to unravel.

title: Aku, Kau, & KUA
storyline: As a young group of friends navigates the pitfalls of love, Deon tries to court the newly single Fira using the ta'aruf process.

title: Cross the Line
storyline: Maya and Haris try to work as migrant workers in Singapore to change their fate. But all did not go according to plan. Their relationship is separated because of the problems of life. In the end, Maya has to fight alone to realize her dream during the loss of someone closest to her.

title: Glitch: Tersesat dalam Waktu
storyline: December 26, 2004, before the tsunami in Indonesia. At that time, Andi and Dara were forced to drive Teten back to Cibubur after spending time in an entertainment venue. At the same time, there was a time glitch in various parts of the world, including in Jakarta. On their journey, the three of them were attacked by a thin mist and suddenly they had moved to Bukittinggi, West Sumatra. After that, they also experienced a variety of strange events. Starting from Dara, who met the same person three times, Teten who was suddenly in the middle of the lake, also Andi, who twice saw a motorcycle rider crossing in front of Dara's house.

title: 4 Mantan
storyline: Sara (Ranty Maria), Airin (Melanie Berentz), Rachel (Malay Nicole), and Amara (Denira Wiraguna) are accidentally brought together by one incident: the death of their ex-boyfriend Alex (Jeff Smith). What is surprising: before he died, Alex left a letter for each of them and said that if they receive the letter after Alex died, one of the killers is among them. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dear Nathan: Hello Salma
storyline: Sequel to the 2017 movie "Dear Nathan" follows the continued relationship between two young people in love.

title: From Bandung with Love
storyline: Vega aka Vey, a university student, works as a radio broadcaster and copywriter. She has her own radio show that discusses love, "From Bandung With Love". On one show, she theorizes that 10 out of 11 men are unfaithful. This theory is then confirmed when Wulan, Vega's friend, is cheated by her boyfriend. Vega wants to test her theory on Ryan, a creative director known to be a playboy. Vega gives herself one week before her next radio show to meet Ryan, and gather information from the point of view of unfaithful men. But then Vega falls in love with Ryan as he really knows how to treat a lady, a talent that Dion, Vega's boyfriend, does not have. Soon, Vega realizes that she is the one being unfaithful. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Roman Picisan
storyline:
ROMAN PICISAN tells love story between Canting (24) and Bali (27), two different characters, back ground and life style, who is met by many conditions and situations that finally make them both falling in love.

Canting is born from a conservative, conventional, academician Javanese aristocrat family. On the other side, Bali comes from a liberal broken home family. Bali has lived independently since hes young. Thats because he chose to live alone in Dewata island (Bali) instead of choosing to stay with one of his parent who got divorced when he was nineteen.

The story begins when Canting attends Widyas wedding (24) that is held in Bali. Widya is Cantings best friend. Unfortunately the wedding ceremony turns into a mess because of Bali who makes Tom-tom, his best friend and also the broom of Widya, fails to come in that wedding ceremony. Cantings life then continues with one purpose, she determines to bring back the love between Tom-tom and Widya. On the other side, Bali has the opposite purpose, messing Tom-tom and Widyas love as soon as he can.

The conflict between Canting and Bali makes them trapped in many silly actions and sabotages, which finally make them stranded in an isolated and deserted area. By that time, the love feeling between them grows slowly, especially when they both have to spend one night in a fishermans boat on the sea shore because theres no motel nor transportation that can bring them back home. That night, under the starry sky of Bali, Canting and Bali admit their each deepest feeling. The chemistry between them starts to collide.

Unfortunately, when the love that grows inside Bali and Cantings heart, some huge obstacles appear among them. Right before Canting goes to Bali, she has agreed her fathers request, Prasetyo (55), to get married with Bimo (30), a son of her fathers friend. In the end, Bali and Canting have to be separated in Ngurah Rai airport because Canting has to go back to Jogja for the wedding.

But apparently, Bali doesnt give up so easily. When Canting and Bimo do the pre wedding photo shoot, Bali suddenly comes in a disguise as the photographer who will handle the photo shoot session of Canting and Bimos wedding ceremony. Balis purpose is one. He want to get a chance to speak personally with Pras in order to be allowed to become Cantings life mate. Balis plan doesnt go smoothly. He keeps facing some obstacles until the day of the wedding arrives. And at the same day, Bali faces Pras and tells him all about his feeling about Canting. How ever, when Pras asks Canting to decide whether she choose Bali or Bimo, a bitter answer is spoken, Canting, who doesnt want to destroy her fathers dignity and happiness, comes to decides that she chooses Bimo. Bali gets sad and disappointed. But he accepts that and goes out from the ceremony gentlemanly, leaving the love of his life to be lived with another man.

Eight years later Bali is musing at the sea shore when he and Canting ever spent a night on a fishermans boat. Suddenly theres a six years old little girl comes to him and gives him a piece of brownies cake, the cake that was very meaningful for Bali and Canting. Bali gets surprised and curious. And its true, its Canting who asks the girl to give that cake. Canting and Bali now meet again. Canting who got divorced from Bimo three years ago, apologizes to Bali for her disappointing decision back day. Bali forgives Canting and says that its all just a part of their past memories. And now, the real story of their love life is about to begin

title: Lafran
storyline: Lafran Pane, founder of the Islamic Students Association (HMI), started with little Lafran, who was intelligent but lacked discipline. Lafran grew up to be a rebel and moved to various schools, even becoming a street boxer. His brothers, poets Sanusi Pane and Armijn Pane, encouraged Lafran to channel his energy in the form of work. During the Japanese occupation, Lafran was detained for defending cattle breeders. He was later released after his father made amends by handing over the Sibual-buali bus to Japanese soldiers. While studying in Jogjakarta, Lafran was anxious to see educated Muslims who were too involved in secular thinking and forgot about worship. He also founded HMI as a forum for fighting within an Islamic, Indonesian and non-political framework. Supported by his girlfriend, Dewi, he allows HMI to be led by students who are not from the Islamic College, before asking Syafaat Muntadja from UGM to lead HMI.

title: Finding Srimulat
storyline: In the middle of the problems he faces, Adika (Reza Rahadian) gets an idea when his car breaks down at a restaurant owned by Kadir, one of the remaining Srimulat legends. Adika, who since childhood has special memories of Srimulat began to tread the possibility of bringing Srimulat back through a unique performance. —Mwd

title: Onrust
storyline: Bramanto Putra finds an ancient notebook belonging to Maria van de Velde's lover that mysteriously disappeared and was fatal. Bram asks Susan Sriwati, a friend he has a crush on, to do his research. Both are students majoring in archeology who are completing their final project. Susan accidentally recites the spell she has managed to concoct. The result: awakens the dark spirits of Onrust Island, namely Maria van de Velde, Jehovah, Hasan, a slave carving gravestones, and Dr. Machinebouw. The four spirits bound each other. One of them is an executor who is allied with the devil and hunts Susan to turn her into a killing machine. Prof Daniel, Bram's uncle, together with Prof Tania helps Bram to save Susan. The riddle of Maria van de Velde's poetry is a thread to uncover the mysteries that occurred on Onrust Island 300 years ago. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Perahu Kertas 2
storyline: Coming home from Bali, Kugy try to avoid Keenan and Remi, Karel home to calm down (Ben Kasyafani), his brother. Keenan who feel lost even looking Kugy. Through Noni, Keenan knows that the first Kugy abstain from Keenan, as well as Noni and Eko, is because it actually Kugy love Keenan, but hindered by the proximity of Keenan and Wanda (Kimberly Ryder). Kugy Keenan decided to meet to finalize their pent-up feelings. However, event-by-event then interweave, unite and separate hearts, alternating between Kugy, Keenan, Remi, Luhde, and also Siska along with other people around them. Even opening the how the relationship Pak Wayan and Keenan's parents, Lena (Ira Wibowo) and Adri. Paper boat on a river flowing, swinging looking lovely heart .

title: Kain Kafan Hitam
storyline: Evelyn, a student, has two younger siblings: Arya and Maya who are still in elementary and middle school. Evelyn has a boyfriend, Bimo, who has a hobby of horror. In fact, he has a strange community on campus, a demon search community. Bimo is accompanied by Angeline and Roy in the community. Evelyn says that after her parents died in an accident, she has to move from her house because the house had been mortgaged to the bank for a long time. They find a house that was in line with Evelyn's financial abilities. Mysteries happen in that house. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Until Tomorrow
storyline: Sarah's waiting for a wedding with her lover, Haka, begins to come true when Haka surprisingly proposes to her after a long courtship. However, their happiness seems to be snatched away when Sarah is diagnosed with stage three blood cancer and has to undergo intense treatment. On the other hand, Haka's job opportunities are shining. He has to share his time to accompany Sarah and do his work.

title: Mendadak Kaya
storyline: Ali Oncom is pursued by a debt collector. At the same time he is also under pressure from his girlfriend, Yuli, who wants to be married soon. Otoy is threatened to be divorced by his wife Eli and expelled from Eli's parents' house because he has never provide a living. Their problems are no less complicated than Doyok who has to pay tens of millions rupiah to Mang Ujang, because he accidentally burned his Warung Kopi. Doyok, Otoy and Ali Oncom are forced to make a lot of money in a short time. They have to do many tricks: disguise as beggars and transvestite buskers which cause them to be arrested by public police, and to engage in mysterious inter-gang transactions. This last event actually bring benefits. They succeed to bring away billions of rupiah. Their dream of becoming rich is achieved. They can shop, travel abroad, and most importantly can overcome all financial problems. One thing they don't understand: that wealth also brings disaster. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Dealova
storyline: Libby, a female basketball player, is caught in confusion when she is faced with two boys who are quite different in age from her and who both love Libby.

title: Jin Qorin
storyline: Seno really loves his wife Alya and her daughter Reva. However, there is a big secret that must be covered by him in the household. Wina, the boss where Seno works, actually also loves Seno. Abdi, a friend and brother -in -law of Seno, suspects that there is a special relationship between Vienna and Seno. In his investigation, Abdi finds irregularities in Seno. At the same time Wina who still insisted on getting Seno's love, finds evidence that strengthened the secrets covered by Seno.

title: Seandainya
storyline: A young man falls in love with a girl but faces severe opposition from his father. However, he soon faces bigger problems

title: Azzamine
storyline: Jasmine, who is tomboyish and lazy, is met through an arranged marriage with a religious man who brings shade through his behavior and words, named Azzam. Jasmine asked Azzam to step back and started to avoid him because he felt inappropriate, but Azzam's gentleness made him melt and echoed in Jasmine's mind. Apart from that, he already has a girlfriend with whom he has been in a relationship for four years named Deka. Jasmine also has to decide where her heart will go.

title: 99% Muhrim: Get Married 5
storyline: Mae (Nirina Zubir) and Rendy (Nino Fernandez) celebrate their wedding anniversary while their children (Farras Fatik, Steven Craig, Hadijah Shahab) are staying with their grandparents, Babe (Jaja Mihardja) and Bu Mardi (Meriam Bellina). But the romantic dinner breaks up completely when they get the new that Babe had a car accident. Rendy also wants to make a party for the good fortune of their family, but instead, Mae often ponders. He was ashamed because he never prayed at all. —HOOQ

title: 3 Hati, Dua Dunia, Satu Cinta
storyline: A love story of a Moslem freelance journalist and a Catholic college girl, in resistance by their different cultures and religion.

title: Mumun
storyline: Mumun wants to marry her fiancé, Juned. But, before marriage, she loses her life. Unfortunately, Mumun's pocong rope is neglected to be removed by Husein, the gravedigger. Mumun becomes a pocong and brings havoc to the people. Juned, who still couldn't let go of her departure, couldn't accept she was called Pocong Mumun. Pocong Mumun also haunts Mimin, Mumun's twin sister, who has to return to treat her parents' grief.

title: Negeri Van Oranje
storyline: It's a story of a bond shared between five friends. And the journey to find meaning in life, to discover their dreams, to overcome their struggles, and to seek love in a foreign country. The journey that took a woman named Lintang to this day, the day before her wedding. The day where all her memories return to the past she had shared with her fiends: Daus, Banjar, Wicak and Geri. Together they had studied for their post-graduate degrees in the Netherlands. Even though they went to study in different cities: Leiden, Utrecht, Rotterdam, Wagenigen and Den Haag, their strong friendship brought them together and helped them survive in a country far away from home. Their togetherness eventually introduced Lintang to love. An unrequited love, for someone who has been keeping a secret none of them had ever known. It is also their togetherness that had brought them to Prague, where their greatest problem finally surfaced. A problem in the name of...love. And today... Lintang is getting married. To one of her best friends.

title: Jendela Seribu Sungai
storyline: Children's dreams and aspirations should flow freely like a river. Three children named Bunga, Arian and Kejora are brought together at school with a teacher, Mrs. Sheila, who understands their dreams and hopes. Unfortunately, their wishes are not always in line with their expectations. Arian, whose father is a kuriding artist, doesn't want his son to inherit his skills in playing kuriding. Kejora, on the other hand, wanted to achieve his dream of becoming a doctor, but was opposed by his father, who was traumatized by the Puskesmas doctor because he was thought to have killed his wife during childbirth. Likewise, Bunga never once developed her dance talent in front of her all-sufficient parents. Down syndrome actually made Bunga's parents give up her dream of becoming a dancer.

title: Iyus Jenius
storyline: Iyus living alone with his mother since his father died. He has an imaginary friend named Babah Tbob (only Iyus can see him) who ultimately helps Iyus become a genius on his journey.

title: Say I Love You
storyline: Sheren (Dinda Hauw) is not only chasing her dreams, but she is also fighting for love. Sheren is an energetic, full of ideas and hopes young lady, secretly admired by Robert (Alvaro Maldini) who is an ignorant and troubled young man. Hand in hand with Sayydah, Olfa, Yohana, and Ridwan, Sheren tries to rebuild their school's reputation so other schools will not underestimate them. Sheren has developed a strong bond with a school that has given her a million dreams and hopes. Sadly, this is not an easy battle for Sheren and it is even harder to love Robert back due to strict rules imposed by the school.

title: Si Jago Merah
storyline: Four students who are threatened with drop out because of arrears in college for 4 consecutive semesters, namely Gito (Deddy Mahendra Desta), Dede (Ringgo Agus Rahman), Kuncoro (Sukma Perdana Manaf), and Rojak (Judika Sihotang). They were hired as apprentices at the Fire Department, as a Reserve Force with makeshift equipment and given the task of caring for an old fire engine, known as Si Jago Merah. —iflix

title: Berbalas Kejam
storyline: Adam, an architect, has lived a traumatic life for two years. He is traumatized by seeing his wife and child being killed in front of his eyes. Because he can't feel comfortable at work, he visits Amanda, a psychiatrist, at the suggestion of his friend. In the healing process, he can take revenge on one of his family's killers. Then proceed with looking for the next killer. He is also romantically involved with his psychiatrist, who turns out to be the sister of a third assassin he has yet to kill.

title: Ghostbuser: Misteri Desa Penari
storyline: Sigit (Tora Sudiro), who has been able to see ghosts since he was a child, helps a herbalist who is killed by a car, Ningsih (Annete Edoardo / Niniek L Karim). Ningsih, who is able to communicate with Sigit, asks for help to find the culprit. On the other hand, Sigit also asks Nining to help in his business to get rid of the ghost he has founded with Alexandra (Wulan Guritno) and Genjing (Gary Iskak) named Ghost Buser. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Perang Kota
storyline: Set in Jakarta in 1946, Isa, a 35-year-old former fighter and a violinist, is now an elementary school teacher. His service during the war for independence leaves him with a reputation as a seasoned soldier. His trauma, however, leaves him with impotence. Isa lives with his wife, Fatimah, and their adopted son, Salim. He steals notebooks to keep his family afloat since students have stopped coming to the school. The city, after all, is in chaos; abandoned by the President, burned by either the Gurkhas, the British, or the Dutch. Isa helps the revolution with his friend and violin student, Hazil young, handsome, with a fervent spirit to fight. Behind Isa's back, the young man is having an affair with Fatimah. Knowing that Hazil is able to impregnate Fatimah, something he would never be able to do, Isa chooses to pretend not knowing anything and acknowledge the baby that Fatimah bears as his own. Together with Hazil, Isa devises a plan to blow up a movie theater in Senen Market, a gathering place for British Nica officials and their "friends", the Dutch. Their main target is Van Mook, the Governor General of the Dutch Indies, who heartily considers Indonesia as his homeland. The mission ends with betrayals. Hazil gives up all the accomplices' names, and Fatimah leaves Isa. But, eventually, Isa finds his peace. This is a story that shows what war means to ordinary people in a city that is, once upon a time, proclaimed as free.

title: Modual Nekad
storyline: Saipul and Jamal are shocked when they find out the money in their suitcase is gone because Marwan used it. In the midst of guilt, Marwan unexpectedly finds hope through something inside the suitcase. With twice the reckless determination, can they escape their troubles?

title: Jendral Soedirman
storyline: The Dutch declares unilaterally that they are not longer bound by the Renville Treaty, and to stop the ceasefire. On December 19, 1948, Army Commander General Spoor Noord Simons leads military aggression II to attack Yogyakarta, the capital of the Republic of Indonesia at the time. The Dutch arrested Soekarno-Hatta and exiled them to the island of Bangka. General Soedirman who suffered from tuberculosis leads the guerrilla war for seven months against the Dutch. Meanwhile the Dutch declares that Indonesia is no longer existed. From the deep of the jungle, Soedirman broadcasts that the Republic of Indonesia is still exist and remains strong, and they will fight for the freedom of all Indonesian people. Soedirman turned Java into a guerrilla war zone, and slowly destroying the Dutch's logistics one by one. The Dutch's armies suffered from the skilled guerrilla tactics by Soedirman, and got defeated in the end. By the union between TNI and the people, Soedirman wins the war. At the end of military aggression, the Roem-Royen agreement is signed, and the Dutch recognize the sovereignty of Indonesia. —straydog12

title: Jokowi Adalah Kita
storyline: Life story of the President of Indonesia when he was a Mayor of Surakarta until he became the President of Indonesia.

title: Tanduk Setan
storyline: A woman who was pregnant out of wedlock where she was waiting for the birth of her child, but unfortunately during the process of giving birth to the child the woman actually experienced terror which was quite tense and made her feel very afraid.

title: Janji Darah
storyline: A married couple named Rayhan and Sheren are expecting the birth of their first child. However, in the middle of Sheren's pregnancy, the husband and wife experienced a terrible mystical terror that threatened the safety of the fetus they were carrying. After investigation, it turned out that the mystical disturbance came from Rayhan's past story with his cousin, Dinda. Reyhan and Dinda have a sixth sense where they made a promise to protect each other. Reyhan suspected that Dinda, who was no longer alive, had come back to him to collect the promise and he was unable to fulfill her request.

title: Bila
storyline: Bila feel it's impossible to obtain Dani's love. Unexpectedly, it turned out that Dani actually loved her. However, Bila's mother forbade their relationship. To honor her, Dani left for Australia.

title: Love & Faith
storyline: The plot is about Kwee Tjie Hoei, a senior high school graduate who comes from an ordinary family who provides his younger brother Kwee Tjie Ong with the opportunity to continue his university education. Hoei works as an honorarium teacher at a school and also as an electronic technician to earn his living. One day Lim Kwee Ing, a student of his, asks him for private lessons and they fall in love and get married. The two are put to test at the ailing bank owned by Hoei's father. Hoei, who is entrusted with his father's problems as one of the bank's proprietors, faces bad management decisions that lead the bank to the brink of collapse, resulting in the decision to lay off many employees. —Kris Tjokro

title: Bismillah Kunikahi Suamimu
storyline: Malik and Hanna are expecting the birth of their first child. During a pregnancy consultation, Hanna's regular organ is unable to attend, and she is replaced by doctor Cathy, who turns out to be her best friend in high school, who also happens to be Malik's ex-girlfriend. Unfortunately, Hanna is diagnosed with cancer which threatened herself and her baby, and she needs to have an operation. The doctor says that Hanna's chances of surviving after the operation is very small. Hanna realizes that she may not live for long and before she dies, she requests Malik to marry Cathy. Malik and Cathy strongly refuse the crazy request, but Hanna is determined. After asking for the family's approval, the marriage's proposal and consent is carried out at the hospital, in Hanna's presence. The three of them are now involved in a complicated love triangle and polygamy.

title: Tumbal: The Ritual
storyline: Nira, Raka, Leo, Maya and Sisi make a horror film for their college assignment. They went to a sugar factory which is said to be very haunted.

title: Negeri Para Ketua
storyline: The situation in the city of Medan is not conducive because there is a feud between five big gangs seeking influence and power. They are the Batak Gang that controls Central Medan, the Javanese Gang that controls North Medan, the Chinese Gang that controls East Medan, the Indian Gang that controls South Medan, and the Malay Gang that controls West Medan. The Chinese Gang Leader wants to match his younger brother, Kenzo, with Indian Gang Leader Rakesh's younger sister Anjali. They secretly want to unite the territories they have previously controlled. However, Binsar, the leader of the Batak Gang, strongly opposed the match.

title: Si Doel: The Movie
storyline: Doel travels to the Netherlands to reunite with a woman who left him 14 years ago. Doel's new journey is started again.

title: Kajiman: Iblis Terkejam Penagih Janji
storyline: Asha is a nurse who has just lost her mother. With her mother gone, the only person Asha has is herself, and the bitter reality is hard for her to accept. Trying to move on with her life, Asha takes a job as a nurse for an elderly patient named Ismail, who suffers from a mysterious illness. But since then, Asha's job has been disrupted by supernatural terror, and she often hears whispers from her mother's spirit. To uncover the mystery, Asha seeks the help of her friend, Rama. Rama's curiosity and concern for Asha drag him into a terrifying story. Unbeknownst to them, Asha and Rama's fate is in jeopardy as they become trapped in a cult ritual of Kajiman, the cruelest demon worshipped through a Javanese incantation called "pesugihan". According to Javanese beliefs, only the heir of Tuesday Kliwon can conquer Kajiman, but on the other hand, their existence is also hunted down by Kajiman's followers to become a sacrificial offering. With time running out, Asha and Rama try to find a way out to free themselves from Kajiman's grip and the terror of black magic.

title: Paranoia
storyline: Dina, who ran away from her husband, Gion. He was wanted because in addition to running with their child, Laura, he was also carrying a valuable item. In hiding, an unknown man named Raka appears and disturbs Dina and Laura's relationship. The situation is getting more difficult and the threat is getting closer.

title: MBA: Married by Accident
storyline: Pressured by their peers, teen couple Raskal and Ole decided to have sex for the first time, and resulted in a clearly unexpected pregnancy. These high schoolers tried to make it their own way, with supports from a gang of misfits.

title: Pulau Hantu 3
storyline: The series of mysterious deaths have been forgotten. Nero, Kimo, Octa and Gaby take the jobs as the staffs. And one by one his friends are killed by the ghost at the back of the island. What will happen to them?

title: Sampai Jumpa, Selamat Tinggal
storyline: Wyn arrives in Seoul to search for her missing lover, Dani. There she meets Rey, an Indonesian worker who then agrees to help her. As they grow closer, Rey discovers Dani's new identity, but keeps it a secret from Wyn. When Wyn meets Dani again, she suddenly disappears. Rey is forced to start searching again to find her.

title: Ada Cinta Di SMA
storyline: Iqbal (Iqbaal Dhiafakhri Ramadhan) gets tired of being underestimated and aims to change the situation by running against Ayla Iqbal (Caitlin Halderman) in the election of student council president. Iqbal's decision is sneered by many parties, including Aldi (Alvaro Maldini) who thinks that becoming student council president is tacky. Seeing Iqbal's seriousness, Aldi supports his friend and faces his opponent's successful team led by Tara (Gege Elisa). On the other hand, Kiki (Teuku Ryzki) who has completed his term as chairman of the council, wants to pursue his dream to become a musician. Bella (Agatha Chelsea) always secretly pays attention to Kiki, who often spends time alone composing songs.

title: Pai kau
storyline: During a Chinese wedding hosted by a powerful business man, unsettling incidents occur which disrupt the celebration.

title: Love You... Love You Not
storyline: A romantic comedy about Amira, an English tutor, and Juki, a hot-tempered Betawi guy. It begins when Suchin, a Thailand girl who is also Juki girlfriend, asks Amira, her English tutor, to tell Juki that they brakes up because she gets a job in America. During this time she and Juki communicate through gestures. When Amira tells Suchin message, Juki does not accept it and forces Amira to teach him English, to follow Suchin. For fear of Juki, Amira tutors him privately. At the same time, another guy, Taufan, is approaching Amira. —themoviedb

title: Assalamualaikum Baitullah
storyline: Amira, a woman who initially lived happily with the person she loved. However, everything changed when she experienced betrayal and lost someone close to her. Disappointment, devastation, and loneliness made Amira lose her direction in life. She felt heartbroken and found it difficult to recover from deep wounds. In desperation, Amira decided to go to the Holy Land. For Amira, this journey was not just a pilgrimage or an escape from problems, but a search for identity and new hope. In Mecca, Amira tried to make peace with her past, rebuild her fragile heart, and strengthen her spiritual connection with God. During her time in the Holy Land, Amira reflected a lot and discovered the true meaning of life. She also met new people who helped her healing process, including Barra who was always there to support her. This journey slowly transformed Amira into a stronger and more sincere person.

title: Dilema
storyline: Dilemma is an omnibus film, five stories that depict dark side of Jakarta's underbelly. Jakarta's underground world that seldom to talk about, and forgotten by most of the people.

title: Triangle the Dark Side
storyline: A retired Hitman is forced to complete his final mission, but falls in love with his target's sister. Now he has to choose between Love and Logic.

title: Persahabatan Bagai Kepompong
storyline: Having a best friend is rather tricky. Ben Sarjono must do many things for friendship to emerge beautifully from its cocoon.

title: London Love Story
storyline: Dave (Dimas Anggara) is terribly heartbroken because the woman he loves left him without any explanation. However, he meets Adelle (Adila Fitri), who happens to be on the brink of committing suicide. Meanwhile, there is also Caramel (Michelle Ziudith) who starts to have feelings for Bima (Dion Wiyoko). Faith then unites these 4 different people and brings a little bit of surprise into their lives. —iflix

title: Hidup Ini Terlalu Banyak Kamu
storyline: Sadali, a student from Bukit Tinggi pursuing his dream of becoming a painter, was successfully accepted to continue his studies at ISI Yogyakarta majoring in fine arts. Before his departure to Yogyakarta, Sadali underwent the Taaruf process and was matched with Arnaza, a beautiful girl from his village. They had known each other before, so the matchmaking went smoothly. They enjoyed a beautiful time together in the remaining time before Sadali left. When Sadali arrived in Yogyakarta, he got a place to stay with the help of Budi, his friend from Bukit Tinggi. His place of residence also had a restaurant and art gallery managed by a female art activist, Mera, the woman's name. While living in the rented house, Sadali also got to know Grace, Mera's younger cousin who helped there. As time went by, Sadali began to realize that Mera was the woman he had dreamed of. Although he realized that Mera was older, already had a daughter and was going through the process of her divorce. Meanwhile, Arnaza in Bukit Tinggi faithfully waited for Sadali to return and they could continue their matchmaking until marriage. Arnaza continued to communicate with Sadali by letter. Will Sadali continue with his arranged marriage with Arnaza or will he pursue his love with Mera, the woman of his dreams.

title: Atas Nama Surga
storyline: Naya and Attar meet when they both lose their loved ones. The return of Salwa, Attar's old love, comes between them.

title: Dignitate
storyline: Alfi (Al Ghazali) is a fierce and cool high school student. Although liked by many girls, he does not have time to date. He is very serious about his studies at school. Keenan (Teuku Rizky Muhammad), his best friend, is the opposite. He always tells Alfi to be more relaxed. One day Alfi is late for school and must clean the women's toilet. There he meets Alana (Caitlin Halderman), a beautiful new student at school. It turns out that both of them are in one class and sitting next to each other. Instead of getting along, they often argue because they both are stubborn. Alana doesn't like Alfi's rude personality. That is caused by Alana's past. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kapal Goyang Kapten
storyline: Three amateur hijackers hijacked a tourist ship that was sailing in the Maluku Sea which contained several local tourists and Captain Gomgom (Babe Cabita). They are Daniel (Ge Pamungkas) who wants to prove to his parents that even a rich kid can work, Cakka (Muhadkly Acho) who needs money for his sick mother, and Bertus (Mamat Alkatiri), an unemployed man. Because of their stupidity, they instead sank the ship and were stranded on an empty island. Resistance from the hostages was driven by Tiara (Yuki Kato) and pressure from other passengers: the Burhan family consisting of a father (Arief Didu), a mother (Asri Welas) and their child (Romaria Simbolon), a husband and wife on their honeymoon , Darto (Yusril) and Salma (Naomi Papilaya), as well as three Noni students (Andi Anissa), Cika (Ryma Shepherd) and Agung (Ananta Rispo). —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Sing to the Dawn
storyline: Dana, is forced to follow the patriarchal tradition in her village and also the dominance of the landlord who burdens her family and the entire village with excessive land taxes. In fact, the landlord Pairot intends to evict the residents in order to build a hotel and casino. Dana's journey becomes very unique when she realizes that only by winning a scholarship competition to continue her education, she can fight against this injustice. Accompanied by forest animals and Rai, her younger brother, Dana not only succeeds in getting a scholarship, but they also discover the landlord's secret about her true identity.

title: Anak Titipan Setan
storyline: Putri has to return from Australia because her family in Meloyo Kidul village, Surakarta, is in big trouble. Granny Susana, Putri's mother, forces Putri to come home with her son, who is believed to be a solution to the problem. The problem that threatened the entire family's safety started when Granny Susana took part in the pesugihan (to be rich) ritual and made a pact with the demon Jaran Penoleh.

title: Tukar Takdir
storyline: Rawa Budiarso, a man who was the sole survivor of the Jakarta Airways 79 Flight crash. The plane was previously declared lost before finally being found in a destroyed condition. Rawa, who suffered serious injuries, managed to survive surprisingly. However, his survival turned out to have a story of its own. Rawa was not able to survive by luck alone. It turned out that he accidentally switched seats with another passenger before departure. The passenger was Raldi, the husband of Dita, who ultimately died in the crash. In addition to having to deal with physical injuries and psychological trauma, Rawa also became the main witness in the investigation process of the cause of the plane crash. The situation became more complex when Rawa had to face Dita, who was still overcome with grief and anger over her husband's death. She questioned how Rawa could have survived, while her husband did not. Not only that, Rawa also met Zahra, the daughter of the plane's pilot who was also a victim. Zahra was also struggling to accept the bitter reality that her father would not return. In their respective life journeys, Rawa, Zahra, and Dita are connected by a shared tragedy. They must find a way to reconcile with the past and accept a painful reality. From an initially awkward and questionable relationship, an emotional closeness slowly emerges between Rawa and Zahra.

title: Athirah
storyline: Athirah's life is shattered when another woman enters her husband's life. In a time and cultural background where polygamy is still widely accepted, Athirah struggles alone with the hurt and humiliation. Meanwhile, Athirah's eldest son, Ucu, has to go through his teenage years with uncertainty. While trying to understand what is going on in his family, Ucu falls in love with Ida. His effort to approach Ida isn't easy and Ucu's frustration deepens when he discovers that his mother is pregnant again. A portrait of an Indonesian family in South Sulawesi circa 1960 that still resonates today.

title: Menculik Miyabi
storyline: Three Indonesian guys head to the airport to see their favorite Japanese porn star, Maria Ozawa, when she visits Jakarta. But airport chaos results in them kidnapping their idol. Throw in a love triangle, mistaken identity, a marketing campaign aimed at teenagers, and a conspicuous lack of adult content, and you have one of the most unnecessarily controversial comedies Indonesia has ever produced. —Mwd

title: Cinta Dari Timor
storyline: Eight years ago, when the East Timor referendum was announced, Langit promised to take Bintang away from this country so that they could stay together. Unfortunately, Langit never came. After 8 years had passed, Langit emerged as a very different person. When Bintang demanded an explanation, she found surprising facts about the reason Langit did not keep his promise.

title: Cin... Tetangga Gue, Kuntilanak!
storyline: While Safina is pregnant, her husband, Anton, is having an affair with his secretary, Yuli.

title: Suster Keramas 2
storyline: Three young teens, Jack (Ricky Harun), Tando (Zidni Adam) and Shelly (Violenzia Jeanette) like to race motorcycles on the road, until one night Shelly has an accident. The two companions immediately brought her to the nearest hospital. While waiting for Shelly in care, they meet Sachiko (Sola Aoi) who is ushered by tour guide Cakil (Marcel Darwin). But the hospital was not an ordinary one. They soon find many strange and terrible things they never expected. —Johnny D

title: Kehormatan di Balik Kerudung
storyline: Syahdu and Ifan develop feelings for each other after a chance encounter. Things take a turn when Syahdu is forced to marry her rich ex-boyfriend to pay for her mother's medical bills.

title: Danur 2: Maddah
storyline: Risa (Prilly Latuconsina), a teenage girl who has 3 ghost friends named Peter (Gamaharitz), William (Alexander Bain) and Jhansen (Kevin Bzezovski). Risa now lives with her sister Riri (Sandrina Michelle), who is getting embarrassed with Risa's ability to see ghosts. They temporarily only stay together because his mother accompanied his father's office abroad. His uncle's family, Om Ahmad (Bucek) recently moved to bandung with his wife, Tente Tina (Sophia Latjuba) and Angki (Shawn Adrian) son. Risa and Riri often visit even stay at home om Ahmad and Tante Tina. Risa initially does not feel any weird with Om Ahmad's house, but one day Risa caught Om Ahmad away with a woman, Risa hardly believe that her Om cheating, Risa dare not say to aunt Tina and choose to investigate themselves, but after that Angki tells some strange things happened and the strangest thing is the attitude of Om Ahmad changed. One night Risa is plagued by the haunting female ghosts in the house. Is it true Om Ahmad cheating? What is his relationship with the terror of the ghost woman in the house that annoys Om Ahmad's family including Risa? Will Peter and his friends come to help Risa despite Peter warning of the previous risks about the dangerous evil spirits in Om Ahmad's house?

title: Yang Tak Tergantikan
storyline: Aryati is a divorcee who works as an online taxi driver to provide for her three children, Bayu, Tika, and Kinanti. Their family's ups and downs.

title: Agen +62
storyline: In Indonesia there are many agents. Credit agents, gallon agents, newspaper agents, insurance agents, and also... secret agents. This is the story of Dito and Martha, two secret agents who are considered losers. Together they try to solve one of the most difficult cases in Indonesia. Disguise after disguise brings them together to Jessica. the owner of a salon who turns out to have a dark secret. Involves the future of one country.

title: 22 Menit
storyline: On January 14th, 2016, explosions shook downtown Jakarta, and screams rang throughout the streets of Sarinah. "22 Menit" ("22 minutes" in Indonesian) recounts the eeryily calm 22 minutes which preluded to moment, the weeks of intense investigation and arrest of those affiliated with the terrorist actors still at large, as well as the cultural impacts these 22 minutes had upon modern Indonesian society, when this fight was brought to its streets. —JL

title: Bu Tejo Sowan Jakarta
storyline: Teddy wants to get married to fulfill his mother's wishes. However, when his mother found out that his future wife, Vanessia, was of Chinese descent, her mother did not allow it because she was embarrassed by the neighbors. Teddy also invited the whole village to Jakarta so they could still get married.

title: Cin(T)a
storyline: Cina and Annisa love God and God loves them both. But Cina and Annisa cannot love each other because they call God by different names

title: Pacarku Kuntilanak Kembar
storyline: Budi and Bodo, often mocked for being single. After failing to find dates, they meet sexy twins Rosa and Rosi, thinking luck is on their side. But the sisters are actually kuntilanak seeking revenge.

title: The Curse
storyline: An expatriate lawyer girl from Indonesia who working in Australia got message from ghost spirit.

title: Kambodja
storyline: Jakarta 1955. Danti, a librarian, and Bayu, a writer, live in the same boarding house with their respective partners. Their partners often leave them to become close because of their similarity of loneliness. When Danti decides to keep her distance from Bayu, she finds out that her husband, Sena, a party activist, has a relationship with Lastri, a singer and Bayu's wife.

title: Satu Suro
storyline: Adinda, who is pregnant, has just moved to a house on the edge of town along with Bayu, her husband. However, strange events are felt in the house, Adinda is often disturbed by spirits and hallucinating.One day Adinda experiences a severe contraction. Bayu takes his wife to the nearest hospital. The doctor assures Adinda that she is not quite ready to give birth so Bayu returns home to pick up items for her stay in hospital. However, upon his return, Bayu finds only an empty, uninhabited old building. Local residents claim that the hospital has not operated for 15 years. The building seems to have been badly burnt, He hears strange sounds, but he has to stay to find his wife who is about to give birth soon. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Virgo and the Sparklings
storyline: Riani, a not-so-normal teenager, deals with "normal" everyday teenage life: love and competition with her friends and band mates, Ussy and Monica. She also learns to control her power of fire and synesthesia (able to see color and sound). In the midst of his crisis as a teenager, it turns out that there is a very big danger for humans. With the help of her band mates, Virgo and The Sparklings, Riani tries to stop the chaos-spreading action.

title: Dilan 1983: Wo Ai Ni
storyline: Dilan's childhood when he was 12 years old. When he was 12 years old, Dilan joined his father on duty in Timor Leste, which was previously called East Timor. Dilan spent around 1.5 years in East Timor and returned to Bandung and went to school at his old place. In 1983, Dilan met a new ethnic Chinese student from Semarang named Mei Lien. Mei Lien's presence at Dilan's school makes him feel like he likes Mei so he wants to learn Mandarin. Dilan's desire to learn Mandarin surprised his family.

title: The Carousel Never Stops Turning
storyline: It's a film about an accountant who cannot leave behind the memory of his late wife, about the newlyweds spending their honeymoon at a zoo, about three girl band members who travel across the countryside for an inspiration, about a prostitute who contemplates her escape plan from her current life, about a woman seeking her mother's murderer and her encounter with a wandering ghost. About two farmers who protest against the eviction done by the State. About a car that witnesses everything.
A young man must find a way to free his father from the threat of jail.

title: Cinlok
storyline: Cundra, a young executive, and Nayla, a hotel manager, meet each other at a food stall. Cundra starts the conversation that developes into a relationship. He finds out that Nayla has a fiancé, Tyo, a businessman, while Cundra also has fiancée, Tika, a designer on the rise. But the truth is that both of them are lying about their lives. After the meeting, they promise to meet each other again and this time they have to use their wits to keep their private lives from being discovered. Will they succeed in maintaining their lies? Will Nayla and Cundra finally fall in love with each other? —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kakak
storyline: Adi and Kirana have been married for a long time but are still childless. Adi decides that a move outside of town. Kirana starts to feel that there is something strange with their new home. a girl ghost who she calls "SISTER".

title: Guru Bangsa Tjokroaminoto
storyline: In 1912, Javanese activist Omar Said Tjokroaminoto (Reza Rahadian) co-founds the Sarekat Islam party to fight injustices of the Dutch East Indies' colonial regime.

title: The Mentalist
storyline: Two mentalists, Deddy Corbuzier and Ronggo Sewu (Limbad), compete to show who is the best. Ronggo Sewu who used to be Deddy Corbuzier's assistant framed Deddy Corbuzier by using black magic in every magic show. This can't be accepted by Deddy Corbuzier. Hostility and revenge between the two are inevitable. They dive into dangerous games where lives are at stake. —Mwd

title: Lost in Love
storyline: Sequel to the 2003 movie "Eiffel I'm in Love".

title: Crazy Love
storyline: Kumbang (Adipati Dolken) is a bad boy in his school. He is often got punished. Until one day, the school principal assigned Olive (Tatjana Saphira) to help him so he could change and have good grades.

title: Pulang
storyline: Pras and Rindu, his daughter, traveled to his parent's house, following Santi and Biru, his wife and youngest son. This trip will be their last journey as a complete family. Because secretly, Pras and Santi decided to divorce. Before reaching the destination, many secrets were revealed one after another.

title: Si Doel the Movie 2
storyline: The news that her husband met with his ex-lover and child makes Zaenab confused in choosing: to defend his marriage with Doel, or to let him go. Especially when Doel says that Sarah and Dul will stay in Jakarta, Zaenab tries to find answers to the fate she has to choose. Hope began to open when Doel hears from Atun that the possibility of Zaenab being pregnant. The assertion comes when Sarah visits Maknyak to express regret for what had happened in the past and asks Dul to call Zaenab mother. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Cinta Tak Pernah Tepat Waktu
storyline: Father and Mother's desire to see Daku get married is not in line with their son's love story which is always messy. When Daku feels he has found the right person, time seems reluctant to be friends. From Nadya who is very patient, Anya who brings lots of excitement, and Sarah who is calming, is there anyone who can be with Daku until the end? Can Daku's love be on time?

title: Surat Kecil Untuk Tuhan
storyline: This movie tells the story of a girl named Gita Sesa Wanda Cantika or also known as Keke who fights deadly cancer called Rhabdomyosarcoma as she is the first Rhabdomyosarcoma patient in Indonesia.

title: Hongkong Kasarung
storyline: Sule (Sule) desperately asks his mother's (Yati Surachman) permission to work in Malaysia. He wants to have a lot of money, in order to reclaim Iis (Selvi Kitty), his girlfriend who is lulled by Cecep (Uus). This situation is exploited by Mang Saswi (Sas Widjanarko), his uncle. Saswi takes Sule to Hong Kong with Sule's money from selling his rice fields. Sule is accidentally involved with the local gang led by Bos K (Iwa K), for trying to help Aline (Pamela Bowie), daughter of an Indonesian businessman (George Rudy). He must also deal with The Bag (Volland Volt), the assassin charged by Aline's father. —Mwd

title: Hati Merdeka: Merah Putih III
storyline: The third and final movie of "Red and White" trilogy and set during the Indonesian revolution in 1947-1948, as a band of guerrillas fight for Indonesia's freedom on land, sea, and air against the Dutch empire.

title: BrokenHearts
storyline: When Olivia's (Julie Estelle) boyfriend, Jamie (Reza Rahadian), disappears without any warning, Olivia's life becomes cold and empty. With her broken heart, Olivia has a hard time trusting anyone, even when she meets Aryo (Darius Sinathrya), a friend of Jamie. Aryo, asked to comfort Olivia by Jamie, becomes closer and closer to Olivia. —Mwd

title: Leak (Penangkeb)
storyline: Yessy, Sandra, Kayun, Edy, and Yunda want to prove the weirdness that happened in an old villa. The oddity is felt when the villa guard says that there is one room that is not rented, because it is specifically for the family of the villa owner. The mystical aura they feel, makes them try to enter a different realm. However, the terror they feel in the unseen realm forces them to return to the real world. Because of the mistakes made by Sandra, the terror continues and is increasingly frightening. With this incident, the mystery of the family room in the villa begins to unfold. There is a grandmother who lay paralyzed for five years. Grandma is deliberately exiled by the family, because the neighbors suspect grandmother of being able to become leak (evil spirits). —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kiko in the Deep Sea
storyline: Ecosystem damage in All waters. Kiko the goldfish and his friends who live in Asri City, must go on an adventure with Princess Clara the mermaid from Shell Castle, looking for the Five Guardian Pearls to restore the damaged environment. But who would have thought, they would have to face monsters guarding pearls and mysterious evil forces.

title: Kesurupan
storyline: A College Teen Gets Possessed By Three Satanic Spirits After Retrieving A Mysterious Odd Doll,With The Help Of Her Two Friends They Must Race Against Time In Order Of What Is Something Sinister Happening To Her Before Time Runs Out.

title: Sang Penari
storyline: Young teenagers, Rasus and Srintil, fall in love amidst living in poverty in their small, poor village of Dukuh Paruk in the 1960s. Srintil is blessed with her dancing moves said to have a certain magic. Many elderly believe that Srintil is destined to be a ronggeng (prime dancer), which means she belongs to the entire village. This makes Rasus feel robbed of his love for Srintil, and in the middle of his despair, he leaves the village to join the army force. As time goes by, Rasus is torn between abdicating himself to the country or to pursue his love for Srintil, until a big political coup separates the two. Will their undying passion for each other survive the great tragedy? —Anonymous

title: Magic Hour
storyline: Raina (Michelle Ziudith) is in dilemma when she met Dimas (Dimas Anggara), an interesting yet ignorant man who got her attention. As they become closer, Toby (Rizky Nazar), Raina's childhood friend, suddenly proclaimed his love for Raina. On the other side, Dimas is already set up with Gwenny (Nadya Arina), who in fact is Raina's best friend. Now Raina is faced with a difficult options, her friendship of her love? —iflix

title: The Tarix Jabrix 2
storyline: The member of The Tarix Jabrix had completed high school. Because they are getting a university that made them separate, they finally agreed to study in Jakarta. At first, they were shocked by life in Jakarta. Jakarta people are already too busy and individualistic. They are also shocked when they see pollution and congestion becoming commonplace for Jakarta people. —iflix

title: Me vs. Mami
storyline: A girl and her mother go on a road trip to Padang, West Sumatera, to visit her grandmother that will change the meaning of their relationship.

title: Surat Untuk Masa Mudaku
storyline: Kefas, one of the children at the Pelita Kasih Orphanage, meets Simon, the caretaker. Their first meeting is filled with potential blood-curdling disagreements. However, slowly, friendship and affection begin to develop between them. This film is told from Kefas' perspective as a young man. His visit to the Pelita Kasih Orphanage brings back unforgettable memories.

title: My Idiot Brother
storyline: Angel is a 15 year old teenage girl who can never accept the situation of her brother Hendra who was born with mental retardation. Even though Angel was so ashamed and hated him, Hendra was never sad. Hendra is a child with special needs due to an illness he suffered as a child. Even so, he remained faithful to give the love of a brother to his sister.

title: Cinta Brontosaurus
storyline: This Movie is about Dika, a writer who had just broken up with his girlfriend, Nina, after a long relationship. Ever since he had his heartbroken, he believes that relationships will eventually get 'expired' and will end. Meanwhile, Kosasih, Dika's writing agent, is trying to convince Dika that there is true love, like Kosasih who believes in the love of his wife, Wanda ( Tyas Mirasih ). Kosasih then tried to introduce Dika to some girls. However, love can come at any time. Dika met Jessica, a girl who has the same strange mindset as Dika. The closer Dika gets to Jessica, the more he questions 'Can love really get expired?' —oliphdhian

title: Horas Amang: Tiga Bulan Untuk Selamanya
storyline: The story of a family that is not harmonious: Amang or father and his three unfilial children. Out of love for her children, Amang uses an unusual way to change their lives forever.

title: Ranah 3 Warna
storyline: Alif has just graduated from Pondok Madani. With a bubbling spirit, he went home to Maninjau and could not wait to go to college.
