However, his best friend, Randai, has a doubt that Alif could pass the college entrance test. Then, he realizes that he does not have Certificate of Senior High School. He brakes down his obstacles. He earns the certificate and passes the test in Padjadjaran University. Alif who lives with Randai (who passes in Bandung Institute of Technology) experiences another obstacle. He is almost discouraged due to the death of his father. Alif is tightening his belt. He almost gives up. Apparently, the spell "man jadda wa jada" (he who gives his all will surely succeed) is insufficiently powerful to win a life. Alif recalls the second spell taught in Pondok Madani: "man shabara zhafira" (he who is patient will be fortunate). Armed with both spell, he is ready to face each 'storm' in his life. Including the storm in his heart, Raisa, the girl who is also close to Randai.

title: Ghost Writer 2
storyline: The success of her second novel makes Naya famous. Unfortunately, she is more labeled as a psychic than a writer. This makes Naya resentful and reluctant to deal with the ghost world again. However, everything changes when her future husband, Vino, suddenly dies.

title: Bridezilla
storyline: Dara, a wedding organizer, has been obsessed since childhood to make the most magnificent wedding. She is ambitious to make the wedding she is working on to be a wedding of the year from Wedding Star magazine. But a big event happens and she has to lose everything. Together with her best friend Key, Dara tries to bounce back when her fiance Alvin proposes to her. She is determined to make her own marriage to get the title of Wedding of the Year. But everything do not go smoothly. Anna, the editor of Wedding Star gives extraordinary conditions if Dara wants her marriage to be Wedding of the Year. From the problem of rings to the invited guests, Dara slowly transforms into Bridezilla like the clients she handled. This changing makes Dara risk losing her best friend and even her husband to be. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Perfect Dream
storyline: A rich ambitious street mob lost his mind. He endanger his family members, so did his marriage. He had to pay back his fault, and look forward to that destiny was on his side.

title: Pertaruhan
storyline: Four brothers Ibra, Elzan, Amar, and Ical attempting to collect money for their father's medical. Always get stalemate, the brothers eventually took a very reckless decision.

title: Bayi Gaib: Bayi Tumbal Bayi Mati
storyline: Rafa, a successful contractor, is having a baby with his wife, Farah. But things get strange when the birth of the baby is unnormal and a lot of mysterious things happen around Rafa and Farah.

title: Perjanjian dengan Iblis
storyline: Annisa married Bara, a widower with a daughter named Lara. Bara takes a picnic to the island that is still rarely visited by tourists, Bengalor Island, so that his wife and child could get familiar with each other. The island of Bengalor turns out to be a mystery. Annisa is surprised by the appearance of a scary child. Lara also sees a figure similar to her biological mother who is dead. Bara doesn't believe the story of Annisa and Lara. This scary and tense atmosphere actually bring Lara closer to Annisa. Both are determined to protect each other. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Paku Kuntilanak
storyline: Joko falls in love with Kunti who is actually a revenge-seeking demon being hunted by three demon hunters. The three try to convince Joko about her true nature to no avail.

title: Zerre: Pendekar Ufuk Timur
storyline: Zerre, from rural Papua, dreams of becoming a fighter. He learns silat from Bhumi, a former silat athlete. Living with limitations, Zerre has achievements so that he gets a scholarship to go to school in the city. In the city, he meets his two little friends Hilda and Drio. Hilda and Zerre have an emotional affinity, while with Drio like his rival. The journey to champions is not easy. Zerre also has to deal with the drug mafia syndicate and human trafficking led by Hendrawan. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Anoksia
storyline: A husband and wife are trapped in a car buried by a landslide. They are trying to survive because the oxygen supply is running low, and so does their level of love and trust in each other.

title: Rocket Rain
storyline: A video artist working on his latest project, is unexpectedly visited by his long lost friend, Jansen. Jansen is having a troubled relationship with his wife. He escapes the city and meet him who has gone through a similar problem. During their awkward reunion, they became aware of how far apart they have grown, and at the same time unfolding each others breakdowns. Rocket Rain touches on the human longing for inner peace within the shifting values of contemporary Indonesian family. In a country where traditions are considered sacred, the concept of nature and social values are being mediated by the demands of modernity. Rocket Rain is a story of people who are trying to cope with this complexity of endless contradictions. —Anonymous

title: Menunggu Pagi
storyline: For Bayu (Arya Saloka) who owns a vinyl store in the Santa area, the desire to go to the biggest annual Djakarta Warehouse Project (DWP) music festival is not a priority. His principle does not change even though his friends Rico (Arya Vasco), Kevin (Raka Hutchision) and Adi (Bio One) force him to come to the event. The principle was cut off when accidentally Sarah (Aurelie Moeremans) comes to the shop during the day before the event began. Sarah makes Bayu curious and interested in her. Bayu decidea to come to the event with Sarah and immediately contact her friends. On a trip with Sarah, Bayu finda many irregularities and bad luck that unwittingly come from Sarah and his friends.

title: Hitmen
storyline: A full peek to a day in the life of Jonny and Franky, two best friends who got cornered into doing three missions out of their work principle and value, in order to retire from their job as hitmen.

title: Jagoan Instan
storyline: In America there are three unemployed hotshots because their country is at peace and prosperous. In Indonesia, there is a former champ who failed to improve his country's condition. Corruption and crime remain rampant. Om Gun (Dede Yusuf), the former champ, invites the three American hotshots to Indonesia with the proviso to bring what is called champ serum. With the serum Om Gun recruites his nephew, Bumi (Kemal Palevi), to become a whiz to fight crimes. Bumi then becomes Instant Champ, who has strength and superiority after being injected with the serum. When the serum disappears, Bumi is back into a mediocre man. Ranging from spying on members of the House of Parliament that make a comparative study to save the guardian of a mountain to be done by Bumi. He even saves one bucket of money from the house of a corruptor. Bumi is dealing with its main enemy, Romeo (Kevin Julio), who seized his girlfriend, Pertiwi (Anisa Rahma). Romeo is sthe son of Queen of Logs (Meriam Bellina), leaders of illegal loggers club in Indonesia. Romeo awares that Pertiwi does not love him. He will give her to Bumi, if he is willing to give up the whiz serum. Bumi agrees. On the day of the deal, Romeo tests the serum and forces Bumi to fight him. Then there goes a duel of two 'champion', which lasts three days and three nights.

title: Serendipity
storyline: Rani's life changed drastically after her father passed away, leaving a big sum of debt. She made the hardest decision in her life to become a lady escort. Arkan, her boyfriend, broke their relationship after knowing about her job, feeling cheated. Then a photo of her all made up with an old man goes viral, making her the school's bullying subject. Jean, her friend becomes distant. Gibran, a new student in the school gets his interest piqued in Rani after being ignored multiple times by her. After being caught crying, Rani befriends him. He always finds a way to help Rani and likes her. But the feeling is not mutual because she still likes her ex-boyfriend. Though Arkan still loves her, they can't get back together. Their relationship intertwines with family problems.

title: Madame X
storyline: When A Capital in the middle of nowhere is threatened by the emergence of KANJENG Storm And The militant political party and homophobia, Safety of Country Singer depending on ADAM, A Hairdresser.

title: Unlimited Love
storyline: A story of friendship and love triangle between Andi (Restu Sinaga), Widia (Prisia Nasution) and Prassetyo (Dallas Pratama). Pras suddenly reappears in the lives of Andi and Widia who have married and get a child. Andi suspects the emergence of Pras is to seize his wife. Andi's jealousy triggers conflict in his household. Pras admits the reason to come. He was infected with the HIV-AIDS virus because his promiscuity while living in the Netherlands. Luckily, the child who turns out the result of Widia's relationship with Pras, is healthy In the remaining time to face death, Pras becomes very religious. Pras goes back to the Netherlands. Since his departure, Andi and Widya are always waiting to hear about Pras from the Netherlands. Until one evening a letter comes on the whereabouts of Pras.

title: Melancholy Is a Movement
storyline: A filmmaker's dreams which are suddenly stopped by an incident. The dynamics of the friends around him and the need to pay office rent forced him to make religious films, which he had always avoided. Without realizing it, he is drawn into the trap of life: how far can he go in maintaining his ideals with the possibilities of life that seem to have a will of their own.

title: Pelet Tali Pocong
storyline: Adam has long been captivated by Susan's beauty, the beautiful widow who owns the tea factory where he works. Unfortunately, not only she didn't feel the same way, but Susan insulted and humiliated him. Adam is determined to avenge his heartache and carried out the ancient ritual he learned from his late father Ki Suryo. He has to dig graves using a spoon with his mouth for days to get 'pelet tali pocong'. It didn't take long for Susan to fall into Adam's arms along with all her factory and assets. The residents were afraid to leave the house because of the pocong's terror that often appears in their village. Ustadz Bahri suspected Adam as the culprit who allied with the 'pocong'. Adam planned to take Ustadz Bahri's life who also became an obstacle to his relationship with Anissa, Ustadz Bahri's daughter. Anissa flatly rejected Adam's love, and he intended to kill Anissa with his own hands. Will Adam succeed? Or will he die horribly due to his own actions.

title: Kembalinya Nenek Gayung
storyline: Brandon, on the rise and arrogant, insulted the figure of Nenek Gayung. Since then, Brandon was haunted by the presence of Nenek Gayung. In a state of fear, Brandon came to Boim and Abas, who had experience dealing with Nenek Gayung.

title: Menjelang Ajal
storyline: Sekar, tries to support his 3 children alone by opening a food stall. Lately he has been worried because his merchandise always goes stale shortly after the food is served. Sekar went to see Mak Ambar, the shaman who put up 'penglaris' in his stall. However, it turned out that Mak Ambar had died. Since then, Jin, who has been helping him, demands his life until Sekar is possessed every night. The three children tried to get treatment, but this attempt actually threatened the lives of their family.

title: Lily of the Valley
storyline: A painful truth is revealed when a successful single mother hosts a private celebration for her daughter's 18th birthday.

title: Tusuk Jelangkung di Lubang Buaya
storyline: Taman Lubang Buaya, famous for its creepiness, has been chosen to be the next vlogging location. Out of the plan, Sisi disappeared after "calling" an evil spirit for being famous on social media. Can Sisi finally escape?

title: Tabula Rasa
storyline: Hans was a young man from Serui, Papua, who has a dream to become a professional football player. But things turn out don't come his way, and when Hans had almost lost hope, he met Mak, a restaurant owners.

title: King
storyline: King tells story about the dream of a village boy named Guntur (Rangga Raditya) to become an international badminton player like his and his father idol, Liem Swie King.

title: Semesta Mendukung
storyline: A boy from Sumenep, Madura Island, participates in the International Physics Olympiad in Singapore to find his mother who left him to work in Singapore when he was a child.

title: Jodoh 3 Bujang
storyline: Three bachelors (single men) brothers, namely, Fadly, Kifly, and Ahmad. They were asked by their parents to have twin marriages. This is a tradition in Makassar when siblings get married simultaneously. The desire for twin marriages is an intention expressed by their father, Mustapa. The reason is because of limited funds in fulfilling the typical Makassar tradition in the form of dowry requirements. Namely, dowry money that must be given by the prospective groom to his prospective wife. However, in the middle of the twin marriage plan which is only targeted to last a short time, Fadly's prospective wife is suddenly matched by her parents with a more established man. Fadly must find a replacement partner in the remaining time, or their twin marriage is threatened with cancellation.

title: Sebelum Dijemput Nenek
storyline: Hestu and Akbar are twins whose bond has fractured. Hestu heads to the city for work, while Akbar stays in the village to care for Grandma. Hestu swears he'll only return if Grandma dies and that vow comes true. Grandma passes away on the most sacred day. Legend has it, souls who die on that day will wander as ghosts until someone joins them in the afterlife. Now, Grandma's spirit is terrorizing them. According to Ki Mangun, the viral but not-so-powerful and reckless shaman, they only have 7 days to find a "replacement" to accompany Grandma. Helped by Kotrek, a thug who's terrified of ghosts, and Nisa, the innocent village beauty, their ritual to banish Grandma's spirit accidentally summons the ghosts of an entire village!. Will they find a replacement... or get taken away by Grandma to the afterlife?

title: Tarzan ke Kota
storyline: In search of the vital ingredient needed to create a miraculous, plant-based face cream, Ratna, the beautiful only daughter of a cosmetics magnate, ventures into the dense jungle. But there, the unscrupulous rival, Arde, and his vicious henchmen await Ratna, eager to go to great lengths to get their hands on the precious herb. As unprepared Ratna ends up in a dark cave, she encounters a compassionate primitive who can communicate with animals. Before long, they strike up an unexpected friendship; however, wounded Ratna needs to return home in the heart of the modern, bustling city. Ratna's fearless protector calls himself Tarzan. But, is the mighty lord of the forest prepared for the wildest, most challenging adventure of his life? —Nick Riganas

title: 3 Doa 3 Cinta
storyline: Huda, Rian and Syahid are three friends that study at the same Islamic school in Java. They all have lost someone in their family and they aspire to different things in their lives.

title: Pinky Promise
storyline: A story of friendship between women who have different backgrounds and also the differences in age and their own personal twists. When Kartika Rahayu (Agni Pratistha) who was wounded and sad after being left by the fiancé who canceled their marriage. Kartika who was called Tika before thought that she was a strong woman but could not face the problem of his life at this time. So her aunt (Ira Maya Sopha) can finally force Tika to get out of her wounds and sadness and advise Tika to move to her house in order to move on from her past. Tika and Anind finally meet new people in their lives. They meet and know Ken (Dhea Seto) a dancer as well as a college blogger and Baby (Alexandra Gottardo) a model for adult men's magazines that are the savages of a thick-kneed masher. —wikipedia

title: Bebek Belur
storyline: A story of the Cibebek village, where every problem happen in villager's daily life, including problems that are very funny, sad, and touching, with various types of characters in them.

title: The Professionals
storyline: Betrayed by his business partner, Reza (Arifin Putra), Abi (Fachry Albar) went to jail. Out from prison, he recruits the victims of Reza, and plans for revenge. They are: Cokro (Lukman Sardi), an analog mechanics; Jo (Richard Kyle), death challenger; Ferry (Cornelio Sunny), digital experts; Sophie (Malay Nicole), the action lady, and Nicole (Imelda Therrine). Reza runs Trimitra company, which is also owned by Nicole and Abi, to be much larger by raiding smaller businesses in unfair ways. Reza also builds an office that has a high security level. While Abi hardly have anything, except the one thing that became his trademark: his brain. Abi et al try to steal Reza weaknesses: a dongle which gives access to all his secrets. With the dongle, they could dismantle the rottenness of Reza, making him captured by the police, and take over all the assets before the shareholders general meeting;. No one knows the location and shape of the dongle. Attempts of Abi and her colleagues are always deadlocked. They got a little hint about the dongle. Reza knows that Abi et al keep trying, so he increases the security of the building.

title: Iblis dalam Kandungan
storyline: After 15 years of marriage and adopting two siblings, Alani and Vito, Amelia is finally pregnant. In order to take care of his wife who also suffers from high blood pressure, her husband, Verdi, changes jobs from Jakarta to a plantation company at the foot of Mount Salak. Problems arise when the house they live in turns out to be inhabited by the spirit of a woman who in the past lost her baby in her womb due to a mystical event. Now the spirit has come, trying to penetrate into Amelia's body to own the baby in her womb. Vito and Alani try to protect their mother even though they have to face a life-threatening terror. As it turned out, the woman's spirit wasn't the only danger they have to deal with. There are other, more sinister forces that have never been thought of before. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: The Guys
storyline: Alfi (Raditya Dika) is an employee who aspires to be the boss. He also falls in love with his friend named Amira (Pevita Pearce). However, problems began to arise when Via, his crush, who originally ignored Alfi, began to show love. Meanwhile, when Alfi starts close to Amira, Amira is a child who turns out Mr. Jeremy (Tarzan), the boss at the office. And again when Alfi invites Mr. Jeremy and Amira to have dinner with him, Mr. Jeremy showing an interest in Alfi's mother (Widyawati) who happens to both long-outs. Helped by his friends that odd namely Aryo (Indra Jegel), Rene (Marthino Lio) and Sukun (Pukaii), expatriate employees from Thailand, can be the boss Alfi good at his job, or romance?

title: The Underdogs
storyline: 4 friends who tried to become famous by being Youtubers.

title: Sakral
storyline: Melina (Olla Ramlan) loses one of her twin children. Her surviving child, Flora (Makayla Rose), grows into a moody and mysterious child. When Flora turns five years old, Melina's family got an unseen disorder and the death of the closest people. Melina herself is threatened with death. Daniel (Teuku Zacky), Melina's husband, finds out what happen to his family. It turns out to be related to their dead baby. The more Daniel reveals the veil of mystery, the greater the danger that lurks the life of his family. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Romantik Problematik
storyline: Alisha runs into a barrage of problems: her mother goes to prison, and she is kicked out of her home. Her life is so messed up. Ricky, her boyfriend, tries to help Alisha out of her problems and tries to prepare their wedding plans. However, these plans bring problems that complicate their relationship and force them to redefine their love.

title: Sweet 20
storyline: Fatmawati is a 70-year old fussy grandma who lives with her son, Aditya, daughter in-law and two grandchildren. Fatmawati dearly loves Aditya and is very proud of her only son whom she raised on her own. Wherever she goes, she always boasts his son's achievement as an excellent university professor. One day, Fatmawati finds out that her family will send her to a nursing home. The revelation deeply saddens and devastates her. While walking on the street, she stumbles upon "Forever Young" photo studio. She plans to take her self-portrait for her not-so-far-off funeral but a strange occurrence happens. After her portrait is taken, Fatmawati mysteriously regains her physical appearance from the age of 20. Feeling abandoned by her family, Fatmawati considers to start over her life and revive her youthful years. Fatmawati renames herself Mieke after her all-time favorite actress, Mieke Wijaya. As the time goes by, Mieke got the chance to pursue a career as a singer. It was something that she could not do when she was young as she had to take care of her only son after her husband passed away from an accident. Although leading her life as the young Mieke, there is nothing change about the way Fatmawati acts. The way she talks and her fashion taste is just like a 70-year old grandma. But it was her distinct styles that captures the heart of a music producer. Aside from the music producer, her own grandson, Juna, falls in love with Fatmawati after listening to her charming voice. One occurrence forces Mieke to make a choice on whether resuming her life as Mieke or returning to be the old Fatmawati to save the life of her grandson, Juna.

title: Takut: Tujuh Hari Bersama Setan
storyline: Yudha moves to Vila Andaru on the slopes of Mount Wilis. Elisa and Dewa go to Mount Wilis to seek the long lost Elisa's sister. Elisa and Dewa stay at the hotel Cempaka. The three meet there. Yudha want to know what really happens there.

title: Almarhum
storyline: The tragic death of Mr. Mulwanto, the father on Tuesday Kliwon, was the beginning of a disaster for Nuri's family. It is said that whoever dies on that day will invite their family members to die together. So the family left behind was asked to undergo a series of rituals to prevent this. Wisesa, the eldest son who works as a doctor, refuses the ritual because it is considered unreasonable and chooses to accompany his mother who is still in shock. However, the strange and terrifying incidents that befell Nuri and her younger sibling, Yanda, forced them to find out the truth behind the myth and ritual. What really happened? Is it true that this has something to do with the death of her father on Tuesday Kliwon? Sooner or Slow, all will become Deceased.

title: Marriage
storyline: In fact, getting married does not automatically make you happy. He married Vika. Nasty, grumpy, blind jealous, can't cook. Such is the regret of Mirza, Vika's husband, who was sued for divorce after 5 years of living together.

title: Martabak Bangka
storyline: Jaya decides to look for Koh Acun family on Bangka Island through his photo. Jaya is against the wishes of her lover Laras who wants Koh Acun's inheritance to be taken by Jaya. Jaya accompanied by Asep tour Bangka Island and meet Tedjo. Jaya does not expect Tedjo to refuse all inheritance and the ashes of his brother. While Jaya is trying to convince Tedjo to accept Koh Acun's ashes so that he receives the proper respect, opened the past of Koh Acun's romance. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Di Bawah Pohon
storyline: Three women looking for answers of their life in Bali

title: Sakaratul Maut
storyline: Pak Wiryo and Bu Wiryo, a respectable married couple from Umbul Krida Village, whose happy life changed drastically due to a traffic accident. The accident caused Mrs. Wiryo to die and Pak Wiryo to fall into a coma. Their youngest child, Retno, postpones her trip to Surabaya to care for her father, with the help of her older sister, Wati. However, the situation becomes more complicated when Wati becomes involved in an inheritance dispute with Tarjo, her half-sister from Mr. Wiryo's second marriage to Bu Giyem. Tensions rise when neighbors start gossiping about Pak Wiryo's "grip" that makes it difficult for him to die. Apart from that, every family member begins to experience terror from the frightening figure of a genie, while Pak Wiryo shows strange behavior on the verge of death.

title: Pocong Mandi Goyang Pinggul
storyline: After surviving a car accident, a young man begins seeing ghosts.

title: Coblos Cinta
storyline: Two students are competing to be the Head of Student Executive Board. There is a lot of rivalry between them as the two candidates trying to gain influence by doing funny campaigns, with erratic happenings as the election day approaches.

title: Setan Budeg
storyline: A vengeful spirit follows three body hunters as they search for missing corpses in Jakarta, Indonesia.

title: LDR: Love Distance Relationshi*
storyline: When suddenly abandoned by her lover who went abroad, Ella was forced to experience a long-distance relationship (LDR). Various challenges started to hit Ella, the pressure from her parents to break up immediately, feelings of worry and jealousy, and internal resistance within Ella to not continue this relationship.

title: Mekah I'm Coming
storyline: Loving each other, Eddy, village workshop business owner, and Eni Michelle Ziudith may need to end their relationships because of Eni's father's disapproval and wanting to marry her daughter to a wealthy bachelor from town, Pietoyo. After gets advice from his mother, Eddy finally could convince Eni's father by stating that he will be Hajj this year and will marry Eni within a year. However, to Hajj every country has different quota each year and Indonesia has so many people who would like to go to Mecca. If Eddy chooses the formal route he has to wait for 10 years. Devastating by the fact that his plan may fall through, Eddy chooses to sell his workshop and takes an instant route to Hajj by trusting a shady travel agent. After arriving in Jakarta, Eddy realizes that he is tricked. He does not want his marriage with Eni will be failed, he decides to stay in Jakarta and pretends he goes to Mecca so he could marry Eni. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Rumah Tanpa Jendela
storyline: Rara, a lonely 8-year-old girl, wants a small window in her hut located in the slum area of Menteng Pulo, Jakarta. Mbok, Rara's ailing grandmother and her father, Raga, do not have enough money to buy the window. So Rara and friends busk for money in the streets or rent out umbrellas on raining days. Meanwhile, in a luxurious housing complex in Jakarta, Aldo, 11-year-old boy, and slightly retarded, does not have any friends. Neglected by his rich father, Ratna Syahri, his grandmother, Nek Aisha, is his only comfort. One day, Aldo meets Rara when the car he is in, grazes her. They become good friends and she is the one he turns to when he flees from home after a quarrel with his brother. —filmindonesia.or.id

title: Kukejar Mimpi
storyline: The figure of Coach Leo, a former soldier who was not successful in his military career. He has a very big personal problem or problem. Coach Leo then meets Mimpi and his gang, who are struggling to achieve their dream of becoming a great cheerleader team. Coach Leo can look in the mirror to get up, and always has enthusiasm. Mimpi and his friends also learned a lot from Coach Leo. Finally they collaborated, and Coach Leo became the manager of the cheerleader team.

title: Get Lost: Urban Legend di Benteng Pendem
storyline: Five friends who lost their way to Jogjakarta. After the car was gone they were forced to stay in an abandoned fortress. But they are not alone there, there is something waiting inside..

title: 3 Dara 2
storyline: Three years after Affandi (Tora Sudiro), Jay (Adipati Dolken), and Richard (Tanta Ginting) experiencing an identity crisis, their lives seem happy. However they repeat the same mistake: belittling women. This time, their "victims" are their own wives. They consider homework is very easy compared to earning a living. After success in their businesses, they decide to build a new business and use most of their assets for investment. —Letterboxd

title: Something in Between
storyline: Gema, a high school teenager, falls in love with Maya, and tries to make every effort to conquer his heart. However, their love must be tested with the challenge of reaching a dream and also the presence of a third person.

title: Bisikan Iblis
storyline: In an all-girl school, there will always be a mysterious death every year, and Nany is enrolled in this school.

title: Godaan Setan yang Terkutuk
storyline: A ruqyah Ustadz named Ahmad. He must face the biggest challenge in his life, which is to perform a ruqyah on his own family. It started when the devil was stalking his wife and children. The devil's disturbance first disturbed his wife and then also targeted his two daughters. The disturbance was not ordinary terror, but rather a disturbance that could endanger the lives of its victims. Ahmad has been helping people deal with disturbances from supernatural beings for years. As the head of the family and a Ustadz, now he must perform a ruqyah on his own family. He was forced to fight with an invisible evil force. However, the more he tried to fight, the stronger the temptations that came. He also had to fight with his own faith. He began to question the limits of his abilities as a ruqyah Ustadz.

title: Lari Dari Kawin Lari
storyline: Satrio dan Aya dipertemukan dalam sebuah momen saat mereka samasama melarikan diri dari pernikahan mereka masing-masing.

title: Dongeng Mistis
storyline: Six Stories about the horror of six Indonesian ghosts
